### `src/app/core/semantic_cache.py`
```py
import hashlib
from typing import Any
import structlog
from app.core.context import AppContext
from app.core.vector_math import flatten_numeric_vector_with_string_fallback
from app.domain.feedback import FeedbackLog
from app.domain.interfaces import (
  CachePort,
  SemanticCachePort,
  VectorSimilarityPort,
)
logger = structlog.get_logger()
class SemanticCacheService(SemanticCachePort):
  def __init__(  # pragma: no mutate
    self,
    cache: CachePort,
    vector_search: VectorSimilarityPort | None = None,
    *,
    threshold: float = 0.15,  # pragma: no mutate
    lookback_days: int = 90,  # pragma: no mutate
  ) -> None:
    self.cache = cache  # pragma: no mutate
    self._vector_search = vector_search  # pragma: no mutate
    self.threshold = threshold  # pragma: no mutate
    self.lookback_days = lookback_days  # pragma: no mutate
    self.ttl_seconds = 86400  # pragma: no mutate  # 24 hours
  def _hash_prompt(self, prompt: str) -> str:
    tenant_id = AppContext.get_tenant_id()
    return hashlib.sha256(
      f"{tenant_id}:{prompt.strip().lower()}".encode()
    ).hexdigest()
  def _ensure_flat_vector(self, embedding: Any) -> list[float]:
    try:
      return flatten_numeric_vector_with_string_fallback(embedding)
    except ValueError as e:
      logger.error(
        "vector_normalization_failed",
        error=str(e),
      )
      raise ValueError(f"Invalid embedding format: {e}") from e
  async def check_exact_match(self, prompt: str) -> str | None:
    cache_key = f"cache:exact:{self._hash_prompt(prompt)}"  # pragma: no mutate
    try:
      cached = await self.cache.get(cache_key)  # pragma: no mutate
      if cached:  # pragma: no mutate
        logger.info("Cache Hit: Layer 1 (Exact Match)")
        return str(cached)  # pragma: no mutate
    except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001  # pragma: no mutate
      logger.warning(
        "layer1_cache_check_failed",
        error=str(e),
      )
    return None  # pragma: no mutate
  async def store_exact_match(self, prompt: str, response: str) -> None:
    cache_key = f"cache:exact:{self._hash_prompt(prompt)}"
    try:
      await self.cache.set(cache_key, response, ttl=self.ttl_seconds)
    except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.warning("layer1_cache_set_failed", error=str(e))
  async def invalidate_exact_match(self, prompt: str) -> None:
    cache_key = f"cache:exact:{self._hash_prompt(prompt)}"
    try:
      await self.cache.delete(cache_key)
      logger.info(
        "Invalidated Layer 1 Cache",
        prompt_hash=cache_key,
      )
    except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.warning(
        "layer1_cache_invalidation_failed",
        error=str(e),
      )
  async def check_semantic_match(self, embedding: list[float]) -> FeedbackLog | None:
    if not self._vector_search:
      logger.warning("Semantic Cache: No vector search available.")
      return None
    flat_embedding: list[float] = []
    try:
      flat_embedding = self._ensure_flat_vector(embedding)
      if not flat_embedding:
        return None
      log_entry = await self._vector_search.find_similar(
        flat_embedding,
        self.threshold,
        self.lookback_days,
      )
      if log_entry:
        logger.info(
          "Cache Hit: Layer 2 (Semantic Match)",
          log_id=str(log_entry.id),
        )
      return log_entry
    except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.warning(
        "layer2_cache_check_failed",
        error=str(e),
        embedding_len=len(flat_embedding)
        if isinstance(flat_embedding, list)
        else "N/A",
      )
    return None
```

### `src/app/static/receipt_parser/demo.html`
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
  <title>Receipt Parser — demo edge + pricing</title>
  <style>
    :root { font-family: system-ui, sans-serif; max-width: 52rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 1rem; }
    h1 { font-size: 1.25rem; }
    .row { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 1rem; align-items: flex-start; }
    label { display: block; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 0.75rem; }
    canvas { max-width: 100%; border: 1px solid #ccc; background: #fafafa; }
    pre { background: #111; color: #e0e0e0; padding: 0.75rem; overflow: auto; font-size: 0.8rem; }
    .banner { padding: 0.75rem; border-radius: 6px; margin: 0.5rem 0; }
    .warn { background: #fff3cd; border: 1px solid #ffc107; }
    .ok { background: #d4edda; border: 1px solid #28a745; }
    button { padding: 0.5rem 1rem; cursor: pointer; margin-top: 0.5rem; }
    a.stripe { display: inline-block; margin: 0.25rem 0.5rem 0.25rem 0; }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>Receipt Parser — compresión edge + API</h1>
  <p>
    La imagen se dibuja en <code>&lt;canvas&gt;</code>, se escala a máximo 1024 px
    en el lado mayor y se exporta como JPEG (~100–150 KB típico). Luego
    <code>POST /api/v1/receipts/process</code> con Base64 sin prefijo data URL.
  </p>
  <div class="row">
    <div>
      <label for="file">Imagen factura</label>
      <input id="file" type="file" accept="image/*" />
      <label for="userId">X-User-Id (pruebas)</label>
      <input id="userId" type="text" value="demo-user" style="width: 100%" />
      <label for="role">Rol del usuario</label>
      <select id="role">
        <option value="payer">Pagador (recibida)</option>
        <option value="issuer">Emisor (emitida)</option>
      </select>
      <br />
      <button type="button" id="btnProcess">Procesar recibo</button>
    </div>
    <div>
      <canvas id="cv" width="400" height="300"></canvas>
      <div id="meta"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="usagePanel">
    <h2>Uso y límites</h2>
    <button type="button" id="btnUsage">Cargar /usage</button>
    <div id="usageSummary" style="font-weight: 650; margin: 0.5rem 0;"></div>
    <div id="usageBanner"></div>
    <pre id="usageOut">{}</pre>
  </div>
  <div>
    <h2>Pricing (Stripe)</h2>
    <button type="button" id="btnPricing">Cargar /pricing</button>
    <div id="stripeLinks"></div>
    <pre id="pricingOut">{}</pre>
  </div>
  <h2>Respuesta process</h2>
  <pre id="out">(sin enviar aún)</pre>
  <p style="font-size: 0.85rem; color: #555;">
    OAuth solo Google: <code>/api/v1/auth/providers</code> → login → callback guarda
    usuario en <code>receipt_parser_users</code>; usa el <code>user_id</code>
    devuelto como <code>X-User-Id</code>.
  </p>
  <script>
    const API = "/api/v1";
    const MAX_SIDE = 1024;
    const JPEG_QUALITY = 0.82;
    // Cache local del estado de /receipts/usage por usuario (X-User-Id).
    // Esto permite actualizar el contador justo cuando llega el JSON de
    // POST /receipts/process sin tener que recargar la página.
    const usageCache = {};
    const file = document.getElementById("file");
    const cv = document.getElementById("cv");
    const ctx = cv.getContext("2d");
    const meta = document.getElementById("meta");
    const out = document.getElementById("out");
    const usageSummary = document.getElementById("usageSummary");
    function resizeToCanvas(img) {
      let w = img.naturalWidth;
      let h = img.naturalHeight;
      const scale = Math.min(1, MAX_SIDE / Math.max(w, h));
      w = Math.round(w * scale);
      h = Math.round(h * scale);
      cv.width = w;
      cv.height = h;
      ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 0, w, h);
      meta.textContent = `Canvas ${w}×${h} px (máx lado ${MAX_SIDE})`;
    }
    file.addEventListener("change", () => {
      const f = file.files && file.files[0];
      if (!f) return;
      const url = URL.createObjectURL(f);
      const img = new Image();
      img.onload = () => {
        resizeToCanvas(img);
        URL.revokeObjectURL(url);
      };
      img.src = url;
    });
    function canvasToJpegBase64() {
      const dataUrl = cv.toDataURL("image/jpeg", JPEG_QUALITY);
      const b64 = dataUrl.split(",")[1] || "";
      const approxKb = Math.round((b64.length * 3) / 4 / 1024);
      meta.textContent += ` · JPEG ~${approxKb} KB (calidad ${JPEG_QUALITY})`;
      return b64;
    }
    function renderUsage(uid, data) {
      usageCache[uid] = data || {};
      document.getElementById("usageOut").textContent =
        JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      const tier = data && data.tier ? data.tier : "unknown";
      const count = typeof data.receipt_count === "number" ? data.receipt_count : 0;
      const max = typeof data.max_receipts === "number" ? data.max_receipts : 0;
      usageSummary.textContent = `${tier} ${count}/${max} (${Math.round(((max > 0 ? (count / max) * 100 : 0)))}%)`;
      const b = document.getElementById("usageBanner");
      b.innerHTML = "";
      if (data && data.at_80_percent) {
        const el = document.createElement("div");
        el.className = "banner warn";
        el.textContent =
          "Te acercas a tu límite de almacenamiento. Exporta CSV/JSON o sube de plan.";
        b.appendChild(el);
      } else {
        const el = document.createElement("div");
        el.className = "banner ok";
        el.textContent = "Capacidad por debajo del 80 %.";
        b.appendChild(el);
      }
    }
    async function refreshUsage(uid) {
      const res = await fetch(`${API}/receipts/usage?user_id=${encodeURIComponent(uid)}`, {
        headers: { "X-User-Id": uid },
      });
      const data = await res.json();
      renderUsage(uid, data);
      return data;
    }
    function incrementUsageForUser(uid) {
      const cached = usageCache[uid];
      if (!cached || typeof cached.receipt_count !== "number" || typeof cached.max_receipts !== "number") {
        return refreshUsage(uid);
      }
      const max = cached.max_receipts;
      const nextCount = cached.receipt_count + 1;
      const pct = max > 0 ? (nextCount / max) * 100 : 0;
      const next = {
        ...cached,
        receipt_count: nextCount,
        at_80_percent: pct >= 80,
      };
      renderUsage(uid, next);
      return next;
    }
    document.getElementById("btnProcess").addEventListener("click", async () => {
      const b64 = canvasToJpegBase64();
      const uid = document.getElementById("userId").value.trim() || "demo-user";
      const role = document.getElementById("role").value;
      out.textContent = "Enviando…";
      const res = await fetch(`${API}/receipts/process`, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: {
          "Content-Type": "application/json",
          "X-User-Id": uid,
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          image_base64: b64,
          user_role: role,
        }),
      });
      const text = await res.text();
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(text);
        out.textContent = JSON.stringify(parsed, null, 2);
        // Regla de UI para el contador:
        // - Si el backend confirma que la persistencia fue "verified",
        //   entonces efectivamente se guardó una fila en Supabase
        //   para este usuario, así que incrementamos su receipt_count.
        if (parsed && parsed.status === "verified") {
          await incrementUsageForUser(uid);
        }
      } catch {
        out.textContent = text;
      }
    });
    document.getElementById("btnUsage").addEventListener("click", async () => {
      const uid = document.getElementById("userId").value.trim() || "demo-user";
      await refreshUsage(uid);
    });
    document.getElementById("btnPricing").addEventListener("click", async () => {
      const res = await fetch(`${API}/receipts/pricing`);
      const data = await res.json();
      document.getElementById("pricingOut").textContent = JSON.stringify(data, null, 2);
      const box = document.getElementById("stripeLinks");
      box.innerHTML = "";
      const links = data.stripe_links || {};
      for (const [k, url] of Object.entries(links)) {
        if (!url) continue;
        const a = document.createElement("a");
        a.className = "stripe";
        a.href = url;
        a.target = "_blank";
        a.rel = "noopener noreferrer";
        a.textContent = k;
        box.appendChild(a);
      }
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
```

### `src/app/domain/events.py`
```py
import uuid
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from typing import Any
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ValidationInfo, field_validator
from app.domain.feedback import KnowledgeStatus
class InteractionLogEvent(BaseModel):
  id: uuid.UUID  # Required; callers must pass id=uuid.uuid4() (mutation hardening).
  request_id: uuid.UUID = Field(default_factory=uuid.uuid4)
  created_at: datetime
  user_prompt: str = ""
  llm_response: str = ""
  score: float = 0.5
  embedding: list[float] = Field(default_factory=list)
  model_used: str = "unknown"
  total_tokens: int = 0
  prompt_tokens: int = 0
  completion_tokens: int = 0
  cost_usd: float = 0.0
  latency_ms: float = 0.0
  trace_id: str | None = None
  tenant_id: str = "default"
  status: KnowledgeStatus = KnowledgeStatus.PENDING
  user_correction: str | None = None
  @field_validator("created_at", mode="before")
  @classmethod
  def parse_created_at(cls, v: Any) -> datetime:
    if v is None:
      raise ValueError("created_at must not be None")
    if isinstance(v, datetime):
      if v.tzinfo is not None:
        return v.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
      return v
    if isinstance(v, str):
      try:
        dt = datetime.fromisoformat(v)
        if dt.tzinfo is not None:
          return dt.astimezone(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None)
        return dt
      except ValueError:
        pass
    raise ValueError(f"Cannot parse created_at from {v!r}")
  @field_validator("id", "request_id", mode="before")
  @classmethod
  def parse_uuids(cls, v: Any, info: ValidationInfo) -> uuid.UUID:
    if getattr(info, "field_name", None) == "id" and v is None:
      raise ValueError("id must not be None")
    if isinstance(v, uuid.UUID):
      return v
    if isinstance(v, str):
      try:
        if v.lower() in ("n/a", "", "none"):
          if getattr(info, "field_name", None) == "id":
            raise ValueError("id must not be None")
          return uuid.uuid4()
        return uuid.UUID(v)
      except ValueError:
        pass
    if getattr(info, "field_name", None) == "id":
      raise ValueError("id must not be None")
    return uuid.uuid4()
```

### `src/app/domain/interfaces.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from collections.abc import AsyncGenerator, AsyncIterator, Coroutine, Sequence
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from datetime import datetime
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING, Any
from pydantic import BaseModel
if TYPE_CHECKING:
  from app.domain.feedback import FeedbackLog
  from app.domain.prompts import PromptTemplate
class LLMResponse(BaseModel):
  content: str
  model_used: str
  total_tokens: int
  prompt_tokens: int
  completion_tokens: int
  audio_tokens: int | None = None
  cost_usd: float = 0.0
  latency_ms: float = 0.0
class StreamChunk(BaseModel):
  content: str
  usage: dict[str, int] | None = None
  finish_reason: str | None = None
class StoredSupportAttachment(BaseModel):
  url: str
  filename: str | None = None
  content_type: str | None = None
  size_bytes: int | None = None
  created_at: datetime | None = None
class ProbePort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def ping(self) -> bool:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class SecurityPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def scrub_pii(self, text: str, strict: bool = True) -> str:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def validate_prompt(self, prompt: str) -> bool:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class LLMProvider(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def warmup(self) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def embed(self, text: str) -> list[float]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def complete(
    self,
    model: str,
    messages: list[dict[str, str]],
    temperature: float = 0.0,
    **kwargs: Any,
  ) -> LLMResponse:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  async def complete_with_multimodal(
    self,
    model: str,
    messages: list[dict[str, Any]],
    temperature: float = 0.0,
    **kwargs: Any,
  ) -> LLMResponse:
    text_messages: list[dict[str, str]] = []
    for m in messages:
      content = m.get("content")
      if isinstance(content, list):
        parts = [
          p.get("text", "")
          for p in content
          if isinstance(p, dict) and p.get("type") == "text"
        ]
        content = " ".join(parts)
      text_messages.append(
        {**m, "content": content if isinstance(content, str) else ""}
      )
    return await self.complete(
      model=model,
      messages=text_messages,
      temperature=temperature,
      **kwargs,
    )
  @abstractmethod
  async def stream(
    self,
    model: str,
    messages: list[dict[str, str]],
    temperature: float = 0.0,
    **kwargs: Any,
  ) -> AsyncGenerator[StreamChunk, None]:
    yield StreamChunk(content="")  # pragma: no cover
class BackgroundRunner(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  def fire(self, coro: Coroutine[Any, Any, Any]) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def shutdown(self) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class CachePort(ProbePort):
  @abstractmethod
  async def get(self, key: str) -> Any | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_many(self, keys: list[str]) -> dict[str, Any]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def set(self, key: str, value: Any, ttl: int = 300, nx: bool = False) -> bool:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def set_many(self, data: dict[str, Any], ttl: int = 300) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def delete(self, key: str) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def incr_float(self, key: str, amount: float, ttl: int = 86400) -> float:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def lua_execute(self, script: str, keys: list[str], args: list[str]) -> Any:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def set_bytes(self, key: str, value: bytes, ttl: int) -> bool:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_bytes(self, key: str) -> bytes | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  @asynccontextmanager
  async def lock(self, key: str, ttl: int = 60) -> AsyncGenerator[None, None]:
    yield  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def xrange(
    self,
    stream_key: str,
    min_id: str = "-",
    max_id: str = "+",
    count: int | None = None,
  ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def xdel(self, stream_key: str, entry_ids: list[str]) -> int:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class EventBusPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def publish(self, stream: str, event: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class SupportAttachmentStoragePort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def store_attachment(
    self,
    *,
    module: str,
    user_id: str,
    ticket_id: int | None,
    filename: str,
    content_type: str,
    data: bytes,
  ) -> StoredSupportAttachment:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class PromptRepositoryPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_template(
    self, name: str, version: str = "latest"
  ) -> PromptTemplate | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class SearchEnginePort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def search(
    self,
    queries: list[str],
    embeddings: list[list[float]] | None = None,
    filters: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
  ) -> Sequence[FeedbackLog]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class VectorSimilarityPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def find_similar(
    self,
    embedding: list[float],
    threshold: float,
    lookback_days: int,
  ) -> FeedbackLog | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class SemanticCachePort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def check_exact_match(self, prompt: str) -> str | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def store_exact_match(self, prompt: str, response: str) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def check_semantic_match(self, embedding: list[float]) -> FeedbackLog | None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def invalidate_exact_match(self, prompt: str) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class TokenManagerPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  def get_limit(self, model: str) -> int:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def count_tokens(self, text: str, model: str) -> int:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def calculate_available_tokens(
    self, model: str, fixed_overhead: int, prompt_text: str, reserve: int
  ) -> int:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def trim_context(
    self, docs: list[str], max_tokens: int, model: str
  ) -> list[str]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def truncate_text(self, text: str, max_tokens: int, model: str) -> str:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class CostCalculatorPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  def calculate_cost(
    self, model: str, prompt_tokens: int, completion_tokens: int
  ) -> float:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class InteractionLoggerPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def log_interaction(self, log_entry: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class NullInteractionLogger(InteractionLoggerPort):
  async def log_interaction(self, log_entry: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
    pass
class DatabasePort(ProbePort):
  @abstractmethod
  @asynccontextmanager
  async def session(self) -> AsyncIterator[Any]:
    yield  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  @asynccontextmanager
  async def transaction(self) -> AsyncIterator[Any]:
    yield  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def close(self) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
class RerankerPort(ABC):
  @property
  @abstractmethod
  def is_ready(self) -> bool:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def warmup(self) -> None:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
  @abstractmethod
  async def rerank(
    self, query: str, documents: list[str], top_k: int = 3
  ) -> list[str]:
    pass  # pragma: no cover
```

### `src/app/domain/base.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import os
from collections.abc import Callable
from typing import cast
from sqlalchemy import JSON
from sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase
from sqlalchemy.types import TypeEngine
VectorColumnFactory = Callable[[int], TypeEngine[object]]
def _running_under_mutmut() -> bool:
  return bool(os.environ.get("MUTANT_UNDER_TEST"))
def _json_vector_column(_dimensions: int) -> TypeEngine[object]:
  return JSON()
def _resolve_vector_column() -> VectorColumnFactory:
  if _running_under_mutmut():
    return _json_vector_column
  from pgvector.sqlalchemy import Vector  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
  return cast(VectorColumnFactory, Vector)
VectorColumn = _resolve_vector_column()
class Base(DeclarativeBase):
  pass
```

### `src/app/domain/feedback.py`
```py
import enum
import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Any
from sqlalchemy import (
  Computed,
  DateTime,
  Enum,
  Float,
  Integer,
  PrimaryKeyConstraint,
  String,
  func,
)
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import TSVECTOR, UUID
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from sqlalchemy.schema import Index
from app.domain.base import Base, VectorColumn
from app.security.feedback_privacy import (
  EncryptedString,
  fingerprint_feedback_text,
)
class KnowledgeStatus(enum.StrEnum):
  PENDING = "pending"
  APPROVED = "approved"
  REJECTED = "rejected"
class FeedbackLog(Base):
  __tablename__ = "feedback_log"
  __table_args__ = (
    PrimaryKeyConstraint("id", "created_at"),
    Index("idx_request_id", "request_id"),
    Index("idx_tenant_created", "tenant_id", "created_at"),
    Index(
      "idx_feedback_lookup",
      "tenant_id",
      "user_prompt_fingerprint",
      "llm_response_fingerprint",
      "created_at",
    ),
    Index(
      "idx_feedback_embedding",
      "embedding",
      postgresql_using="hnsw",
      postgresql_with={"m": 16, "ef_construction": 64},
      postgresql_ops={"embedding": "vector_cosine_ops"},
    ),
    Index("idx_feedback_search", "search_vector", postgresql_using="gin"),
    {
      "extend_existing": True,
      "postgresql_partition_by": "RANGE (created_at)",
    },
  )
  id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    UUID(as_uuid=True), default=uuid.uuid4
  )
  request_id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    UUID(as_uuid=True), index=True
  )
  tenant_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    String, default="default", index=True
  )
  status: Mapped[KnowledgeStatus] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Enum(KnowledgeStatus),
    default=KnowledgeStatus.PENDING,
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  user_prompt: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(EncryptedString())  # pragma: no mutate
  user_prompt_fingerprint: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    String(64),
    default=lambda ctx: fingerprint_feedback_text(
      ctx.get_current_parameters().get("user_prompt"),
      context="feedback-user-prompt-v1",
    ),
    nullable=True,
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  llm_response: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(EncryptedString())  # pragma: no mutate
  llm_response_fingerprint: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    String(64),
    default=lambda ctx: fingerprint_feedback_text(
      ctx.get_current_parameters().get("llm_response"),
      context="feedback-llm-response-v1",
    ),
    nullable=True,
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  user_correction: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    EncryptedString(), nullable=True
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  score: Mapped[float] = mapped_column(Float)  # pragma: no mutate
  model_used: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    String, server_default="unknown"
  )
  total_tokens: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Integer, server_default="0"
  )
  prompt_tokens: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Integer, server_default="0"
  )
  completion_tokens: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Integer, server_default="0"
  )
  cost_usd: Mapped[float] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Float, server_default="0.0"
  )
  latency_ms: Mapped[float] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    Float, server_default="0.0"
  )
  trace_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    String, index=True, nullable=True
  )
  embedding: Mapped[list[float]] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    VectorColumn(1536)
  )
  search_vector: Mapped[Any] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    TSVECTOR,
    Computed(
      "to_tsvector('english', user_prompt || ' ' || llm_response)",
      persisted=True,
    ),
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(  # pragma: no mutate
    DateTime, default=func.now(), nullable=False
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  def to_few_shot_example(self) -> str:
    correct_response = (
      self.user_correction if self.user_correction else self.llm_response
    )
    return (
      f"<knowledge>\n"
      f"  <question>{self.user_prompt}</question>\n"
      f"  <answer>{correct_response}</answer>\n"
      f"</knowledge>"
    )
```

```py
from __future__ import annotations
import enum
import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from decimal import Decimal
from sqlalchemy import DateTime, Enum, String, func
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from app.domain.base import Base
from app.security.billing_privacy import EncryptedBillingString, EncryptedDecimal
class WalletTransactionType(enum.StrEnum):
  CREDIT = "CREDIT"
  DEBIT = "DEBIT"
class WalletTransaction(Base):
  __tablename__ = "wallet_transactions"
  id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
    UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4
  )
  tenant_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, nullable=False, index=True)
  module: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=False, index=True)
  transaction_type: Mapped[WalletTransactionType] = mapped_column(
    Enum(WalletTransactionType), nullable=False
  )
  amount_usd: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(EncryptedDecimal(), nullable=False)
  balance_after_usd: Mapped[Decimal] = mapped_column(
    EncryptedDecimal(), nullable=False
  )
  reference_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(
    EncryptedBillingString(), nullable=True, index=True
  )
  description: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(
    EncryptedBillingString(), nullable=False, default=""
  )
  created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
    DateTime, nullable=False, default=func.now()
  )
```

```py
import uuid
from datetime import datetime
from sqlalchemy import DateTime, String, Text, func
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID
from sqlalchemy.orm import Mapped, mapped_column
from app.domain.base import Base
class PromptTemplate(Base):
  __tablename__ = "prompt_templates"
  id: Mapped[uuid.UUID] = mapped_column(
    UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4
  )
  name: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, index=True, nullable=False)
  version: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String, default="v1", nullable=False)
  content: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=False)
  description: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String, nullable=True)
  input_variables: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(
    String, comment="Comma-separated list of expected variables"
  )
  is_active: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(default=True)
  created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime, default=func.now())
  updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(
    DateTime, default=func.now(), onupdate=func.now()
  )
  class Config:
    orm_mode = True
```

### `src/app/domain/exceptions.py`
```py
class DomainError(Exception):
  pass
class PIIScrubbingError(DomainError):
  pass
class SecurityViolationError(DomainError):
  pass
class LLMContextError(DomainError):
  pass
class LLMGenerationError(DomainError):
  pass
class ServiceUnavailableError(DomainError):
  pass
class UpstreamTimeoutError(DomainError):
  pass
class InsufficientBalanceFallbackRequiredError(DomainError):
  def __init__(self, message: str, *, fallback_tier: str) -> None:
    super().__init__(message)
    self.fallback_tier = fallback_tier
class PayloadTooLargeError(DomainError):
  pass
class CacheUnavailableError(ServiceUnavailableError):
  def __init__(
    self,
    message: str,
    *,
    operation: str,
    surface: str,
  ) -> None:
    super().__init__(message)
    self.operation = operation
    self.surface = surface
class IdempotencyUnavailableError(CacheUnavailableError):
```

### `src/app/modules/genui/router.py`
```py
import json
from collections.abc import AsyncGenerator
from typing import Annotated
import structlog
from fastapi import APIRouter, Body, Depends, Query, Request
from fastapi.responses import StreamingResponse
from app.config import settings
from app.core.context import AppContext
from app.dependencies import (
  get_llm_provider,
  get_sanitize_prompt_use_case,
  get_token_manager,
)
from app.domain.interfaces import LLMProvider, TokenManagerPort
from app.modules.dlp_proxy.application.sanitize_prompt import SanitizePromptUseCase
from app.modules.genui.application.generate_proposal import generate_proposal_use_case
from app.modules.genui.domain.schemas import (
  GenerateProposalRequest,
  ProjectGridResponse,
  StaticProjectSchema,
)
router = APIRouter(prefix="/genui", tags=["genui"])
logger = structlog.get_logger()
@router.get("/projects", response_model=ProjectGridResponse)
async def get_projects(stack: str | None = Query(default=None)) -> ProjectGridResponse:
  projects = [
    StaticProjectSchema(
      id="pdf-anki",
      title="KERA (Knowledge Extraction and Retention Architecture)",
      stack="python",
      description=(
        "RAG-style document extraction with flashcard generation, "
        "model fallback, and storage controls."
      ),
      youtube_id="_bYYlRWlrs4",
      tags=[
        "RAG",
        "Semantic Caching",
        "DSPy",
        "Async Workers",
        "FinOps",
        "SOC2",
        "ALE Encryption",
      ],
    ),
    StaticProjectSchema(
      id="receipt-parser",
      title="VERA (Verified Expense and Receipt Architecture)",
      stack="python",
      description=(
        "Deterministic receipt validation with human review for "
        "math and OCR edge cases."
      ),
      youtube_id="V_RVnV5D_24",
      tags=[
        "Edge Compute",
        "HITL",
        "Deterministic Math",
        "PII Scrubbing",
        "RAG",
        "SOC2",
        "ALE Encryption",
      ],
    ),
    StaticProjectSchema(
      id="audio-notes",
      title="AURA (Audio Understanding and Retention Architecture)",
      stack="python",
      description=(
        "Async audio transcription, summarization, feedback capture, "
        "and observability."
      ),
      youtube_id="1wK76ZHs2TM",
      tags=[
        "Idempotency",
        "Nested Learning Loop",
        "2PC Wallet",
        "Redis Debouncing",
        "RAG",
        "SOC2",
        "ALE Encryption",
      ],
    ),
    StaticProjectSchema(
      id="sre-qa-pipeline",
      title="Zero-Compromise QA & SRE",
      stack="fullstack",
      description=(
        "Enterprise CI/CD pipeline featuring Mutation Testing, "
        "DeepEval (LLM-as-a-Judge), Chaos Engineering, and "
        "Adversarial RAG."
      ),
      youtube_id=None,
      tags=[
        "Mutation Testing",
        "LLM-as-a-Judge",
        "Chaos Engineering",
        "OpenTelemetry",
        "Circuit Breakers",
      ],
    ),
    StaticProjectSchema(
      id="genui",
      title="GenUI Proposal Stream",
      stack="typescript",
      description=(
        "Next.js component registry that renders backend-selected "
        "UI inside streamed proposals."
      ),
      youtube_id=None,
      tags=[
        "Generative UI",
        "Vercel Data Stream",
        "React",
        "TailwindCSS",
      ],
    ),
  ]
  if stack:
    stack_normalized = stack.lower()
    projects = [p for p in projects if p.stack.lower() == stack_normalized]
  return ProjectGridResponse(projects=projects, total=len(projects))
@router.post("/proposal/generate")
async def generate_proposal(
  req: Request,
  llm: Annotated[LLMProvider, Depends(get_llm_provider)],
  token_manager: Annotated[TokenManagerPort, Depends(get_token_manager)],
  sanitize_prompt: Annotated[
    SanitizePromptUseCase, Depends(get_sanitize_prompt_use_case)
  ],
  request: GenerateProposalRequest = Body(default_factory=GenerateProposalRequest),
) -> StreamingResponse:
  _ = req  # Used for dependency injection context if needed
  trace_id = AppContext.get_request_id()
  tenant_id = AppContext.get_tenant_id()
  api_key = (
    settings.GROQ_GENUI_API_KEY.get_secret_value()
    if settings.GROQ_GENUI_API_KEY
    else None
  )
  logger.info(
    "genui_proposal_generate_requested",
    path="/api/v1/genui/proposal/generate",
    tenant_id=tenant_id,
    tenant_namespace="genui" if tenant_id.startswith("genui-") else "other",
    trace_id=trace_id,
    stack=request.stack,
    context_chars=len(request.context),
  )
  async def ndjson_generator() -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
    async for chunk in generate_proposal_use_case(
      context=request.context,
      stack=request.stack,
      llm=llm,
      token_manager=token_manager,
      sanitize_prompt=sanitize_prompt,
      trace_id=trace_id,
      api_key_override=api_key,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
    ):
      yield json.dumps(chunk.model_dump(exclude_none=True)) + "\n"
  return StreamingResponse(
    ndjson_generator(),
    media_type="application/x-ndjson",
    headers={"X-GenUI-Upstream": "fastapi"},
  )
```

```py
import json
import re
from collections.abc import AsyncGenerator
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Any
import structlog
from app.core.context import AppContext
from app.core.finops_logger import log_token_usage
from app.domain.interfaces import LLMProvider, TokenManagerPort
from app.modules.dlp_proxy.application.sanitize_prompt import SanitizePromptUseCase
from app.modules.dlp_proxy.domain.exceptions import SecurityPolicyViolation
from app.modules.genui.domain.schemas import ProposalStreamChunk
logger = structlog.get_logger()
GENUI_MODEL = "groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile"
SECURITY_BLOCK_REASON = (
  "Sensitive identifiers or credentials were detected. Request blocked locally."
)
_STRICT_COMPONENT_PREFIX = "|||COMPONENT:"
_STRICT_COMPONENT_SUFFIX = "|||"
_LEGACY_COMPONENT_PREFIX = "<<COMPONENT:"
_LEGACY_COMPONENT_SUFFIX = ">>"
_COMPONENT_NAMES = (
  "PdfAnkiFlashcard",
  "ReceiptHitlForm",
  "AudioNoteTelegramMock",
  "PdfAnkiErrorAlert",
  "CapacityBanner",
  "AlternativeApproachCard",
  "FinOpsROICalculator",
  "AsyncSingleFlightVisualizer",
  "RAGLearningLoopVisualizer",
  "ArchitectureFitScore",
  "FitBadge",
  "SecurityBlockCard",
)
_BARE_COMPONENT_PATTERN = re.compile(
  r"(?<![A-Za-z0-9_])("
  + "|".join(re.escape(name) for name in _COMPONENT_NAMES)
  + r")\s*:\s*(\{)"
)
_OBVIOUS_SENSITIVE_PATTERNS: tuple[tuple[re.Pattern[str], str], ...] = (
  (
    re.compile(
      r"\b[a-zA-Z0-9._%+-]+(@| AT )[a-zA-Z0-9.-]+(\.| DOT )[A-Za-z]{2,}\b",
      re.IGNORECASE,
    ),
    "email",
  ),
  (re.compile(r"\+?1?\s*\(?\d{3}\)?[-.\s]?\d{3}[-.\s]?\d{4}"), "phone"),
  (re.compile(r"\b\d{3}-\d{2}-\d{4}\b"), "ssn"),
  (re.compile(r"\b(?:\d[ -]*?){13,19}\b"), "payment_card"),
  (
    re.compile(r"\b(?:sk|gsk|xox[baprs]|ghp|github_pat)-[A-Za-z0-9_-]{16,}\b"),
    "api_key",
  ),
  (
    re.compile(
      r"\b(?:api[_ -]?key|secret|password|bearer token)\s*[:=]\s*\S+",
      re.IGNORECASE,
    ),
    "credential",
  ),
  (
    re.compile(
      r"\b(?:MRN|medical record(?: number)?|patient id)\s*[:#-]?\s*"
      r"[A-Za-z0-9-]{4,}\b",
      re.IGNORECASE,
    ),
    "medical_identifier",
  ),
  (
    re.compile(
      r"\b(?:patient|member)\s+(?:name\s+)?(?:is\s+)?[A-Z][a-z]+(?:\s+[A-Z][a-z]+)+\b"
    ),
    "patient_name",
  ),
)
SYSTEM_PROMPT = (
  "You are a Staff Pre-Sales Engineer for the 'Frugal Fortress' Enterprise AI "
  "architecture. Your goal is to write a highly technical, convincing proposal "
  "based on the user's context.\n\n"
  "CORE ARCHITECTURE FACTS (DO NOT HALLUCINATE OR MIX DOMAINS):\n"
  "- Audio Notes (Voice): We use a Global SHA-256 Idempotency Guard in Redis to "
  "prevent duplicate LLM calls for viral/forwarded audio. We DO NOT use Edge Canvas for audio.\n"
  "- Receipts & Invoices: We use Edge Canvas compression (browser) to reduce payload size, "
  "and a deterministic pure Python MathValidator for accuracy (No ML for math).\n"
  "- PDF Processing: We use LanceDB for semantic chunk deduplication and Arq async workers.\n"
  "- AI Learning: 'Nested Learning Loop' (RAG Few-Shot Injection via pgvector) learns from "
  "Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) or text corrections.\n"
  "- Security & Compliance: Local SLM (Llama 3.2) + Presidio for PII scrubbing. Application-"
  "Level Encryption (ALE) secures data at rest against database breaches.\n"
  "- FinOps & Cost Efficiency: Strict token budgets and dynamic model routing.\n"
  "- SRE (Resilience & Concurrency): Redis-backed Circuit Breakers prevent cascading "
  "failures. AsyncSingleFlight prevents cache stampedes for concurrent synchronous API requests.\n"
  "- Auditability: OpenTelemetry trace_id propagation, structured JSON logging "
  "(Loki), and immutable FeedbackLog in PostgreSQL.\n\n"
  "You MUST interleave your text with interactive UI components to demonstrate "
  "the architecture.\n\n"
  "To render a component, you MUST output exactly this syntax on a new line:\n"
  '|||COMPONENT:ComponentName:{"propKey": "propValue"}|||\n\n'
  "GOOD: |||COMPONENT:ReceiptHitlForm:{}|||\n"
  "BAD: ReceiptHitlForm:{}\n"
  "CRITICAL: NEVER use PascalCase or CamelCase component names (like 'AudioNoteTelegramMock' "
  "or 'FinOpsROICalculator') in your plain text paragraphs. Always use natural language "
  "references such as 'the interactive demo below', 'the following ROI chart', or 'this interface'.\n\n"
  "STATIC COMPONENTS (Use empty props {}):\n"
  "- PdfAnkiFlashcard: Use ONLY for educational, study, or document-to-knowledge "
  "use cases. DO NOT use for financial/receipt proposals.\n"
  "- ReceiptHitlForm: ALWAYS use this when the user asks about Human-in-the-Loop "
  "(HITL), OCR math, or receipt validation.\n"
  "- AudioNoteTelegramMock: Use when discussing voice, async workflows, or Telegram.\n"
  "- PdfAnkiErrorAlert: Use when discussing API rate limits, fallbacks, resilience.\n"
  "- CapacityBanner: Use when discussing storage limits or data pruning.\n"
  "- AlternativeApproachCard: Use when the user asks for bad architectural patterns.\n\n"
  "DYNAMIC COMPONENTS (You MUST provide the exact JSON props):\n"
  '- FinOpsROICalculator: Use when discussing costs. Props: {"competitorCost": '
  'number, "frugalFortressCost": number, "savings": number}\n'
  "- AsyncSingleFlightVisualizer: Use ONLY when discussing synchronous API traffic spikes "
  "or text concurrency. DO NOT use for audio/voice deduplication. "
  'Props: {"concurrentRequests": number, "cacheHits": number}\n'
  "- RAGLearningLoopVisualizer: Use when discussing hallucinations, fine-tuning, "
  "or how the system learns from Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) corrections. "
  'Props: {"originalError": string, "correction": string}\n'
  "- ArchitectureFitScore: ALWAYS use at the very end of the proposal. "
  'Props: {"score": number (0-100), "reason": string}\n\n'
  "Keep the text concise, professional, and focused on FinOps, SOC2, and SRE. "
  "CRITICAL: Do not mix contexts (e.g., do not mention healthcare or HIPAA if "
  "the prompt is about financial receipts)."
)
@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
class _ComponentMatch:
  start: int
  end: int
  component: str
  props: dict[str, Any]
@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
class _PendingComponent:
  start: int
def _detect_obvious_sensitive_data(text: str) -> str | None:
  for pattern, label in _OBVIOUS_SENSITIVE_PATTERNS:
    if pattern.search(text):
      return label
  return None
def _sanitize_genui_context(context: str) -> str:
  sensitive_label = _detect_obvious_sensitive_data(context)
  if sensitive_label is not None:
    raise SecurityPolicyViolation(f"GenUI prompt contains {sensitive_label}.")
  return context
def _json_object_end(text: str, start: int) -> int | None:
  if start >= len(text) or text[start] != "{":
    return None
  depth = 0
  in_string = False
  escaped = False
  for index in range(start, len(text)):
    char = text[index]
    if in_string:
      if escaped:
        escaped = False
      elif char == "\\":
        escaped = True
      elif char == '"':
        in_string = False
      continue
    if char == '"':
      in_string = True
    elif char == "{":
      depth += 1
    elif char == "}":
      depth -= 1
      if depth == 0:
        return index + 1
  return None
def _loads_props(text: str, start: int, end: int) -> dict[str, Any]:
  try:
    data = json.loads(text[start:end])
  except json.JSONDecodeError:
    return {}
  return data if isinstance(data, dict) else {}
def _skip_whitespace(text: str, index: int) -> int:
  while index < len(text) and text[index].isspace():
    index += 1
  return index
def _parse_strict_component(
  text: str, start: int
) -> _ComponentMatch | _PendingComponent | None:
  name_start = start + len(_STRICT_COMPONENT_PREFIX)
  name_match = re.match(r"([A-Za-z0-9_]+):", text[name_start:])
  if name_match is None:
    return _PendingComponent(start)
  component = name_match.group(1)
  json_start = name_start + name_match.end()
  json_end = _json_object_end(text, json_start)
  if json_end is None:
    return _PendingComponent(start)
  suffix_start = _skip_whitespace(text, json_end)
  suffix_end = suffix_start + len(_STRICT_COMPONENT_SUFFIX)
  if suffix_end > len(text):
    return _PendingComponent(start)
  if not text.startswith(_STRICT_COMPONENT_SUFFIX, suffix_start):
    return None
  return _ComponentMatch(
    start=start,
    end=suffix_end,
    component=component,
    props=_loads_props(text, json_start, json_end),
  )
def _parse_legacy_component(
  text: str, start: int
) -> _ComponentMatch | _PendingComponent | None:
  json_start = start + len(_LEGACY_COMPONENT_PREFIX)
  json_end = _json_object_end(text, json_start)
  if json_end is None:
    return _PendingComponent(start)
  suffix_start = _skip_whitespace(text, json_end)
  suffix_end = suffix_start + len(_LEGACY_COMPONENT_SUFFIX)
  if suffix_end > len(text):
    return _PendingComponent(start)
  if not text.startswith(_LEGACY_COMPONENT_SUFFIX, suffix_start):
    return None
  payload = _loads_props(text, json_start, json_end)
  component = str(payload.get("name") or "")
  props = payload.get("props")
  return _ComponentMatch(
    start=start,
    end=suffix_end,
    component=component,
    props=props if isinstance(props, dict) else {},
  )
def _parse_bare_component(
  text: str, match: re.Match[str]
) -> _ComponentMatch | _PendingComponent:
  json_start = match.start(2)
  json_end = _json_object_end(text, json_start)
  if json_end is None:
    return _PendingComponent(match.start())
  return _ComponentMatch(
    start=match.start(),
    end=json_end,
    component=match.group(1),
    props=_loads_props(text, json_start, json_end),
  )
def _find_next_component(text: str) -> _ComponentMatch | _PendingComponent | None:
  candidates: list[_ComponentMatch | _PendingComponent] = []
  strict_start = text.find(_STRICT_COMPONENT_PREFIX)
  if strict_start != -1:
    strict_match = _parse_strict_component(text, strict_start)
    if strict_match is not None:
      candidates.append(strict_match)
  legacy_start = text.find(_LEGACY_COMPONENT_PREFIX)
  if legacy_start != -1:
    legacy_match = _parse_legacy_component(text, legacy_start)
    if legacy_match is not None:
      candidates.append(legacy_match)
  bare_match = _BARE_COMPONENT_PATTERN.search(text)
  if bare_match is not None:
    candidates.append(_parse_bare_component(text, bare_match))
  if not candidates:
    return None
  return min(candidates, key=lambda candidate: candidate.start)
def _clean_text_chunk(text: str) -> str:
  cleaned = text.replace(_STRICT_COMPONENT_SUFFIX, "").replace(
    _LEGACY_COMPONENT_SUFFIX, ""
  )
  cleaned = re.sub(r"\|\|\|", "", cleaned)
  return cleaned
async def generate_proposal_use_case(
  context: str,
  stack: str,
  llm: LLMProvider,
  token_manager: TokenManagerPort,
  sanitize_prompt: SanitizePromptUseCase,
  trace_id: str | None = None,
  api_key_override: str | None = None,
  tenant_id: str | None = None,
) -> AsyncGenerator[ProposalStreamChunk, None]:
  trace_id = trace_id or AppContext.get_request_id()
  tenant_id = tenant_id or AppContext.get_tenant_id()
  try:
    _ = sanitize_prompt
    safe_context = _sanitize_genui_context(context)
  except SecurityPolicyViolation as e:
    logger.warning(
      "genui_proposal_blocked_by_dlp",
      trace_id=trace_id,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      tenant_namespace="genui" if tenant_id.startswith("genui-") else "other",
      error=str(e),
    )
    yield ProposalStreamChunk(
      type="component",
      component="SecurityBlockCard",
      props={"reason": SECURITY_BLOCK_REASON},
    )
    return
  logger.info(
    "genui_dlp_preflight_allowed",
    trace_id=trace_id,
    tenant_id=tenant_id,
    tenant_namespace="genui" if tenant_id.startswith("genui-") else "other",
    context_chars=len(safe_context),
  )
  model = GENUI_MODEL
  messages = [
    {"role": "system", "content": SYSTEM_PROMPT},
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": f"Client Context: {safe_context}\nPreferred Stack: {stack}",
    },
  ]
  total_prompt_tokens = await token_manager.count_tokens(
    SYSTEM_PROMPT + safe_context, model
  )
  total_completion_tokens = 0
  buffer = ""
  logger.info(
    "genui_proposal_llm_stream_start",
    model=model,
    tenant_id=tenant_id,
    tenant_namespace="genui" if tenant_id.startswith("genui-") else "other",
    trace_id=trace_id,
  )
  try:
    stream = llm.stream(
      model=model,
      messages=messages,
      temperature=0.3,
      api_key_override=api_key_override,
    )
    async for chunk in stream:
      if chunk.usage:
        total_prompt_tokens = chunk.usage.get(
          "prompt_tokens", total_prompt_tokens
        )
        total_completion_tokens = chunk.usage.get(
          "completion_tokens", total_completion_tokens
        )
      if chunk.content:
        buffer += chunk.content
        while True:
          component_match = _find_next_component(buffer)
          if isinstance(component_match, _PendingComponent):
            if component_match.start > 0:
              safe_text = buffer[: component_match.start]
              clean_text = _clean_text_chunk(safe_text)
              if clean_text.strip():
                yield ProposalStreamChunk(
                  type="text", content=clean_text
                )
              buffer = buffer[component_match.start :]
            break
          if component_match is None:
            if _STRICT_COMPONENT_PREFIX in buffer and not buffer.endswith(
              _STRICT_COMPONENT_SUFFIX
            ):
              break
            if "\n" in buffer:
              split_idx = buffer.rfind("\n")
              safe_text = buffer[: split_idx + 1]
              if _STRICT_COMPONENT_PREFIX not in safe_text:
                clean_text = _clean_text_chunk(safe_text)
                if clean_text.strip():
                  yield ProposalStreamChunk(
                    type="text", content=clean_text
                  )
                buffer = buffer[split_idx + 1 :]
              else:
                break
            break
          preceding_text = buffer[: component_match.start]
          clean_preceding = _clean_text_chunk(preceding_text)
          if clean_preceding.strip():
            yield ProposalStreamChunk(type="text", content=clean_preceding)
          if component_match.component:
            yield ProposalStreamChunk(
              type="component",
              component=component_match.component,
              props=component_match.props,
            )
          buffer = buffer[component_match.end :]
    while True:
      component_match = _find_next_component(buffer)
      if not isinstance(component_match, _ComponentMatch):
        break
      preceding_text = buffer[: component_match.start]
      clean_preceding = _clean_text_chunk(preceding_text)
      if clean_preceding.strip():
        yield ProposalStreamChunk(type="text", content=clean_preceding)
      if component_match.component:
        yield ProposalStreamChunk(
          type="component",
          component=component_match.component,
          props=component_match.props,
        )
      buffer = buffer[component_match.end :]
    if buffer.strip():
      clean_buffer = _clean_text_chunk(buffer)
      if clean_buffer.strip():
        yield ProposalStreamChunk(type="text", content=clean_buffer)
  except Exception as e:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.error(
      "genui_proposal_stream_error",
      error=str(e),
      trace_id=trace_id,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      tenant_namespace="genui" if tenant_id.startswith("genui-") else "other",
    )
    yield ProposalStreamChunk(
      type="component",
      component="PdfAnkiErrorAlert",
      props={
        "error": {
          "code": "stream_failed",
          "title": "Proposal generation interrupted.",
        }
      },
    )
  finally:
    log_token_usage(
      model_name=model,
      input_tokens=total_prompt_tokens,
      output_tokens=total_completion_tokens,
      estimated_cost_usd=0.0,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      trace_id=trace_id,
    )
```

```py
from typing import Any, Literal
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
class GenerateProposalRequest(BaseModel):
  context: str = Field(default="")
  stack: str = Field(default="python")
class ProposalStreamChunk(BaseModel):
  type: Literal["text", "component"] = "text"
  content: str = ""
  component: str | None = None
  props: dict[str, Any] | None = None
class StaticProjectSchema(BaseModel):
  id: str
  title: str
  stack: str
  description: str | None = None
  youtube_id: str | None = None
  tags: list[str] = Field(default_factory=list)
class ProjectGridResponse(BaseModel):
  projects: list[StaticProjectSchema]
  total: int
```

### `src/app/modules/genui/infrastructure/static_projects_adapter.py`
```py
from app.modules.genui.domain.schemas import StaticProjectSchema
_STUB_PROJECTS: list[StaticProjectSchema] = [
  StaticProjectSchema(
    id="1",
    title="Sample Python API",
    stack="python",
    description="FastAPI backend template.",
  ),
  StaticProjectSchema(
    id="2",
    title="Sample Next.js App",
    stack="javascript",
    description="Next.js with Vercel.",
  ),
]
class StaticProjectsAdapter:
  async def get_projects(
    self, stack: str | None = None
  ) -> list[dict[str, str | None]]:
    items = _STUB_PROJECTS
    if stack:
      items = [p for p in items if p.stack.lower() == stack.lower()]
    return [
      {
        "id": p.id,
        "title": p.title,
        "stack": p.stack,
        "description": p.description,
      }
      for p in items
    ]
```

```py
router = APIRouter(prefix="/pdf", tags=["pdf_anki"])
PDF_RAW_PREFIX = "pdf:raw:"
PDF_RAW_TTL = 3600
def _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
) -> str:
  payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
  )
  return payload.sub
@router.get("/pricing")
async def get_pricing() -> dict[str, object]:
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  free_fc, free_decks = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits("free", None, None)
  premium_fc, premium_decks = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits("premium", None, None)
  pro_fc, pro_decks = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits("pro", None, None)
  payg_fc, payg_decks = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits("payg", None, None)
  return {
    "tiers": [
      {
        "id": "free",
        "max_flashcards": free_fc,
        "max_decks": free_decks,
        "max_pages_per_pdf": get_pdf_page_limit("free"),
      },
      {
        "id": "premium",
        "max_flashcards": premium_fc,
        "max_decks": premium_decks,
        "max_pages_per_pdf": get_pdf_page_limit("premium"),
      },
      {
        "id": "pro",
        "max_flashcards": pro_fc,
        "max_decks": pro_decks,
        "max_pages_per_pdf": get_pdf_page_limit("pro"),
      },
      {
        "id": "payg",
        "max_flashcards": payg_fc,
        "max_decks": payg_decks,
        "max_pages_per_pdf": get_pdf_page_limit("payg"),
      },
    ],
    "stripe_links": {
      "premium": snap.pdf_stripe_link_premium or "",
      "pro": snap.pdf_stripe_link_pro or "",
      "payg_topup": snap.pdf_stripe_link_payg_topup or "",
      "pago": snap.pdf_pago_stripe or "",
    },
    "customer_portal_path": "/billing/stripe/customer-portal?module=pdf_anki",
  }
def _count_pdf_pages_sync(pdf_bytes: bytes) -> int:
  try:
    import pypdf
    reader = pypdf.PdfReader(io.BytesIO(pdf_bytes))
    return len(reader.pages)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    return -1
@router.post(
  "/upload",
  response_model=UploadAcceptedResponse,
  status_code=202,
  responses={
    401: {"description": "Not signed in (missing or invalid Bearer JWT)"},
    413: {"description": "PDF exceeds page limit for the current tier"},
    415: {"description": "Invalid or corrupted PDF file"},
    429: {"description": "Monthly page quota exceeded for current tier"},
  },
)
async def upload_pdf(
  file: Annotated[UploadFile, File()],
  request: Request,
  user_tier: Annotated[str, Form()] = "free",
  user_id: Annotated[str, Form()] = "anonymous",
  title: Annotated[str | None, Form()] = None,
  pdf_anki_unified_model_id: Annotated[str | None, Form()] = None,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
  queue_manager: type[QueueManager] = Depends(get_queue_manager),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> UploadAcceptedResponse:
  _ = user_id, user_tier
  resolved_user_id = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
  ).sub
  user_repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  row = await user_repo.get_user_by_id(resolved_user_id)
  resolved_tier = "free"
  is_payg = False
  if row is not None:
    t = getattr(row, "tier", None)
    if isinstance(t, str) and t.strip():
      resolved_tier = t.strip().lower()
    payg_val = getattr(row, "payg", None)
    is_payg = payg_val is True
  effective_tier = "payg" if is_payg else resolved_tier
  pdf_bytes = await file.read()
  num_pages = await CpuBoundExecutor.run(_count_pdf_pages_sync, pdf_bytes)
  if num_pages == -1:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=415,
      detail="Invalid, corrupted, or password-protected PDF file.",
    )
  max_pages = get_pdf_page_limit(effective_tier)
  if num_pages > max_pages:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=413,
      detail=(
        f"PDF_PAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Your tier "
        f"({effective_tier.capitalize()}) allows up to "
        f"{max_pages} pages per document. "
        f"This PDF has {num_pages} pages."
      ),
    )
  month_key = PdfAnkiUserRepository.monthly_window_key()
  monthly_used = await user_repo.get_monthly_pages_usage(
    resolved_user_id,
    window_key=month_key,
  )
  monthly_limit = _monthly_pdf_page_limit(effective_tier)
  if monthly_used + num_pages > monthly_limit:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=429,
      detail=(
        f"PDF_MONTHLY_PAGE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Your tier "
        f"({effective_tier.capitalize()}) allows up to "
        f"{monthly_limit} pages per month. "
        f"Current usage={monthly_used}, requested={num_pages}."
      ),
    )
  file_hash = compute_file_hash(pdf_bytes)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  existing = await repo.get_by_file_hash(file_hash)
  if existing is not None:
    user_decks = await repo.list_decks_for_user(resolved_user_id, limit=100)
    user_has_deck = next((d for d in user_decks if d.file_hash == file_hash), None)
    if user_has_deck is not None:
      return UploadAcceptedResponse(
        task_id=str(existing.id),
        status="completed",
        message="Document already processed.",
        already_processed=True,
        deck_id=str(user_has_deck.id),
      )
    await repo.update_state(
      str(existing.id), DocumentState.PENDING, error_message=""
    )
    await session.commit()
    doc = existing
  else:
    doc = await repo.create(file_hash, state=DocumentState.PENDING)
    await session.commit()
  encrypted_bytes = await CpuBoundExecutor.run(encrypt_bytes, pdf_bytes)
  cache_ok = await cache.set_bytes(
    f"{PDF_RAW_PREFIX}{file_hash}",
    encrypted_bytes,
    PDF_RAW_TTL,
  )
  if not cache_ok:
    await repo.update_state(
      str(doc.id),
      DocumentState.FAILED,
      error_message="Cache unavailable: PDF bytes not stored.",
    )
    await session.commit()
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=503,
      detail="Cache unavailable. PDF could not be stored. Try again later.",
    )
  payg_unified = _parse_optional_unified_pdf_model_id(pdf_anki_unified_model_id)
  trace_ctx = inject_trace_context()
  try:
    pool = await queue_manager.get_pool()
    await pool.enqueue_job(
      JobNames.PROCESS_PDF,
      document_id=doc.id,
      file_hash=file_hash,
      user_tier=effective_tier,
      user_id=resolved_user_id,
      title=title or file.filename or "Untitled Deck",
      payg_unified_model_id=payg_unified,
      pdf_page_count=num_pages,
      trace_context=trace_ctx,
    )
  except Exception as e:
    await repo.update_state(
      str(doc.id), DocumentState.FAILED, error_message=f"Queue failed: {e}"
    )
    await session.commit()
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=503,
      detail="Queue unavailable. Try again later.",
    ) from e
  return UploadAcceptedResponse(
    task_id=str(doc.id),
    status="processing",
    message="Document queued for processing.",
  )
@router.get("/status/{task_id}", response_model=DocumentStatusResponse)
async def get_status(
  task_id: str,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
) -> DocumentStatusResponse:
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  doc = await repo.get_by_id(task_id)
  if doc is None:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found.")
  deck: list[FlashcardItem] | None = None
  deck_id: str | None = None
  deck_entity = None
  if doc.state in (
    DocumentState.COMPLETED,
    DocumentState.COMPLETED_PARTIAL,
  ):
    cached = await cache.get(pdf_deck_redis_key(str(doc.file_hash)))
    raw_deck = decode_pdf_deck_redis_value(cached)
    if raw_deck is not None:
      deck_items: list[FlashcardItem] = []
      for c in raw_deck:
        tags_value = c.get("tags")
        if isinstance(tags_value, list):
          tags_list = [str(tag) for tag in tags_value]
        else:
          tags_list = []
        deck_items.append(
          FlashcardItem(
            front=str(c.get("front", "")),
            back=str(c.get("back", "")),
            tags=tags_list,
          )
        )
      deck = deck_items
    deck_entity = await repo.get_deck_by_document_id(str(doc.id))
    if deck_entity is not None:
      deck_id = str(deck_entity.id)
    if deck is None and deck_entity is not None:
      _, rows = await repo.get_deck_with_flashcards(
        str(deck_entity.id),
        user_id=None,
      )
      fallback_items: list[FlashcardItem] = []
      for c in rows:
        tags_value = c.get("tags")
        if isinstance(tags_value, list):
          tags_fb = [str(tag) for tag in tags_value]
        else:
          tags_fb = []
        fallback_items.append(
          FlashcardItem(
            front=str(c.get("front", "")),
            back=str(c.get("back", "")),
            tags=tags_fb,
          )
        )
      deck = fallback_items
  err_msg = str(doc.error_message) if doc.error_message else None
  resolved_model = getattr(doc, "resolved_model_id", None)
  resolved_model_id = (
    str(resolved_model).strip() if isinstance(resolved_model, str) else None
  )
  if resolved_model_id == "":
    resolved_model_id = None
  return DocumentStatusResponse(
    task_id=str(doc.id),
    status=doc.state.value,
    file_hash=str(doc.file_hash) if doc.file_hash else None,
    error_message=err_msg,
    error_code=_pdf_status_error_code(err_msg),
    resolved_model_id=resolved_model_id,
    deck=deck,
    deck_id=deck_id,
  )
@router.get("/decks", response_model=list[PdfDeckSummary])
async def list_decks(
  request: Request,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> list[PdfDeckSummary]:
  tenant_id = _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(request, authorization)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  decks = await repo.list_decks_for_user(user_id=tenant_id)
  return [
    PdfDeckSummary(
      id=str(deck.id),
      title=str(deck.title),
      status=str(deck.status.value),
      created_at=deck.created_at.isoformat()
      if deck.created_at is not None
      else "",
      updated_at=deck.updated_at.isoformat()
      if deck.updated_at is not None
      else None,
      document_id=str(deck.document_id),
    )
    for deck in decks
  ]
@router.get("/deck/{deck_id}", response_model=PdfDeckDetail)
async def get_deck(
  deck_id: str,
  request: Request,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> PdfDeckDetail:
  tenant_id = _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(request, authorization)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  deck, cards = await repo.get_deck_with_flashcards(
    deck_id=deck_id, user_id=tenant_id
  )
  if deck is None:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
  flashcards = [
    FlashcardItem(
      front=str(card.get("front", "")),
      back=str(card.get("back", "")),
      tags=[str(t) for t in card.get("tags", [])],
    )
    for card in cards
  ]
  return PdfDeckDetail(
    id=str(deck.id),
    title=str(deck.title),
    status=str(deck.status.value),
    created_at=deck.created_at.isoformat() if deck.created_at is not None else "",
    flashcards=flashcards,
  )
@router.get("/deck/{deck_id}/tags", response_model=PdfDeckTagsResponse)
async def get_deck_tags(
  deck_id: str,
  request: Request,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> PdfDeckTagsResponse:
  tenant_id = _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(request, authorization)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  deck, cards = await repo.get_deck_with_flashcards(
    deck_id=deck_id, user_id=tenant_id
  )
  if deck is None:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
  tags = collect_sorted_tags(cards)
  return PdfDeckTagsResponse(deck_id=str(deck.id), tags=tags)
@router.get("/deck/{deck_id}/export")
async def export_deck_file(
  deck_id: str,
  request: Request,
  export_format: Annotated[
    Literal["csv", "txt", "apkg", "xlsx"], Query(alias="format")
  ] = "csv",
  lang: Annotated[str, Query()] = "en",
  tag: Annotated[list[str] | None, Query()] = None,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> Response:
  tenant_id = _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(request, authorization)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  deck, cards = await repo.get_deck_with_flashcards(
    deck_id=deck_id, user_id=tenant_id
  )
  if deck is None:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
  tag_list = list(tag) if tag else []
  filtered = filter_cards_by_tags_all(cards, tag_list)
  body, media_type, filename = export_deck_blob(
    str(deck.title),
    filtered,
    fmt=export_format,
    lang=lang,
  )
  return Response(
    content=body,
    media_type=media_type,
    headers={"Content-Disposition": f'attachment; filename="{filename}"'},
  )
@router.delete(
  "/deck/{deck_id}",
  responses={
    200: {"description": "Deck deleted"},
    404: {"description": "Deck not found"},
  },
)
async def delete_deck(
  deck_id: str,
  request: Request,
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  tenant_id = _resolve_pdf_anki_tenant_id(request, authorization)
  repo = DocumentRepository(session)
  deck = await repo.get_deck_for_user(deck_id=deck_id, user_id=tenant_id)
  if deck is None:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
  file_hash = str(deck.file_hash)
  deck_cache_key = pdf_deck_redis_key(file_hash)
  raw_cache_key = f"{PDF_RAW_PREFIX}{file_hash}"
  await cache.delete(deck_cache_key)
  await cache.delete(raw_cache_key)
  deleted = await repo.delete_deck_for_user(deck_id=deck_id, user_id=tenant_id)
  if not deleted:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
  await repo.delete_document_by_file_hash(file_hash)
  await session.commit()
  await cache.delete(deck_cache_key)
  await cache.delete(raw_cache_key)
  return {"status": "deleted"}
@router.post(
  "/deck/flashcards/feedback/edit",
  response_model=EditFlashcardFeedbackResponse,
  status_code=200,
)
async def edit_flashcard_feedback(
  payload: FlashcardFeedbackEditRequest,
  request: Request,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  llm: LLMProvider = Depends(get_llm_provider),
) -> EditFlashcardFeedbackResponse:
  resolved_user_id = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
  ).sub
  old_tenant_id = AppContext.get_tenant_id()
  AppContext.set_tenant_id(resolved_user_id)
  try:
    repo = DocumentRepository(session)
    prefix, idx = _parse_card_key_index(payload.card_key)
    if prefix != payload.deck_id:
      raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="card_key/deck_id mismatch.")
    cards = await repo.get_deck_flashcards_ordered_with_ids(
      deck_id=payload.deck_id,
      user_id=resolved_user_id,
    )
    if not cards:
      raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
    if idx < 0 or idx >= len(cards):
      raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard index out of range.")
    card = cards[idx]
    if (
      card["front"] != payload.original_front
      or card["back"] != payload.original_back
    ):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=409,
        detail="Flashcard original content does not match (stale edit).",
      )
    await repo.update_flashcard_text(
      card_id=card["id"],
      new_front=payload.new_front,
      new_back=payload.new_back,
    )
    user_prompt_raw = (
      f"{payload.original_front.strip()}\n{payload.original_back.strip()}".strip()
    )
    llm_response_raw = (
      f"{payload.new_front.strip()}\n{payload.new_back.strip()}".strip()
    )
    try:
      user_prompt = await PIIScrubber.scrub_async(user_prompt_raw, strict=True)
      llm_response = await PIIScrubber.scrub_async(llm_response_raw, strict=True)
    except PIIScrubbingError as e:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=400,
        detail="Invalid feedback content. Please remove sensitive data.",
      ) from e
    embedding = await llm.embed(user_prompt)
    feedback = FeedbackLog(
      request_id=uuid4(),
      tenant_id=resolved_user_id,
      status=KnowledgeStatus.APPROVED,
      user_prompt=user_prompt,
      llm_response=llm_response,
      user_correction=None,
      score=1.0,
      model_used="pdf_anki_flashcard_feedback_edit",
      total_tokens=0,
      prompt_tokens=0,
      completion_tokens=0,
      cost_usd=0.0,
      latency_ms=0.0,
      trace_id=AppContext.get_request_id(),
      embedding=embedding,
    )
    session.add(feedback)
    await session.commit()
    return EditFlashcardFeedbackResponse(status="saved")
  finally:
    AppContext.set_tenant_id(old_tenant_id)
@router.post(
  "/deck/flashcards/feedback/discard",
  response_model=DiscardFlashcardFeedbackResponse,
  status_code=200,
)
async def discard_flashcard_feedback(
  payload: FlashcardFeedbackDiscardRequest,
  request: Request,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  llm: LLMProvider = Depends(get_llm_provider),
) -> DiscardFlashcardFeedbackResponse:
  resolved_user_id = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
  ).sub
  old_tenant_id = AppContext.get_tenant_id()
  AppContext.set_tenant_id(resolved_user_id)
  try:
    repo = DocumentRepository(session)
    prefix, idx = _parse_card_key_index(payload.card_key)
    if prefix != payload.deck_id:
      raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="card_key/deck_id mismatch.")
    cards = await repo.get_deck_flashcards_ordered_with_ids(
      deck_id=payload.deck_id,
      user_id=resolved_user_id,
    )
    if not cards:
      raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Deck not found.")
    if idx < 0 or idx >= len(cards):
      raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard index out of range.")
    card = cards[idx]
    if (
      card["front"] != payload.original_front
      or card["back"] != payload.original_back
    ):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=409,
        detail="Flashcard original content does not match (stale discard).",
      )
    deleted = await repo.delete_flashcard_for_user(
      card_id=card["id"],
      deck_id=payload.deck_id,
      user_id=resolved_user_id,
    )
    if not deleted:
      raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Flashcard not found.")
    user_prompt_raw = (
      f"{payload.original_front.strip()}\n{payload.original_back.strip()}".strip()
    )
    try:
      user_prompt = await PIIScrubber.scrub_async(user_prompt_raw, strict=True)
    except PIIScrubbingError as e:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=400,
        detail="Invalid feedback content. Please remove sensitive data.",
      ) from e
    embedding = await llm.embed(user_prompt)
    feedback = FeedbackLog(
      request_id=uuid4(),
      tenant_id=resolved_user_id,
      status=KnowledgeStatus.REJECTED,
      user_prompt=user_prompt,
      llm_response="rejected",
      user_correction=None,
      score=0.0,
      model_used="pdf_anki_flashcard_feedback_discard",
      total_tokens=0,
      prompt_tokens=0,
      completion_tokens=0,
      cost_usd=0.0,
      latency_ms=0.0,
      trace_id=AppContext.get_request_id(),
      embedding=embedding,
    )
    session.add(feedback)
    await session.commit()
    return DiscardFlashcardFeedbackResponse(status="rejected")
  finally:
    AppContext.set_tenant_id(old_tenant_id)
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/data_lifecycle.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
import structlog
from sqlalchemy import delete, select
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.lifecycle_heuristics import (
  is_subscription_canceled,
  parse_period_end,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.pdf_prune_selection import (
  decks_to_delete_after_keep,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.entities import PdfAnkiUser, PdfDeck, PdfFlashcard
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.ports import VectorStorePort
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.storage_quotas import (
  PDF_ANKI_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS,
  effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.infrastructure import pdf_anki_ale as _pale
_VECTOR_STORE_TABLE_NAME = "pdf_anki_chunks"
_FREE_MAX_FLASHCARDS, _FREE_MAX_DECKS = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits(
  "free",
  None,
  None,
)
_MAX_DECKS_TO_KEEP_DEFAULT = _FREE_MAX_DECKS
logger = structlog.get_logger()
def _parse_period_end(value: object) -> datetime | None:
  return parse_period_end(value)
async def _get_expired_user_ids(
  session: AsyncSession,
) -> list[str]:
  try:
    stmt = select(PdfAnkiUser)
    result = await session.execute(stmt)
    rows = list(result.scalars().all())
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "pdf_anki_expired_users_query_failed",
      error=str(exc),
    )
    return []
  now = datetime.now(UTC)
  cutoff = now - timedelta(days=PDF_ANKI_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS)
  expired: list[str] = []
  for row in rows:
    status = (
      (_pale.decrypt_field(getattr(row, "subscription_status", None)) or "")
      .strip()
      .lower()
    )
    if not is_subscription_canceled(status):
      continue
    end = _parse_period_end(getattr(row, "current_period_end", None))
    if end is None or end >= cutoff:
      continue
    expired.append(str(row.id))
  return expired
async def prune_expired_pdf_data_use_case(
  session: AsyncSession,
  vector_store: VectorStorePort,
  max_decks_to_keep: int = _MAX_DECKS_TO_KEEP_DEFAULT,
  max_flashcards_to_keep: int = _FREE_MAX_FLASHCARDS,
) -> None:
  assert isinstance(max_decks_to_keep, int)
  assert max_decks_to_keep >= 0
  assert isinstance(max_flashcards_to_keep, int)
  assert max_flashcards_to_keep >= 0
  expired_user_ids = await _get_expired_user_ids(session)
  if not expired_user_ids:
    logger.info("pdf_anki_prune_no_expired_users")
    return
  now = datetime.now(UTC)
  cutoff = now - timedelta(days=PDF_ANKI_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS)
  logger.info(
    "pdf_anki_prune_start",
    user_count=len(expired_user_ids),
    cutoff=cutoff.isoformat(),
  )
  for user_id in expired_user_ids:
    stmt = (
      select(PdfDeck)
      .where(PdfDeck.user_id == user_id)
      .order_by(PdfDeck.created_at.desc())
    )
    result = await session.execute(stmt)
    decks = list(result.scalars().all())
    decks_to_delete = decks_to_delete_after_keep(decks, max_decks_to_keep)
    kept_decks = [deck for deck in decks if deck not in decks_to_delete]
    if decks_to_delete:
      document_ids_to_delete = {deck.document_id for deck in decks_to_delete}
      deck_ids_to_delete = [deck.id for deck in decks_to_delete]
      assert len(deck_ids_to_delete) > 0, "deck_ids_to_delete must not be empty"
      await session.execute(
        delete(PdfFlashcard).where(PdfFlashcard.deck_id.in_(deck_ids_to_delete))
      )
      await session.execute(
        delete(PdfDeck).where(PdfDeck.id.in_(deck_ids_to_delete))
      )
      for document_id in document_ids_to_delete:
        try:
          await vector_store.delete_by_document_id(
            table_name=_VECTOR_STORE_TABLE_NAME,
            document_id=str(document_id),
          )
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
          logger.warning(
            "pdf_anki_prune_vector_delete_failed",
            document_id=str(document_id),
            error=str(exc),
          )
    kept_deck_ids = [deck.id for deck in kept_decks]
    if kept_deck_ids:
      flashcards_result = await session.execute(
        select(PdfFlashcard)
        .where(PdfFlashcard.deck_id.in_(kept_deck_ids))
        .order_by(PdfFlashcard.created_at.desc(), PdfFlashcard.id.desc())
      )
      kept_flashcards = list(flashcards_result.scalars().all())
      flashcards_to_delete = kept_flashcards[max_flashcards_to_keep:]
      if flashcards_to_delete:
        flashcard_ids_to_delete = [card.id for card in flashcards_to_delete]
        await session.execute(
          delete(PdfFlashcard).where(
            PdfFlashcard.id.in_(flashcard_ids_to_delete)
          )
        )
      deleted_flashcard_ids = {card.id for card in flashcards_to_delete}
      remaining_deck_ids = {
        card.deck_id
        for card in kept_flashcards
        if card.id not in deleted_flashcard_ids
      }
      empty_kept_decks = [
        deck for deck in kept_decks if deck.id not in remaining_deck_ids
      ]
      if empty_kept_decks:
        empty_deck_ids = [deck.id for deck in empty_kept_decks]
        await session.execute(
          delete(PdfDeck).where(PdfDeck.id.in_(empty_deck_ids))
        )
        for deck in empty_kept_decks:
          try:
            await vector_store.delete_by_document_id(
              table_name=_VECTOR_STORE_TABLE_NAME,
              document_id=str(deck.document_id),
            )
          except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.warning(
              "pdf_anki_prune_vector_delete_failed",
              document_id=str(deck.document_id),
              error=str(exc),
            )
    user_result = await session.execute(
      select(PdfAnkiUser).where(PdfAnkiUser.id == user_id)
    )
    user_rows = list(user_result.scalars().all())
    user = user_rows[0] if user_rows else None
    if user is not None:
      user.tier = _pale.encrypt_field("free")  # type: ignore[assignment]
  logger.info("pdf_anki_prune_completed")
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/router_heuristics.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import re
_CARD_KEY_PATTERN: str = r"^(?P<prefix>.+?)-f-(?P<idx>\d+)$"
_CARD_KEY_REGEX = re.compile(_CARD_KEY_PATTERN)
_CARD_KEY_PREFIX_GROUP: str = "prefix"
_CARD_KEY_IDX_GROUP: str = "idx"
_PDF_STATUS_ERROR_PREFIXES: tuple[str, ...] = (
  "PDF_ANKI_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE",
  "PDF_ANKI_WALLET_PORT_REQUIRED",
)
_TIER_PRO: str = "pro"
_TIER_ADMIN: str = "admin"
_TIER_PREMIUM: str = "premium"
_TIER_PAYG: str = "payg"
_PAGE_LIMIT_PAYG: int = 50_000
_PAGE_LIMIT_PRO_ADMIN: int = 2000
_PAGE_LIMIT_PREMIUM: int = 1000
_PAGE_LIMIT_DEFAULT: int = 50
_MIN_INDEX: int = 0
```
