def _uses_unified_pdf_pipeline(
  user_tier: str,
  *,
  pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked: bool = False,
) -> bool:
  tier = _normalize_user_tier(user_tier)
  if not isinstance(pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked, bool):
    raise TypeError(
      "pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked must be bool, "
      f"got {type(pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked)}"
    )
  if pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked:
    return True
  return tier in (_TIER_PREMIUM, _TIER_PRO)
def _effective_tier_for_pdf_anki_job_caps(
  user_tier: str,
  *,
  pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked: bool,
) -> str:
  tier = _normalize_user_tier(user_tier)
  if not isinstance(pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked, bool):
    raise TypeError(
      "pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked must be bool, "
      f"got {type(pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked)}"
    )
  if pdf_anki_balance_payg_unlocked and tier in (_TIER_FREE, _TIER_ADMIN):
    return _WALLET_TIER
  return user_tier
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/unified_pdf_heuristics.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from typing import Literal
_TIER_PREMIUM: str = "premium"
_TIER_PRO: str = "pro"
_FEEDBACK_EXAMPLE_HEADER_POSITIVE: str = "Format your answers like this:"
_FEEDBACK_EXAMPLE_HEADER_NEGATIVE: str = "DO NOT generate cards like this:"
_FEEDBACK_EXAMPLE_LINE_SEPARATOR: str = "\n"
_FEEDBACK_EXAMPLE_SECTION_SEPARATOR: str = "\n\n"
_BASE64_DIVISOR: int = 3
_BASE64_TOKENS_ESTIMATE_MAX: int = 600_000
_DEFAULT_MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMIT: int = 128_000
_FEEDBACK_FEW_SHOT_MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS: int = 12_000
_FEEDBACK_FEW_SHOT_MIN_CONTEXT_CHARS: int = 200
_FEEDBACK_LOOKBACK_LIMIT: int = 10
_BASE64_CHAR_ESTIMATE_DIVISOR: int = 3
_TOKEN_TO_CHAR_RATIO: int = 4
_EMPTY_STRING: str = ""
_PIPELINE_UNIFIED: Literal["unified"] = "unified"
_TEMPERATURE_UNIFIED: float = 0.2
_VERTEX_PREFIX: str = "gemini/"
def select_model_for_unified_tier(
  tier: str,
  premium_model: str,
  pro_model: str,
) -> str:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  tier_normalized = tier.strip()
  if len(tier_normalized) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  if not isinstance(premium_model, str):
    raise TypeError(f"premium_model must be str, got {type(premium_model)}")
  if len(premium_model) == 0:
    raise ValueError("premium_model cannot be empty")
  if not isinstance(pro_model, str):
    raise TypeError(f"pro_model must be str, got {type(pro_model)}")
  if len(pro_model) == 0:
    raise ValueError("pro_model cannot be empty")
  tier_lower: str = tier_normalized.lower()
  if tier_lower == _TIER_PREMIUM:
    return premium_model
  if tier_lower == _TIER_PRO:
    return pro_model
  raise ValueError(f"Unified model is not defined for tier: {tier!r}")
def is_vertex_model(model_id: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(model_id, str):
    raise TypeError(f"model_id must be str, got {type(model_id)}")
  if len(model_id) == 0:
    raise ValueError("model_id cannot be empty")
  model_lower: str = model_id.lower()
  return model_lower.startswith(_VERTEX_PREFIX)
def estimate_base64_tokens(data_bytes: bytes) -> int:
  if not isinstance(data_bytes, bytes):
    raise TypeError(f"data_bytes must be bytes, got {type(data_bytes)}")
  byte_count: int = len(data_bytes)
  estimated_chars: int = (byte_count * 4) // _BASE64_DIVISOR
  estimated_tokens: int = estimated_chars // _TOKEN_TO_CHAR_RATIO
  if estimated_tokens > _BASE64_TOKENS_ESTIMATE_MAX:
    raise ValueError(
      f"estimated tokens ({estimated_tokens}) exceed max "
      f"({_BASE64_TOKENS_ESTIMATE_MAX})"
    )
  return estimated_tokens
def validate_context_window(
  used_chars: int,
  model_limit: int,
) -> bool:
  if used_chars < 0:
    raise ValueError(f"used_chars must be non-negative, got {used_chars}")
  if model_limit < 0:
    raise ValueError(f"model_limit must be non-negative, got {model_limit}")
  return used_chars <= model_limit
def should_include_feedback_examples(
  feedback_context_chars: int,
) -> bool:
  if feedback_context_chars < 0:
    raise ValueError(
      f"feedback_context_chars must be non-negative, got {feedback_context_chars}"
    )
  return feedback_context_chars >= _FEEDBACK_FEW_SHOT_MIN_CONTEXT_CHARS
def clamp_feedback_context(
  requested_chars: int,
) -> int:
  if requested_chars < 0:
    raise ValueError(f"requested_chars must be non-negative, got {requested_chars}")
  min_clamped: int = max(requested_chars, _FEEDBACK_FEW_SHOT_MIN_CONTEXT_CHARS)
  return min(min_clamped, _FEEDBACK_FEW_SHOT_MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS)
def calculate_temperature_for_tier(tier: str) -> float:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  tier_normalized = tier.strip()
  if len(tier_normalized) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  tier_lower: str = tier_normalized.lower()
  if tier_lower in (_TIER_PREMIUM, _TIER_PRO):
    return _TEMPERATURE_UNIFIED
  raise ValueError(f"Temperature not defined for tier: {tier!r}")
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/deck_export_heuristics.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import re
from typing import Any
_LANG_SPANISH_PREFIX: str = "es"
_LANG_DEFAULT: str = "en"
_HEADER_FRONT_EN: str = "Front"
_HEADER_BACK_EN: str = "Back"
_HEADER_TAGS_EN: str = "Tags"
_HEADER_FRONT_ES: str = "Anverso"
_HEADER_BACK_ES: str = "Reverso"
_HEADER_TAGS_ES: str = "Etiquetas"
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_PATTERN: str = r"[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+"
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_REPLACEMENT: str = "_"
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_MAX_LEN: int = 72
_DEFAULT_FILENAME: str = "deck"
_EMPTY_STRING: str = ""
def localized_export_headers(lang: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
  if not isinstance(lang, str):
    raise TypeError(f"lang must be str, got {type(lang)}")
  key: str = (lang or _LANG_DEFAULT).strip().lower()
  if key.startswith(_LANG_SPANISH_PREFIX):
    return (
      _HEADER_FRONT_ES,
      _HEADER_BACK_ES,
      _HEADER_TAGS_ES,
    )
  return (_HEADER_FRONT_EN, _HEADER_BACK_EN, _HEADER_TAGS_EN)
def collect_sorted_tags(cards: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[str]:
  if not isinstance(cards, list):
    raise TypeError(f"cards must be list, got {type(cards)}")
  seen: set[str] = set()
  for c in cards:
    if not isinstance(c, dict):
      continue
    raw = c.get("tags")
    if not isinstance(raw, list):
      continue
    for t in raw:
      s: str = str(t).strip()
      if s:
        seen.add(s)
  return sorted(seen)
def safe_filename_base(title: str) -> str:
  if not isinstance(title, str):
    raise TypeError(f"title must be str, got {type(title)}")
  stripped: str = title.strip()
  s: str = re.sub(_UNSAFE_FILENAME_PATTERN, _UNSAFE_FILENAME_REPLACEMENT, stripped)[
    :_UNSAFE_FILENAME_MAX_LEN
  ]
  return s or _DEFAULT_FILENAME
def has_any_tag(card: dict[str, Any] | None) -> bool:
  if card is None:
    return False
  if not isinstance(card, dict):
    raise TypeError(f"card must be dict or None, got {type(card)}")
  raw = card.get("tags")
  return isinstance(raw, list) and len(raw) > 0
def extract_card_tags(card: dict[str, Any]) -> list[str]:
  if not isinstance(card, dict):
    raise TypeError(f"card must be dict, got {type(card)}")
  raw = card.get("tags", [])
  if not isinstance(raw, list):
    return []
  return [str(x).strip() for x in raw if str(x).strip()]
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/token_optimizer.py`
```py
import re
_PAGE_OF_RE = re.compile(
  r"\b(?:page\s+\d+\s+of\s+\d+|\d+\s*/\s*\d+)\b",
  re.IGNORECASE,
)
_LEADING_PAGE_NUM_RE = re.compile(r"^\s*\d+\s*$", re.MULTILINE)
_TRAILING_PAGE_NUM_RE = re.compile(r"\s*\d+\s*$", re.MULTILINE)
_WHITESPACE_RUNS = re.compile(r"[ \t]+")
_DEFAULT_MAX_LINE_LEN = 80
_MIN_DIGIT_LEN = 1
_TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE = 4
_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS = 1
def strip_headers_footers(
  text: str | None,
  max_line_len: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_LINE_LEN,
) -> str:
  if text is not None and not isinstance(text, str):
    raise TypeError(f"text must be str or None, got {type(text)}")
  if not isinstance(max_line_len, int):
    raise TypeError(f"max_line_len must be int, got {type(max_line_len)}")
  if max_line_len <= 0:
    raise ValueError(f"max_line_len must be positive, got {max_line_len}")
  if not text or not text.strip():
    return ""
  out = text
  out = _PAGE_OF_RE.sub("", out)
  out = _LEADING_PAGE_NUM_RE.sub("", out)
  out = _TRAILING_PAGE_NUM_RE.sub("", out)
  lines = out.split("\n")
  cleaned = [
    line
    for line in lines
    if not (line.strip().isdigit() and len(line.strip()) <= max_line_len)
  ]
  out = "\n".join(cleaned)
  out = _WHITESPACE_RUNS.sub(" ", out)
  return out.strip()
def estimate_tokens(text: str | None) -> int:
  if text is None:
    return 0
  if not isinstance(text, str):
    raise TypeError(f"text must be str or None, got {type(text)}")
  if not text:
    return 0
  estimated = len(text) // _TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE
  return max(_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS, estimated)
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/unified_pdf_pure.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import base64
import json
from collections.abc import Mapping
from typing import Any
_TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE = 4
_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS = 1
def _normalize_json_array_text(raw: str) -> str:
  text = raw.strip()
  if "```" in text:
    segments = text.split("```")
    for idx in range(1, len(segments), 2):
      inner = segments[idx].strip()
      if inner.lstrip().startswith("json"):
        inner = inner.lstrip()[4:].lstrip()
      if inner.startswith("["):
        return inner
    if text.startswith("```"):
      parts = text.split("```")
      if len(parts) >= 2:
        text = parts[1].strip()
        if text.lstrip().startswith("json"):
          text = text.lstrip()[4:].lstrip()
  first_bracket = text.find("[")
  if first_bracket >= 0:
    return text[first_bracket:]
  return text
def estimate_tokens(text: str) -> int:
  if not text:
    return 0
  estimated = len(text) // _TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE
  return max(_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS, estimated)
def split_front_back(raw: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
  raw = (raw or "").strip()
  if not raw:
    return "", ""
  if "\n" in raw:
    parts = raw.split("\n", 1)
    front, back = parts
    return front.strip(), back.strip()
  return raw, ""
def _normalize_flashcard_item(item: Mapping[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
  tags = item.get("tags", [])
  return {
    "front": str(item.get("front", "")),
    "back": str(item.get("back", "")),
    "tags": list(tags) if tags else [],
  }
def recover_partial_flashcard_json(raw: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  text = _normalize_json_array_text(raw)
  if not text.startswith("["):
    return []
  decoder = json.JSONDecoder()
  out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  pos = 1
  end = len(text)
  while pos < end:
    char = text[pos]
    if char in " \t\r\n,":
      pos += 1
      continue
    if char == "]":
      break
    try:
      item, next_pos = decoder.raw_decode(text, pos)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
      next_object = text.find("{", pos + 1)
      if next_object == -1:
        break
      pos = next_object
      continue
    if isinstance(item, Mapping):
      out.append(_normalize_flashcard_item(item))
    pos = next_pos
  return out
def recover_partial_string_array_json(raw: str) -> list[str]:
  text = _normalize_json_array_text(raw)
  if not text:
    return []
  try:
    data = json.loads(text)
  except (json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError, TypeError):
    data = None
  out: list[str] = []
  seen: set[str] = set()
  if isinstance(data, list):
    for item in data:
      if not isinstance(item, str):
        continue
      value = item.strip()
      if not value or value in seen:
        continue
      seen.add(value)
      out.append(value)
    if out:
      return out
  decoder = json.JSONDecoder()
  pos = text.find('"')
  while pos >= 0:
    try:
      item, next_pos = decoder.raw_decode(text, pos)
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
      break
    if isinstance(item, str):
      value = item.strip()
      if value and value not in seen:
        seen.add(value)
        out.append(value)
    pos = text.find('"', next_pos)
  return out
def parse_flashcard_json(raw: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  text = _normalize_json_array_text(raw)
  data = json.loads(text)
  if not isinstance(data, list):
    return []
  out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  for c in data:
    if not isinstance(c, Mapping):
      continue
    out.append(_normalize_flashcard_item(c))
  return out
def build_pdf_user_message_dict(
  *,
  pdf_bytes: bytes,
  filename: str,
  instruction: str = "Produce flashcards as specified in the system message.",
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  b64 = base64.standard_b64encode(pdf_bytes).decode("ascii")
  safe_name = filename or "document.pdf"
  prompt_instruction = (
    instruction.strip()
    if isinstance(instruction, str) and instruction.strip()
    else "Produce flashcards as specified in the system message."
  )
  data_uri = f"data:application/pdf;base64,{b64}"
  return {
    "role": "user",
    "content": [
      {
        "type": "text",
        "text": f"PDF file name: {safe_name}. {prompt_instruction}",
      },
      {
        "type": "file",
        "file": {
          "file_data": data_uri,
          "filename": safe_name,
        },
      },
    ],
  }
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/deck_export.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import csv
import io
import tempfile
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any, Literal, cast
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.deck_export_heuristics import (
  collect_sorted_tags as _collect_sorted_tags_impl,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.deck_export_heuristics import (
  localized_export_headers as _localized_export_headers_impl,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.deck_export_heuristics import (
  safe_filename_base as _safe_filename_base_impl,
)
ExportFormat = Literal["csv", "txt", "apkg", "xlsx"]
XLSX_MIME = "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
_FORMAT_CSV = "csv"
_FORMAT_TXT = "txt"
_FORMAT_XLSX = "xlsx"
_FORMAT_APKG = "apkg"
_MEDIA_TYPE_CSV = "text/csv; charset=utf-8"
_MEDIA_TYPE_TXT = "text/plain; charset=utf-8"
_MEDIA_TYPE_APKG = "application/octet-stream"
_DEFAULT_DECK_NAME = "Deck"
_ENCODING_UTF8 = "utf-8"
_ENCODING_UTF8_SIG = "utf-8-sig"
_TAGS_SEPARATOR = "; "
_EMPTY_STRING = ""
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_PATTERN = r"[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]+"
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_REPLACEMENT = "_"
_UNSAFE_FILENAME_MAX_LEN = 72
_DEFAULT_FILENAME = "deck"
_APKG_MODEL_ID = 1_607_392_319
_APKG_DECK_ID = 2_059_400_110
_APKG_MODEL_NAME = "PDF-AnKi Export"
_APKG_CARD_NAME = "Card 1"
_APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_PREFIX = "{{"
_APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_SUFFIX = "}}"
_APKG_TEMPLATE_AFMT_HR = '<hr id="answer">'
_APKG_TEMPLATE_CSS = ".card { font-family: sans-serif; }"
_APKG_FILENAME = "deck.apkg"
_XLSX_WORKSHEET_NAME = "Deck"
def _require_string(value: object, *, field: str) -> str:
  if not isinstance(value, str):
    raise TypeError(f"{field} must be str, got {type(value)}")
  return value
def _require_cards(value: object, *, field: str = "cards") -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  if not isinstance(value, list):
    raise TypeError(f"{field} must be list, got {type(value)}")
  for card in value:
    if not isinstance(card, dict):
      raise TypeError(f"card must be dict, got {type(card)}")
  return cast(list[dict[str, Any]], value)
def _require_string_list(value: object, *, field: str) -> list[str]:
  if not isinstance(value, list):
    raise TypeError(f"{field} must be list[str], got {type(value)}")
  for item in value:
    if not isinstance(item, str):
      raise TypeError(f"{field} entries must be str, got {type(item)}")
  return cast(list[str], value)
def _localized_headers_checked(lang: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
  headers = localized_export_headers(lang)
  if not all(headers):
    raise ValueError("localized export headers must not be empty")
  return headers
def _joined_tags(card: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
  tags_raw = card.get("tags", [])
  if not isinstance(tags_raw, list):
    return _EMPTY_STRING
  return _TAGS_SEPARATOR.join(str(t) for t in tags_raw)
def localized_export_headers(lang: str) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
  return _localized_export_headers_impl(lang)
def collect_sorted_tags(cards: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> list[str]:
  return _collect_sorted_tags_impl(cards)
def filter_cards_by_tags_all(
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  required: list[str],
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_required = _require_string_list(required, field="required")
  req = [t.strip().lower() for t in safe_required if t.strip()]
  if not req:
    return list(safe_cards)
  out: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  for c in safe_cards:
    raw = c.get("tags", [])
    tags_l = [str(x).strip().lower() for x in raw] if isinstance(raw, list) else []
    if all(rt in tags_l for rt in req):
      out.append(c)
  return out
def _safe_filename_base(title: str) -> str:
  return _safe_filename_base_impl(title)
def build_csv_bytes(
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  *,
  lang: str,
) -> bytes:
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_lang = _require_string(lang, field="lang")
  hf, hb, ht = _localized_headers_checked(safe_lang)
  buf = io.StringIO()
  writer = csv.writer(buf)
  writer.writerow([hf, hb, ht])
  for c in safe_cards:
    tags_joined = _joined_tags(c)
    writer.writerow(
      [
        str(c.get("front", _EMPTY_STRING)),
        str(c.get("back", _EMPTY_STRING)),
        tags_joined,
      ]
    )
  return buf.getvalue().encode(_ENCODING_UTF8_SIG)
def build_txt_bytes(
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  *,
  lang: str,
) -> bytes:
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_lang = _require_string(lang, field="lang")
  hf, hb, ht = _localized_headers_checked(safe_lang)
  blocks: list[str] = []
  for c in safe_cards:
    tags_joined = _joined_tags(c)
    blocks.append(f"{hf}: {c.get('front', _EMPTY_STRING)}")
    blocks.append(f"{hb}: {c.get('back', _EMPTY_STRING)}")
    blocks.append(f"{ht}: {tags_joined}")
    blocks.append(_EMPTY_STRING)
  return "\n".join(blocks).encode(_ENCODING_UTF8)
def build_apkg_bytes(
  deck_title: str,
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  *,
  lang: str,
) -> bytes:
  import genanki
  safe_title = _require_string(deck_title, field="deck_title")
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_lang = _require_string(lang, field="lang")
  hf, hb, _ht = _localized_headers_checked(safe_lang)
  afmt = (
    _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_PREFIX
    + "FrontSide"
    + _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_SUFFIX
    + _APKG_TEMPLATE_AFMT_HR
    + _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_PREFIX
    + hb
    + _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_SUFFIX
  )
  model = genanki.Model(
    _APKG_MODEL_ID,
    _APKG_MODEL_NAME,
    fields=[{"name": hf}, {"name": hb}],
    templates=[
      {
        "name": _APKG_CARD_NAME,
        "qfmt": _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_PREFIX + hf + _APKG_TEMPLATE_QFMT_SUFFIX,
        "afmt": afmt,
      },
    ],
    css=_APKG_TEMPLATE_CSS,
  )
  deck = genanki.Deck(_APKG_DECK_ID, safe_title or _DEFAULT_DECK_NAME)
  for c in safe_cards:
    deck.add_note(
      genanki.Note(
        model=model,
        fields=[
          str(c.get("front", _EMPTY_STRING)),
          str(c.get("back", _EMPTY_STRING)),
        ],
      )
    )
  pkg = genanki.Package(deck)
  with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
    path = Path(td) / _APKG_FILENAME
    pkg.write_to_file(str(path))
    return path.read_bytes()
def build_xlsx_bytes(
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  *,
  lang: str,
) -> bytes:
  from openpyxl import Workbook  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_lang = _require_string(lang, field="lang")
  hf, hb, ht = _localized_headers_checked(safe_lang)
  wb = Workbook()
  ws = wb.active
  if ws is None:
    raise RuntimeError("worksheet must not be None")
  ws.title = _XLSX_WORKSHEET_NAME
  ws.append([hf, hb, ht])
  for c in safe_cards:
    tags_joined = _joined_tags(c)
    ws.append(
      [
        str(c.get("front", _EMPTY_STRING)),
        str(c.get("back", _EMPTY_STRING)),
        tags_joined,
      ]
    )
  buf = io.BytesIO()
  wb.save(buf)
  return buf.getvalue()
def export_deck_blob(
  deck_title: str,
  cards: list[dict[str, Any]],
  *,
  fmt: ExportFormat,
  lang: str,
) -> tuple[bytes, str, str]:
  safe_title = _require_string(deck_title, field="deck_title")
  safe_cards = _require_cards(cards)
  safe_fmt = _require_string(fmt, field="fmt")
  safe_lang = _require_string(lang, field="lang")
  base = _safe_filename_base(safe_title)
  if not base:
    raise ValueError("base filename must not be empty")
  if safe_fmt == _FORMAT_CSV:
    body = build_csv_bytes(safe_cards, lang=safe_lang)
    filename = f"{base}.csv"
    return body, _MEDIA_TYPE_CSV, filename
  if safe_fmt == _FORMAT_TXT:
    body = build_txt_bytes(safe_cards, lang=safe_lang)
    filename = f"{base}.txt"
    return body, _MEDIA_TYPE_TXT, filename
  if safe_fmt == _FORMAT_XLSX:
    body = build_xlsx_bytes(safe_cards, lang=safe_lang)
    filename = f"{base}.xlsx"
    return body, XLSX_MIME, filename
  body = build_apkg_bytes(safe_title, safe_cards, lang=safe_lang)
  filename = f"{base}.apkg"
  return body, _MEDIA_TYPE_APKG, filename
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/pdf_process_heuristics.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
_TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE: int = 4
_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS: int = 1
_CREDIT_COST_LOW_THRESHOLD: int = 500
_CREDIT_COST_HIGH_THRESHOLD: int = 1500
_CREDIT_COST_LOW: int = 1
_CREDIT_COST_MID: int = 2
_CREDIT_COST_HIGH: int = 3
def estimate_tokens_from_text(text: str) -> int:
  if not isinstance(text, str):
    raise TypeError(f"text must be str, got {type(text)}")
  if len(text) == 0:
    return 0
  estimated: int = len(text) // _TOKENS_PER_CHUNK_SIZE
  result: int = max(_MIN_ESTIMATED_TOKENS, estimated)
  if not isinstance(result, int):
    raise TypeError(f"result must be int, got {type(result)}")
  if result < 0:
    raise ValueError(f"result must be non-negative, got {result}")
  return result
def calculate_chunk_credit_cost(token_count: int) -> int:
  if not isinstance(token_count, int):
    raise TypeError(f"token_count must be int, got {type(token_count)}")
  if token_count < 0:
    raise ValueError(f"token_count must be non-negative, got {token_count}")
  if token_count <= _CREDIT_COST_LOW_THRESHOLD:
    cost: int = _CREDIT_COST_LOW
    if not isinstance(cost, int):
      raise TypeError(f"cost must be int, got {type(cost)}")
    return cost
  if token_count > _CREDIT_COST_HIGH_THRESHOLD:
    cost = _CREDIT_COST_HIGH
    if not isinstance(cost, int):
      raise TypeError(f"cost must be int, got {type(cost)}")
    return cost
  cost = _CREDIT_COST_MID
  if not isinstance(cost, int):
    raise TypeError(f"cost must be int, got {type(cost)}")
  return cost
def split_front_back_card(text: str) -> tuple[str, str]:
  if not isinstance(text, str):
    raise TypeError(f"text must be str, got {type(text)}")
  normalized: str = (text or "").strip()
  if len(normalized) == 0:
    return "", ""
  if "\n" not in normalized:
    return normalized, ""
  parts: list[str] = normalized.split("\n", 1)
  if len(parts) != 2:
    raise ValueError(f"split should return 2 parts, got {len(parts)}")
  front: str = parts[0].strip()
  back: str = parts[1].strip()
  if not isinstance(front, str) or not isinstance(back, str):
    raise TypeError(f"split parts must be str, got ({type(front)}, {type(back)})")
  return front, back
def validate_tier(user_tier: str) -> str:
  if user_tier is None:
    raise ValueError("user_tier cannot be None")
  if not isinstance(user_tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"user_tier must be str, got {type(user_tier)}")
  normalized: str = user_tier.lower().strip()
  if len(normalized) == 0:
    raise ValueError(
      f"user_tier must not be empty after normalization, got: {user_tier!r}"
    )
  return normalized
def is_free_tier(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  return tier in ("free", "admin")
def is_premium_tier(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  return tier == "premium"
def is_pro_tier(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  return tier == "pro"
def compute_similarity_score(
  similarity: float,
  threshold: float,
) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(similarity, (int, float)):
    raise TypeError(f"similarity must be float, got {type(similarity)}")
  if not isinstance(threshold, (int, float)):
    raise TypeError(f"threshold must be float, got {type(threshold)}")
  return similarity >= threshold
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/pdf_prune_selection.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from collections.abc import Sequence
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.entities import PdfDeck
def decks_to_delete_after_keep(  # pragma: no mutate
  decks_ordered_newest_first: Sequence[PdfDeck],  # pragma: no mutate
  max_decks_to_keep: int,  # pragma: no mutate
) -> list[PdfDeck]:  # pragma: no mutate
  if len(decks_ordered_newest_first) <= max_decks_to_keep:  # pragma: no mutate
    return []  # pragma: no mutate
  return list(decks_ordered_newest_first[max_decks_to_keep:])  # pragma: no mutate
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/chunking.py`
```py
import re
from dataclasses import dataclass
_DEFAULT_MAX_CHARS = 1500
_HEADER_MARKER = "#"
_HEADER_EXCLUDE_PATTERN = "# "
_NEWLINE = "\n"
_PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR = r"\n\s*\n"
_PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR_STR = "\n\n"
_PERIOD_MARKER = ". "
_SPACE = " "
_PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR_LEN = 2
_CHUNK_INDEX_START = 0
_CUTOFF_THRESHOLD_DIVISOR = 2
@dataclass
class TextChunk:
  text: str
  index_in_doc: int
def semantic_chunk(  # pragma: no mutate
  markdown: str | None, max_chars: int = _DEFAULT_MAX_CHARS
) -> list[TextChunk]:
  if not isinstance(markdown, str):
    return []
  assert isinstance(max_chars, int)
  assert max_chars > 0
  if not markdown or not markdown.strip():
    return []
  parts: list[str] = []
  current: list[str] = []
  lines = markdown.split(_NEWLINE)
  assert isinstance(lines, list)
  for line in lines:
    assert isinstance(line, str)
    stripped = line.strip()
    is_header = stripped.startswith(_HEADER_MARKER) and not stripped.startswith(
      _HEADER_EXCLUDE_PATTERN
    )
    if is_header and current:
      parts.append(_NEWLINE.join(current))
      current = [line]
    else:
      current.append(line)
  if current:
    parts.append(_NEWLINE.join(current))
  chunks: list[TextChunk] = []
  idx = _CHUNK_INDEX_START
  for part in parts:
    assert isinstance(part, str)
    part = part.strip()
    if not part:
      continue
    if len(part) <= max_chars:
      assert len(part) > 0
      chunks.append(TextChunk(text=part, index_in_doc=idx))
      idx += 1
    else:
      sub_parts = re.split(_PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR, part)
      assert isinstance(sub_parts, list)
      current_chunk_text = ""
      for sub in sub_parts:
        assert isinstance(sub, str)
        sub = sub.strip()
        if not sub:
          continue
        if (
          current_chunk_text
          and len(current_chunk_text) + _PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR_LEN + len(sub)
          > max_chars
        ):
          assert len(current_chunk_text) > 0
          chunks.append(
            TextChunk(text=current_chunk_text.strip(), index_in_doc=idx)
          )
          idx += 1
          current_chunk_text = ""
        if len(sub) > max_chars:
          if current_chunk_text:
            assert len(current_chunk_text) > 0
            chunks.append(
              TextChunk(text=current_chunk_text.strip(), index_in_doc=idx)
            )
            idx += 1
            current_chunk_text = ""
          remaining = sub
          assert len(remaining) > max_chars
          while remaining:
            assert isinstance(remaining, str)
            if len(remaining) <= max_chars:
              current_chunk_text = remaining
              break
            cut = remaining[:max_chars]
            assert len(cut) == max_chars
            last_period = cut.rfind(_PERIOD_MARKER)
            cutoff_threshold = max_chars // _CUTOFF_THRESHOLD_DIVISOR
            if last_period > cutoff_threshold:
              cut = cut[: last_period + 1]
            else:
              cut = remaining[:max_chars]
            assert len(cut) > 0
            chunks.append(TextChunk(text=cut.strip(), index_in_doc=idx))
            idx += 1
            remaining = remaining[len(cut) :].strip()
        else:
          if current_chunk_text:
            current_chunk_text += _PARAGRAPH_SEPARATOR_STR + sub
          else:
            current_chunk_text = sub
      if current_chunk_text:
        assert len(current_chunk_text) > 0
        chunks.append(
          TextChunk(text=current_chunk_text.strip(), index_in_doc=idx)
        )
        idx += 1
  assert isinstance(chunks, list)
  return chunks
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/pdf_wallet_finops.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from decimal import Decimal
import structlog
from app.core.pricing_registry import get_model_pricing
from app.infrastructure.cost_calculator import LiteLLMCostCalculator
logger = structlog.get_logger()
def estimate_provider_cost_usd(
  model: str,
  *,
  prompt_tokens: int,
  completion_tokens: int,
) -> Decimal:
  pricing = get_model_pricing(model)
  if pricing is None:
    calc = LiteLLMCostCalculator()
    out = Decimal(str(calc.calculate_cost(model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens)))
    logger.info(
      "pdf_anki_provider_cost_estimate",
      model=model,
      pricing_source="litellm_cost_calculator",
      prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
      completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
      estimated_provider_cost_usd=str(out),
    )
    return out
  input_cost = (
    Decimal(prompt_tokens) / Decimal("1000000")
  ) * pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens
  output_cost = (
    Decimal(completion_tokens) / Decimal("1000000")
  ) * pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens
  out = input_cost + output_cost
  logger.info(
    "pdf_anki_provider_cost_estimate",
    model=model,
    pricing_source="pricing_registry_per_1m_tokens",
    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
    completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
    input_price_per_m_tokens=str(pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens),
    output_price_per_m_tokens=str(pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens),
    estimated_provider_cost_usd=str(out),
  )
  return out
def provider_cost_from_llm_response(
  *,
  model_used: str,
  prompt_tokens: int,
  completion_tokens: int,
  cost_usd: float,
) -> Decimal:
  if cost_usd > 0:
    return Decimal(str(cost_usd))
  return estimate_provider_cost_usd(
    model_used,
    prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
    completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/pdf_deck_cache.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import base64
import binascii
import hashlib
import json
from typing import Any
from cryptography.fernet import InvalidToken
from app.infrastructure.encryption import decrypt_bytes
def pdf_deck_redis_key(file_hash: str) -> str:  # pragma: no mutate
  import app.core.runtime_tunable_config as runtime_tunable_config
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()  # pragma: no mutate
  sig_parts = (  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_semantic_chunk_max_chars),  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_max_cards_per_chunk),  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_legacy_max_flashcards_free),  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_legacy_max_flashcards_admin_pro),  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_legacy_max_flashcards_premium),  # pragma: no mutate
    str(snap.pdf_anki_legacy_max_flashcards_payg),  # pragma: no mutate
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  sig = hashlib.sha256(":".join(sig_parts).encode()).hexdigest()[
    :12
  ]  # pragma: no mutate
  return f"pdf:deck:{file_hash}:{sig}"  # pragma: no mutate
def decode_pdf_deck_redis_value(
  cached: Any,
) -> list[dict[str, Any]] | None:  # pragma: no mutate
  if cached is None:  # pragma: no mutate
    return None  # pragma: no mutate
  if isinstance(cached, list):  # pragma: no mutate
    if not cached:  # pragma: no mutate
      return []  # pragma: no mutate
    if all(isinstance(x, dict) for x in cached):  # pragma: no mutate
      return cached  # pragma: no mutate
    return None  # pragma: no mutate
  if isinstance(cached, str):  # pragma: no mutate
    stripped = cached.strip()  # pragma: no mutate
    if stripped.startswith("["):  # pragma: no mutate
      try:  # pragma: no mutate
        data = json.loads(stripped)  # pragma: no mutate
      except json.JSONDecodeError:  # pragma: no mutate
        data = None  # pragma: no mutate
      if isinstance(data, list) and all(
        isinstance(x, dict) for x in data
      ):  # pragma: no mutate
        return data  # pragma: no mutate
    try:  # pragma: no mutate
      encrypted = base64.b64decode(cached.encode("ascii"))  # pragma: no mutate
      plaintext = decrypt_bytes(encrypted)  # pragma: no mutate
      data = json.loads(plaintext.decode("utf-8"))  # pragma: no mutate
    except (  # pragma: no mutate
      ValueError,  # pragma: no mutate
      TypeError,  # pragma: no mutate
      json.JSONDecodeError,  # pragma: no mutate
      UnicodeDecodeError,  # pragma: no mutate
      binascii.Error,  # pragma: no mutate
      InvalidToken,  # pragma: no mutate
    ):  # pragma: no mutate
      return None  # pragma: no mutate
    if isinstance(data, list) and all(
      isinstance(x, dict) for x in data
    ):  # pragma: no mutate
      return data  # pragma: no mutate
    return None  # pragma: no mutate
  return None  # pragma: no mutate
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/application/router_pure.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from fastapi import HTTPException
from app.config import settings
from app.modules.pdf_anki.application.router_heuristics import (
  monthly_pdf_page_limit,
  parse_card_key_index,
  parse_optional_unified_pdf_model_id,
  pdf_status_error_code,
)
_INVALID_CARD_KEY_STATUS_CODE = 400
_INVALID_CARD_KEY_MESSAGE = "Invalid card_key format."
_INVALID_MODEL_STATUS_CODE = 400
_INVALID_MODEL_MESSAGE = (
  "pdf_anki_unified_model_id must be a selectable unified model "
  "(see GET /auth/me: pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_options)."
)
def _parse_card_key_index(card_key: str) -> tuple[str, int]:
  try:
    return parse_card_key_index(card_key)
  except ValueError as err:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=_INVALID_CARD_KEY_STATUS_CODE,
      detail=_INVALID_CARD_KEY_MESSAGE,
    ) from err
def _pdf_status_error_code(message: str | None) -> str | None:
  return pdf_status_error_code(message)
def _parse_optional_unified_pdf_model_id(raw: str | None) -> str | None:
  choice = parse_optional_unified_pdf_model_id(raw)
  if choice is None:
    return None
  allowed = frozenset(settings.PDF_ANKI_PAYG_SELECTABLE_UNIFIED_MODELS)
  assert isinstance(allowed, frozenset)
  if choice not in allowed:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=_INVALID_MODEL_STATUS_CODE,
      detail=_INVALID_MODEL_MESSAGE,
    )
  return choice
def _monthly_pdf_page_limit(tier: str) -> int:
  return monthly_pdf_page_limit(tier)
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/entities.py`
```py
from enum import StrEnum
import uuid
from sqlalchemy import Column, DateTime, Enum, String, Text, func
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID as PGUUID
from app.domain.base import Base
def _uuid_str() -> str:
  return str(uuid.uuid4())
class DocumentState(StrEnum):
  PENDING = "pending"
  PROCESSING = "processing"
  COMPLETED = "completed"
  COMPLETED_PARTIAL = "completed_partial"
  FAILED = "failed"
def _document_state_db_values(enum_cls: type[DocumentState]) -> list[str]:
  return [member.value for member in enum_cls]
class DocumentMetadata(Base):
  __tablename__ = "pdf_anki_documents"
  id = Column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=_uuid_str)
  file_hash = Column(String(64), unique=True, index=True, nullable=False)
  state: DocumentState = Column(  # type: ignore[assignment]
    Enum(
      DocumentState,
      name="documentstate",
      values_callable=_document_state_db_values,
      create_type=False,
    ),
    default=DocumentState.PENDING,
    nullable=False,
  )
  error_message = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  resolved_model_id = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  created_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now())
  updated_at = Column(
    DateTime(timezone=True),
    server_default=func.now(),
    onupdate=func.now(),
  )
class PdfAnkiUser(Base):
  __tablename__ = "pdf_anki_users"
  id = Column(String(256), primary_key=True)
  email = Column(Text, nullable=True, index=True)
  display_name = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  avatar_url = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  tier = Column(Text, nullable=True, default="free")
  stripe_customer_id = Column(Text, nullable=True, index=True)
  stripe_subscription_id = Column(Text, nullable=True, index=True)
  subscription_status = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  current_period_start = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  current_period_end = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  balance_usd = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  payg = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  active_unified_pdf_model = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  monthly_pages_count = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  monthly_pages_window = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  created_at = Column(Text, nullable=True)
  updated_at = Column(Text, nullable=True)
def _uuid_default_pg() -> uuid.UUID:
  return uuid.uuid4()
class PdfDeckStatus(StrEnum):
  COMPLETED = "completed"
  COMPLETED_PARTIAL = "completed_partial"
class PdfDeck(Base):
  __tablename__ = "pdf_decks"
  id = Column(
    PGUUID(as_uuid=True),
    primary_key=True,
    default=_uuid_default_pg,
  )
  user_id = Column(String(256), nullable=False, index=True)
  document_id = Column(String(36), nullable=False, index=True)
  file_hash = Column(String(64), nullable=False, index=True)
  title_encrypted = Column(Text, nullable=False)
  status: PdfDeckStatus = Column(  # type: ignore[assignment]
    Enum(PdfDeckStatus, native_enum=False, length=32),
    default=PdfDeckStatus.COMPLETED,
    nullable=False,
  )
  created_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now())
  updated_at = Column(
    DateTime(timezone=True),
    server_default=func.now(),
    onupdate=func.now(),
  )
  @property
  def title(self) -> str:
    return str(getattr(self, "_plain_title", "") or "")
class PdfFlashcard(Base):
  __tablename__ = "pdf_flashcards"
  id = Column(
    PGUUID(as_uuid=True),
    primary_key=True,
    default=_uuid_default_pg,
  )
  deck_id = Column(
    PGUUID(as_uuid=True),
    nullable=False,
    index=True,
  )
  front_encrypted = Column(Text, nullable=False)
  back_encrypted = Column(Text, nullable=False)
  tags_encrypted = Column(Text, nullable=False)
  chunk_id = Column(String(36), nullable=True, index=True)
  created_at = Column(DateTime(timezone=True), server_default=func.now())
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/parsing_pipeline_public.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Final, Literal
from app.core.model_fallbacks import cheaper_vertex_fallback_chain
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.pdf_wallet_billing import (
  subscription_unified_model_for_tier,
)
PDF_ANKI_FREE_TIER_FLASHCARD_LLM_MODEL_ID: Final[str] = "groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile"
PdfAnkiParsePipelineKind = Literal["llamaparse_then_llm", "unified_multimodal"]
_PIPELINE_LLAMAPARSE_THEN_LLM: Literal["llamaparse_then_llm"] = "llamaparse_then_llm"
_PIPELINE_UNIFIED_MULTIMODAL: Literal["unified_multimodal"] = "unified_multimodal"
_TEXT_EXTRACTOR_LLAMAPARSE = "LlamaParse"
_TIER_PREMIUM = "premium"
_TIER_PRO = "pro"
_TIER_PAYG = "payg"
_TIER_FREE = "free"
_EMPTY_STRING = ""
def _require_string(value: object, *, field: str) -> str:
  if not isinstance(value, str):
    raise TypeError(f"{field} must be str, got {type(value)}")
  return value
def _require_non_empty_model_id(value: str, *, field: str) -> str:
  if not value:
    raise ValueError(f"{field} must not be empty")
  return value
def _require_string_tuple(value: object, *, field: str) -> tuple[str, ...]:
  if not isinstance(value, tuple):
    raise TypeError(f"{field} must be tuple[str, ...], got {type(value)}")
  for model_id in value:
    if not isinstance(model_id, str):
      raise TypeError(f"{field} entries must be str, got {type(model_id)}")
  return value
def resolve_payg_unified_pdf_model_id(
  *,
  allowlist: tuple[str, ...],
  configured_default: str,
  upload_override: str | None,
  stored_preference: str | None,
) -> str:
  safe_allowlist = _require_string_tuple(allowlist, field="allowlist")
  safe_default = _require_string(configured_default, field="configured_default")
  allowed = frozenset(m.strip() for m in safe_allowlist if m.strip())
  if not allowed:
    return safe_default.strip() or _EMPTY_STRING
  default_model = safe_default.strip()
  fallback = (
    default_model if default_model in allowed else next(iter(sorted(allowed)))
  )
  def _pick(raw: str | None) -> str | None:
    if raw is None:
      return None
    if not isinstance(raw, str):
      raise TypeError(f"model override must be str or None, got {type(raw)}")
    s = raw.strip()
    return s if s in allowed else None
  return _pick(upload_override) or _pick(stored_preference) or fallback
def resolve_payg_unified_pdf_fallback_chain(
  *,
  allowlist: tuple[str, ...],
  configured_default: str,
  upload_override: str | None,
  stored_preference: str | None,
) -> tuple[str, ...]:
  selected = resolve_payg_unified_pdf_model_id(
    allowlist=allowlist,
    configured_default=configured_default,
    upload_override=upload_override,
    stored_preference=stored_preference,
  )
  return cheaper_vertex_fallback_chain(
    allowlist=allowlist,
    selected_model=selected,
    configured_default=configured_default,
  )
@dataclass(frozen=True, slots=True)
class PdfAnkiParsingMeFields:
  parse_pipeline_kind: PdfAnkiParsePipelineKind
  pdf_text_extractor: str | None
  flashcard_llm_model_id: str
  flashcard_llm_model_options: tuple[str, ...] | None
  tier_included_unified_model_id: str | None = None
def build_pdf_anki_parsing_me_fields(
  tier: str | None,
  *,
  balance_payg_unlocked: bool,
  premium_unified_model_id: str,
  pro_unified_model_id: str,
  payg_unified_model_id: str,
  payg_selectable_llm_model_ids: tuple[str, ...],
  active_unified_pdf_model_id: str | None = None,
  free_tier_flashcard_model_id: str = (PDF_ANKI_FREE_TIER_FLASHCARD_LLM_MODEL_ID),
) -> PdfAnkiParsingMeFields:
  if tier is not None and not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str or None, got {type(tier)}")
  if not isinstance(balance_payg_unlocked, bool):
    raise TypeError(
      f"balance_payg_unlocked must be bool, got {type(balance_payg_unlocked)}"
    )
  premium_model = _require_string(
    premium_unified_model_id,
    field="premium_unified_model_id",
  )
  pro_model = _require_string(pro_unified_model_id, field="pro_unified_model_id")
  payg_model = _require_string(payg_unified_model_id, field="payg_unified_model_id")
  payg_options = _require_string_tuple(
    payg_selectable_llm_model_ids,
    field="payg_selectable_llm_model_ids",
  )
  free_model = _require_string(
    free_tier_flashcard_model_id,
    field="free_tier_flashcard_model_id",
  )
  raw = (tier or _EMPTY_STRING).strip().lower()
  if raw == _TIER_PAYG:
    raw = _TIER_FREE
  t = raw if raw else _TIER_FREE
  if t == _TIER_PREMIUM and not balance_payg_unlocked:
    premium_model = _require_non_empty_model_id(
      premium_model,
      field="premium_unified_model_id",
    )
    return PdfAnkiParsingMeFields(
      parse_pipeline_kind=_PIPELINE_UNIFIED_MULTIMODAL,
      pdf_text_extractor=None,
      flashcard_llm_model_id=premium_model,
      flashcard_llm_model_options=None,
      tier_included_unified_model_id=premium_model,
    )
  if t == _TIER_PRO and not balance_payg_unlocked:
    pro_model = _require_non_empty_model_id(
      pro_model,
      field="pro_unified_model_id",
    )
    return PdfAnkiParsingMeFields(
      parse_pipeline_kind=_PIPELINE_UNIFIED_MULTIMODAL,
      pdf_text_extractor=None,
      flashcard_llm_model_id=pro_model,
      flashcard_llm_model_options=None,
      tier_included_unified_model_id=pro_model,
    )
  if balance_payg_unlocked:
    effective = resolve_payg_unified_pdf_model_id(
      allowlist=payg_options,
      configured_default=payg_model,
      upload_override=None,
      stored_preference=active_unified_pdf_model_id,
    )
    effective_model = _require_non_empty_model_id(
      effective,
      field="payg_unified_model_id",
    )
    return PdfAnkiParsingMeFields(
      parse_pipeline_kind=_PIPELINE_UNIFIED_MULTIMODAL,
      pdf_text_extractor=None,
      flashcard_llm_model_id=effective_model,
      flashcard_llm_model_options=payg_options,
      tier_included_unified_model_id=subscription_unified_model_for_tier(t),
    )
  free_model = _require_non_empty_model_id(
    free_model,
    field="free_tier_flashcard_model_id",
  )
  return PdfAnkiParsingMeFields(
    parse_pipeline_kind=_PIPELINE_LLAMAPARSE_THEN_LLM,
    pdf_text_extractor=_TEXT_EXTRACTOR_LLAMAPARSE,
    flashcard_llm_model_id=free_model,
    flashcard_llm_model_options=None,
    tier_included_unified_model_id=None,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/schemas.py`
```py
from typing import Literal
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, field_validator
class DocumentChunk(BaseModel):
  id: str
  document_id: str
  text: str
  index_in_doc: int = 0
  embedding: list[float] | None = None
class FlashcardItem(BaseModel):
  front: str = Field(
    ...,
    min_length=1,
    max_length=8000,
    description="Question or prompt (plain text, already decrypted by API).",
  )
  back: str = Field(
    ...,
    min_length=1,
    max_length=16000,
    description="Answer or definition (plain text, already decrypted by API).",
  )
  tags: list[str] = Field(
    default_factory=list,
    max_length=30,
    description="Optional labels (topics, section, difficulty) for filtering.",
  )
  @field_validator("tags", mode="before")
  @classmethod
  def _coerce_tags(cls, value: object) -> object:
    if value is None:
      return []
    return value
class DocumentStatusResponse(BaseModel):
  task_id: str
  status: str  # pending | processing | completed | completed_partial | failed
  file_hash: str | None = None
  error_message: str | None = None
  error_code: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Stable machine code when ``error_message`` starts with a known "
      "PDF-AnKi prefix (e.g. insufficient wallet balance)."
    ),
  )
  resolved_model_id: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Actual unified model used for the job. When different from the "
      "user-selected PAYG model, the frontend should show a fallback "
      "warning and update the selector."
    ),
  )
  deck: list[FlashcardItem] | None = None
  deck_id: str | None = None
  payg_wallet_charged_usd: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Full-precision decimal string (e.g. '0.03359650') of the amount "
      "debited from the PAYG wallet for this job. None when wallet "
      "billing was not applied."
    ),
  )
  payg_wallet_balance_usd: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Full-precision decimal string (e.g. '4.88640350') of the wallet "
      "balance remaining after this job's debit. None when wallet "
      "billing was not applied."
    ),
  )
class UploadAcceptedResponse(BaseModel):
  task_id: str
  status: str = "processing"
  message: str = "Document queued for processing."
  already_processed: bool = False
  deck_id: str | None = None
class UploadPdfRequest(BaseModel):
  user_tier: str = "free"
class PdfDeckSummary(BaseModel):
  id: str
  title: str
  status: str
  created_at: str
  updated_at: str | None = None
  document_id: str
class PdfDeckDetail(BaseModel):
  id: str
  title: str
  status: str
  created_at: str
  flashcards: list[FlashcardItem]
class PdfDeckTagsResponse(BaseModel):
  deck_id: str
  tags: list[str]
class FlashcardFeedbackEditRequest(BaseModel):
  deck_id: str
  card_key: str
  original_front: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=8000)
  original_back: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=16000)
  new_front: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=8000)
  new_back: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=16000)
class EditFlashcardFeedbackResponse(BaseModel):
  status: Literal["saved"] = "saved"
class FlashcardFeedbackDiscardRequest(BaseModel):
  deck_id: str
  card_key: str
  original_front: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=8000)
  original_back: str = Field(min_length=1, max_length=16000)
  rejected: Literal[True] = True
class DiscardFlashcardFeedbackResponse(BaseModel):
  status: Literal["rejected"] = "rejected"
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/page_limits.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
def get_pdf_page_limit(tier: str) -> int:
  t = tier.strip().lower()
  if t in ("pro", "admin"):
    return 500
  if t == "payg":
    return 2000
  if t == "premium":
    return 100
  return 10
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/pdf_wallet_billing.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Final
from app.config import settings
PDF_ANKI_WALLET_JOB_CAPS: Final[str] = "wallet"
PDF_ANKI_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE_MESSAGE: Final[str] = (
  "PDF_ANKI_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE: Estimated charge (model cost + 40% fee) "
  "exceeds your wallet balance. Choose a model included in your "
  "subscription, pick a cheaper model, or top up your balance."
)
PDF_ANKI_WALLET_PORT_REQUIRED_MESSAGE: Final[str] = (
  "PDF_ANKI_WALLET_PORT_REQUIRED: Wallet billing requires a persisted user "
  "profile and balance; retry after signing in."
)
def subscription_unified_model_for_tier(
  tier: str | None,
) -> str | None:  # pragma: no mutate
  t = (tier or "").strip().lower()  # pragma: no mutate
  if t == "premium":  # pragma: no mutate
    return settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PREMIUM  # pragma: no mutate
  if t == "pro":  # pragma: no mutate
    return settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PRO  # pragma: no mutate
  return None  # pragma: no mutate
def normalized_model_id(model: str) -> str:
  return model.strip()
def unified_pdf_uses_wallet_not_subscription(  # pragma: no mutate
  *,  # pragma: no mutate
  db_tier: str,  # pragma: no mutate
  wallet_unlocked: bool,  # pragma: no mutate
  resolved_model_id: str,  # pragma: no mutate
) -> bool:  # pragma: no mutate
  if not wallet_unlocked:  # pragma: no mutate
    return False  # pragma: no mutate
  t = db_tier.strip().lower()  # pragma: no mutate
  bundled = subscription_unified_model_for_tier(t)  # pragma: no mutate
  if bundled is None:  # pragma: no mutate
    return True  # pragma: no mutate
  return normalized_model_id(resolved_model_id) != normalized_model_id(
    bundled
  )  # pragma: no mutate
def wallet_charge_multiplier() -> Decimal:
  return Decimal(str(settings.PDF_ANKI_WALLET_CHARGE_MULTIPLIER))
def marked_up_wallet_charge_usd(
  provider_cost_usd: Decimal,
) -> Decimal:
  return provider_cost_usd * wallet_charge_multiplier()
def estimate_unified_pdf_token_budget(  # pragma: no mutate
  pdf_byte_len: int,  # pragma: no mutate
  max_cards: int,  # pragma: no mutate
) -> tuple[int, int]:  # pragma: no mutate
  approx_b64_payload_chars = (max(pdf_byte_len, 1) * 4) // 3  # pragma: no mutate
  input_tokens = 2_000 + min(
    approx_b64_payload_chars // 3, 600_000
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  output_tokens = 500 + max_cards * 250  # pragma: no mutate
  return input_tokens, output_tokens  # pragma: no mutate
```

### `src/app/modules/pdf_anki/domain/ports.py`
```py
from abc import ABC, abstractmethod
from collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Any, Protocol
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.entities import DocumentMetadata, DocumentState
class DocumentChunkInput:
  __slots__ = (
    "chunk_id",
    "document_id",
    "embedding",
    "index_in_doc",
    "text",
    "user_id",
  )
  def __init__(
    self,
    chunk_id: str,
    document_id: str,
    user_id: str,
    text: str,
    index_in_doc: int,
    embedding: list[float],
  ) -> None:
    self.chunk_id = chunk_id
    self.document_id = document_id
    self.user_id = user_id
    self.text = text
    self.index_in_doc = index_in_doc
    self.embedding = embedding
class PdfParserPort(Protocol):
  @abstractmethod
  async def extract_markdown(
    self,
    pdf_bytes: bytes,
    filename: str,
    *,
    pdf_user_tier: str | None = None,
  ) -> str:
    ...
class VectorStorePort(Protocol):
  @abstractmethod
  async def add_chunks(
    self,
    table_name: str,
    chunks: list[DocumentChunkInput],
  ) -> None:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def search_similar(
    self,
    table_name: str,
    query_embedding: list[float],
    user_id: str,
    limit: int = 5,
    min_score: float | None = None,
  ) -> list[tuple[str, str, float]]:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def delete_by_document_id(
    self,
    table_name: str,
    document_id: str,
  ) -> None:
    ...
class PdfAnkiWalletPort(Protocol):
  async def get_balance_usd_decimal(self, user_id: str) -> Decimal:
    ...
  async def debit_wallet_usd(self, user_id: str, amount: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    ...
class DocumentRepositoryPort(Protocol):
  @abstractmethod
  async def create(
    self, file_hash: str, state: DocumentState = DocumentState.PENDING
  ) -> DocumentMetadata:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_by_id(self, document_id: str) -> DocumentMetadata | None:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_by_file_hash(self, file_hash: str) -> DocumentMetadata | None:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def update_state(
    self,
    document_id: str,
    state: DocumentState,
    error_message: str | None = None,
    resolved_model_id: str | None = None,
  ) -> None:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def rollback_transaction(self) -> None:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def get_flashcards_by_chunk_id(self, chunk_id: str) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    ...
class EmbeddingPort(ABC):
  @abstractmethod
  async def embed(self, text: str) -> list[float]:
    ...
  @abstractmethod
  async def embed_batch(self, texts: list[str]) -> list[list[float]]:
    ...
class FlashcardGeneratorPort(Protocol):
  @abstractmethod
  async def generate(
    self,
    chunk_text: str,
    user_tier: str,
    context: str | None = None,
    *,
    chunk_id: str | None = None,
    groq_congestion_commit_hook: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]] | None = None,
    groq_tpd_all_keys_commit_hook: Callable[[], Awaitable[None]] | None = None,
    groq_structlog_extra: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
  ) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    ...
```
