from app.modules.receipt_parser.application.router_pure import (
  _build_receipts_csv_bytes,
  _build_receipts_xlsx_bytes,
  _sanitize_validation_errors_for_frontend,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.application.router_support_pure import (
  _daily_history_edit_limit,
  _daily_limit_ttl_seconds,
  _daily_receipts_limit,
  _enforce_tier_limits,
  _max_receipts_capacity,
  _max_versions_per_receipt_chain,
  _monthly_receipts_limit,
  _monthly_window_key,
  _normalize_accept_language,
  _normalize_receipt_feedback_user_prompt,
  _receipt_feedback_llm_response,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.errors import (
  ReceiptIdBelongsToAnotherTenantError,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.receipt_wallet_billing import (
  estimate_receipt_provider_cost_usd,
  marked_up_receipt_wallet_charge_usd,
  receipt_base_tier_model,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.schemas import (
  ReceiptHistorySaveRequest,
  ReceiptHistorySaveResponse,
  ReceiptProcessRequest,
  ReceiptProcessResponse,
  ReceiptSchema,
  receipt_with_user_stated_role,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.infrastructure.repositories import (
  ReceiptParserUserRepository,
  ReceiptRepository,
)
_jwt_secret = api_jwt_secret
_RECEIPT_FEEDBACK_MISSING_USER_PROMPT = (
  receipt_router_support_pure._RECEIPT_FEEDBACK_MISSING_USER_PROMPT
)
def _structured_error_detail(*, code: str, message: str) -> dict[str, str]:
  return {"code": code, "message": message}
async def _apply_receipt_stripe_state(
  *,
  user_repo: Any,
  user_id: str,
  tier: str,
  stripe_customer_id_value: str | None,
  stripe_subscription_id_value: str | None,
  subscription_status: str | None,
  current_period_start: datetime | None,
  current_period_end: datetime | None,
  payg_wallet: bool | None,
) -> None:
  apply_state = getattr(user_repo, "apply_stripe_subscription_state", None)
  if callable(apply_state):
    maybe_coro = apply_state(
      user_id=user_id,
      tier=tier,
      stripe_customer_id=stripe_customer_id_value,
      stripe_subscription_id=stripe_subscription_id_value,
      subscription_status=subscription_status,
      current_period_start=current_period_start,
      current_period_end=current_period_end,
      payg_wallet=payg_wallet,
    )
    if asyncio.iscoroutine(maybe_coro):
      await maybe_coro
      return
  await user_repo.update_tier(
    user_id,
    tier,
    subscription_status=subscription_status,
    current_period_start=current_period_start,
    current_period_end=current_period_end,
    payg_wallet=payg_wallet,
  )
async def _upsert_receipt_text_feedback(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  tenant_id: str,
  receipt_type: str,
  field: Literal["issuer_name", "payer_name", "nif_cif_ssn"],
  original_value: str | None,
  corrected_value: str | None,
) -> bool:
  original_norm = _normalize_receipt_feedback_user_prompt(original_value)
  corrected_norm = (corrected_value or "").strip()
  if not corrected_norm:
    return False
  context = _receipt_feedback_llm_response(receipt_type, field=field)
  original_fingerprint = fingerprint_feedback_text(
    original_norm, context="feedback-user-prompt-v1"
  )
  context_fingerprint = fingerprint_feedback_text(
    context, context="feedback-llm-response-v1"
  )
  stmt = (
    select(FeedbackLog)
    .where(
      FeedbackLog.tenant_id == tenant_id,
      FeedbackLog.user_prompt_fingerprint == original_fingerprint,
      FeedbackLog.llm_response_fingerprint == context_fingerprint,
    )
    .order_by(FeedbackLog.created_at.desc())
    .limit(1)
  )
  res = await session.execute(stmt)
  existing = res.scalar_one_or_none()
  if existing is not None:
    if (existing.user_correction or "").strip() == corrected_norm:
      return False
    existing.user_correction = corrected_norm
    existing.score = 1.0
    existing.status = KnowledgeStatus.APPROVED
    return True
  embedding_zeros = [0.0] * 1536
  log = FeedbackLog(
    request_id=uuid.uuid4(),
    tenant_id=tenant_id,
    status=KnowledgeStatus.APPROVED,
    user_prompt=original_norm,
    llm_response=context,
    user_correction=corrected_norm,
    score=1.0,
    model_used="receipt_parser_feedback",
    total_tokens=0,
    prompt_tokens=0,
    completion_tokens=0,
    cost_usd=0.0,
    latency_ms=0.0,
    trace_id=None,
    embedding=embedding_zeros,
  )
  session.add(log)
  return True
_RECEIPT_TEXT_FEEDBACK_FIELDS: tuple[
  Literal["issuer_name", "payer_name", "nif_cif_ssn"], ...
] = ("issuer_name", "payer_name", "nif_cif_ssn")
async def _get_receipt_text_feedback_correction(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  tenant_id: str,
  receipt_type: str,
  field: Literal["issuer_name", "payer_name", "nif_cif_ssn"],
  original_value: str | None,
) -> str | None:
  original_norm = _normalize_receipt_feedback_user_prompt(original_value)
  context = _receipt_feedback_llm_response(receipt_type, field=field)
  original_fingerprint = fingerprint_feedback_text(
    original_norm, context="feedback-user-prompt-v1"
  )
  context_fingerprint = fingerprint_feedback_text(
    context, context="feedback-llm-response-v1"
  )
  stmt = (
    select(FeedbackLog)
    .where(
      FeedbackLog.tenant_id.in_([tenant_id, "default"]),
      FeedbackLog.user_prompt_fingerprint == original_fingerprint,
      FeedbackLog.llm_response_fingerprint == context_fingerprint,
      FeedbackLog.score > 0.8,
      FeedbackLog.status == KnowledgeStatus.APPROVED,
    )
    .order_by(FeedbackLog.created_at.desc())
    .limit(1)
  )
  res = await session.execute(stmt)
  existing = res.scalar_one_or_none()
  return (existing.user_correction or "").strip() if existing else None
async def _apply_receipt_text_feedback_to_receipt_schema(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  tenant_id: str,
  receipt: ReceiptSchema,
) -> None:
  receipt_type = receipt.type or "RECEIVED"
  for field in _RECEIPT_TEXT_FEEDBACK_FIELDS:
    current_value = getattr(receipt, field)
    corrected = await _get_receipt_text_feedback_correction(
      session=session,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      receipt_type=receipt_type,
      field=field,
      original_value=current_value,
    )
    if corrected is not None:
      setattr(receipt, field, corrected)
async def _apply_receipt_text_feedback_to_dict(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  tenant_id: str,
  receipt_type: str,
  payload: dict[str, Any],
) -> None:
  for field in _RECEIPT_TEXT_FEEDBACK_FIELDS:
    current_value = payload.get(field)
    corrected = await _get_receipt_text_feedback_correction(
      session=session,
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      receipt_type=receipt_type,
      field=field,
      original_value=current_value if isinstance(current_value, str) else None,
    )
    if corrected is not None:
      payload[field] = corrected
router = APIRouter(prefix="/receipts", tags=["receipts"])
_struct_log = structlog.get_logger()
async def _list_receipts_for_user_or_422(
  repo: ReceiptRepository,
  *,
  user_id: str,
  user_role: str | None = None,
  limit: int = 100,
  offset: int = 0,
) -> list[ReceiptSchema]:
  try:
    return await repo.list_by_user(
      user_id=user_id,
      user_role=user_role,
      limit=limit,
      offset=offset,
    )
  except ValueError as exc:
    detail = str(exc)
    if "expected UUID" in detail:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_CONTENT,
        detail=detail,
      ) from exc
    raise
async def _resolve_receipts_identity(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
) -> tuple[str, str, str, bool, str | None]:
  sub = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
    authorization=authorization,
  ).sub
  user_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  try:
    user = await user_repo.get_or_create_user(sub)
    tier = str(getattr(user, "tier", "free") or "free")
    payg_wallet = getattr(user, "payg", None) is True
    active_raw = getattr(user, "active_receipt_parser_llm_model", None)
    active_mid = str(active_raw).strip() if active_raw is not None else None
    return sub, str(user.id), tier, payg_wallet, active_mid
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    return sub, sub, "free", False, None
async def _resolve_receipts_tenant_id(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
) -> str:
  _, tenant_id, _, _, _ = await _resolve_receipts_identity(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  return tenant_id
class LlamaParseReceiptAdapter(LlamaParsePort):
  async def extract_markdown(self, pdf_bytes: bytes, filename: str) -> str:
    _key = getattr(settings, "LLAMAPARSE_API_KEY", None)
    receipt_key = getattr(settings, "LLAMAPARSE_RECEIPT_PARSER_API_KEY", None)
    api_key = ""
    if receipt_key is not None:
      api_key = receipt_key.get_secret_value()
    elif _key is not None:
      api_key = _key.get_secret_value()
    base_url: str | None = getattr(settings, "LLAMAPARSE_BASE_URL", None)
    parser = LlamaParseAdapter(
      api_key=api_key,
      base_url=base_url,
      request_timeout_seconds=(
        settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_LLAMAPARSE_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
      ),
      poll_timeout_seconds=(
        settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_LLAMAPARSE_POLL_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
      ),
    )
    return await parser.extract_markdown(pdf_bytes, filename)
class NoopLlamaParseAdapter(LlamaParsePort):
  async def extract_markdown(self, pdf_bytes: bytes, filename: str) -> str:
    return "STORE\nItem 1  10.00  Total: 10.00"
async def _increment_daily_receipts_counter_or_429(
  *,
  tenant_id: str,
  tier: str,
) -> None:
  limit = _daily_receipts_limit(tier)
  day_key = datetime.now(UTC).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
  ttl = _daily_limit_ttl_seconds()
  redis_key = f"receipt_parser:{{{tenant_id}}}:daily_receipts:{day_key}"
  script = (
    "local current = tonumber(redis.call('GET', KEYS[1]) or '0'); "
    "local limit = tonumber(ARGV[1]); "
    "if current >= limit then return -1; end; "
    "local nextv = redis.call('INCR', KEYS[1]); "
    "if nextv == 1 then redis.call('EXPIRE', KEYS[1], ARGV[2]); end; "
    "return nextv;"
  )
  try:
    result = await redis_cache.lua_execute(
      script,
      keys=[redis_key],
      args=[str(limit), str(ttl)],
    )
    if int(result) == -1:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_429_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
        detail="Daily receipt processing limit exceeded for this tier.",
      )
  except HTTPException:
    raise
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    _struct_log.warning(
      "receipt_daily_limit_check_failed",
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      tier=tier,
      error=str(exc),
    )
async def _increment_daily_history_edits_or_429(
  *,
  tenant_id: str,
  tier: str,
) -> None:
  limit = _daily_history_edit_limit(tier)
  day_key = datetime.now(UTC).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
  ttl = _daily_limit_ttl_seconds()
  redis_key = f"receipt_parser:{{{tenant_id}}}:daily_history_edits:{day_key}"
  script = (
    "local current = tonumber(redis.call('GET', KEYS[1]) or '0'); "
    "local limit = tonumber(ARGV[1]); "
    "if current >= limit then return -1; end; "
    "local nextv = redis.call('INCR', KEYS[1]); "
    "if nextv == 1 then redis.call('EXPIRE', KEYS[1], ARGV[2]); end; "
    "return nextv;"
  )
  try:
    result = await redis_cache.lua_execute(
      script,
      keys=[redis_key],
      args=[str(limit), str(ttl)],
    )
    if int(result) == -1:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_429_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
        detail="Daily receipt history edit limit exceeded for this tier.",
      )
  except HTTPException:
    raise
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    _struct_log.warning(
      "receipt_daily_history_edit_limit_check_failed",
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      tier=tier,
      error=str(exc),
    )
def _receipt_dedup_key(tenant_id: str, image_hash: str) -> str:
  return f"receipt_parser:{{{tenant_id}}}:image_hash:{image_hash}"
async def _mark_receipt_hash_persisted(
  *,
  tenant_id: str,
  image_hash: str,
) -> None:
  if getattr(redis_cache, "redis_client", None) is None:
    return
  try:
    await redis_cache.set(
      _receipt_dedup_key(tenant_id, image_hash),
      {"persisted": True},
      ttl=86400,
      nx=False,
    )
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    _struct_log.warning(
      "receipt_dedup_mark_persisted_failed",
      tenant_id=tenant_id,
      error=str(exc),
    )
@router.post(
  "/process",
  response_model=ReceiptProcessResponse,
  status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK,
  responses={
    200: {"description": "Verified or unprocessable"},
    206: {"description": "Partial: best-effort JSON for human correction"},
    401: {"description": "Not signed in (missing or invalid Bearer JWT)"},
    409: {"description": "Duplicate image (same image_hash already stored)"},
    429: {"description": "Tier limit exceeded"},
  },
)
async def process_receipt(
  body: ReceiptProcessRequest,
  llm: Annotated[LLMProvider, Depends(get_llm_provider)],
  token_manager: Annotated[TokenManagerPort, Depends(get_token_manager)],
  cost_calculator: Annotated[
    CostCalculatorPort,
    Depends(get_cost_calculator),
  ],
  budget_manager: Annotated[BudgetManager, Depends(get_budget_manager)],
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ReceiptProcessResponse | JSONResponse:
  (
    subject_id,
    db_user_id,
    tier,
    payg_wallet,
    active_rp_model,
  ) = await _resolve_receipts_identity(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  receipt_repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  user_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  payg_fallback_model_id: str | None = None  # set when balance insufficient
  effective_payg_wallet = payg_wallet  # may be demoted to False below
  if payg_wallet:
    from app.modules.receipt_parser.application.parsing_me_public import (
      _resolve_receipt_parser_payg_llm_model_id,
    )
    selected_model = _resolve_receipt_parser_payg_llm_model_id(
      allowlist=tuple(settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_SELECTABLE_LLM_MODELS),
      configured_default=settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL_ID,
      stored_preference=active_rp_model,
    )
    tier_subscription_model = receipt_base_tier_model(tier)
    if tier_subscription_model and selected_model == tier_subscription_model:
      effective_payg_wallet = False
      _struct_log.info(
        "receipt_payg_subscription_model_used",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=tier,
        selected_model=selected_model,
      )
    else:
      try:
        est_provider = estimate_receipt_provider_cost_usd(selected_model)
        est_charge = marked_up_receipt_wallet_charge_usd(est_provider)
        balance = await user_repo.get_balance_usd_decimal(subject_id)
        if est_charge > balance:
          fallback = tier_subscription_model
          if fallback:
            payg_fallback_model_id = fallback
          else:
            payg_fallback_model_id = RECEIPT_PARSER_FREE_STACK_LLM_MODEL_ID
          effective_payg_wallet = False
          _struct_log.info(
            "receipt_payg_balance_insufficient_fallback",
            tenant_id=subject_id,
            tier=tier,
            selected_model=selected_model,
            estimated_charge=str(est_charge),
            balance=str(balance),
            fallback_model=payg_fallback_model_id,
          )
      except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        _struct_log.warning(
          "receipt_payg_balance_check_failed",
          tenant_id=subject_id,
          error=str(exc),
        )
  effective_tier_for_limits = "payg" if effective_payg_wallet else tier
  await _increment_daily_receipts_counter_or_429(
    tenant_id=subject_id, tier=effective_tier_for_limits
  )
  monthly_limit = _monthly_receipts_limit(effective_tier_for_limits)
  if monthly_limit is not None:
    try:
      monthly_count = await user_repo.get_monthly_receipts_usage(
        subject_id,
        window_key=_monthly_window_key(),
      )
      if monthly_count >= monthly_limit:
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_429_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
          detail="Monthly receipt processing limit exceeded for this tier.",
        )
    except HTTPException:
      raise
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.warning(
        "receipt_monthly_limit_check_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        error=str(exc),
      )
  max_cap = _max_receipts_capacity(effective_tier_for_limits)
  try:
    count = await receipt_repo.count_by_user(db_user_id)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    count = 0
  await _enforce_tier_limits(
    subject_id,
    effective_tier_for_limits,
    budget_manager,
    receipt_count=count,
    max_capacity=max_cap,
  )
  if body.image_hash:
    try:
      exists = await receipt_repo.exists_by_image_hash(
        db_user_id, body.image_hash
      )
      if exists:
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
          detail="A receipt with this image was already uploaded.",
        )
    except HTTPException:
      raise
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      await session.rollback()
      _struct_log.error(
        "receipt_duplicate_check_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        error=str(exc),
      )
  _uses_free_parsing = receipt_uses_llamaparse_stack(tier, effective_payg_wallet)
  llamaparse_adapter: LlamaParsePort | None = None
  if _uses_free_parsing:
    if settings.TESTING:
      llamaparse_adapter = NoopLlamaParseAdapter()
    else:
      base_key = getattr(settings, "LLAMAPARSE_API_KEY", None)
      receipt_key = getattr(
        settings,
        "LLAMAPARSE_RECEIPT_PARSER_API_KEY",
        None,
      )
      if base_key is None and receipt_key is None:
        _struct_log.warning(
          "receipt_process_stub_missing_llamaparse_config",
          tenant_id=subject_id,
          tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        )
        return ReceiptProcessResponse(
          status="unprocessable",
          error_message=(
            "[STUB] Receipt processing disabled: missing LlamaParse "
            "API key config."
          ),
        )
      llamaparse_adapter = LlamaParseReceiptAdapter()
  async def _get_examples(issuer_name: str) -> list[ReceiptSchema]:
    issuer_embedding: list[float] | None = None
    with suppress(Exception):
      issuer_embedding = await llm.embed(issuer_name)
    return await receipt_repo.get_by_issuer_name(
      db_user_id,
      issuer_name,
      limit=2,
      issuer_embedding=issuer_embedding,
    )
  try:
    (
      receipt,
      error,
      cost_usd,
      best_effort,
      best_effort_validation_errors,
    ) = await process_receipt_image(
      image_base64=body.image_base64,
      tier=tier,
      llm=llm,
      token_manager=token_manager,
      cost_calculator=cost_calculator,
      llamaparse=llamaparse_adapter,
      get_examples=_get_examples,
      user_stated_role=body.user_role,
      document_mime_type=body.document_mime_type,
      document_filename=body.document_filename,
      payg_wallet=effective_payg_wallet,
      active_receipt_parser_llm_model_id=active_rp_model,
    )
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    _struct_log.error(
      "receipt_process_unexpected_error",
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
      error=str(exc),
      exc_info=True,
    )
    error_text = str(exc)
    error_message = (
      error_text
      if "ratelimit" in error_text.lower() or "rate limit" in error_text.lower()
      else (
        "[STUB] Receipt processing failed due to unexpected error. "
        "See server logs for details."
      )
    )
    return ReceiptProcessResponse(
      status="unprocessable",
      error_message=error_message,
    )
  payg_charged_usd: str | None = None
  payg_balance_after_usd: str | None = None
  if effective_payg_wallet and cost_usd > 0:
    try:
      wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
      actual_charge = marked_up_receipt_wallet_charge_usd(Decimal(str(cost_usd)))
      debited = await user_repo.debit_wallet_usd(subject_id, actual_charge)
      new_balance = await user_repo.get_balance_usd_decimal(subject_id)
      payg_charged_usd = str(debited.quantize(Decimal("0.000001")))
      payg_balance_after_usd = str(new_balance.quantize(Decimal("0.000001")))
      await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
        WalletTransaction(
          tenant_id=subject_id,
          module="receipt_parser",
          transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.DEBIT,
          amount_usd=Decimal(payg_charged_usd),
          balance_after_usd=Decimal(payg_balance_after_usd),
          reference_id=str(body.image_hash or ""),
          description="PAYG wallet debit for receipt_parser processing",
        )
      )
      await session.commit()
      _struct_log.info(
        "receipt_payg_wallet_debited",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        charged_usd=payg_charged_usd,
        balance_after_usd=payg_balance_after_usd,
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.error(
        "receipt_payg_wallet_debit_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        error=str(exc),
      )
  _struct_log.info(
    "receipt_process_completed",
    tenant_id=subject_id,
    tier=tier,
    effective_tier_for_limits=effective_tier_for_limits,
    status="verified" if receipt is not None else "unprocessable",
    error_message=error,
    cost_usd=cost_usd,
    payg_charged_usd=payg_charged_usd,
    payg_fallback=payg_fallback_model_id,
  )
  if receipt is not None:
    receipt = receipt_with_user_stated_role(receipt, body.user_role)
    receipt.source = receipt.source or "llm_parse"
    receipt.version = receipt.version or 1
    now = datetime.now(UTC)
    if receipt.created_at is None:
      receipt.created_at = now
    if receipt.updated_at is None:
      receipt.updated_at = receipt.created_at
    try:
      await _apply_receipt_text_feedback_to_receipt_schema(
        session=session,
        tenant_id=db_user_id,
        receipt=receipt,
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.warning(
        "receipt_feedback_apply_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        error=str(exc),
      )
    issuer_embedding: list[float] | None = None
    with suppress(Exception):
      issuer_name = receipt.issuer_name or ""
      issuer_embedding = await llm.embed(issuer_name)
    try:
      await receipt_repo.save(
        user_id=db_user_id,
        user_role=body.user_role,
        receipt=receipt,
        image_hash=body.image_hash,
        issuer_embedding=issuer_embedding,
      )
      if monthly_limit is not None:
        try:
          await user_repo.increment_monthly_receipts_usage(
            subject_id,
            window_key=_monthly_window_key(),
          )
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
          _struct_log.warning(
            "receipt_monthly_limit_increment_failed",
            tenant_id=subject_id,
            tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
            error=str(exc),
          )
      await session.commit()
      if body.image_hash:
        await _mark_receipt_hash_persisted(
          tenant_id=db_user_id,
          image_hash=body.image_hash,
        )
    except ReceiptIdBelongsToAnotherTenantError as exc:
      await session.rollback()
      _struct_log.warning(
        "receipt_process_persist_tenant_mismatch",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        error=str(exc),
      )
      return ReceiptProcessResponse(
        status="unprocessable",
        receipt=None,
        error_message=("Receipt id is not available for this account."),
      )
    except IntegrityError as exc:
      await session.rollback()
      _struct_log.error(
        "receipt_process_persist_integrity",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        error=str(exc),
      )
      return ReceiptProcessResponse(
        status="unprocessable",
        receipt=None,
        error_message="Receipt could not be saved (data conflict).",
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      await session.rollback()
      _struct_log.error(
        "receipt_process_persist_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        tier=effective_tier_for_limits,
        error=str(exc),
      )
      return ReceiptProcessResponse(
        status="unprocessable",
        receipt=None,
        error_message=(
          "No se pudo insertar esta factura en la base de datos. "
          "Lamentamos la molestia, inténtalo de nuevo más tarde."
        ),
      )
    return ReceiptProcessResponse(
      status="verified",
      receipt=receipt,
      payg_wallet_charged_usd=payg_charged_usd,
      payg_wallet_balance_usd=payg_balance_after_usd,
      payg_fallback_model_id=payg_fallback_model_id,
    )
  if best_effort is not None:
    best_effort["type"] = "ISSUED" if body.user_role == "issuer" else "RECEIVED"
    best_effort["user_role"] = body.user_role
    try:
      await _apply_receipt_text_feedback_to_dict(
        session=session,
        tenant_id=db_user_id,
        receipt_type=cast(str, best_effort.get("type")),
        payload=best_effort,
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.warning(
        "receipt_feedback_apply_failed_best_effort",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        error=str(exc),
      )
    best_effort_totals: dict[str, str | None] = {
      "subtotal": str(best_effort.get("subtotal"))
      if best_effort.get("subtotal") is not None
      else None,
      "discount": str(best_effort.get("discount"))
      if best_effort.get("discount") is not None
      else None,
      "tax": str(best_effort.get("tax")) if best_effort.get("tax") else None,
      "total": str(best_effort.get("total"))
      if best_effort.get("total") is not None
      else None,
      "currency": str(best_effort.get("currency"))
      if best_effort.get("currency") is not None
      else None,
    }
    hitl_errors: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
    if best_effort_validation_errors:
      for e in best_effort_validation_errors:
        hitl_errors.append(
          {
            "rule": e.rule,
            "field": e.field,
            "item_line": e.item_line,
            "expected": e.expected,
            "actual": e.actual,
            "message": e.message,
          }
        )
    _struct_log.info(
      "receipt_requires_human_correction_payload",
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
      best_effort_totals=best_effort_totals,
      validation_errors=hitl_errors,
      llm_error=error,
    )
    resp = ReceiptProcessResponse(
      status="requires_human_correction",
      error_message=error or "Math validation failed after retries.",
      best_effort_receipt=best_effort,
      validation_errors=_sanitize_validation_errors_for_frontend(
        best_effort_validation_errors
      ),
      payg_wallet_charged_usd=payg_charged_usd,
      payg_wallet_balance_usd=payg_balance_after_usd,
      payg_fallback_model_id=payg_fallback_model_id,
    )
    return JSONResponse(
      content=resp.model_dump(mode="json"),
      status_code=status.HTTP_206_PARTIAL_CONTENT,
    )
  return ReceiptProcessResponse(
    status="unprocessable",
    error_message=error or "Validation failed after retries",
    payg_fallback_model_id=payg_fallback_model_id,
  )
@router.post(
  "/history",
  response_model=ReceiptHistorySaveResponse,
  status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK,
  responses={
    200: {"description": "Human correction persisted"},
    401: {"description": "Missing/invalid Bearer JWT"},
    403: {"description": "Receipt id not owned by this tenant"},
    409: {"description": "Version conflict or persistence conflict"},
    422: {"description": "Corrected receipt failed math validation"},
    429: {
      "description": "Tier limit exceeded (storage, daily budget, or "
      "max versions per receipt chain)",
    },
  },
)
async def save_receipt_history(
  body: ReceiptHistorySaveRequest,
  budget_manager: Annotated[BudgetManager, Depends(get_budget_manager)],
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ReceiptHistorySaveResponse | JSONResponse:
  subject_id, db_user_id, tier, _, _ = await _resolve_receipts_identity(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  receipt_repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  chain_row_version: int | None = None
  if body.image_hash and body.receipt.id:
    try:
      chain_row_version = await receipt_repo.get_chain_row_version_if_owned(
        db_user_id,
        body.image_hash,
        body.receipt.id,
      )
    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
      chain_row_version = None
  is_history_edit = chain_row_version is not None
  if not is_history_edit and body.receipt.id:
    try:
      existing = await receipt_repo.get_by_id(
        user_id=db_user_id,
        receipt_id=body.receipt.id,
      )
      is_history_edit = existing is not None
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.debug("History edit lookup failed", exc_info=exc)
  if is_history_edit:
    await _increment_daily_history_edits_or_429(
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
    )
  max_cap = _max_receipts_capacity(tier)
  try:
    count = await receipt_repo.count_by_user(db_user_id)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    count = 0
  if body.image_hash:
    try:
      chain_rows = await receipt_repo.count_by_user_and_image_hash(
        db_user_id,
        body.image_hash,
      )
    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
      chain_rows = 0
    max_chain = _max_versions_per_receipt_chain(tier)
    if chain_rows >= max_chain and chain_row_version is None:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_429_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
        detail=(
          "Maximum stored versions for this receipt (image_hash) "
          f"reached for this tier (limit={max_chain})."
        ),
      )
  await _enforce_tier_limits(
    subject_id,
    tier,
    budget_manager,
    receipt_count=count,
    max_capacity=max_cap,
  )
  corrected = receipt_with_user_stated_role(body.receipt, body.user_role)
  feedback_written = False
  original_receipt: ReceiptSchema | None = None
  if body.receipt.id:
    try:
      original_receipt = await receipt_repo.get_by_id(
        user_id=db_user_id,
        receipt_id=body.receipt.id,
      )
    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
      original_receipt = None
  for field in _RECEIPT_TEXT_FEEDBACK_FIELDS:
    if original_receipt is not None:
      original_val = getattr(original_receipt, field)
    else:
      original_val = (
        body.original_issuer_name
        if field == "issuer_name"
        else body.original_payer_name
        if field == "payer_name"
        else body.original_nif_cif_ssn
      )
    corrected_val = getattr(corrected, field)
    if (original_val or "").strip() == (corrected_val or "").strip():
      continue
    try:
      feedback_written |= await _upsert_receipt_text_feedback(
        session=session,
        tenant_id=db_user_id,
        receipt_type=corrected.type or "RECEIVED",
        field=field,
        original_value=original_val,
        corrected_value=corrected_val,
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      _struct_log.warning(
        "receipt_feedback_persist_failed",
        tenant_id=subject_id,
        field=field,
        error=str(exc),
      )
  validation_result = validate_receipt_math(corrected)
  valid = validation_result.valid
  err = validation_result.error_message
  validation_errors = validation_result.validation_errors
  if not valid:
    if feedback_written:
      await session.commit()
    resp = ReceiptHistorySaveResponse(
      status="unprocessable",
      receipt=None,
      error_message=err or "Math validation failed.",
      validation_errors=_sanitize_validation_errors_for_frontend(
        validation_errors
      ),
    )
    return JSONResponse(
      content=resp.model_dump(mode="json"),
      status_code=status.HTTP_422_UNPROCESSABLE_CONTENT,
    )
  corrected.source = "human_corrected"
  latest_version: int | None = None
  expected_next_version: int
  if body.image_hash:
    if chain_row_version is not None:
      corrected.version = chain_row_version
    else:
      latest_version = await receipt_repo.get_latest_version_by_image_hash(
        user_id=db_user_id,
        image_hash=body.image_hash,
      )
      expected_next_version = (latest_version or 0) + 1
      if corrected.version is not None and (
        corrected.version != expected_next_version
      ):
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
          detail=(
            "Version conflict. Expected "
            f"version={expected_next_version} "
            f"(latest={latest_version})."
          ),
        )
      corrected.version = expected_next_version
  else:
    corrected.version = corrected.version or 1
  try:
    await receipt_repo.save(
      user_id=db_user_id,
      user_role=body.user_role,
      receipt=corrected,
      image_hash=body.image_hash,
      issuer_embedding=None,
    )
    await session.commit()
    if body.image_hash:
      await _mark_receipt_hash_persisted(
        tenant_id=db_user_id,
        image_hash=body.image_hash,
      )
  except ReceiptIdBelongsToAnotherTenantError as exc:
    await session.rollback()
    _struct_log.warning(
      "receipt_history_persist_tenant_mismatch",
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
      image_hash=body.image_hash,
      error=str(exc),
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail=str(exc),
    ) from exc
  except IntegrityError as exc:
    await session.rollback()
    _struct_log.error(
      "receipt_history_persist_integrity",
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
      image_hash=body.image_hash,
      error=str(exc),
      exc_info=True,
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_409_CONFLICT,
      detail="Receipt persistence conflict.",
    ) from exc
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    await session.rollback()
    _struct_log.error(
      "receipt_history_persist_failed",
      tenant_id=subject_id,
      tier=tier,
      image_hash=body.image_hash,
      error=str(exc),
      exc_info=True,
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
      detail="Failed to persist corrected receipt.",
    ) from None
  return ReceiptHistorySaveResponse(status="saved", receipt=corrected)
@router.get(
  "/history",
  responses={
    401: {"description": "Missing or invalid Bearer JWT"},
    403: {"description": "Token issued for another module"},
    422: {"description": "Invalid user id (e.g. non-UUID on Postgres)"},
  },
)
async def list_receipts(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  user_role: Annotated[
    str | None,
    Query(description="Filter: issuer or payer"),
  ] = None,
  limit: int = Query(100, ge=1, le=500),
  offset: int = Query(0, ge=0),
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  tenant_id = await _resolve_receipts_tenant_id(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  receipts = await _list_receipts_for_user_or_422(
    repo,
    user_id=tenant_id,
    user_role=user_role,
    limit=limit,
    offset=offset,
  )
  return [r.model_dump(mode="json") for r in receipts]
@router.get("/history/{receipt_id}", response_model=ReceiptSchema)
async def get_receipt_history_detail(
  receipt_id: str,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ReceiptSchema:
  tenant_id = await _resolve_receipts_tenant_id(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  receipt = await repo.get_by_id(user_id=tenant_id, receipt_id=receipt_id)
  if receipt is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Receipt not found.",
    )
  return receipt
@router.delete(
  "/history/{receipt_id}",
  responses={
    200: {"description": "Receipt deleted (owned by this tenant)"},
    401: {"description": "Missing or invalid Bearer JWT"},
    403: {"description": "Receipt not owned by this tenant"},
    404: {"description": "Receipt not found"},
  },
)
async def delete_receipt_history_detail(
  receipt_id: str,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  tenant_id = await _resolve_receipts_tenant_id(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  is_owned = await repo.exists_by_id_for_tenant(
    user_id=tenant_id,
    receipt_id=receipt_id,
  )
  if is_owned:
    deleted = await repo.delete_by_id(user_id=tenant_id, receipt_id=receipt_id)
    if not deleted:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
        detail=_structured_error_detail(
          code="RECEIPT_DELETE_NOT_FOUND",
          message="Receipt not found.",
        ),
      )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "deleted"}
  owner_user_id = await repo.get_owner_user_id_for_receipt_id(receipt_id)
  if owner_user_id is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail=_structured_error_detail(
        code="RECEIPT_DELETE_NOT_FOUND",
        message="Receipt not found.",
      ),
    )
  if str(owner_user_id) != str(tenant_id):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail=_structured_error_detail(
        code="RECEIPT_DELETE_FORBIDDEN",
        message="Receipt not owned by this tenant.",
      ),
    )
  deleted = await repo.delete_by_id(user_id=tenant_id, receipt_id=receipt_id)
  if not deleted:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail=_structured_error_detail(
        code="RECEIPT_DELETE_NOT_FOUND",
        message="Receipt not found.",
      ),
    )
  await session.commit()
  return {"status": "deleted"}
@router.get("/export", response_class=StreamingResponse)
async def export_receipts_csv(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  accept_language: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Accept-Language"),
  user_role: Annotated[
    str | None,
    Query(description="Filter: issuer or payer"),
  ] = None,
  export_format: Annotated[
    Literal["csv", "xlsx"],
    Query(alias="format", description="csv or xlsx"),
  ] = "csv",
) -> StreamingResponse:
  tenant_id = await _resolve_receipts_tenant_id(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  receipts = await _list_receipts_for_user_or_422(
    repo,
    user_id=tenant_id,
    user_role=user_role,
    limit=10_000,
    offset=0,
  )
  lang = _normalize_accept_language(accept_language)
  if export_format == "xlsx":
    content = await asyncio.to_thread(
      _build_receipts_xlsx_bytes, receipts, lang=lang
    )
    return StreamingResponse(
      iter([content]),
      media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
      headers={
        "Content-Disposition": "attachment; filename=receipts_export.xlsx",
      },
    )
  content = await asyncio.to_thread(_build_receipts_csv_bytes, receipts, lang=lang)
  return StreamingResponse(
    iter([content]),
    media_type="text/csv; charset=utf-8",
    headers={
      "Content-Disposition": "attachment; filename=receipts_export.csv",
    },
  )
@router.get("/pricing")
async def get_pricing() -> dict[str, Any]:
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  return {
    "tiers": [
      {"id": "free", "max_receipts": _max_receipts_capacity("free")},
      {"id": "premium", "max_receipts": _max_receipts_capacity("premium")},
      {"id": "pro", "max_receipts": _max_receipts_capacity("pro")},
      {"id": "ultra", "max_receipts": _max_receipts_capacity("ultra")},
      {"id": "admin", "max_receipts": _max_receipts_capacity("admin")},
    ],
    "stripe_links": {
      "premium": snap.rp_stripe_link_premium or "",
      "pro": snap.rp_stripe_link_pro or "",
      "payg_topup": snap.rp_stripe_link_payg_topup or "",
      "pago": snap.rp_pago_stripe or "",
    },
    "customer_portal_path": "/billing/stripe/customer-portal?module=receipt_parser",
  }
@router.post(
  "/billing/stripe-webhook",
  status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK,
  summary="Stripe webhook for Receipt Parser tier updates",
)
async def receipt_stripe_webhook(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request = None,  # type: ignore[assignment]
  event: dict[str, Any] | None = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  if request is not None:
    try:
      event = verify_and_parse_stripe_event(
        payload=await request.body(),
        signature_header=request.headers.get("Stripe-Signature"),
      )
    except (UnicodeDecodeError, json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError) as exc:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail=f"Invalid Stripe webhook payload: {exc}",
      ) from exc
  elif event is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Missing Stripe webhook payload.",
    )
  event_type = str(event.get("type") or "")
  if event_type not in {
    "checkout.session.completed",
    "invoice.payment_succeeded",
    "invoice.paid",
    "invoice.payment_failed",
    "customer.subscription.created",
    "customer.subscription.updated",
    "customer.subscription.deleted",
    "subscription_schedule.created",
    "subscription_schedule.updated",
    "subscription_schedule.released",
    "subscription_schedule.completed",
  }:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "unsupported_event_type"}
  data_obj = event.get("data") or {}
  stripe_object = data_obj.get("object") or {}
  if not isinstance(stripe_object, dict):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid Stripe event: data.object must be an object.",
    )
  metadata = stripe_metadata(stripe_object)
  receipt_user_id = str(
    metadata.get("receipt_user_id")
    or metadata.get("user_id")
    or stripe_object.get("client_reference_id")
    or ""
  ).strip()
  raw_tier = str(metadata.get("tier") or "").strip().lower() or (
    infer_tier_from_stripe_object(stripe_object) or ""
  )
  user_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  resolved_customer_id = stripe_customer_id(stripe_object)
  resolved_subscription_id = stripe_subscription_id(stripe_object)
  period_start, period_end = stripe_period_bounds(event_type, stripe_object)
  resolved_status = normalize_subscription_status(event_type, stripe_object)
  if resolved_subscription_id and (
    event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
    or event_type.startswith("subscription_schedule.")
    or not raw_tier
    or period_start is None
    or period_end is None
    or not resolved_status
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      subscription_obj = await fetch_stripe_subscription(resolved_subscription_id)
      sub_start, sub_end = stripe_period_bounds(
        "customer.subscription.created",
        subscription_obj,
      )
      period_start = period_start or sub_start
      period_end = period_end or sub_end
      fetched_status = normalize_subscription_status(
        (
          "customer.subscription.updated"
          if event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
          else "customer.subscription.created"
        ),
        subscription_obj,
      )
      if resolved_status == "canceled" or fetched_status == "canceled":
        resolved_status = "canceled"
      elif resolved_status == "active" or fetched_status == "active":
        resolved_status = "active"
      else:
        resolved_status = fetched_status or resolved_status
      resolved_customer_id = resolved_customer_id or stripe_customer_id(
        subscription_obj
      )
      if not raw_tier:
        raw_tier = (
          infer_tier_from_stripe_object(subscription_obj)
          or str(
            stripe_metadata(subscription_obj).get("tier") or raw_tier or ""
          )
          .strip()
          .lower()
        )
  if not receipt_user_id:
    matched = None
    if resolved_subscription_id:
      matched = await user_repo.find_user_by_stripe_subscription_id(
        resolved_subscription_id
      )
    if matched is None and resolved_customer_id:
      matched = await user_repo.find_user_by_stripe_customer_id(
        resolved_customer_id
      )
    if matched is not None:
      receipt_user_id = str(getattr(matched, "user_id", "") or "").strip()
      if not raw_tier:
        raw_tier = str(getattr(matched, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
  if not receipt_user_id or raw_tier not in {"premium", "pro", "payg"}:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "missing receipt_user_id or tier"}
  await user_repo.get_or_create_user(receipt_user_id)
  tier_to_store = raw_tier
  payg_wallet_flag: bool | None = True if raw_tier == "payg" else None
  if raw_tier == "payg":
    existing = user_repo.get_user_by_id(receipt_user_id)
    if asyncio.iscoroutine(existing):
      existing = await existing  # type: ignore[assignment]
    stored_tier = str(getattr(existing, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
    tier_to_store = stored_tier or "free"
  await _apply_receipt_stripe_state(
    user_repo=user_repo,
    user_id=receipt_user_id,
    tier=tier_to_store,
    stripe_customer_id_value=resolved_customer_id,
    stripe_subscription_id_value=resolved_subscription_id,
    subscription_status=resolved_status,
    current_period_start=period_start,
    current_period_end=period_end,
    payg_wallet=payg_wallet_flag,
  )
  if event_type == "checkout.session.completed" and raw_tier == "payg":
    amount_total = stripe_object.get("amount_total")
    currency = str(stripe_object.get("currency") or "usd").strip().lower()
    if (
      amount_total is not None
      and isinstance(amount_total, int)
      and amount_total > 0
      and currency == "usd"
    ):
      new_balance = await user_repo.apply_balance_topup_from_stripe_cents(
        receipt_user_id,
        amount_total_cents=amount_total,
      )
      await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
        WalletTransaction(
          tenant_id=receipt_user_id,
          module="receipt_parser",
          transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.CREDIT,
          amount_usd=(Decimal(amount_total) / Decimal(100)).quantize(
            Decimal("0.000001")
          ),
          balance_after_usd=new_balance,
          reference_id=str(stripe_object.get("id") or ""),
          description="PAYG wallet top-up from Stripe checkout",
        )
      )
  if event_type == "customer.subscription.deleted" and raw_tier in {"premium", "pro"}:
    await _apply_receipt_stripe_state(
      user_repo=user_repo,
      user_id=receipt_user_id,
      tier="free",
      stripe_customer_id_value=resolved_customer_id,
      stripe_subscription_id_value=resolved_subscription_id,
      subscription_status="canceled",
      current_period_start=period_start,
      current_period_end=period_end,
      payg_wallet=None,
    )
  await session.commit()
  return {"status": "processed", "tier": raw_tier}
_DEMO_HTML = (
  Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2] / "static" / "receipt_parser" / "demo.html"
)
@router.get(
  "/demo",
  include_in_schema=False,
  response_class=FileResponse,
)
async def receipt_parser_demo() -> FileResponse:
  if not _DEMO_HTML.is_file():
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Demo asset missing.",
    )
  return FileResponse(
    _DEMO_HTML,
    media_type="text/html; charset=utf-8",
  )
@router.get("/usage")
async def get_usage(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  _, db_user_id, tier, _, _ = await _resolve_receipts_identity(
    session=session,
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  receipt_repo = ReceiptRepository(session)
  max_receipts = _max_receipts_capacity(tier)
  try:
    count = await receipt_repo.count_by_user(db_user_id)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    count = 0
  pct = (count / max_receipts * 100) if max_receipts > 0 else 0
  return {
    "receipt_count": count,
    "max_receipts": max_receipts,
    "tier": tier,
    "at_80_percent": pct >= 80.0,
  }

### `src/app/modules/receipt_parser/application/receipt_math_validation_pure.py`
