### `src/app/modules/receipt_parser/infrastructure/receipt_ale.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import base64
import binascii
import json
from datetime import date, datetime
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Any
import structlog
from cryptography.fernet import InvalidToken
from app.infrastructure.encryption import (
  decrypt_bytes,
  encrypt_bytes,
  hmac_sha256_hex,
)
logger = structlog.get_logger()
_FERNET_MIN_B64_LEN = 80
_FERNET_MIN_PAYLOAD_LEN = 57
_FERNET_VERSION_BYTE = 0x80
def _looks_like_fernet_ciphertext(value: str) -> bool:  # pragma: no mutate
  if len(value) < _FERNET_MIN_B64_LEN:
    return False
  try:
    raw_ascii = value.encode("ascii")
  except UnicodeEncodeError:
    return False
  pad = (-len(raw_ascii)) % 4
  to_decode = raw_ascii + (b"=" * pad if pad else b"")
  try:
    raw = base64.urlsafe_b64decode(to_decode)
  except binascii.Error:
    return False
  if len(raw) < _FERNET_MIN_PAYLOAD_LEN:
    return False
  return raw[0] == _FERNET_VERSION_BYTE
def fingerprint_issuer_name(name: str) -> str:
  normalized = name.strip().casefold()
  return hmac_sha256_hex(normalized, context="receipt-issuer-name-v1")
def fingerprint_user_role(role: str) -> str:
  normalized = role.strip().casefold()
  return hmac_sha256_hex(normalized, context="receipt-user-role-v1")
def encrypt_field(value: str | None) -> str | None:
  if value is None:
    return None
  raw = value.encode("utf-8")
  encrypted = encrypt_bytes(raw)
  return encrypted.decode("ascii")
def decrypt_field(value: str | None) -> str | None:
  if value is None:
    return None
  if not _looks_like_fernet_ciphertext(value):
    return value
  try:
    token = value.encode("ascii")
    decrypted = decrypt_bytes(token)
    return decrypted.decode("utf-8")
  except (InvalidToken, binascii.Error, UnicodeDecodeError, UnicodeEncodeError):
    logger.warning(
      "receipt_ale_decrypt_failed",
      fallback="returning_raw_value",
    )
    return value
def encrypt_json_value(value: Any) -> str:
  raw = json.dumps(value, default=str).encode("utf-8")
  return encrypt_bytes(raw).decode("ascii")
def decrypt_json_value(token: str) -> Any:
  try:
    plain = decrypt_bytes(token.encode("ascii")).decode("utf-8")
    return json.loads(plain)
  except (InvalidToken, binascii.Error, UnicodeDecodeError, UnicodeEncodeError):
    return json.loads(token)
def encrypt_decimal_string(d: Decimal | str) -> str:
  text = format(d, "f") if isinstance(d, Decimal) else str(d).strip()
  enc = encrypt_field(text)
  assert enc is not None
  return enc
def decrypt_decimal_string(token: str) -> str:
  plain = decrypt_field(token)
  return plain if plain is not None else ""
def encrypt_version_int(version: int) -> str:
  enc = encrypt_field(str(version))
  assert enc is not None
  return enc
def decrypt_version_int(raw: str | None) -> int | None:
  if raw is None:
    return None
  plain = decrypt_field(raw)
  if plain is None:
    return None
  try:
    return int(plain)
  except ValueError:
    return None
def encrypt_date_iso(d: date | datetime | str) -> str:
  iso = d if isinstance(d, str) else d.isoformat()
  enc = encrypt_field(iso)
  assert enc is not None
  return enc
def encrypt_bool(value: bool | None) -> str | None:
  if value is None:
    return None
  return encrypt_field("true" if value else "false")
def decrypt_bool(value: str | None) -> bool | None:
  if value is None:
    return None
  plain = decrypt_field(value)
  if plain is None:
    return None
  normalized = plain.strip().lower()
  if normalized in ("true", "1", "yes"):
    return True
  if normalized in ("false", "0", "no"):
    return False
  logger.warning(
    "receipt_ale_decrypt_bool_unexpected_value",
    raw=plain[:20],
    fallback="returning_none",
  )
  return None
```

### `src/app/modules/receipt_parser/infrastructure/repositories.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import base64
import json
import uuid
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import Any, Protocol, cast
import structlog
from sqlalchemy import delete, or_, select, text
from sqlalchemy import func as sqlfunc
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.config import settings
from app.infrastructure.encryption import decrypt_bytes, encrypt_bytes
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.entities import ReceiptParserUser, ReceiptRecord
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.errors import (
  ReceiptIdBelongsToAnotherTenantError,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.domain.schemas import ReceiptSchema
from app.modules.receipt_parser.infrastructure import receipt_ale as _rale
logger = structlog.get_logger()
def _parse_uuid(value: str, field_name: str) -> uuid.UUID:
  try:
    return uuid.UUID(value)
  except ValueError as exc:
    raise ValueError(f"Invalid {field_name}: expected UUID.") from exc
def _encrypt_payload(receipt: ReceiptSchema) -> str:
  raw = receipt.model_dump(mode="json")
  plaintext = json.dumps(raw, default=str).encode("utf-8")
  token = encrypt_bytes(plaintext)
  return token.decode("ascii")
def _decrypt_payload(encrypted_payload: str) -> ReceiptSchema:
  try:
    if encrypted_payload.startswith("Z0"):
      token = base64.b64decode(encrypted_payload.encode("ascii"))
    else:
      token = encrypted_payload.encode("ascii")
    plaintext = decrypt_bytes(token)
    data = json.loads(plaintext.decode("utf-8"))
    return ReceiptSchema.model_validate(data)
  except Exception as exc:
    logger.warning(
      "receipt_decryption_failed",
      error=str(exc),
    )
    raise
def _reconstruct_receipt_from_record(rec: ReceiptRecord) -> ReceiptSchema:
  try:
    return _decrypt_payload(cast(str, rec.payload_encrypted))
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "receipt_payload_decryption_fallback",
      receipt_id=str(rec.id),
      error=str(exc),
    )
    items_raw = _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "items", None)))
    taxes_raw = _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "taxes", None)))
    try:
      items = json.loads(items_raw) if items_raw else []
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
      items = []
    try:
      taxes = json.loads(taxes_raw) if taxes_raw else []
    except json.JSONDecodeError:
      taxes = []
    shipping_raw = _rale.decrypt_field(
      cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "shipping", None))
    )
    change_due_raw = _rale.decrypt_field(
      cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "change_due", None))
    )
    data = {
      "id": str(rec.id),
      "issuer_name": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "issuer_name", None))
      )
      or "",
      "payer_name": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "payer_name", None))
      )
      or "",
      "invoice_number": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "invoice_number", None))
      )
      or "",
      "billing_id": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "billing_id", None))
      ),
      "order_number": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "order_number", None))
      ),
      "nif_cif_ssn": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "nif_cif_ssn", None))
      )
      or "",
      "invoice_date": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "invoice_date", None))
      )
      or "",
      "due_date": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "due_date", None))
      )
      or None,
      "type": _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "type", None)))
      or "RECEIVED",
      "user_role": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "user_role", None))
      )
      or "payer",
      "currency": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "currency", None))
      )
      or "USD",
      "subtotal": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "subtotal", None))
      )
      or "0",
      "discount": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "discount", None))
      )
      or "0",
      "tax": _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "tax", None)))
      or "0",
      "shipping": shipping_raw if shipping_raw else None,
      "total": _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "total", None)))
      or "0",
      "items": items,
      "taxes": taxes,
      "payment_received": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "payment_received", None))
      ),
      "change_due": change_due_raw if change_due_raw else None,
      "source": _rale.decrypt_field(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "source", None))
      ),
      "version": _rale.decrypt_version_int(
        cast(str | None, getattr(rec, "version", None))
      ),
    }
    return ReceiptSchema.model_validate(data)
def _partition_users_equal(stored: object, user_key: uuid.UUID | str) -> bool:
  if stored == user_key:
    return True
  try:
    return uuid.UUID(str(stored)) == uuid.UUID(str(user_key))
  except ValueError:
    return str(stored) == str(user_key)
def _receipt_row_column_values(
  *,
  receipt_uuid: uuid.UUID,
  user_key: uuid.UUID | str,
  user_role: str,
  receipt: ReceiptSchema,
  image_hash: str | None,
  issuer_embedding: list[float] | None,
  payload_encrypted: str,
  items_json: list[Any],
  taxes_json: list[Any],
  nif_cif_ssn: str,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  ver = int(receipt.version or 1)
  issuer_plain = (receipt.issuer_name or "")[:512]
  payer_name = (receipt.payer_name or "")[:512]
  invoice_number = (receipt.invoice_number or "")[:128]
  invoice_date = receipt.invoice_date or ""
  due_date = receipt.due_date or ""
  receipt_type = receipt.type or "RECEIVED"
  currency = (receipt.currency or "USD")[:3]
  subtotal = receipt.subtotal or "0"
  discount = receipt.discount or "0"
  tax = receipt.tax or "0"
  shipping = receipt.shipping
  total = receipt.total or "0"
  return {
    "id": receipt_uuid,
    "tenant_id": user_key,
    "user_id": user_key,
    "user_role": _rale.encrypt_field(user_role),
    "user_role_fp": _rale.fingerprint_user_role(user_role),
    "issuer_name": _rale.encrypt_field(issuer_plain),
    "issuer_name_fp": _rale.fingerprint_issuer_name(issuer_plain),
    "payer_name": _rale.encrypt_field(payer_name),
    "issuer_embedding": issuer_embedding,
    "image_hash": image_hash,
    "invoice_number": _rale.encrypt_field(invoice_number),
    "billing_id": _rale.encrypt_field(receipt.billing_id[:128])
    if receipt.billing_id is not None
    else None,
    "order_number": _rale.encrypt_field(receipt.order_number[:128])
    if receipt.order_number is not None
    else None,
    "nif_cif_ssn": _rale.encrypt_field(nif_cif_ssn),
    "invoice_date": _rale.encrypt_date_iso(invoice_date),
    "due_date": _rale.encrypt_date_iso(due_date) if due_date else None,
    "type": _rale.encrypt_field(receipt_type),
    "currency": _rale.encrypt_field(currency),
    "subtotal": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(subtotal),
    "discount": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(discount),
    "tax": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(tax),
    "shipping": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(shipping)
    if shipping is not None
    else None,
    "total": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(total),
    "items": _rale.encrypt_json_value(items_json),
    "taxes": _rale.encrypt_json_value(taxes_json),
    "payment_received": _rale.encrypt_field(receipt.payment_received)
    if receipt.payment_received is not None
    else None,
    "change_due": _rale.encrypt_decimal_string(receipt.change_due)
    if receipt.change_due is not None
    else None,
    "source": _rale.encrypt_field(receipt.source)
    if receipt.source is not None
    else None,
    "version": _rale.encrypt_version_int(ver),
    "payload_encrypted": payload_encrypted,
  }
class ReceiptRepository:
  def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession) -> None:
    self._session = session
  def _dialect_name(self) -> str:
    bind = getattr(self._session, "bind", None)
    if bind is not None:
      sync_eng = getattr(bind, "sync_engine", None)
      if sync_eng is not None and hasattr(sync_eng, "dialect"):
        return str(sync_eng.dialect.name)
      dialect = getattr(bind, "dialect", None)
      if dialect is not None:
        return str(dialect.name)
    url = (settings.DATABASE_URL or "").lower()
    if "postgresql" in url or "postgres" in url:
      return "postgresql"
    return "sqlite"
  def _user_id_for_db(self, user_id: str) -> uuid.UUID | str:
    if self._dialect_name() == "postgresql":
      return _parse_uuid(user_id, "user_id")
    try:
      return uuid.UUID(user_id)
    except ValueError:
      return user_id
  async def save(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    user_role: str,
    receipt: ReceiptSchema,
    image_hash: str | None = None,
    issuer_embedding: list[float] | None = None,
  ) -> str:
    receipt_uuid: uuid.UUID
    explicit_client_id: bool
    if receipt.id:
      try:
        receipt_uuid = uuid.UUID(receipt.id)
        explicit_client_id = True
      except ValueError:
        receipt_uuid = uuid.uuid4()
        explicit_client_id = False
    else:
      receipt_uuid = uuid.uuid4()
      explicit_client_id = False
    receipt.id = str(receipt_uuid)
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    now = datetime.now(UTC)
    receipt.source = receipt.source or "llm_parse"
    receipt.version = receipt.version or 1
    stmt_own = (
      select(ReceiptRecord)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid,
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
      )
      .limit(1)
    )
    res_own = await self._session.execute(stmt_own)
    existing = res_own.scalar_one_or_none()
    if existing is None and explicit_client_id:
      stmt_global = (
        select(ReceiptRecord).where(ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid).limit(1)
      )
      res_global = await self._session.execute(stmt_global)
      blocking = res_global.scalar_one_or_none()
      if blocking is not None:
        if not _partition_users_equal(blocking.user_id, user_key):
          raise ReceiptIdBelongsToAnotherTenantError(
            "Receipt id is not owned by the current tenant."
          )
        existing = blocking
    if existing is None:
      if receipt.created_at is None:
        receipt.created_at = now
      if receipt.updated_at is None:
        receipt.updated_at = receipt.created_at
    else:
      created_existing = cast(datetime | None, existing.created_at)
      if created_existing is not None:
        receipt.created_at = created_existing
      elif receipt.created_at is None:
        receipt.created_at = now
      receipt.updated_at = now
    payload_encrypted = _encrypt_payload(receipt)
    receipt_json = receipt.model_dump(mode="json")
    items_json = cast(list[Any], receipt_json.get("items") or [])
    taxes_json = cast(list[Any], receipt_json.get("taxes") or [])
    nif_cif_ssn = (receipt.nif_cif_ssn or "")[:64]
    emb: list[float] | None = None
    if (
      issuer_embedding is not None
      and len(issuer_embedding) == settings.EMBEDDING_DIM
    ):
      emb = issuer_embedding
    row_values = _receipt_row_column_values(
      receipt_uuid=receipt_uuid,
      user_key=user_key,
      user_role=user_role,
      receipt=receipt,
      image_hash=image_hash,
      issuer_embedding=emb,
      payload_encrypted=payload_encrypted,
      items_json=items_json,
      taxes_json=taxes_json,
      nif_cif_ssn=nif_cif_ssn,
    )
    record: ReceiptRecord
    if existing is not None:
      record = existing
      for attr, value in row_values.items():
        setattr(record, attr, value)
    else:
      record = ReceiptRecord(**row_values)
      self._session.add(record)
    await self._session.flush()
    await self._session.refresh(record)
    created_at = cast(datetime | None, record.created_at)
    updated_at = cast(datetime | None, record.updated_at)
    if created_at is not None:
      receipt.created_at = created_at
    if updated_at is not None:
      receipt.updated_at = updated_at
    return str(receipt_uuid)
  async def get_latest_version_by_image_hash(
    self, user_id: str, image_hash: str
  ) -> int | None:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = select(ReceiptRecord).where(
      ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.image_hash == image_hash,
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    rows = list(result.scalars().all())
    best: int | None = None
    for row in rows:
      v = _rale.decrypt_version_int(cast(str, row.version))
      if v is not None and (best is None or v > best):
        best = v
    return best
  async def count_by_user(self, user_id: str) -> int:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = select(sqlfunc.count(ReceiptRecord.id)).where(
      ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    return int(result.scalar() or 0)
  async def count_by_user_and_image_hash(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    image_hash: str,
  ) -> int:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = select(sqlfunc.count(ReceiptRecord.id)).where(
      ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.image_hash == image_hash,
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    return int(result.scalar() or 0)
  async def get_chain_row_version_if_owned(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    image_hash: str,
    receipt_id: str,
  ) -> int | None:
    try:
      rid = uuid.UUID(receipt_id)
    except ValueError:
      return None
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.image_hash == image_hash,
        ReceiptRecord.id == rid,
      )
      .limit(1)
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    rec = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if rec is None:
      return None
    v = _rale.decrypt_version_int(cast(str, rec.version))
    return v
  async def list_by_user(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    user_role: str | None = None,
    limit: int = 100,
    offset: int = 0,
  ) -> list[ReceiptSchema]:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
      )
      .order_by(ReceiptRecord.created_at.desc())
      .limit(limit)
      .offset(offset)
    )
    if user_role is not None:
      fp = _rale.fingerprint_user_role(user_role)
      stmt = stmt.where(
        or_(
          ReceiptRecord.user_role_fp == fp,
          ReceiptRecord.user_role_fp.is_(None),
        )
      )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    records = list(result.scalars().all())
    out: list[ReceiptSchema] = []
    for rec in records:
      try:
        receipt = _reconstruct_receipt_from_record(rec)
        if (
          user_role is not None
          and getattr(rec, "user_role_fp", None) is None
          and receipt.user_role != user_role
        ):
          continue
        out.append(
          receipt.model_copy(
            update={
              "created_at": getattr(rec, "created_at", None),
              "updated_at": getattr(rec, "updated_at", None),
            }
          )
        )
      except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.error(
          "receipt_reconstruction_failed",
          receipt_id=str(rec.id),
          error=str(exc),
        )
        continue
    return out
  async def get_by_id(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    receipt_id: str,
  ) -> ReceiptSchema | None:
    try:
      receipt_uuid = uuid.UUID(receipt_id)
    except ValueError:
      return None
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid,
      )
      .limit(1)
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    rec = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if rec is None:
      return None
    try:
      receipt = _reconstruct_receipt_from_record(rec)
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.error(
        "receipt_reconstruction_failed", receipt_id=str(rec.id), error=str(exc)
      )
      return None
    return receipt.model_copy(
      update={
        "created_at": getattr(rec, "created_at", None),
        "updated_at": getattr(rec, "updated_at", None),
      }
    )
  async def get_owner_user_id_for_receipt_id(
    self,
    receipt_id: str,
  ) -> uuid.UUID | str | None:
    try:
      receipt_uuid = uuid.UUID(receipt_id)
    except ValueError:
      return None
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord.user_id)
      .where(ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid)
      .limit(1)
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    return result.scalar_one_or_none()
  async def exists_by_id_for_tenant(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    receipt_id: str,
  ) -> bool:
    try:
      receipt_uuid = uuid.UUID(receipt_id)
    except ValueError:
      return False
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord.id)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid,
      )
      .limit(1)
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    return result.scalar_one_or_none() is not None
  async def delete_by_id(self, user_id: str, receipt_id: str) -> bool:
    try:
      receipt_uuid = uuid.UUID(receipt_id)
    except ValueError:
      return False
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = delete(ReceiptRecord).where(
      ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
      ReceiptRecord.id == receipt_uuid,
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    row_count = getattr(result, "rowcount", 0) or 0
    return int(row_count) > 0
  async def get_by_issuer_name(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    issuer_name: str,
    limit: int = 2,
    issuer_embedding: list[float] | None = None,
  ) -> list[ReceiptSchema]:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    out: list[ReceiptSchema] = []
    seen: set[Any] = set()
    dialect = self._dialect_name()
    dim = settings.EMBEDDING_DIM
    if (
      dialect == "postgresql"
      and issuer_embedding is not None
      and len(issuer_embedding) == dim
    ):
      try:
        stmt_vec = (
          select(ReceiptRecord)
          .where(
            ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
            ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
            ReceiptRecord.issuer_embedding.is_not(None),
          )
          .order_by(
            ReceiptRecord.issuer_embedding.cosine_distance(issuer_embedding)
          )
          .limit(limit)
        )
        vec_result = await self._session.execute(stmt_vec)
        for rec in vec_result.scalars().all():
          if rec.id in seen or len(out) >= limit:
            continue
          try:
            out.append(_reconstruct_receipt_from_record(rec))
            seen.add(rec.id)
          except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
            logger.error(
              "receipt_reconstruction_failed",
              receipt_id=str(rec.id),
              error=str(exc),
            )
            continue
      except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
        logger.warning(
          "receipt_issuer_vector_search_failed",
          error=str(exc),
        )
    if len(out) < limit:
      ifp = _rale.fingerprint_issuer_name(issuer_name)
      stmt_exact = (
        select(ReceiptRecord)
        .where(
          ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
          ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
          or_(
            ReceiptRecord.issuer_name_fp == ifp,
            ReceiptRecord.issuer_name_fp.is_(None),
          ),
        )
        .order_by(ReceiptRecord.created_at.desc())
        .limit(limit * 2)
      )
      ex_result = await self._session.execute(stmt_exact)
      for rec in ex_result.scalars().all():
        if rec.id in seen or len(out) >= limit:
          continue
        try:
          r = _reconstruct_receipt_from_record(rec)
          if (
            getattr(rec, "issuer_name_fp", None) is None
            and r.issuer_name != issuer_name
          ):
            continue
          out.append(r)
          seen.add(rec.id)
        except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
          logger.error(
            "receipt_reconstruction_failed",
            receipt_id=str(rec.id),
            error=str(exc),
          )
          continue
    return out[:limit]
  async def exists_by_image_hash(self, user_id: str, image_hash: str) -> bool:
    user_key = self._user_id_for_db(user_id)
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptRecord.id)
      .where(
        ReceiptRecord.user_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.tenant_id == user_key,
        ReceiptRecord.image_hash == image_hash,
      )
      .limit(1)
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    return result.scalar_one_or_none() is not None
class _ReceiptParserUserMutable(Protocol):
  email: str | None
  display_name: str | None
  avatar_url: str | None
  auth_provider: str | None
  tier: str
  balance_usd: str
  stripe_customer_id: str | None
  stripe_subscription_id: str | None
  subscription_status: str | None
  current_period_start: str | None
  current_period_end: str | None
  monthly_receipts_count: str | None
  monthly_window_start: str | None
  active_receipt_parser_llm_model: str | None
  payg: bool | None
  created_at: str | None
  updated_at: str | None
def _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user: ReceiptParserUser) -> None:
  mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
  mutable_user.email = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "email", None))
  )
  mutable_user.display_name = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "display_name", None))
  )
  mutable_user.avatar_url = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "avatar_url", None))
  )
  mutable_user.auth_provider = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "auth_provider", None))
  )
  tier_plain = _rale.decrypt_field(cast(str | None, getattr(user, "tier", None)))
  mutable_user.tier = tier_plain if tier_plain is not None else "free"
  bal_plain = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "balance_usd", None))
  )
  mutable_user.balance_usd = bal_plain if bal_plain is not None else "0"
  mutable_user.stripe_customer_id = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", None))
  )
  mutable_user.stripe_subscription_id = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "stripe_subscription_id", None))
  )
  mutable_user.subscription_status = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "subscription_status", None))
  )
  cps_raw = getattr(user, "current_period_start", None)
  if cps_raw is None:
    mutable_user.current_period_start = None
  elif isinstance(cps_raw, str):
    mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.decrypt_field(cps_raw)
  elif hasattr(cps_raw, "isoformat"):
    iso_start = cps_raw.isoformat()
    mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.decrypt_field(iso_start)
  else:
    mutable_user.current_period_start = None
  cpe_raw = getattr(user, "current_period_end", None)
  if cpe_raw is None:
    mutable_user.current_period_end = None
  elif isinstance(cpe_raw, str):
    mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.decrypt_field(cpe_raw)
  elif hasattr(cpe_raw, "isoformat"):
    iso_end = cpe_raw.isoformat()
    mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.decrypt_field(iso_end)
  else:
    mutable_user.current_period_end = None
  mutable_user.monthly_receipts_count = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "monthly_receipts_count", None))
  )
  mutable_user.monthly_window_start = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "monthly_window_start", None))
  )
  mutable_user.active_receipt_parser_llm_model = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "active_receipt_parser_llm_model", None))
  )
  mutable_user.payg = _rale.decrypt_bool(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "payg", None))
  )
  mutable_user.created_at = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "created_at", None))
  )
  mutable_user.updated_at = _rale.decrypt_field(
    cast(str | None, getattr(user, "updated_at", None))
  )
def _detach_hydrated_user(session: AsyncSession, user: ReceiptParserUser) -> None:
  session.expunge(user)
def _enc_now_receipt() -> str:
  enc = _rale.encrypt_field(datetime.now(UTC).isoformat())
  assert enc is not None
  return enc
class ReceiptParserUserRepository:
  def __init__(self, session: AsyncSession) -> None:
    self._session = session
    self._monthly_columns_checked = False
  async def _ensure_monthly_counter_columns(self) -> None:
    if self._monthly_columns_checked:
      return
    bind = self._session.bind
    dialect_name = (
      str(bind.dialect.name)
      if bind is not None and getattr(bind, "dialect", None) is not None
      else "sqlite"
    )
    missing: set[str] = set()
    if dialect_name == "postgresql":
      rows = await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns "
          "WHERE table_name = 'receipt_parser_users'"
        )
      )
      present = {str(row[0]) for row in rows.all()}
      for col in (
        "avatar_url",
        "monthly_receipts_count",
        "monthly_window_start",
        "payg",
        "active_receipt_parser_llm_model",
        "stripe_subscription_id",
        "current_period_start",
      ):
        if col not in present:
          missing.add(col)
    else:
      rows = await self._session.execute(
        text("PRAGMA table_info(receipt_parser_users)")
      )
      present = {str(row[1]) for row in rows.all()}
      for col in (
        "monthly_receipts_count",
        "monthly_window_start",
        "payg",
        "active_receipt_parser_llm_model",
        "stripe_subscription_id",
        "current_period_start",
      ):
        if col not in present:
          missing.add(col)
    if "monthly_receipts_count" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users "
          "ADD COLUMN monthly_receipts_count TEXT"
        )
      )
    if "monthly_window_start" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users "
          "ADD COLUMN monthly_window_start TEXT"
        )
      )
    if "avatar_url" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text("ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users ADD COLUMN avatar_url TEXT")
      )
    if "payg" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text("ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users ADD COLUMN payg TEXT")
      )
    if "active_receipt_parser_llm_model" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users "
          "ADD COLUMN active_receipt_parser_llm_model TEXT"
        )
      )
    if "stripe_subscription_id" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users "
          "ADD COLUMN stripe_subscription_id TEXT"
        )
      )
    if "current_period_start" in missing:
      await self._session.execute(
        text(
          "ALTER TABLE receipt_parser_users "
          "ADD COLUMN current_period_start TEXT"
        )
      )
    if missing:
      logger.warning(
        "receipt_parser_users_schema_columns_auto_added",
        columns=sorted(missing),
      )
    self._monthly_columns_checked = True
  async def get_or_create_user(self, user_id: str) -> ReceiptParserUser:
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      _now = _enc_now_receipt()
      user = ReceiptParserUser(
        user_id=user_id,
        tier=_rale.encrypt_field("free"),
        balance_usd=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_receipts_count=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_window_start=None,
        created_at=_now,
        updated_at=_now,
      )
      self._session.add(user)
      await self._session.flush()
      await self._session.refresh(user)
    _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user)
    _detach_hydrated_user(self._session, user)
    return user
  async def get_user_by_id(self, user_id: str) -> ReceiptParserUser | None:
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      return None
    _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user)
    _detach_hydrated_user(self._session, user)
    return user
  async def upsert_google_oauth_user(
    self,
    google_sub: str,
    email: str | None,
    display_name: str | None,
    avatar_url: str | None,
  ) -> ReceiptParserUser:
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == google_sub)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      _now = _enc_now_receipt()
      user = ReceiptParserUser(
        user_id=google_sub,
        tier=_rale.encrypt_field("free"),
        balance_usd=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_receipts_count=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_window_start=None,
        email=_rale.encrypt_field(email) if email else None,
        display_name=(
          _rale.encrypt_field(display_name) if display_name else None
        ),
        avatar_url=_rale.encrypt_field(avatar_url) if avatar_url else None,
        auth_provider=_rale.encrypt_field("google"),
        created_at=_now,
        updated_at=_now,
      )
      self._session.add(user)
    else:
      mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
      if email is not None:
        mutable_user.email = _rale.encrypt_field(email)
      if display_name is not None:
        mutable_user.display_name = _rale.encrypt_field(display_name)
      if avatar_url is not None:
        mutable_user.avatar_url = _rale.encrypt_field(avatar_url)
      ap = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "auth_provider", None))
      if ap is None:
        mutable_user.auth_provider = _rale.encrypt_field("google")
      mutable_user.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
    await self._session.refresh(user)
    _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user)
    _detach_hydrated_user(self._session, user)
    return user
  async def update_tier(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    tier: str,
    subscription_status: str | None = None,
    current_period_start: object | None = None,
    current_period_end: object | None = None,
    payg_wallet: bool | None = None,
  ) -> None:
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is not None:
      mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
      encrypted_tier = _rale.encrypt_field(tier)
      mutable_user.tier = encrypted_tier if encrypted_tier is not None else "free"
      if subscription_status is not None:
        mutable_user.subscription_status = _rale.encrypt_field(
          subscription_status
        )
      if current_period_start is not None:
        if isinstance(current_period_start, datetime):
          mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.encrypt_field(
            current_period_start.isoformat()
          )
        else:
          mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.encrypt_field(
            str(current_period_start)
          )
      if current_period_end is not None:
        if isinstance(current_period_end, datetime):
          mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.encrypt_field(
            current_period_end.isoformat()
          )
        else:
          mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.encrypt_field(
            str(current_period_end)
          )
      if payg_wallet is not None:
        user.payg = _rale.encrypt_bool(payg_wallet)  # type: ignore[assignment]
      mutable_user.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
      await self._session.flush()
  async def apply_stripe_subscription_state(
    self,
    *,
    user_id: str,
    tier: str | None = None,
    stripe_customer_id: str | None = None,
    stripe_subscription_id: str | None = None,
    subscription_status: str | None = None,
    current_period_start: object | None = None,
    current_period_end: object | None = None,
    payg_wallet: bool | None = None,
  ) -> None:
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      _now = _enc_now_receipt()
      user = ReceiptParserUser(
        user_id=user_id,
        tier=_rale.encrypt_field(tier or "free"),
        balance_usd=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_receipts_count=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_window_start=None,
        created_at=_now,
        updated_at=_now,
      )
      self._session.add(user)
      await self._session.flush()
      await self._session.refresh(user)
    mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    if tier is not None:
      mutable_user.tier = _rale.encrypt_field(tier) or "free"
    if stripe_customer_id is not None:
      mutable_user.stripe_customer_id = _rale.encrypt_field(stripe_customer_id)
    if stripe_subscription_id is not None:
      mutable_user.stripe_subscription_id = _rale.encrypt_field(
        stripe_subscription_id
      )
    if subscription_status is not None:
      mutable_user.subscription_status = _rale.encrypt_field(subscription_status)
    if current_period_start is not None:
      if isinstance(current_period_start, datetime):
        mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.encrypt_field(
          current_period_start.isoformat()
        )
      else:
        mutable_user.current_period_start = _rale.encrypt_field(
          str(current_period_start)
        )
    if current_period_end is not None:
      if isinstance(current_period_end, datetime):
        mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.encrypt_field(
          current_period_end.isoformat()
        )
      else:
        mutable_user.current_period_end = _rale.encrypt_field(
          str(current_period_end)
        )
    if payg_wallet is not None:
      user.payg = _rale.encrypt_bool(payg_wallet)  # type: ignore[assignment]
    mutable_user.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
  async def find_user_by_stripe_customer_id(
    self,
    stripe_customer_id: str,
  ) -> ReceiptParserUser | None:
    candidate = str(stripe_customer_id or "").strip()
    if not candidate:
      return None
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    result = await self._session.execute(select(ReceiptParserUser))
    for user in result.scalars().all():
      encrypted = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", None))
      if (_rale.decrypt_field(encrypted) or "").strip() != candidate:
        continue
      _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user)
      _detach_hydrated_user(self._session, user)
      return user
    return None
  async def find_user_by_stripe_subscription_id(
    self,
    stripe_subscription_id: str,
  ) -> ReceiptParserUser | None:
    candidate = str(stripe_subscription_id or "").strip()
    if not candidate:
      return None
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    result = await self._session.execute(select(ReceiptParserUser))
    for user in result.scalars().all():
      encrypted = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "stripe_subscription_id", None))
      if (_rale.decrypt_field(encrypted) or "").strip() != candidate:
        continue
      _hydrate_receipt_parser_user(user)
      _detach_hydrated_user(self._session, user)
      return user
    return None
  async def get_monthly_receipts_usage(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    *,
    window_key: str,
  ) -> int:
    user = await self.get_or_create_user(user_id)
    mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    stored_window = mutable_user.monthly_window_start
    if stored_window != window_key:
      return 0
    raw_count = mutable_user.monthly_receipts_count
    if raw_count is None:
      return 0
    try:
      return max(0, int(raw_count))
    except ValueError:
      return 0
  async def increment_monthly_receipts_usage(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    *,
    window_key: str,
  ) -> int:
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      _now = _enc_now_receipt()
      user = ReceiptParserUser(
        user_id=user_id,
        tier=_rale.encrypt_field("free"),
        balance_usd=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_receipts_count=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_window_start=None,
        created_at=_now,
        updated_at=_now,
      )
      self._session.add(user)
      await self._session.flush()
      await self._session.refresh(user)
    raw_window = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "monthly_window_start", None))
    raw_count_enc = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "monthly_receipts_count", None))
    stored_window = _rale.decrypt_field(raw_window)
    raw_count_plain = _rale.decrypt_field(raw_count_enc)
    count = 0
    if stored_window == window_key and raw_count_plain is not None:
      try:
        count = max(0, int(raw_count_plain))
      except ValueError:
        count = 0
    new_count = count + 1
    mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    mutable_user.monthly_window_start = _rale.encrypt_field(window_key)
    mutable_user.monthly_receipts_count = _rale.encrypt_field(str(new_count))
    mutable_user.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
    return new_count
  async def get_balance_usd_decimal(self, user_id: str) -> Decimal:
    row = await self.get_user_by_id(user_id)
    if row is None:
      return Decimal("0")
    raw = getattr(row, "balance_usd", None)
    if raw is None or not str(raw).strip():
      return Decimal("0")
    return Decimal(str(raw).strip())
  async def apply_balance_topup_from_stripe_cents(
    self, user_id: str, *, amount_total_cents: int
  ) -> Decimal:
    if amount_total_cents <= 0:
      return await self.get_balance_usd_decimal(user_id)
    credit = (Decimal(amount_total_cents) / Decimal(100)).quantize(
      Decimal("0.000001")
    )
    await self._ensure_monthly_counter_columns()
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      _now = _enc_now_receipt()
      user = ReceiptParserUser(
        user_id=user_id,
        tier=_rale.encrypt_field("free"),
        balance_usd=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_receipts_count=_rale.encrypt_field("0"),
        monthly_window_start=None,
        created_at=_now,
        updated_at=_now,
      )
      self._session.add(user)
      await self._session.flush()
      await self._session.refresh(user)
    bal_enc = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "balance_usd", None))
    prev_plain = _rale.decrypt_field(bal_enc)
    prev = Decimal(str(prev_plain).strip() if prev_plain else "0")
    new_balance = (prev + credit).quantize(Decimal("0.000001"))
    mutable_user = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    mutable_user.balance_usd = _rale.encrypt_field(str(new_balance))  # type: ignore[assignment]
    user.payg = _rale.encrypt_bool(True)  # type: ignore[assignment]
    mutable_user.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
    return new_balance
  async def debit_wallet_usd(self, user_id: str, amount: Decimal) -> Decimal:
    if amount <= 0:
      return Decimal("0")
    stmt = (
      select(ReceiptParserUser)
      .where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
      .with_for_update()
    )
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      return Decimal("0")
    bal_enc = cast(str | None, getattr(user, "balance_usd", None))
    bal_plain = _rale.decrypt_field(bal_enc)
    bal = Decimal(str(bal_plain).strip() if bal_plain else "0")
    debit = min(amount, bal).quantize(Decimal("0.000001"))
    new_b = (bal - debit).quantize(Decimal("0.000001"))
    encrypted = _rale.encrypt_field(str(new_b))
    assert isinstance(encrypted, str)
    m = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    m.balance_usd = encrypted
    m.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
    return debit
  async def update_active_receipt_parser_llm_model(
    self,
    user_id: str,
    model_id: str | None,
  ) -> None:
    stmt = select(ReceiptParserUser).where(ReceiptParserUser.user_id == user_id)
    result = await self._session.execute(stmt)
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is None:
      return
    mid = (model_id or "").strip()
    m = cast(_ReceiptParserUserMutable, user)
    m.active_receipt_parser_llm_model = _rale.encrypt_field(mid) if mid else None
    m.updated_at = _enc_now_receipt()
    await self._session.flush()
```

from app.modules.audio_notes.i18n.privacy_policy import get_privacy_policy

from app.modules.audio_notes.infrastructure.whisper_groq import WhisperGroqAdapter
router = APIRouter(tags=["audio_notes"])
logger = structlog.get_logger(__name__)
TELEGRAM_TEXT_LIMIT = 4096
_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS: int = 120
_TICKET_TG_MEDIA_GROUP_WAIT_SECONDS: float = 1.5
_TICKET_TG_PENDING_PREFIX: str = "ticket:tg_media_pending:audio_notes:"
_TICKET_CREATE_PENDING_PREFIX: str = "ticket:tg_ticket_create_pending:audio_notes:"
_TICKET_CMD_IDEMPOTENCY_PREFIX: str = "ticket:tg_ticket_cmd_idem:audio_notes:"
_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_GUARD_PREFIX: str = "audio:tg_webhook_guard:audio_notes:"
_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_GUARD_TTL_SECONDS: int = 600
_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_PAID_FAILURE_TTL_SECONDS: int = 1800
_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_FREE_FAILURE_TTL_SECONDS: int = 300
_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_FREE_MAX_ATTEMPTS: int = 3
_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN: int = 16
_LANGUAGE_COMMANDS: set[str] = {"/lang", "/language", "/idioma"}
_LANGUAGE_AUTO_VALUES: set[str] = {"auto", "telegram", "default", "reset"}
_RATE_LIMIT_KEY_PREFIX: str = "audio_notes:rate_limit"
_RATE_LIMIT_TTL_SECONDS: int = 86400
_RATE_LIMIT_GLOBAL_PER_USER: int = 500
_RATE_LIMITS_PER_ACTION: dict[str, int] = {
  "lang": 20,
  "rules": 100,
  "history": 100,
  "upgrade": 100,
  "use": 100,
  "privacy": 100,
  "cancel": 50,
  "ticket": 30,
  "llms": 50,
  "help": 50,
}
class _PreferredLanguageUser(Protocol):
  preferred_language_code: str | None
def _cache_lookup_latency_ms(start_time: float) -> float:
  return round((perf_counter() - start_time) * 1000, 3)
def _log_audio_summary_from_cache(
  *,
  content_hash: str,
  user_id: str,
  latency_ms: float,
  source: str,
) -> None:
  logger.info(
    "audio_summary_from_cache",
    source=source,
    layer="redis_idempotency_guard",
    hash=content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN],
    user_id=user_id,
    latency_ms=latency_ms,
    cost_saved_usd=0.0,
  )
def _ticket_tg_pending_key(*, user_id: str, media_group_id: str) -> str:
  return f"{_TICKET_TG_PENDING_PREFIX}{user_id}:{media_group_id}"
def _ticket_create_pending_key(*, pending_id: str) -> str:
  return f"{_TICKET_CREATE_PENDING_PREFIX}{pending_id}"
def _ticket_cmd_idempotency_key(*, chat_id: str, telegram_message_id: int) -> str:
  return f"{_TICKET_CMD_IDEMPOTENCY_PREFIX}{chat_id}:{telegram_message_id}"
def _audio_webhook_guard_key(*, chat_id: str, file_id: str) -> str:
  return f"{_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_GUARD_PREFIX}{chat_id}:{file_id}"
async def _try_claim_audio_webhook_guard(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  guard_key: str,
) -> tuple[bool, dict[str, Any] | None]:
  payload = {"status": "processing"}
  try:
    claimed = await cache.set(
      guard_key,
      payload,
      ttl=_AUDIO_WEBHOOK_GUARD_TTL_SECONDS,
      nx=True,
    )
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    return True, None
  if claimed:
    return True, payload
  try:
    existing = await cache.get(guard_key)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    return True, None
  if isinstance(existing, dict):
    return False, existing
  return True, None
async def _set_audio_webhook_guard_state(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  guard_key: str,
  state: dict[str, Any],
  ttl_seconds: int,
) -> None:
  await cache.set(guard_key, state, ttl=ttl_seconds)
def _is_paid_audio_tier(raw_tier: str) -> bool:
  return raw_tier in {"premium", "pro", "payg"}
def _preferred_language_from_user(user: object, *, fallback: str = "en") -> str:
  raw = getattr(user, "preferred_language_code", None)
  if isinstance(raw, str) and raw.strip():
    return normalize_locale(raw)
  return normalize_locale(fallback)
def _supported_locale_or_none(language_code: object) -> str | None:
  if not isinstance(language_code, str):
    return None
  raw = language_code.strip()
  if not raw:
    return None
  lang = raw[:2].lower()
  if lang in SUPPORTED_LANGS:
    return lang
  return None
def _telegram_user_language_code(from_user: object) -> tuple[str | None, str]:
  if not isinstance(from_user, dict):
    return None, ""
  raw = from_user.get("language_code")
  raw_text = raw.strip() if isinstance(raw, str) else ""
  return _supported_locale_or_none(raw_text), raw_text
def _command_base(command: str) -> str:
  return command.split("@", maxsplit=1)[0].strip().lower()
def _text_command(text: object) -> str:
  if not isinstance(text, str):
    return ""
  parts = text.strip().split(maxsplit=1)
  if not parts:
    return ""
  return _command_base(parts[0])
def _language_command_arg(text: object) -> str:
  if not isinstance(text, str):
    return ""
  parts = text.strip().split(maxsplit=1)
  return parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else ""
def _resolve_message_language(
  *,
  user: _PreferredLanguageUser,
  from_user: object,
  chat_id: str,
) -> str:
  stored_raw = str(getattr(user, "preferred_language_code", "") or "").strip()
  stored_lang = _supported_locale_or_none(stored_raw)
  telegram_lang, telegram_raw = _telegram_user_language_code(from_user)
  if stored_lang:
    logger.info(
      "audio_notes_telegram_language_resolved",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      source="stored_preference",
      stored_preferred_language=stored_raw,
      telegram_language_code=telegram_raw or None,
      resolved_language_code=stored_lang,
    )
    return stored_lang
  if telegram_lang:
    user.preferred_language_code = telegram_lang
    logger.info(
      "audio_notes_telegram_language_resolved",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      source="telegram_from_user_initialized",
      stored_preferred_language=None,
      telegram_language_code=telegram_raw or None,
      resolved_language_code=telegram_lang,
    )
    return telegram_lang
  logger.info(
    "audio_notes_telegram_language_resolved",
    chat_id=chat_id,
    source="default",
    stored_preferred_language=stored_raw or None,
    telegram_language_code=telegram_raw or None,
    resolved_language_code=normalize_locale("en"),
  )
  return normalize_locale("en")
def _rate_limit_day_bucket() -> int:
  return int(_now_seconds() // _RATE_LIMIT_TTL_SECONDS)
def _rate_limit_counter_key(chat_id: str, action: str) -> str:
  bucket = _rate_limit_day_bucket()
  return f"{_RATE_LIMIT_KEY_PREFIX}:{chat_id}:{action}:{bucket}"
def _rate_limit_notified_key(chat_id: str, action: str) -> str:
  bucket = _rate_limit_day_bucket()
  return f"{_RATE_LIMIT_KEY_PREFIX}:notified:{chat_id}:{action}:{bucket}"
async def _enforce_rate_limit(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  chat_id: str,
  action: str,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  language_code: str,
) -> bool:
  action_limit = _RATE_LIMITS_PER_ACTION.get(action)
  if action_limit is None:
    return True
  try:
    action_count = await cache.incr_float(
      _rate_limit_counter_key(chat_id, action),
      1.0,
      ttl=_RATE_LIMIT_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
    global_count = await cache.incr_float(
      _rate_limit_counter_key(chat_id, "_global"),
      1.0,
      ttl=_RATE_LIMIT_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "audio_notes_rate_limit_cache_unavailable",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      action=action,
    )
    return True
  if action_count <= action_limit and global_count <= _RATE_LIMIT_GLOBAL_PER_USER:
    return True
  notified_key = _rate_limit_notified_key(chat_id, action)
  try:
    just_notified = await cache.set(
      notified_key, "1", ttl=_RATE_LIMIT_TTL_SECONDS, nx=True
    )
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    just_notified = False
  if just_notified:
    try:
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr(
          "audio_notes.rate_limit.daily_exceeded",
          normalize_locale(language_code),
        ),
        parse_mode=None,
      )
    except Exception:
      logger.exception(
        "audio_notes_rate_limit_notice_failed",
        chat_id=chat_id,
        action=action,
      )
  logger.info(
    "audio_notes_rate_limit_blocked",
    chat_id=chat_id,
    action=action,
    action_count=int(action_count),
    action_limit=action_limit,
    global_count=int(global_count),
    global_limit=_RATE_LIMIT_GLOBAL_PER_USER,
    notified=bool(just_notified),
  )
  return False
async def _resolve_callback_language(
  *,
  callback: dict[str, Any],
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  chat_id: str,
) -> str:
  try:
    user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    return normalize_locale("en")
  return _resolve_message_language(
    user=user,
    from_user=callback.get("from") or {},
    chat_id=chat_id,
  )
def _build_llms_finops_line(
  *,
  lang: str,
  cost_per_minute: Decimal,
  max_minutes: int,
) -> str:
  cost_str = f"{cost_per_minute:.4f}"
  return tr(
    "audio_notes.llms.finops_line",
    lang,
    cost=cost_str,
    max_minutes=max_minutes,
  )
def _build_audio_processing_retry_later_message(
  language_code: str,
  *,
  can_create_ticket: bool,
) -> str:
  return tr(
    (
      "audio_notes.transcription.error_retry_later_support"
      if can_create_ticket
      else "audio_notes.transcription.error_retry_later"
    ),
    normalize_locale(language_code),
  )
def _select_largest_photo_file_ids(photo_field: object) -> list[str]:
  if not isinstance(photo_field, list):
    return []
  candidates: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  for item in photo_field:
    if isinstance(item, dict):
      file_id_raw = item.get("file_id")
      if isinstance(file_id_raw, str) and file_id_raw.strip():
        candidates.append(item)
  if not candidates:
    return []
  def _size(p: dict[str, Any]) -> int:
    v = p.get("file_size")
    return int(v) if isinstance(v, int) and v >= 0 else 0
  best = max(candidates, key=_size)
  return [str(best.get("file_id") or "").strip()]
def _to_public_attachment_url(*, url: str) -> str:
  if url.startswith("/"):
    base = str(getattr(settings, "WEBHOOK_URL", "") or "").strip()
    if base:
      return f"{base.rstrip('/')}{url}"
  return url
async def _download_and_store_telegram_image_as_support_attachment(
  *,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort,
  module: str,
  user_id: str,
  ticket_id: int | None,
  file_id: str,
  strict: bool,
) -> SupportAttachment | None:
  try:
    data, filename_hint = await telegram_client.get_file_bytes(file_id)
  except HTTPStatusError:
    if strict:
      raise
    return None
  size_bytes = len(data)
  if size_bytes > MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES:
    if strict:
      raise ValueError("Attachment exceeds max size of 5MB per file.")
    return None
  try:
    content_type = infer_content_type_from_filename_hint(filename_hint)
  except ValueError:
    if strict:
      raise
    return None
  stored = await storage.store_attachment(
    module=module,
    user_id=user_id,
    ticket_id=ticket_id,
    filename=filename_hint,
    content_type=content_type,
    data=data,
  )
  created_at = stored.created_at
  return SupportAttachment(
    url=str(stored.url or "").strip(),
    filename=stored.filename,
    content_type=stored.content_type,
    size_bytes=stored.size_bytes,
    created_at=created_at,
  )
async def _collect_ticket_attachments_for_media_group(
  *,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  media_group_id: str,
  action: str,
  ticket_id: int | None,
  photo_file_ids: list[str],
) -> list[SupportAttachment]:
  pending_key = _ticket_tg_pending_key(user_id=user_id, media_group_id=media_group_id)
  pending: dict[str, Any] = {
    "processed": False,
    "action": action,
    "ticket_id": ticket_id,
    "attachment_count": 0,
    "total_attachment_bytes": 0,
    "attachments": [],
  }
  try:
    existing_raw = await cache.get(pending_key)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    existing_raw = None
  if isinstance(existing_raw, dict):
    pending_merged = existing_raw
    pending_merged["action"] = action
    pending_merged["ticket_id"] = ticket_id
    await cache.set(pending_key, pending_merged, ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS)
  else:
    await cache.set(
      pending_key,
      pending,
      ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS,
      nx=True,
    )
  local_attachments: list[SupportAttachment] = []
  for file_id in photo_file_ids:
    stored = await _download_and_store_telegram_image_as_support_attachment(
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      storage=storage,
      module="audio_notes",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      file_id=file_id,
      strict=True,
    )
    if stored is None:
      continue
    local_attachments.append(stored)
    pending["attachment_count"] += 1
    pending["total_attachment_bytes"] += int(stored.size_bytes or 0)
    validate_attachment_limits(
      attachment_count=pending["attachment_count"],
      total_bytes=pending["total_attachment_bytes"],
    )
    pending["attachments"].append(
      {
        "url": stored.url,
        "filename": stored.filename,
        "content_type": stored.content_type,
        "size_bytes": stored.size_bytes,
        "created_at": stored.created_at.isoformat()
        if stored.created_at
        else None,
        "telegram_file_id": file_id,
      }
    )
  try:
    current_raw = await cache.get(pending_key)
    if isinstance(current_raw, dict):
      cur_attachments_raw = current_raw.get("attachments")
      if not isinstance(cur_attachments_raw, list):
        cur_attachments_raw = []
      def _fingerprint(item: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, Any, Any]:
        telegram_file_id = item.get("telegram_file_id")
        if isinstance(telegram_file_id, str) and telegram_file_id.strip():
          return ("telegram_file_id", telegram_file_id.strip(), None)
        return (
          str(item.get("url") or "").strip(),
          item.get("filename"),
          item.get("size_bytes"),
        )
      existing_fps: set[tuple[str, Any, Any]] = set()
      merged_attachments_raw: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
      for it in cur_attachments_raw:
        if isinstance(it, dict):
          fp = _fingerprint(it)
          existing_fps.add(fp)
          merged_attachments_raw.append(it)
      leader_items = pending.get("attachments") or []
      if isinstance(leader_items, list):
        for it in leader_items:
          if not isinstance(it, dict):
            continue
          fp = _fingerprint(it)
          if fp in existing_fps:
            continue
          existing_fps.add(fp)
          merged_attachments_raw.append(it)
      def _sort_key(item: dict[str, Any]) -> str:
        created_at = item.get("created_at")
        if isinstance(created_at, str) and created_at.strip():
          return created_at
        return "9999-12-31T00:00:00Z"
      merged_attachments_raw.sort(key=_sort_key)
      total_bytes = 0
      for it in merged_attachments_raw:
        size = it.get("size_bytes")
        if isinstance(size, int):
          total_bytes += size
      current_raw["attachments"] = merged_attachments_raw
      current_raw["attachment_count"] = len(merged_attachments_raw)
      current_raw["total_attachment_bytes"] = total_bytes
      current_raw["action"] = pending.get("action", current_raw.get("action"))
      current_raw["ticket_id"] = pending.get(
        "ticket_id",
        current_raw.get("ticket_id"),
      )
      await cache.set(
        pending_key,
        current_raw,
        ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS,
      )
    else:
      await cache.set(pending_key, pending, ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning("ticket_media_group_merge_failed", key=pending_key)
    with suppress(Exception):
      for att in pending.get("attachments") or []:
        raw_retry = await cache.get(pending_key)
        if not isinstance(raw_retry, dict):
          raw_retry = {**pending, "attachments": []}
        existing = raw_retry.setdefault("attachments", [])
        existing_tg_ids = {
          it.get("telegram_file_id")
          for it in existing
          if isinstance(it, dict) and it.get("telegram_file_id")
        }
        tg_id = att.get("telegram_file_id") if isinstance(att, dict) else None
        if tg_id and tg_id in existing_tg_ids:
          continue
        existing.append(att)
        raw_retry["attachment_count"] = len(existing)
        await cache.set(
          pending_key,
          raw_retry,
          ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS,
        )
  loop = asyncio.get_event_loop()
  start = loop.time()
  max_wait_seconds = max(1.0, float(_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS) - 0.5)
  poll_interval_seconds = 0.25
  deadline = start + max_wait_seconds
  while loop.time() < deadline:
    await asyncio.sleep(poll_interval_seconds)
    pending_now = await cache.get(pending_key)
    if not isinstance(pending_now, dict):
      continue
    atts_raw = pending_now.get("attachments")
    if not isinstance(atts_raw, list):
      continue
    current_count = len(atts_raw)
    if current_count >= MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE:
      break
  final_raw = await cache.get(pending_key)
  if isinstance(final_raw, dict):
    attachments_raw = final_raw.get("attachments")
    if isinstance(attachments_raw, list) and attachments_raw:
      out: list[SupportAttachment] = []
      seen_tg_ids: set[str] = set()
      for item in attachments_raw:
        if not isinstance(item, dict):
          continue
        tg_id = item.get("telegram_file_id")
        if isinstance(tg_id, str) and tg_id.strip():
          if tg_id in seen_tg_ids:
            continue
          seen_tg_ids.add(tg_id)
        created_at_raw = item.get("created_at")
        created_at = None
        if isinstance(created_at_raw, str) and created_at_raw.strip():
          from datetime import datetime
          try:
            created_at = datetime.fromisoformat(created_at_raw)
          except ValueError:
            created_at = None
        out.append(
          SupportAttachment(
            url=str(item.get("url") or "").strip(),
            filename=item.get("filename"),
            content_type=item.get("content_type"),
            size_bytes=item.get("size_bytes"),
            created_at=created_at,
          )
        )
      if out:
        with suppress(Exception):
          await cache.delete(pending_key)
        return out
  with suppress(Exception):
    await cache.delete(pending_key)
  return local_attachments
async def _maybe_append_photo_to_pending_media_group(
  *,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  media_group_id: str,
  photo_file_ids: list[str],
) -> bool:
  pending_key = _ticket_tg_pending_key(user_id=user_id, media_group_id=media_group_id)
  raw = await cache.get(pending_key)
  if not isinstance(raw, dict):
    raw = {
      "processed": False,
      "action": "",
      "ticket_id": None,
      "attachment_count": 0,
      "total_attachment_bytes": 0,
      "attachments": [],
    }
    try:
      await cache.set(
        pending_key,
        raw,
        ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS,
        nx=True,
      )
      current = await cache.get(pending_key)
      if isinstance(current, dict):
        raw = current
    except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.debug(
        "ticket_media_group_follower_cache_seed_failed",
        key=pending_key,
      )
  if raw.get("processed") is True:
    return False
  ticket_id_raw = raw.get("ticket_id")
  ticket_id = int(ticket_id_raw) if isinstance(ticket_id_raw, int) else None
  attachment_count = int(raw.get("attachment_count") or 0)
  total_attachment_bytes = int(raw.get("total_attachment_bytes") or 0)
  for file_id in photo_file_ids:
    if attachment_count >= MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE:
      return True
    stored = await _download_and_store_telegram_image_as_support_attachment(
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      storage=storage,
      module="audio_notes",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      file_id=file_id,
      strict=False,
    )
    if stored is None:
      return True
    new_size = int(stored.size_bytes or 0)
    new_total = total_attachment_bytes + new_size
    new_count = attachment_count + 1
    try:
      validate_attachment_limits(
        attachment_count=new_count,
        total_bytes=new_total,
      )
    except ValueError:
      return True
    attachment_count = new_count
    total_attachment_bytes = new_total
    raw["attachment_count"] = attachment_count
    raw["total_attachment_bytes"] = total_attachment_bytes
    raw.setdefault("attachments", []).append(
      {
        "url": stored.url,
        "filename": stored.filename,
        "content_type": stored.content_type,
        "size_bytes": stored.size_bytes,
        "created_at": stored.created_at.isoformat()
        if stored.created_at
        else None,
        "telegram_file_id": file_id,
      }
    )
    await cache.set(
      pending_key,
      raw,
      ttl=_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
  return True
def _split_text_for_telegram(
  text: str, max_len: int = TELEGRAM_TEXT_LIMIT
) -> list[str]:
  if len(text) <= max_len:
    return [text]
  parts: list[str] = []
  remaining = text
  while remaining:
    if len(remaining) <= max_len:
      parts.append(remaining)
      break
    chunk = remaining[:max_len]
    split_idx = max(
      chunk.rfind("\n\n"),
      chunk.rfind("\n"),
      chunk.rfind(". "),
      chunk.rfind("! "),
      chunk.rfind("? "),
    )
    if split_idx <= 0 or split_idx < max_len // 2:
      split_idx = max_len
    part = remaining[:split_idx].rstrip()
    parts.append(part)
    remaining = remaining[split_idx:].lstrip()
  return parts
def _summary_feedback_markup(language_code: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  return {
    "inline_keyboard": [
      [
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.summary_feedback.useful_button", lang),
          "callback_data": "summary_feedback:up",
        },
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.summary_feedback.inaccurate_button", lang),
          "callback_data": "summary_feedback:down",
        },
      ]
    ]
  }
def _get_repo(session: AsyncSession) -> AudioNotesRepositoryPort:
  return AudioNotesRepository(session)
def _get_idempotency(cache: CachePort) -> IdempotencyPort:
  return RedisIdempotencyGuard(cache)
def _pagination_posture() -> CacheResiliencePosture:
  return posture_from_str(settings.AUDIO_NOTES_PAGINATION_CACHE_POSTURE)
def _idempotency_posture() -> CacheResiliencePosture:
  return posture_from_str(settings.AUDIO_NOTES_IDEMPOTENCY_CACHE_POSTURE)
async def _get_whisper(config: DynamicConfigService) -> WhisperPort:
  model = await config.get_audio_notes_whisper_model()
  return WhisperGroqAdapter(model=model)
async def _get_summarizer(
  llm: LLMProvider,
  config: DynamicConfigService,
) -> SummarizerPort:
  model_free, model_pro = await config.get_audio_notes_summary_models()
  return LLMSummarizerAdapter(
    llm,
    model_free=model_free,
    model_pro=model_pro,
  )
async def _get_audio_to_summary(
  llm: LLMProvider,
  config: DynamicConfigService,
) -> AudioToSummaryPort:
  model_free, model_pro = await config.get_audio_notes_summary_models()
  return VertexAudioToSummaryAdapter(
    llm,
    model_free=model_free,
    model_pro=model_pro,
  )
async def _get_judge(
  llm: LLMProvider,
  config: DynamicConfigService,
) -> CorrectionJudgePort:
  model = await config.get_audio_notes_judge_model()
  return LLMCorrectionJudgeAdapter(llm, model=model)
def _get_notifier() -> NotifierPort:
  return NoOpNotifier()
def _get_telegram_client() -> TelegramClient:
  if settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=500,
      detail="TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is not configured",
    )
  return TelegramClient(settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.get_secret_value())
def _build_help_text(language_code: str) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  return tr("audio_notes.help.main", lang)
def _build_rules_view_message(
  rules: list[GlossaryRuleResponse],
  *,
  tier: str,
  total_rules: int,
  page: int,
  total_pages: int,
  remaining_corrections: int,
  language_code: str,
) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if not rules:
    text = tr("audio_notes.rules.empty", lang)
    return text, {"inline_keyboard": []}
  header = tr(
    "audio_notes.rules.management_header",
    lang,
    tier=tier.upper(),
    total_rules=total_rules,
    remaining_corrections=remaining_corrections,
  )
  tap_hint = tr("audio_notes.rules.tap_delete_restore", lang)
  message_text = f"{header}\n\n{tap_hint}"
  inline_keyboard: list[list[dict[str, Any]]] = []
  inline_keyboard.append(
    [
      {
        "text": tr("audio_notes.rules.button.export_xlsx", lang),
        "callback_data": "export_glossary",
      }
    ]
  )
  page_indicator_text = tr(
    "audio_notes.rules.page_indicator",
    lang,
    page=page,
    total_pages=total_pages,
  )
  inline_keyboard.append([{"text": page_indicator_text, "callback_data": "nav:noop"}])
  for rule in rules:
    action_icon = "🗑️" if rule.is_active else "♻️"
    term = (
      rule.misheard_term[:12] + "..."
      if len(rule.misheard_term) > 15
      else rule.misheard_term
    )
    corr = (
      rule.correction[:12] + "..."
      if len(rule.correction) > 15
      else rule.correction
    )
    button_text = f"{action_icon} {term} ➡️ {corr}"
    inline_keyboard.append(
      [
        {
          "text": button_text,
          "callback_data": f"toggle:{rule.id}:{page}",
        }
      ]
    )
  nav_row: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  nav_row.append({"text": "⏮️", "callback_data": "nav:1"})
  nav_row.append({"text": "-10", "callback_data": f"nav:{max(1, page - 10)}"})
  nav_row.append({"text": "⬅️", "callback_data": f"nav:{max(1, page - 1)}"})
  nav_row.append({"text": "➡️", "callback_data": f"nav:{min(total_pages, page + 1)}"})
  nav_row.append(
    {"text": "+10", "callback_data": f"nav:{min(total_pages, page + 10)}"}
  )
  nav_row.append({"text": "⏭️", "callback_data": f"nav:{total_pages}"})
  inline_keyboard.append(nav_row)
  return message_text, {"inline_keyboard": inline_keyboard}
def _build_transactions_view_message(
  transactions: list[WalletTransaction],
  *,
  total_transactions: int,
  page: int,
  total_pages: int,
  language_code: str,
) -> tuple[str, dict[str, Any]]:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if not transactions:
    return tr("audio_notes.history.empty", lang), {"inline_keyboard": []}
  header = tr(
    "audio_notes.history.header",
    lang,
    total_transactions=total_transactions,
  )
  rows: list[str] = []
  def _translate_transaction_description(description: str) -> str:
    known_keys = {
      "PAYG wallet debit for audio_notes processing": (
        "audio_notes.history.description.audio_notes_debit"
      ),
      "PAYG wallet top-up from Stripe checkout": (
        "audio_notes.history.description.wallet_topup_stripe"
      ),
    }
    key = known_keys.get(description.strip())
    return tr(key, lang) if key else description
  for tx in transactions:
    tx_type = str(tx.transaction_type.value).upper()
    type_label = (
      tr("audio_notes.history.type_credit", lang)
      if tx_type == "CREDIT"
      else tr("audio_notes.history.type_debit", lang)
    )
    amount = Decimal(str(tx.amount_usd))
    balance = Decimal(str(tx.balance_after_usd))
    rows.append(
      tr(
        "audio_notes.history.row",
        lang,
        date=tx.created_at.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat(),
        amount=format(amount.normalize(), "f") if amount != 0 else "0",
        tx_type=type_label,
        balance=format(balance.normalize(), "f") if balance != 0 else "0",
        description=_translate_transaction_description(str(tx.description)),
      )
    )
  inline_keyboard: list[list[dict[str, Any]]] = [
    [
      {
        "text": tr("audio_notes.history.button.export_xlsx", lang),
        "callback_data": "hist_export",
      }
    ],
    [
      {
        "text": tr(
          "audio_notes.history.page_indicator",
          lang,
          page=page,
          total_pages=total_pages,
        ),
        "callback_data": "hist_nav:noop",
      }
    ],
    [
      {"text": "⏮️", "callback_data": "hist_nav:1"},
      {"text": "⏪-10", "callback_data": f"hist_nav:{max(1, page - 10)}"},
      {"text": "⬅️", "callback_data": f"hist_nav:{max(1, page - 1)}"},
      {"text": "➡️", "callback_data": f"hist_nav:{min(total_pages, page + 1)}"},
      {
        "text": "+10⏩",
        "callback_data": f"hist_nav:{min(total_pages, page + 10)}",
      },
      {"text": "⏭️", "callback_data": f"hist_nav:{total_pages}"},
    ],
  ]
  message_text = f"{header}\n\n" + "\n\n".join(rows)
  return message_text, {"inline_keyboard": inline_keyboard}
async def _send_transactions_view(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  transactions: list[WalletTransaction],
  total_transactions: int,
  page: int,
  total_pages: int,
  language_code: str,
  message_id: int | None = None,
) -> None:
  text, reply_markup = _build_transactions_view_message(
    transactions,
    total_transactions=total_transactions,
    page=page,
    total_pages=total_pages,
    language_code=language_code,
  )
  if message_id is None:
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=text,
      parse_mode=None,
      reply_markup=reply_markup,
    )
    return
  await telegram_client.edit_message_text(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    message_id=message_id,
    text=text,
    parse_mode=None,
    reply_markup=reply_markup,
  )
def _build_feedback_reply(
  payload: dict[str, str | int],
  *,
  language_code: str,
  stripe_payment_url: str = "",
) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  status = str(payload.get("status") or "")
  term = str(payload.get("term") or "")
  new_corr = str(payload.get("new_correction") or "")
  old_corr = str(payload.get("old_correction") or "")
  limit = payload.get("limit")
  tier = str(payload.get("tier") or "")
  if status == "learned":
    return tr(
      "audio_notes.feedback.learned",
      lang,
      term=term,
      new_correction=new_corr,
    )
  if status == "updated":
    return tr(
      "audio_notes.feedback.updated",
      lang,
      term=term,
      old_correction=old_corr,
      new_correction=new_corr,
    )
  if status == "limit_exceeded":
    return tr("audio_notes.feedback.limit_exceeded", lang)
  if status == "storage_limit":
    message = tr(
      "audio_notes.feedback.storage_limit",
      lang,
      tier=tier,
      limit=limit if isinstance(limit, int) else 0,
    )
    if lang == "en" and stripe_payment_url.strip():
      url = stripe_payment_url.strip()
      premium_phrase = (
        f"[subscribe]({url}) as a Premium user and get up to 300 rules."
      )
      message = message.replace(
        "subscribe as a Premium user and get up to 300 rules.",
        premium_phrase,
      )
    return message
  return tr("audio_notes.feedback.unclear", lang)
@router.post("/audio/upload", response_model=UploadResponse)
async def upload_audio(
  file: Annotated[UploadFile, File()],
  chat_id: Annotated[str, Form()],
  platform: Annotated[str, Form()] = "telegram",
  user_tier: Annotated[str, Form()] = "free",
  language_code: Annotated[str, Form()] = "en",
  regenerate: Annotated[
    bool, Query(description="Force new summary, skip cache")
  ] = False,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
  llm: LLMProvider = Depends(get_llm_provider),
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService = Depends(get_dynamic_config_service),
) -> UploadResponse:
  audio_bytes = await file.read()
  filename = file.filename or "audio.ogg"
  user_id = chat_id
  if settings.TESTING or settings.MOCK_LLM:
    return UploadResponse(
      status="completed",
      message=tr(
        "audio_notes.upload.processed",
        normalize_locale(language_code),
      ),
      hash="test-hash",
      data={
        "summary_text": "",
        "transcript": "",
      },
    )
  idempotency = _get_idempotency(cache)
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  whisper = await _get_whisper(dynamic_config)
  summarizer = await _get_summarizer(llm, dynamic_config)
  audio_to_summary = await _get_audio_to_summary(llm, dynamic_config)
  notifier = _get_notifier()
  content_hash = idempotency.hash_bytes(audio_bytes)
  if regenerate:
    await idempotency.delete_cached(content_hash)
  cache_lookup_start = perf_counter()
  cached = await idempotency.get_cached(content_hash)
  cache_lookup_latency = _cache_lookup_latency_ms(cache_lookup_start)
  if cached is not None and not cached_payload_matches_language(
    cached,
    language_code,
  ):
    logger.info(
      "audio_summary_cache_language_miss",
      source="upload",
      hash=content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN],
      user_id=user_id,
      requested_language=normalize_locale(language_code),
      cached_language=cached.get("language_code"),
    )
    cached = None
  if cached is not None:
    _log_audio_summary_from_cache(
      content_hash=content_hash,
      user_id=user_id,
      latency_ms=cache_lookup_latency,
      source="upload",
    )
    summary_text = cached.get("summary_text") or ""
    if summary_text and notifier:
      await notifier.send_summary(chat_id, summary_text, platform)
    await session.commit()
    return UploadResponse(
      status="cached",
      message=tr(
        "audio_notes.upload.cached",
        normalize_locale(language_code),
      ),
      hash=content_hash,
      cost_saved=True,
      data={"cached_summary": summary_text},
    )
  try:
    result = await process_audio_use_case(
      audio_bytes=audio_bytes,
      filename=filename,
      user_id=user_id,
      user_tier=user_tier,
      idempotency=idempotency,
      whisper=whisper,
      summarizer=summarizer,
      repo=repo,
      cache=cache,
      notifier=notifier,
      chat_id=chat_id,
      platform=platform,
      language_code=language_code,
      audio_to_summary=audio_to_summary,
      idempotency_posture=_idempotency_posture(),
      dynamic_config=dynamic_config,
    )
  except IdempotencyUnavailableError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=503,
      detail={
        "type": "idempotency_store_unavailable",
        "operation": exc.operation,
        "surface": exc.surface,
      },
      headers={"Retry-After": "30"},
    ) from exc
