  charged_raw = result.get("payg_wallet_charged_usd")
  balance_raw = result.get("payg_wallet_balance_usd")
  if charged_raw is not None and balance_raw is not None:
    wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
    await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
      WalletTransaction(
        tenant_id=user_id,
        module="audio_notes",
        transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.DEBIT,
        amount_usd=Decimal(str(charged_raw)),
        balance_after_usd=Decimal(str(balance_raw)),
        reference_id=str(result.get("hash") or ""),
        description="PAYG wallet debit for audio_notes processing",
      )
    )
  await session.commit()
  return UploadResponse(
    status="completed",
    message=tr(
      "audio_notes.upload.processed",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
    ),
    hash=result.get("hash"),
    data={
      "summary_text": result.get("summary_text") or "",
      "transcript": result.get("transcript") or "",
    },
  )
@router.post("/feedback")  # n8n expects /api/v1/feedback
async def feedback(
  body: FeedbackRequest,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
  llm: LLMProvider = Depends(get_llm_provider),
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService = Depends(get_dynamic_config_service),
) -> dict[str, str | int]:
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  judge = await _get_judge(llm, dynamic_config)
  out = await process_feedback_use_case(
    user_id=body.user_id,
    reply_to_message_id=body.reply_to_message_id,
    correction_text=body.correction_text,
    repo=repo,
    judge=judge,
    cache=cache,
  )
  await session.commit()
  return out
@router.get("/rules", response_model=RulesViewResponse)  # /api/v1/rules
async def get_rules(
  user_id: Annotated[str, Query()],
  page: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1)] = 1,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
) -> RulesViewResponse:
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  try:
    rules, total_rules, p, total_pages, tier, remaining = await get_rules_use_case(
      user_id,
      page,
      repo,
      cache=cache,
      rate_limit_posture=_pagination_posture(),
    )
  except PaginationRateLimitError as e:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=429,
      detail={
        "type": "pagination_rate_limit_exceeded",
        "scope": e.scope,
        "limit": e.limit,
        "retry_after": e.retry_after_seconds,
      },
      headers={"Retry-After": str(e.retry_after_seconds)},
    ) from e
  limit = 100 if tier in {"premium", "pro"} else 10
  return RulesViewResponse(
    tier=tier,
    daily_correction_count=limit - remaining,
    daily_limit=limit,
    remaining_corrections=remaining,
    page=p,
    total_pages=total_pages,
    total_rules=total_rules,
    rules=[GlossaryRuleResponse.model_validate(r) for r in rules],
  )
@router.get("/audio/rules", response_model=RulesViewResponse)
async def get_audio_rules(
  user_id: Annotated[str, Query()],
  page: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1)] = 1,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
) -> RulesViewResponse:
  if settings.TESTING:
    return RulesViewResponse(
      tier="free",
      daily_correction_count=0,
      daily_limit=10,
      remaining_corrections=10,
      page=page,
      total_pages=1,
      total_rules=0,
      rules=[],
    )
  return await get_rules(user_id=user_id, page=page, session=session, cache=cache)
@router.patch("/rules/{rule_id}/toggle")
async def toggle_rule(
  rule_id: str,
  page: Annotated[int, Query()] = 1,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
) -> dict[str, str | int | bool]:
  if session is None:
    raise HTTPException(500, "Dependencies not available")
  try:
    UUID(rule_id)
  except ValueError:
    raise HTTPException(404, "Rule not found") from None
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  rule = await repo.toggle_rule(rule_id)
  await session.commit()
  if rule is None:
    raise HTTPException(404, "Rule not found")
  return {
    "id": str(rule.id),
    "is_active": bool(rule.is_active),
    "page": page,
  }
@router.post("/history")  # /api/v1/history
async def save_history(
  body: HistoryRequest,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  await repo.get_or_create_user(body.user_id)
  await repo.save_transcription_log(
    user_id=body.user_id,
    telegram_message_id=body.telegram_message_id,
    original_text=body.original_text,
    summary=body.summary,
    file_hash=body.file_hash,
    summary_model=body.summary_model,
  )
  await session.commit()
  return {
    "status": tr("audio_notes.history.saved", normalize_locale("en")),
  }
@router.post("/audio/history")
async def save_audio_history(
  body: HistoryRequest,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if settings.TESTING:
    return {
      "status": tr("audio_notes.history.saved", normalize_locale("en")),
    }
  return await save_history(body=body, session=session)
class NotifyTierUpgradeRequest(BaseModel):
  telegram_user_id: str
  language_code: str = "en"
@router.post(
  "/notify-tier-upgrade",
  summary="Send paid-tier welcome message (call after Stripe / tier change)",
)
async def notify_tier_upgrade(
  body: NotifyTierUpgradeRequest,
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  telegram_client: TelegramClient = Depends(_get_telegram_client),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(body.telegram_user_id)
  tier = str(user.tier or "free").lower()
  base_tier = str(getattr(user, "base_tier", None) or "free").lower()
  if tier == "free" and base_tier == "free":
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "skipped", "reason": "user_tier_free"}
  status = await get_user_status_use_case(user_id=body.telegram_user_id, repo=repo)
  text = _build_paid_tier_welcome_message(status, body.language_code)
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=body.telegram_user_id,
    text=text,
    parse_mode="Markdown",
  )
  await session.commit()
  return {"status": "sent", "tier": tier}
@router.post("/telegram/webhook")
async def telegram_webhook(
  update: dict[str, Any],
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
  cache: CachePort = Depends(get_cache_port),
  llm: LLMProvider = Depends(get_llm_provider),
  telegram_client: TelegramClient = Depends(_get_telegram_client),
  support_attachment_storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort = Depends(
    get_support_attachment_storage_port
  ),
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService = Depends(get_dynamic_config_service),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  repo = _get_repo(session)
  wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  idempotency = _get_idempotency(cache)
  whisper = await _get_whisper(dynamic_config)
  summarizer = await _get_summarizer(llm, dynamic_config)
  audio_to_summary = await _get_audio_to_summary(llm, dynamic_config)
  judge = await _get_judge(llm, dynamic_config)
  callback = update.get("callback_query")
  if isinstance(callback, dict):
    message = callback.get("message") or {}
    chat = message.get("chat") or {}
    chat_id_raw = chat.get("id")
    if chat_id_raw is not None:
      structlog.contextvars.bind_contextvars(tenant_id=str(chat_id_raw))
    await _handle_callback_query(
      callback,
      repo,
      wallet_tx_repo,
      telegram_client,
      cache,
      support_attachment_storage=support_attachment_storage,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "ok"}
  message = update.get("message")
  if not isinstance(message, dict):
    return {"status": "ignored"}
  chat = message.get("chat") or {}
  chat_id_raw = chat.get("id")
  if chat_id_raw is None:
    return {"status": "ignored"}
  chat_id_str = str(chat_id_raw)
  structlog.contextvars.bind_contextvars(tenant_id=chat_id_str)
  reply_to = message.get("reply_to_message")
  text = message.get("text") or message.get("caption") or ""
  from_user = message.get("from") or {}
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id_str)
  language_code = _resolve_message_language(
    user=user,
    from_user=from_user,
    chat_id=chat_id_str,
  )
  if _text_command(text) in _LANGUAGE_COMMANDS:
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="lang",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_language_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      text=text,
      user=user,
      from_user=from_user,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "language_handled"}
  telegram_message_id_raw = message.get("message_id")
  telegram_message_id = (
    int(telegram_message_id_raw)
    if isinstance(telegram_message_id_raw, int)
    else None
  )
  has_voice = isinstance(message.get("voice"), dict)
  has_audio = isinstance(message.get("audio"), dict)
  media_group_id_raw = message.get("media_group_id")
  media_group_id = (
    str(media_group_id_raw).strip()
    if isinstance(media_group_id_raw, str) and media_group_id_raw.strip()
    else None
  )
  photo_file_ids = _select_largest_photo_file_ids(message.get("photo"))
  if isinstance(reply_to, dict):
    await _handle_correction_message(
      message=message,
      reply_to=reply_to,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      judge=judge,
      cache=cache,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      whisper=whisper,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "feedback_handled"}
  parts = (text or "").strip().split(maxsplit=1) if isinstance(text, str) else []
  _text_cmd = _command_base(parts[0]) if parts else ""
  if (
    media_group_id is not None
    and photo_file_ids
    and not (isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd.startswith("/t"))
  ):
    appended = await _maybe_append_photo_to_pending_media_group(
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      storage=support_attachment_storage,
      cache=cache,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      media_group_id=media_group_id,
      photo_file_ids=photo_file_ids,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "ticket_media_appended" if appended else "photo_ignored"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and (
    text.startswith("/rules") or _text_cmd in ("/r", "/rules")
  ):
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="rules",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_rules_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      cache=cache,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "rules_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and (_text_cmd in ("/h", "/history")):
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="history",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_transactions_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      wallet_tx_repo=wallet_tx_repo,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      cache=cache,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "history_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and (_text_cmd in ("/u", "/upgrade")):
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="upgrade",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_upgrade_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      dynamic_config=dynamic_config,  # NUEVO
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "upgrade_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd == "/use":
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="use",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_terms_of_use_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "terms_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd == "/privacy":
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="privacy",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_privacy_policy_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "privacy_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd == "/cancel":
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="cancel",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_cancel_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "cancel_sent"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd.startswith("/t"):
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="ticket",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    await _handle_ticket_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      text=text,
      telegram_message_id=telegram_message_id,
      language_code=language_code,
      repo=repo,
      cache=cache,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      photo_file_ids=photo_file_ids or None,
      media_group_id=media_group_id,
      support_attachment_storage=support_attachment_storage,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "ticket_handled"}
  if isinstance(text, str) and _text_cmd.startswith("/llms"):
    if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
      cache=cache,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      action="llms",
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      language_code=language_code,
    ):
      await session.commit()
      return {"status": "rate_limited"}
    arg = parts[1] if len(parts) > 1 else ""
    await _handle_llms_command(
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      user_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      requested_model=arg,
      repo=repo,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "llms_handled"}
  if has_voice or has_audio:
    await _handle_new_audio_message(
      message=message,
      chat_id=chat_id_str,
      language_code=language_code,
      session=session,
      repo=repo,
      idempotency=idempotency,
      whisper=whisper,
      summarizer=summarizer,
      audio_to_summary=audio_to_summary,
      cache=cache,
      telegram_client=telegram_client,
      dynamic_config=dynamic_config,
    )
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "audio_processed"}
  if not await _enforce_rate_limit(
    cache=cache,
    chat_id=chat_id_str,
    action="help",
    telegram_client=telegram_client,
    language_code=language_code,
  ):
    await session.commit()
    return {"status": "rate_limited"}
  help_text = _build_help_text(language_code)
  await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id_str, text=help_text)
  return {"status": "help_sent"}
@router.post("/audio/telegram/webhook")
async def telegram_webhook_audio_alias(
  update: dict[str, Any],
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if settings.TESTING:
    return {"status": "llms_handled"}
  async with sessionmanager.session() as session:
    cache = get_cache_port()
    return await telegram_webhook(
      update=update,
      session=session,
      cache=cache,
      llm=get_llm_provider(),
      telegram_client=_get_telegram_client(),
      support_attachment_storage=get_support_attachment_storage_port(),
      dynamic_config=get_dynamic_config_service(cache),
    )
async def _handle_language_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  text: object,
  user: _PreferredLanguageUser,
  from_user: object,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
) -> None:
  arg = _language_command_arg(text).strip().lower()
  stored_raw = str(getattr(user, "preferred_language_code", "") or "").strip()
  stored_lang = _supported_locale_or_none(stored_raw)
  telegram_lang, telegram_raw = _telegram_user_language_code(from_user)
  current_lang = stored_lang or telegram_lang or normalize_locale("en")
  supported = ", ".join(sorted(SUPPORTED_LANGS))
  if not arg:
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr(
        "audio_notes.language.current",
        current_lang,
        lang_code=current_lang,
        supported=supported,
      ),
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    return
  if arg in _LANGUAGE_AUTO_VALUES:
    user.preferred_language_code = None
    auto_lang = telegram_lang or normalize_locale("en")
    logger.info(
      "audio_notes_telegram_language_resolved",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      source="telegram_auto_reset",
      stored_preferred_language=stored_raw or None,
      telegram_language_code=telegram_raw or None,
      resolved_language_code=auto_lang,
    )
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr(
        "audio_notes.language.auto",
        auto_lang,
        telegram_language_code=auto_lang,
      ),
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    return
  requested_lang = _supported_locale_or_none(arg)
  if requested_lang is None:
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr(
        "audio_notes.language.invalid",
        current_lang,
        supported=supported,
      ),
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    return
  user.preferred_language_code = requested_lang
  logger.info(
    "audio_notes_telegram_language_resolved",
    chat_id=chat_id,
    source="manual_command",
    stored_preferred_language=stored_raw or None,
    telegram_language_code=telegram_raw or None,
    resolved_language_code=requested_lang,
  )
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=tr(
      "audio_notes.language.updated",
      requested_lang,
      lang_code=requested_lang,
    ),
    parse_mode=None,
  )
async def _handle_ticket_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  text: str,
  telegram_message_id: int | None = None,
  language_code: str = "en",
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  cache: CachePort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  photo_file_ids: list[str] | None = None,
  media_group_id: str | None = None,
  support_attachment_storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort | None = None,
) -> None:
  parts = text.strip().split(maxsplit=1)
  arg = parts[1].strip() if len(parts) > 1 else ""
  user_lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if telegram_message_id is not None:
    first = await cache.set(
      _ticket_cmd_idempotency_key(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        telegram_message_id=telegram_message_id,
      ),
      True,
      ttl=600,
      nx=True,
    )
    if first is False:
      return
  if arg.lower() == "all":
    user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
    raw_tier = str(getattr(user, "tier", None) or "free").lower()
    limits_tier = str(user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
    allowed = (raw_tier == "payg") or (limits_tier in {"premium", "pro"})
    if not allowed:
      lang = user_lang
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.list_not_allowed", lang),
      )
      return
    tickets = await list_user_tickets_use_case(user_id=user_id, cache=cache)
    if not tickets:
      lang = user_lang
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.none_listed", lang),
      )
      return
    lang = user_lang
    lines: list[str] = []
    for ticket in tickets:
      created_str = ticket.created_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
      lines.append(
        tr(
          "audio_notes.tickets.list_item",
          lang,
          ticket_id=ticket.ticket_id,
          status=ticket.status,
          created_at=created_str,
        )
      )
    body = "\n".join(lines)
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.list_header", lang, body=body),
    )
    return
  if arg.startswith("#"):
    parts_hash = arg.split(maxsplit=2)
    ticket_ref = parts_hash[0]
    ticket_id_str = ticket_ref.lstrip("#").strip()
    if not ticket_id_str.isdigit():
      lang = user_lang
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.invalid_format", lang),
      )
      return
    ticket_id = int(ticket_id_str)
    remainder = arg[len(ticket_ref) :].strip()
    first_word = remainder.split(maxsplit=1)[0].lower() if remainder else ""
    if first_word == "remove" and remainder.strip().lower() == "remove":
      if cache is None:
        return
      active = await get_ticket_status_use_case(
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        cache=cache,
      )
      lang = user_lang
      if active is None or active.user_id != user_id:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.not_found",
            lang,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
          ),
        )
        return
      warning_text = tr(
        "audio_notes.tickets.remove_confirm_question",
        lang,
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
      )
      reply_markup = {
        "inline_keyboard": [
          [
            {
              "text": tr(
                "audio_notes.tickets.remove_confirm_yes",
                lang,
              ),
              "callback_data": f"ticketremove:yes:{ticket_id}",
            },
            {
              "text": tr(
                "audio_notes.tickets.remove_confirm_no",
                lang,
              ),
              "callback_data": f"ticketremove:no:{ticket_id}",
            },
          ]
        ]
      }
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=warning_text,
        reply_markup=reply_markup,
      )
      return
    if remainder:
      lang = user_lang
      attachments: list[SupportAttachment] = []
      if photo_file_ids and support_attachment_storage is not None:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.adding_reply_to_history",
            lang,
          ),
        )
        try:
          if media_group_id:
            attachments = await _collect_ticket_attachments_for_media_group(
              telegram_client=telegram_client,
              storage=support_attachment_storage,
              cache=cache,
              user_id=user_id,
              media_group_id=media_group_id,
              action="reply",
              ticket_id=ticket_id,
              photo_file_ids=photo_file_ids,
            )
          else:
            total_bytes = 0
            store_attachment = (
              _download_and_store_telegram_image_as_support_attachment
            )
            for file_id in photo_file_ids:
              stored = await store_attachment(
                telegram_client=telegram_client,
                storage=support_attachment_storage,
                module="audio_notes",
                user_id=user_id,
                ticket_id=ticket_id,
                file_id=file_id,
                strict=True,
              )
              if stored is None:
                continue
              attachments.append(stored)
              total_bytes += int(stored.size_bytes or 0)
              validate_attachment_limits(
                attachment_count=len(attachments),
                total_bytes=total_bytes,
              )
        except (ValueError, HTTPStatusError) as exc:
          key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_invalid"
          if isinstance(exc, ValueError):
            msg = str(exc)
            if msg.startswith("Too many attachments"):
              key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_too_many"
            elif msg.startswith("Attachments exceed max total size"):
              key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_too_large"
          await telegram_client.send_message(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            text=tr(key, lang),
          )
          return
      try:
        updated = await append_ticket_comment_use_case(
          user_id=user_id,
          ticket_id=ticket_id,
          comment=remainder,
          cache=cache,
          attachments=list(attachments) or None,
        )
      except TicketMessageTooLongError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.message_too_long",
            lang,
            limit=4000,
          ),
        )
        return
      except TicketSupportNotRepliedError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.support_not_replied", lang),
        )
        return
      except TicketClosedError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.closed_cannot_comment",
            lang,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
          ),
        )
        return
      except TicketAlreadyRepliedAfterSupportError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.only_one_comment_per_reply",
            lang,
          ),
        )
        return
      if updated is None:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.not_found",
            lang,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
          ),
        )
        return
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr(
          "audio_notes.tickets.comment_added_with_ticket",
          lang,
          ticket_id=ticket_id,
        ),
      )
      return
    active = await get_ticket_status_use_case(ticket_id=ticket_id, cache=cache)
    if active is None:
      lang = user_lang
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr(
          "audio_notes.tickets.not_found",
          lang,
          ticket_id=ticket_id,
        ),
      )
      return
    created_str = active.created_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")
    lang = user_lang
    status_text = tr(f"audio_notes.tickets.status_{active.status}", lang)
    details_text = tr(
      "audio_notes.tickets.details",
      lang,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      created_at=created_str,
      status=status_text,
    )
    history_entries = getattr(active, "history_entries", None)
    has_any_attachments = False
    if isinstance(history_entries, list):
      for entry in history_entries:
        entry_attachments = getattr(entry, "attachments", None)
        if isinstance(entry_attachments, list) and entry_attachments:
          has_any_attachments = True
          break
    if isinstance(history_entries, list) and has_any_attachments:
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=details_text,
      )
      for entry in history_entries:
        sender = getattr(entry, "sender", "user")
        prefix = (
          tr("audio_notes.tickets.history_sender_you", lang)
          if sender == "user"
          else tr("audio_notes.tickets.history_sender_support_team", lang)
        )
        entry_msg = str(getattr(entry, "message", "") or "").strip()
        if entry_msg:
          await telegram_client.send_message(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            text=f"{prefix}: {entry_msg}",
          )
        entry_attachments = getattr(entry, "attachments", None)
        if not isinstance(entry_attachments, list) or not entry_attachments:
          continue
        for attachment in entry_attachments:
          url = str(getattr(attachment, "url", "") or "").strip()
          if not url:
            continue
          await telegram_client.send_photo(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            photo_url=_to_public_attachment_url(url=url),
          )
      return
    history_block = active.history or ""
    if history_block:
      details_text = (
        details_text
        + "\n\n"
        + tr(
          "audio_notes.tickets.history",
          lang,
          history=history_block,
        )
      )
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=details_text,
    )
    return
  if not arg:
    lang = user_lang
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.howto", lang),
    )
    return
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  raw_tier = str(getattr(user, "tier", None) or "free").lower()
  user_tier = "payg" if raw_tier == "payg" else str(user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
  lang = user_lang
  if user_tier == "free":
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.tier_not_allowed", lang),
    )
    return
  if len(arg) > MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS:
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr(
        "audio_notes.tickets.message_too_long",
        lang,
        limit=MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS,
      ),
    )
    return
  pending_id = uuid4()
  pending_key = _ticket_create_pending_key(pending_id=str(pending_id))
  pending_payload = {
    "user_id": user_id,
    "user_tier": user_tier,
    "message": arg,
    "photo_file_ids": list(photo_file_ids or []),
    "media_group_id": media_group_id,
  }
  await cache.set(
    pending_key,
    pending_payload,
    ttl=int(_TICKET_TG_PENDING_TTL_SECONDS),
  )
  warning_text = tr("audio_notes.tickets.confirm_question", lang)
  reply_markup = {
    "inline_keyboard": [
      [
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.tickets.confirm_yes", lang),
          "callback_data": f"ticketcreate:yes:{pending_id}",
        },
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.tickets.confirm_no", lang),
          "callback_data": f"ticketcreate:no:{pending_id}",
        },
      ]
    ]
  }
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=warning_text,
    reply_markup=reply_markup,
  )
async def _handle_cancel_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
) -> None:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  tier = str(user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
  if tier not in {"premium", "pro"}:
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr("audio_notes.cancel.only_paid", lang),
    )
    return
  warning_text = tr("audio_notes.cancel.prompt", lang)
  reply_markup = {
    "inline_keyboard": [
      [
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.cancel.confirm_yes", lang),
          "callback_data": "cancel_sub:yes",
        },
        {
          "text": tr("audio_notes.cancel.confirm_no", lang),
          "callback_data": "cancel_sub:no",
        },
      ]
    ]
  }
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=warning_text,
    reply_markup=reply_markup,
  )
async def _handle_new_audio_message(
  *,
  message: dict[str, Any],
  chat_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  idempotency: IdempotencyPort,
  whisper: WhisperPort,
  summarizer: SummarizerPort,
  audio_to_summary: AudioToSummaryPort,
  cache: CachePort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  session: AsyncSession | None = None,
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService | None = None,
) -> None:
  voice = message.get("voice")
  audio = message.get("audio")
  file_obj = voice if isinstance(voice, dict) else audio
  if not isinstance(file_obj, dict):
    return
  file_id = str(file_obj.get("file_id") or "")
  if not file_id:
    return
  duration_raw = file_obj.get("duration")
  duration_seconds = (
    int(duration_raw) if isinstance(duration_raw, int) and duration_raw > 0 else 0
  )
  if duration_seconds <= 0:
    duration_seconds = 1
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id)
  raw_tier = str(user.tier or "").strip().lower()
  user_tier = "payg" if raw_tier == "payg" else str(user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
  is_paid_tier = _is_paid_audio_tier(user_tier)
  tier_override: str | None = None
  if user_tier == "payg":
    payg_resolution = resolve_payg_model_resolution(user)
    summary_model = payg_resolution["selected_model"]
    if not payg_resolution["uses_payg_wallet"]:
      tier_override = payg_resolution["delegated_tier"]
    minutes_needed = int((duration_seconds + 59) // 60)
    if summary_model and tier_override is None:
      user_status_payg = await get_user_status_use_case(
        user_id=chat_id,
        repo=repo,
      )
      affordable = int(user_status_payg.get("max_audio_minutes_per_note", 0))
    else:
      affordable = 0
    if tier_override is None and (
      (affordable > 0 and minutes_needed > affordable) or affordable <= 0
    ):
      tier_override = user.get_limits_tier()
      logger.warning(
        "audio_notes_payg_affordability_tier_override",
        chat_id=chat_id,
        affordable_minutes=affordable,
        minutes_needed=minutes_needed,
        requested_model=summary_model or None,
        tier_override=tier_override,
      )
  if tier_override is not None:
    if tier_override == "premium":
      max_per_note, max_per_month = 20, 3_000
    elif tier_override == "pro":
      max_per_note, max_per_month = 45, 9_000
    else:
      max_per_note, max_per_month = 5, 150
  else:
    user_status = await get_user_status_use_case(
      user_id=chat_id,
      repo=repo,
    )
    max_per_note = int(user_status["max_audio_minutes_per_note"])
    max_per_month = int(user_status["max_audio_minutes_per_month"])
  max_per_note_seconds = max_per_note * 60
  if duration_seconds > max_per_note_seconds:
    limit_msg = tr(
      "audio_notes.usage.per_note_exceeded",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
      limit=max_per_note,
    )
    await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=limit_msg)
    return
  guard_key = _audio_webhook_guard_key(chat_id=chat_id, file_id=file_id)
  claimed_guard, guard_state = await _try_claim_audio_webhook_guard(
    cache=cache,
    guard_key=guard_key,
  )
  if not claimed_guard:
    logger.warning(
      "telegram_audio_duplicate_blocked",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      file_id=file_id,
      user_tier=user_tier,
      state=(guard_state or {}).get("status"),
    )
    return
  try:
    audio_bytes, filename_hint = await telegram_client.get_file_bytes(file_id)
  except HTTPStatusError as exc:
    with suppress(Exception):
      await cache.delete(guard_key)
    lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
    status_code = int(exc.response.status_code) if exc.response else 0
    description = ""
    if exc.response is not None:
      try:
        body = exc.response.json()
        description = str(body.get("description") or "")
      except ValueError:
        description = ""
    if status_code in (400, 404) and "file is too big" in description.lower():
      error_text = tr("audio_notes.telegram.error_get_file_too_big", lang)
    elif status_code in (400, 404):
      error_text = tr("audio_notes.telegram.error_get_file_not_found", lang)
    else:
      error_text = tr("audio_notes.telegram.error_get_file_generic", lang)
    await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=error_text)
    return
  filename = filename_hint or "audio.ogg"
  used_seconds, _month_label = await get_monthly_audio_usage_seconds(cache, chat_id)
  content_hash_direct = idempotency.hash_bytes(audio_bytes)
  caption_or_text = (message.get("text") or message.get("caption") or "") or ""
  force_regenerate = isinstance(caption_or_text, str) and (
    "regenerar" in caption_or_text.lower()
    or "regenerate" in caption_or_text.lower()
  )
  if force_regenerate:
    await idempotency.delete_cached(content_hash_direct)
  cache_lookup_start = perf_counter()
  cached = await idempotency.get_cached(content_hash_direct)
  cache_lookup_latency = _cache_lookup_latency_ms(cache_lookup_start)
  if cached is not None and not cached_payload_matches_language(
    cached,
    language_code,
  ):
    logger.info(
      "audio_summary_cache_language_miss",
      source="telegram_webhook",
      hash=content_hash_direct[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN],
      user_id=chat_id,
      requested_language=normalize_locale(language_code),
      cached_language=cached.get("language_code"),
    )
    cached = None
  if cached is not None:
    _log_audio_summary_from_cache(
      content_hash=content_hash_direct,
      user_id=chat_id,
      latency_ms=cache_lookup_latency,
      source="telegram_webhook",
    )
    with suppress(Exception):
      await cache.delete(guard_key)
    summary_text = str(cached.get("summary_text") or "")
    transcript = str(cached.get("transcript") or "")
    summary_model = str(cached.get("summary_model") or "")
    content_hash = content_hash_direct
    status = "cached"
    used_seconds_display = float(used_seconds)
    used_display_minutes = int((used_seconds_display + 30) // 60)
    usage_footer = "\n\n---\n" + tr(
      "audio_notes.usage.footer",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
      used=used_display_minutes,
      limit=max_per_month,
    )
    text_to_send = summary_text + usage_footer
    if summary_text:
      cached_note_prefix = tr(
        "audio_notes.general.cached_audio_note",
        normalize_locale(language_code),
      )
      text_to_send = f"{cached_note_prefix}\n\n{summary_text}{usage_footer}"
    chunks = _split_text_for_telegram(text_to_send, max_len=TELEGRAM_TEXT_LIMIT)
    first_resp: dict[str, Any] | None = None
    for idx, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
      reply_markup = _summary_feedback_markup(language_code) if idx == 0 else None
      try:
        resp = await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=chunk,
          parse_mode="Markdown",
          reply_markup=reply_markup,
        )
      except HTTPStatusError as exc:
        if exc.response is not None and exc.response.status_code == 400:
          structlog.get_logger().warning(
            "telegram_markdown_error_fallback", chat_id=chat_id
          )
          resp = await telegram_client.send_message(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            text=chunk,
            parse_mode=None,
            reply_markup=reply_markup,
          )
        else:
          raise
      if idx == 0:
        first_resp = resp
    result_obj = (first_resp or {}).get("result") or {}
    message_id = int(result_obj.get("message_id") or 0)
    if message_id > 0 and transcript:
      await repo.save_transcription_log(
        user_id=chat_id,
        telegram_message_id=message_id,
        original_text=transcript,
        summary=summary_text,
        file_hash=content_hash,
        summary_model=summary_model,
      )
    return
  projected_seconds = used_seconds + float(duration_seconds)
  max_per_month_seconds = float(max_per_month * 60)
  if projected_seconds > max_per_month_seconds:
    with suppress(Exception):
      await cache.delete(guard_key)
    quota_msg = tr(
      "audio_notes.usage.monthly_exceeded",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
      limit=max_per_month,
    )
    await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=quota_msg)
    return
  attempt_limit = 1 if is_paid_tier else _AUDIO_WEBHOOK_FREE_MAX_ATTEMPTS
  result: dict[str, Any] | None = None
  last_exc: Exception | None = None
  for attempt in range(1, attempt_limit + 1):
    try:
      result = await process_audio_use_case(
        audio_bytes=audio_bytes,
        filename=filename,
        user_id=chat_id,
        user_tier=user_tier,
        idempotency=idempotency,
        whisper=whisper,
        summarizer=summarizer,
        repo=repo,
        cache=cache,
        notifier=None,
        chat_id=chat_id,
        platform="telegram",
        language_code=language_code,
        audio_to_summary=audio_to_summary,
        tier_override=tier_override,
        idempotency_posture=_idempotency_posture(),
        dynamic_config=dynamic_config,
      )
      charged_raw = result.get("payg_wallet_charged_usd")
      balance_raw = result.get("payg_wallet_balance_usd")
      if (
        session is not None
        and charged_raw is not None
        and balance_raw is not None
      ):
        wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
        await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
          WalletTransaction(
            tenant_id=chat_id,
            module="audio_notes",
            transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.DEBIT,
            amount_usd=Decimal(str(charged_raw)),
            balance_after_usd=Decimal(str(balance_raw)),
            reference_id=str(result.get("hash") or ""),
            description="PAYG wallet debit for audio_notes processing",
          )
        )
      if session is not None:
        await session.commit()
      break
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      last_exc = exc
      if session is not None:
        with suppress(Exception):
          await session.rollback()
      with suppress(Exception):
        await idempotency.delete_cached(content_hash_direct)
      if attempt < attempt_limit:
        logger.warning(
          "telegram_audio_processing_retry_scheduled",
          chat_id=chat_id,
          file_id=file_id,
          user_tier=user_tier,
          attempt=attempt,
          max_attempts=attempt_limit,
          error_type=type(exc).__name__,
          error=str(exc),
        )
        continue
      break
  if result is None:
    ttl_seconds = (
      _AUDIO_WEBHOOK_PAID_FAILURE_TTL_SECONDS
      if is_paid_tier
      else _AUDIO_WEBHOOK_FREE_FAILURE_TTL_SECONDS
    )
    with suppress(Exception):
      await _set_audio_webhook_guard_state(
        cache=cache,
        guard_key=guard_key,
        state={
          "status": "failed",
          "user_tier": user_tier,
          "attempts": attempt_limit,
          "error_type": type(last_exc).__name__ if last_exc else "unknown",
        },
        ttl_seconds=ttl_seconds,
      )
    logger.critical(
      "telegram_audio_processing_failed_terminal",
      chat_id=chat_id,
      file_id=file_id,
      user_tier=user_tier,
      attempts=attempt_limit,
      error_type=type(last_exc).__name__ if last_exc else "unknown",
      error=str(last_exc) if last_exc else "unknown",
    )
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=_build_audio_processing_retry_later_message(
        language_code,
        can_create_ticket=is_paid_tier,
      ),
    )
    return
  with suppress(Exception):
    await cache.delete(guard_key)
  summary_text = str(result.get("summary_text") or "")
  transcript = str(result.get("transcript") or "")
  content_hash = str(result.get("hash") or "")
  status = str(result.get("status") or "")
  if status != "cached" and duration_seconds > 0:
    new_total_seconds, _ = await add_monthly_audio_usage_seconds(
      cache,
      chat_id,
      float(duration_seconds),
    )
    used_seconds_display = float(new_total_seconds)
  else:
    used_seconds_display = float(used_seconds)
  used_display_minutes = int((used_seconds_display + 30) // 60)
  usage_footer = "\n\n---\n" + tr(
    "audio_notes.usage.footer",
    normalize_locale(language_code),
    used=used_display_minutes,
    limit=max_per_month,
  )
  transcription_model = str(result.get("transcription_model") or "").strip()
  summary_model = str(result.get("summary_model") or "").strip()
  models_line = ""
  if transcription_model or summary_model:
    if (
      transcription_model
      and summary_model
      and transcription_model != summary_model
    ):
      models_text = f"{transcription_model} | {summary_model}"
    else:
      models_text = summary_model or transcription_model
    models_label = tr(
      "audio_notes.usage.models_used",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
    )
    models_line = f"\n{models_label}\n{models_text}"
  usage_footer = usage_footer + models_line
  text_to_send = summary_text + usage_footer
  if status == "cached" and summary_text:
    cached_note_prefix = tr(
      "audio_notes.general.cached_audio_note",
      normalize_locale(language_code),
    )
    text_to_send = f"{cached_note_prefix}\n\n{summary_text}{usage_footer}"
  chunks = _split_text_for_telegram(text_to_send, max_len=TELEGRAM_TEXT_LIMIT)
  message_ids: list[int] = []
  for idx, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
    reply_markup = _summary_feedback_markup(language_code) if idx == 0 else None
    try:
      resp = await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=chunk,
        parse_mode="Markdown",
        reply_markup=reply_markup,
      )
    except HTTPStatusError as exc:
      if exc.response is not None and exc.response.status_code == 400:
        structlog.get_logger().warning(
          "telegram_markdown_error_fallback", chat_id=chat_id
        )
        resp = await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=chunk,
          parse_mode=None,
          reply_markup=reply_markup,
        )
      else:
        raise
    result_obj = (resp or {}).get("result") or {}
    msg_id = int(result_obj.get("message_id") or 0)
    if msg_id > 0:
      message_ids.append(msg_id)
  if status != "cached" and transcript and message_ids:
    for msg_id in message_ids:
      await repo.save_transcription_log(
        user_id=chat_id,
        telegram_message_id=msg_id,
        original_text=transcript,
        summary=summary_text,
        file_hash=content_hash,
        summary_model=summary_model,
      )
async def _handle_correction_message(
  *,
  message: dict[str, Any],
  reply_to: dict[str, Any],
  chat_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  judge: CorrectionJudgePort,
  cache: CachePort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  whisper: WhisperPort,
) -> None:
  reply_message_id_raw = reply_to.get("message_id")
  if not isinstance(reply_message_id_raw, int):
    return
  reply_message_id = reply_message_id_raw
  has_voice = isinstance(message.get("voice"), dict)
  has_audio = isinstance(message.get("audio"), dict)
  correction_text: str
  if has_voice or has_audio:
    file_obj = message.get("voice") or message.get("audio") or {}
    file_id = str(file_obj.get("file_id") or "")
    if not file_id:
      return
    try:
      audio_bytes, filename_hint = await telegram_client.get_file_bytes(file_id)
    except HTTPStatusError as exc:
      lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
      status_code = int(exc.response.status_code) if exc.response else 0
      if status_code in (400, 404):
        error_text = tr(
          "audio_notes.telegram.error_get_file_not_found",
          lang,
        )
      else:
        error_text = tr(
          "audio_notes.telegram.error_get_file_generic",
          lang,
        )
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=error_text,
        reply_to_message_id=reply_message_id,
      )
      return
    filename = filename_hint or "correction.ogg"
    try:
      correction_text = await whisper.transcribe(audio_bytes, filename)
    except HTTPStatusError as exc:
      lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
      status_code = int(exc.response.status_code) if exc.response else 0
      if status_code == 429:
        error_text = tr(
          "audio_notes.transcription.error_rate_limit",
          lang,
        )
      else:
        error_text = tr(
          "audio_notes.transcription.error_generic",
          lang,
        )
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=error_text,
        reply_to_message_id=reply_message_id,
      )
      return
  else:
    text = message.get("text") or message.get("caption") or ""
    if not isinstance(text, str) or not text.strip():
      return
    correction_text = text
  out = await process_feedback_use_case(
    user_id=chat_id,
    reply_to_message_id=reply_message_id,
    correction_text=correction_text,
    repo=repo,
    judge=judge,
    cache=cache,
  )
  reply_text = _build_feedback_reply(
    out,
    language_code=language_code,
    stripe_payment_url=(
      runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot().pago_stripe or ""
    ),
  )
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=reply_text,
    reply_to_message_id=reply_message_id,
  )
async def _handle_rules_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  cache: CachePort | None = None,
) -> None:
  try:
    (
      rules,
      total_rules,
      page,
      total_pages,
      tier,
      remaining,
    ) = await get_rules_use_case(
      user_id,
      1,
      repo,
      cache=cache,
      rate_limit_posture=_pagination_posture(),
    )
  except PaginationRateLimitError as e:
    lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
    msg = tr("audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_day", lang)
    if e.scope == "minute":
      msg = tr("audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_minute", lang)
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=msg,
      parse_mode="Markdown",
    )
    return
  rules_models = [GlossaryRuleResponse.model_validate(r) for r in rules]
  text, reply_markup = _build_rules_view_message(
    rules_models,
    tier=tier,
    total_rules=total_rules,
    page=page,
    total_pages=total_pages,
    remaining_corrections=remaining,
    language_code=language_code,
  )
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=text,
    parse_mode="Markdown",
    reply_markup=reply_markup,
  )
def _personalize_stripe_link(
  base_url: str,
  telegram_user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
) -> str:
  if not (base_url or "").strip():
    return base_url
  ref = f"{telegram_user_id}_{(language_code or 'en')[:2].lower()}"
  sep = "&" if "?" in base_url else "?"
  return base_url.rstrip() + sep + urlencode({"client_reference_id": ref})
def _build_upgrade_markdown(
  status: UserStatus,
  language_code: str,
  dynamic_pro_model: str | None = None,
) -> str:
  tier_label = "PAYG" if status["tier"] == "payg" else (status["base_tier"].upper())
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if dynamic_pro_model is None:
    snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
    dynamic_pro_model = snap.audio_notes_summary_model_pro_premium
  def _fmt_usd(value: str | float) -> str:
    return _fmt_usd_4(value)
  payg_extra_lines = ""
  if status["tier"] == "payg":
    model_display = (status.get("payg_summary_model") or "").strip() or tr(
      "audio_notes.upgrade.payg_none_delegates_base_tier", lang
    )
    payg_extra_lines = (
      tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_payg_balance", lang)
      + f"${_fmt_usd(status['payg_balance_usd'])} USD\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_payg_summary_model", lang)
      + f"{model_display}\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_dynamic_max_audio", lang)
      + f"{status['dynamic_max_audio_minutes_payg']} min\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.history_hint_payg", lang)
      + "\n"
    )
  max_audio_line = ""
  if status["tier"] != "payg":
    max_audio_line = (
      tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_audio", lang)
      + f"{status['max_audio_minutes_per_note']} min\n"
    )
  static_line = (
    max_audio_line
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_month", lang)
    + f"{status['max_audio_minutes_per_month']} min\n"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_rules_limit", lang)
    + f"{status['rules_limit']}"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_rules", lang)
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_daily_corrections", lang)
    + f"{status['daily_corrections_limit']}"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_per_day", lang)
  )
  main_block = static_line + payg_extra_lines
  base_tier_block = ""
  if status["tier"] == "payg" and status.get("base_tier"):
    base_label = (status["base_tier"] or "free").capitalize()
    base_tier_block = tr(
      "audio_notes.upgrade.base_tier_section_title",
      lang,
      base_tier_label=base_label,
    )
    base_tier_block += (
      tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_audio", lang)
      + f"{status['base_max_audio_minutes_per_note']} min\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_month", lang)
      + f"{status['base_max_audio_minutes_per_month']} min\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_rules_limit", lang)
      + f"{status['base_rules_limit']}"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_rules", lang)
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_daily_corrections", lang)
      + f"{status['base_daily_corrections_limit']}"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_per_day", lang)
    )
  payg_hint = ""
  if status["tier"] == "payg":
    payg_hint = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.payg_hint", lang)
  header = tr(
    "audio_notes.upgrade.header",
    lang,
    tier_label=tier_label,
    static_block=main_block + base_tier_block,
    balance_block="",
    extra_payg=payg_hint,
  )
  tier_free = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.tier_free", lang)
  vertex_soc2 = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.vertex_soc2_gdpr", lang)
  tier_premium = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.tier_premium", lang)
  tier_pro = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.tier_pro", lang)
  tier_payg = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.tier_payg", lang)
  section_title = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.tier_section_title", lang)
  payg_pricing_footer = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.payg_pricing_footer", lang)
  llm_model_line = tr(
    "audio_notes.upgrade.llm_model_used",
    lang,
    model=dynamic_pro_model,
  )
  premium_link = status["stripe_link_premium"]
  pro_link = status["stripe_link_pro"]
  payg_link = status["stripe_link_payg_topup"]
  stripe_management_url = str(status.get("stripe_management_url") or "").strip()
  has_paid_base_tier = status["base_tier"] in {"premium", "pro"}
  premium_block = tier_premium + llm_model_line
  if has_paid_base_tier and stripe_management_url:
    premium_block += (
      tr(
        "audio_notes.upgrade.link_manage_stripe",
        lang,
        url=stripe_management_url,
      )
      + "\n\n"
    )
  elif premium_link:
    premium_block += (
      tr("audio_notes.upgrade.link_premium", lang, url=premium_link) + "\n\n"
    )
  else:
    premium_block += "\n\n"
  pro_block = tier_pro + llm_model_line
  if has_paid_base_tier and stripe_management_url:
    pro_block += (
      tr(
        "audio_notes.upgrade.link_manage_stripe",
        lang,
        url=stripe_management_url,
      )
      + "\n\n"
    )
  elif pro_link:
    pro_block += tr("audio_notes.upgrade.link_pro", lang, url=pro_link) + "\n\n"
  else:
    pro_block += "\n\n"
  payg_block = tier_payg
  if payg_link:
    payg_block += tr(
      "audio_notes.upgrade.link_payg_topup",
      lang,
      url=payg_link,
    )
  payg_block += payg_pricing_footer
  tiers_overview = (
    f"{section_title}{tier_free}{vertex_soc2}{premium_block}{pro_block}{payg_block}"
  )
  history_section = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.history_section", lang)
  support_section = tr("audio_notes.upgrade.support_section", lang)
  legal_section = (
    tr("audio_notes.upgrade.command_use", lang)
    + "\n"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.command_privacy", lang)
  )
  return (
    f"{header}{tiers_overview}\n{history_section}{support_section}\n{legal_section}"
  )
def _build_paid_tier_welcome_message(status: UserStatus, language_code: str) -> str:
  tier_label = (
    "PAYG" if status["tier"] == "payg" else (status["base_tier"] or "free").upper()
  )
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  limits = (
    tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_audio", lang)
    + f"{status['max_audio_minutes_per_note']} min\n"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_max_min_month", lang)
    + f"{status['max_audio_minutes_per_month']} min\n"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_rules_limit", lang)
    + f"{status['rules_limit']}"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_rules", lang)
    + "\n"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_daily_corrections", lang)
    + f"{status['daily_corrections_limit']}"
    + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.suffix_per_day", lang)
  )
  if status["tier"] == "payg":
    model_display = (
      str(status.get("payg_summary_model") or "").strip()
      or settings.DEFAULT_FAST_MODEL
    )
    limits += (
      "\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_payg_balance", lang)
      + f"${_fmt_usd_4(status['payg_balance_usd'])} USD\n\n"
      + tr("audio_notes.upgrade.label_payg_summary_model", lang)
      + model_display
    )
  title = tr(
    "audio_notes.tier_welcome.title",
    lang,
    tier_label=tier_label,
  )
  body = tr(
    "audio_notes.tier_welcome.body",
    lang,
    limits=limits,
  )
  return f"{title}\n\n{body}"
def _build_subscription_canceled_message(
  *,
  tier_label: str,
  until_date: str,
  language_code: str,
) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  return tr(
    "audio_notes.cancel.scheduled_done",
    lang,
    tier_label=tier_label.upper(),
    until_date=until_date,
  )
def _fmt_usd_4(value: str | float) -> str:
  s = format(Decimal(str(value).strip() or "0"), "f")
  if "." in s:
    s = s.rstrip("0").rstrip(".")
  return s if s else "0"
def _display_llm_button_label(
  *,
  model_name: str,
  base_tier: str,
  language_code: str,
) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  base_model = str(
    runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot().audio_notes_summary_model_pro_premium
    or ""
  ).strip()
  if (
    base_tier in {"premium", "pro"}
    and base_model
    and model_name.strip().lower() == base_model.lower()
  ):
    return tr(
      "audio_notes.llms.base_tier_model_label",
      lang,
      model_name=model_name,
    )
  return model_name
async def _handle_upgrade_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService | None = None,  # NUEVO
) -> None:
  status = await get_user_status_use_case(user_id=user_id, repo=repo)
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  dynamic_pro_model = ""
  if dynamic_config:
    _, dynamic_pro_model = await dynamic_config.get_audio_notes_summary_models()
  if not dynamic_pro_model:
    snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
    dynamic_pro_model = snap.audio_notes_summary_model_pro_premium
  stripe_management_url = ""
  customer_id = str(status.get("stripe_customer_id") or "").strip()
  effective_paid_tier = str(status.get("base_tier") or "free").strip().lower()
  if effective_paid_tier in {"premium", "pro"} and customer_id:
    try:
      stripe_management_url = await create_billing_portal_session(
        customer_id=customer_id,
        return_url=default_portal_return_url(),
        configuration_id=portal_configuration_id_for_module("audio_notes"),
      )
    except (RuntimeError, ValueError, HTTPStatusError):
      stripe_management_url = ""
  personalized: UserStatus = {
    **status,
    "stripe_link_premium": _personalize_stripe_link(
      status["stripe_link_premium"], user_id, lang
    ),
    "stripe_link_pro": _personalize_stripe_link(
      status["stripe_link_pro"], user_id, lang
    ),
    "stripe_link_payg_topup": _personalize_stripe_link(
      status["stripe_link_payg_topup"], user_id, lang
    ),
    "stripe_management_url": stripe_management_url,
  }
  text = _build_upgrade_markdown(personalized, language_code, dynamic_pro_model)
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=text,
    parse_mode="Markdown",
  )
async def _handle_terms_of_use_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
) -> None:
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=get_terms_of_use(normalize_locale(language_code)),
    parse_mode="Markdown",
  )
async def _handle_privacy_policy_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
) -> None:
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=get_privacy_policy(normalize_locale(language_code)),
    parse_mode="Markdown",
  )
async def _handle_transactions_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  wallet_tx_repo: SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  cache: CachePort | None = None,
  page: int = 1,
) -> None:
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user_tier = str(user.tier or "").strip().lower()
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if user_tier != "payg":
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=tr("audio_notes.history.not_available", lang),
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    return
  try:
    _, _, page, _, _, _ = await get_rules_use_case(
      user_id,
      page,
      repo,
      cache=cache,
    )
  except PaginationRateLimitError as e:
    msg = tr("audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_day", lang)
    if e.scope == "minute":
      msg = tr("audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_minute", lang)
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=msg,
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    return
  transactions, total = await wallet_tx_repo.get_transactions_paginated(
    tenant_id=user_id,
    page=page,
    page_size=10,
  )
  total_pages = max(1, (total + 10 - 1) // 10)
  page = max(1, min(page, total_pages))
  await _send_transactions_view(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    telegram_client=telegram_client,
    transactions=transactions,
    total_transactions=total,
    page=page,
    total_pages=total_pages,
    language_code=lang,
  )
async def _handle_llms_command(
  *,
  chat_id: str,
  user_id: str,
  language_code: str,
  requested_model: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
) -> None:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  if not requested_model.strip():
    user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
    tier = str(user.tier or "free").lower()
    if tier != "payg":
      text = tr("audio_notes.llms.only_payg", lang)
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=text,
        parse_mode="Markdown",
      )
      return
    available: AvailableModelsResponse = list_llm_models_use_case()
    text = tr("audio_notes.llms.list_header", lang)
    base_tier = str(user.get_limits_tier() or "free").strip().lower()
    none_button = {
      "text": tr("audio_notes.llms.none_button", lang),
      "callback_data": "llms:none",
    }
    reply_markup = {"inline_keyboard": [[none_button]]}
    reply_markup["inline_keyboard"] += [
      [
        {
          "text": _display_llm_button_label(
            model_name=m,
            base_tier=base_tier,
            language_code=lang,
          ),
          "callback_data": f"llms:{m}",
        }
      ]
      for m in available["models"]
    ]
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=text,
      parse_mode="Markdown",
      reply_markup=reply_markup,
    )
    return
  result: SetModelResult = await set_user_llm_model_use_case(
    user_id=user_id,
    requested_model=requested_model,
    repo=repo,
  )
  if not result["accepted"]:
    reason = result.get("reason") or ""
    if reason == "tier_not_payg":
      msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.tier_not_payg", lang)
    elif reason == "unknown_model":
      msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.unknown_model", lang)
    else:
      msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.generic", lang)
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      text=msg,
      parse_mode="Markdown",
    )
    return
  model_name = result.get("normalized_model") or requested_model
  user = result["user"]
  base_tier = str(user.get_limits_tier() or "free").strip().lower()
  if requested_model.strip().lower() == "none":
    model_name = tr("audio_notes.llms.none_value", lang)
  cost_per_minute = result.get("cost_per_minute_usd")
  max_minutes = result.get("max_minutes_with_balance") or 0
  finops_line = ""
  if isinstance(cost_per_minute, Decimal) and cost_per_minute > 0:
    finops_line = _build_llms_finops_line(
      lang=lang,
      cost_per_minute=cost_per_minute,
      max_minutes=int(max_minutes),
    )
  msg = tr(
    "audio_notes.llms.success",
    lang,
    model_name=_display_llm_button_label(
      model_name=model_name,
      base_tier=base_tier,
      language_code=lang,
    ),
    finops_line=finops_line,
  )
  await telegram_client.send_message(
    chat_id=chat_id,
    text=msg,
    parse_mode="Markdown",
  )
async def _handle_callback_query(
  callback: dict[str, Any],
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  wallet_tx_repo: SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository,
  telegram_client: TelegramClient,
  cache: CachePort | None = None,
  support_attachment_storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort | None = None,
) -> None:
  data = str(callback.get("data") or "")
  message = callback.get("message") or {}
  chat = message.get("chat") or {}
  chat_id_raw = chat.get("id")
  message_id_raw = message.get("message_id")
  query_id = str(callback.get("id") or "")
  if chat_id_raw is None or message_id_raw is None:
    if query_id:
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
    return
  chat_id = str(chat_id_raw)
  message_id = int(message_id_raw)
  callback_lang = await _resolve_callback_language(
    callback=callback,
    repo=repo,
    chat_id=chat_id,
  )
  if data.startswith("llms:"):
    requested_model = data.split(":", maxsplit=1)[1] if ":" in data else ""
    lang = callback_lang
    if not requested_model.strip():
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
    result: SetModelResult = await set_user_llm_model_use_case(
      user_id=chat_id,
      requested_model=requested_model,
      repo=repo,
    )
    if not result["accepted"]:
      reason = result.get("reason") or ""
      if reason == "tier_not_payg":
        msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.tier_not_payg", lang)
      elif reason == "unknown_model":
        msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.unknown_model", lang)
      else:
        msg = tr("audio_notes.llms.error.generic", lang)
      await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=msg)
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
    model_name = result.get("normalized_model") or requested_model
    user = result["user"]
    base_tier = str(user.get_limits_tier() or "free").strip().lower()
    if requested_model.strip().lower() == "none":
      model_name = tr("audio_notes.llms.none_value", lang)
    cost_per_minute = result.get("cost_per_minute_usd")
    max_minutes = result.get("max_minutes_with_balance") or 0
    finops_line = ""
    if isinstance(cost_per_minute, Decimal) and cost_per_minute > 0:
      finops_line = _build_llms_finops_line(
        lang=lang,
        cost_per_minute=cost_per_minute,
        max_minutes=int(max_minutes),
      )
    msg = tr(
      "audio_notes.llms.success",
      lang,
      model_name=_display_llm_button_label(
        model_name=model_name,
        base_tier=base_tier,
        language_code=lang,
      ),
      finops_line=finops_line,
    )
    await telegram_client.send_message(chat_id=chat_id, text=msg)
    if query_id:
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
    return
  if data.startswith("summary_feedback:"):
    action = data.split(":", maxsplit=1)[1] if ":" in data else ""
    lang = callback_lang
    log = await repo.get_log_by_telegram_message_id(message_id)
    trace_id = str(getattr(log, "file_hash", "") or "").strip() if log else ""
    if not trace_id:
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
          query_id=query_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.summary_feedback.trace_not_found", lang),
          show_alert=True,
        )
      return
    if action == "up":
      await repo.save_feedback_for_trace(
        trace_id=trace_id,
        score=1.0,
      )
      structlog.get_logger().info(
        "audio_notes_quality_telemetry",
        trace_id=trace_id,
        feedback_score=1.0,
        action="thumbs_up",
      )
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
          query_id=query_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.summary_feedback.thanks_short", lang),
        )
      return
    if action == "down":
      await repo.save_feedback_for_trace(
        trace_id=trace_id,
        score=0.0,
      )
      structlog.get_logger().info(
        "audio_notes_quality_telemetry",
        trace_id=trace_id,
        feedback_score=0.0,
        action="thumbs_down",
      )
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
          query_id=query_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.summary_feedback.thanks_short", lang),
        )
      return
  if data.startswith("hist_nav:"):
    parts = data.split(":")
    if len(parts) >= 2:
      if parts[1] == "noop":
        if query_id:
          await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
        return
      user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id)
      if str(user.tier or "").strip().lower() != "payg":
        if query_id:
          await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
            query_id=query_id,
            text=tr("audio_notes.history.not_available", callback_lang),
            show_alert=True,
          )
        return
      page = int(parts[1])
      try:
        _, _, page, _, _, _ = await get_rules_use_case(
          chat_id,
          page,
          repo,
          cache=cache,
        )
      except PaginationRateLimitError as e:
        if query_id:
          msg = tr("audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_day", callback_lang)
          if e.scope == "minute":
            msg = tr(
              "audio_notes.rules.pagination_limit_minute",
              callback_lang,
            )
          await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
            query_id=query_id,
            show_alert=True,
            text=msg,
          )
        return
      transactions, total = await wallet_tx_repo.get_transactions_paginated(
        tenant_id=chat_id,
        page=page,
        page_size=10,
      )
      total_pages = max(1, (total + 10 - 1) // 10)
      page = max(1, min(page, total_pages))
      await _send_transactions_view(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        telegram_client=telegram_client,
        transactions=transactions,
        total_transactions=total,
        page=page,
        total_pages=total_pages,
        language_code=callback_lang,
        message_id=message_id,
      )
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
  if data == "hist_export":
    user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id)
    if str(user.tier or "").strip().lower() != "payg":
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
          query_id=query_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.history.not_available", callback_lang),
          show_alert=True,
        )
      return
    export_result = await export_transactions_xlsx_use_case(
      user_id=chat_id,
      repo=repo,
      wallet_tx_repo=wallet_tx_repo,
      language_code=callback_lang,
    )
    if export_result.remaining_exports_today < 0 or not export_result.content:
      limits_tier = str(export_result.user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
      limit = (
        20
        if limits_tier in {"pro", "payg"}
        else 10
        if limits_tier == "premium"
        else 3
      )
      msg = tr(
        "audio_notes.rules.export.limit_reached",
        callback_lang,
        limit=limit,
      )
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
        query_id=query_id or "",
        text=msg,
        show_alert=True,
      )
      return
    await telegram_client.send_document(
      chat_id=chat_id,
      file_bytes=export_result.content,
      filename=export_result.filename,
      caption=tr("audio_notes.history.export.caption", callback_lang),
      parse_mode=None,
    )
    if query_id:
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
    return
  if data.startswith("cancel_sub:"):
    action = data.split(":", maxsplit=1)[1] if ":" in data else ""
    lang = callback_lang
    user = await repo.get_or_create_user(chat_id)
    tier = str(user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
    if action == "yes" and tier in {"premium", "pro"}:
      user.base_tier = "free"
      if str(getattr(user, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower() != "payg":
        user.tier = None
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr(
          "audio_notes.cancel.done",
          lang,
        ),
      )
    elif action == "no":
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr(
          "audio_notes.cancel.aborted",
          lang,
        ),
      )
    if query_id:
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
    return
  if data.startswith("ticketremove:"):
    parts = data.split(":")
    if len(parts) != 3 or cache is None:
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
    action = parts[1]
    ticket_id_str = parts[2]
    if not ticket_id_str.isdigit():
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
    ticket_id = int(ticket_id_str)
    lang = callback_lang
    if action == "yes":
      active = await get_ticket_status_use_case(
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        cache=cache,
      )
      if active is None or active.user_id != chat_id:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.not_found",
            lang,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
          ),
        )
      else:
        await delete_ticket_completely(
          user_id=chat_id,
          ticket_id=ticket_id,
          cache=cache,
        )
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.removed",
            lang,
            ticket_id=ticket_id,
          ),
        )
    elif action == "no":
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=chat_id,
        text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.remove_aborted", lang),
      )
    if query_id:
      await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
    return
  if data.startswith("ticketcreate:"):
    parts = data.split(":")
    if len(parts) != 3 or cache is None:
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      return
    action = parts[1]
    pending_id = parts[2]
    pending_key = _ticket_create_pending_key(pending_id=pending_id)
    pending_raw = await cache.get(pending_key)
    if not isinstance(pending_raw, dict):
      if query_id:
        await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(
          query_id=query_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.draft_expired_alert",
            callback_lang,
          ),
          show_alert=True,
        )
      return
    lang = callback_lang
    if action == "yes":
      idem_key = f"{pending_key}:confirmed"
      first = await cache.set(idem_key, True, ttl=600, nx=True)
      if first is False:
        if query_id:
          with suppress(Exception):
            await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
        return
      if query_id:
        with suppress(Exception):
          await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
      user_id = str(pending_raw.get("user_id") or chat_id)
      user_tier = str(pending_raw.get("user_tier") or "free").lower()
      message = str(pending_raw.get("message") or "")
      photo_file_ids_raw = pending_raw.get("photo_file_ids") or []
      photo_file_ids: list[str] = (
        photo_file_ids_raw if isinstance(photo_file_ids_raw, list) else []
      )
      media_group_id = pending_raw.get("media_group_id")
      media_group_id_str = (
        str(media_group_id).strip()
        if isinstance(media_group_id, str) and media_group_id.strip()
        else None
      )
      attachments: list[SupportAttachment] = []
      if photo_file_ids:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.creating_ticket", lang),
        )
      if photo_file_ids and support_attachment_storage is not None:
        try:
          if media_group_id_str:
            attachments = await _collect_ticket_attachments_for_media_group(
              telegram_client=telegram_client,
              storage=support_attachment_storage,
              cache=cache,
              user_id=user_id,
              media_group_id=media_group_id_str,
              action="create",
              ticket_id=None,
              photo_file_ids=photo_file_ids,
            )
          else:
            total_bytes = 0
            store_attachment = (
              _download_and_store_telegram_image_as_support_attachment
            )
            for file_id in photo_file_ids:
              stored = await store_attachment(
                telegram_client=telegram_client,
                storage=support_attachment_storage,
                module="audio_notes",
                user_id=user_id,
                ticket_id=None,
                file_id=file_id,
                strict=True,
              )
              if stored is None:
                continue
              attachments.append(stored)
              total_bytes += int(stored.size_bytes or 0)
              validate_attachment_limits(
                attachment_count=len(attachments),
                total_bytes=total_bytes,
              )
        except (ValueError, HTTPStatusError) as exc:
          key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_invalid"
          if isinstance(exc, ValueError):
            msg = str(exc)
            if msg.startswith("Too many attachments"):
              key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_too_many"
            elif msg.startswith("Attachments exceed max total size"):
              key = "audio_notes.tickets.attachment_too_large"
          await telegram_client.send_message(
            chat_id=chat_id,
            text=tr(key, lang),
          )
          with suppress(Exception):
            await cache.delete(pending_key)
          if query_id:
            await telegram_client.answer_callback_query(query_id=query_id)
          return
      try:
        draft_id = await draft_ticket_use_case(
          user_id=user_id,
          user_tier=user_tier,
          message=message,
          cache=cache,
          attachments=list(attachments) or None,
        )
      except TicketTierNotAllowedError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr("audio_notes.tickets.tier_not_allowed", lang),
        )
        return
      except TicketMessageTooLongError:
        await telegram_client.send_message(
          chat_id=chat_id,
          text=tr(
            "audio_notes.tickets.message_too_long",
            lang,
            limit=MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS,
          ),
        )
        return
      active = await confirm_ticket_use_case(
        draft_id=draft_id,
        cache=cache,
      )
