### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/data_lifecycle.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from datetime import UTC, datetime, timedelta
import structlog
from sqlalchemy import delete, select
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import GlossaryRule, TranscriptionLog, User
AUDIO_NOTES_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS = 90
_FREE_HISTORY_LIMIT = 20
_FREE_GLOSSARY_LIMIT = 200
logger = structlog.get_logger()
def _normalize_subscription_status(value: object) -> str:
  return str(value or "").strip().lower()
async def _get_expired_user_ids(session: AsyncSession) -> list[str]:
  try:
    result = await session.execute(select(User))
    rows = list(result.scalars().all())
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning("audio_notes_expired_users_query_failed", error=str(exc))
    return []
  cutoff = datetime.now(UTC).replace(tzinfo=None) - timedelta(
    days=AUDIO_NOTES_SUBSCRIPTION_GRACE_DAYS
  )
  expired: list[str] = []
  for row in rows:
    status = _normalize_subscription_status(
      getattr(row, "subscription_status", None)
    )
    if status not in {"canceled", "cancelled"}:
      continue
    period_end = getattr(row, "current_period_end", None)
    if not isinstance(period_end, datetime):
      continue
    candidate = period_end.replace(tzinfo=None) if period_end.tzinfo else period_end
    if candidate >= cutoff:
      continue
    expired.append(str(row.telegram_id))
  return expired
async def _delete_old_logs_for_user(
  session: AsyncSession,
  *,
  user_id: str,
  keep: int,
) -> None:
  result = await session.execute(
    select(TranscriptionLog.id)
    .where(TranscriptionLog.user_id == user_id)
    .order_by(TranscriptionLog.created_at.desc())
    .offset(keep)
  )
  delete_ids = list(result.scalars().all())
  if not delete_ids:
    return
  await session.execute(
    delete(TranscriptionLog).where(TranscriptionLog.id.in_(delete_ids))
  )
async def _delete_old_rules_for_user(
  session: AsyncSession,
  *,
  user_id: str,
  keep: int,
) -> None:
  result = await session.execute(
    select(GlossaryRule.id)
    .where(GlossaryRule.user_id == user_id)
    .order_by(GlossaryRule.created_at.desc())
    .offset(keep)
  )
  delete_ids = list(result.scalars().all())
  if not delete_ids:
    return
  await session.execute(delete(GlossaryRule).where(GlossaryRule.id.in_(delete_ids)))
async def prune_expired_audio_notes_data_use_case(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  history_limit: int = _FREE_HISTORY_LIMIT,
  glossary_limit: int = _FREE_GLOSSARY_LIMIT,
) -> list[str]:
  expired_user_ids = await _get_expired_user_ids(session)
  if not expired_user_ids:
    logger.info("audio_notes_prune_no_expired_users")
    return []
  logger.info(
    "audio_notes_prune_start",
    user_count=len(expired_user_ids),
    history_limit=history_limit,
    glossary_limit=glossary_limit,
  )
  for user_id in expired_user_ids:
    await _delete_old_logs_for_user(session, user_id=user_id, keep=history_limit)
    await _delete_old_rules_for_user(
      session,
      user_id=user_id,
      keep=glossary_limit,
    )
    result = await session.execute(select(User).where(User.telegram_id == user_id))
    user = result.scalar_one_or_none()
    if user is not None:
      user.base_tier = "free"
  logger.info("audio_notes_prune_completed")
  return expired_user_ids
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/cache_policy.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from enum import StrEnum
class AudioTier(StrEnum):
  FREE = "free"
  PREMIUM = "premium"
  PRO = "pro"
  PAYG = "payg"
FREE_TTL_SECONDS = 60 * 60 * 24
PREMIUM_TTL_SECONDS = 60 * 60 * 24 * 3
PRO_TTL_SECONDS = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7
PAYG_TTL_SECONDS = 60 * 60 * 24 * 7
def get_audio_cache_ttl_seconds(tier: AudioTier) -> int:
  if tier is AudioTier.FREE:
    return FREE_TTL_SECONDS
  if tier is AudioTier.PREMIUM:
    return PREMIUM_TTL_SECONDS
  if tier is AudioTier.PRO:
    return PRO_TTL_SECONDS
  if tier is AudioTier.PAYG:
    return PAYG_TTL_SECONDS
  return FREE_TTL_SECONDS
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/export_transactions.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
import io
import secrets
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import date
from decimal import Decimal
from openpyxl import Workbook  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
from app.domain.billing import WalletTransaction
from app.domain.ports import WalletTransactionRepositoryPort
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import (
  coerce_audio_notes_tier,
  daily_export_limit_for_tier,
  normalize_user_tier_string,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import User
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
from app.modules.audio_notes.i18n.messages import normalize_locale, tr
XLSX_MIME = "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
@dataclass(frozen=True)
class TransactionsExportResult:
  user: User
  filename: str
  content: bytes
  mime_type: str
  tier: str
  remaining_exports_today: int
def _format_amount(value: Decimal) -> str:
  return format(value.normalize(), "f") if value != 0 else "0"
def _translate_transaction_description(description: str, language_code: str) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  normalized = description.strip()
  known_keys = {
    "PAYG wallet debit for audio_notes processing": (
      "audio_notes.history.description.audio_notes_debit"
    ),
    "PAYG wallet top-up from Stripe checkout": (
      "audio_notes.history.description.wallet_topup_stripe"
    ),
  }
  key = known_keys.get(normalized)
  return tr(key, lang) if key else normalized
def _build_transactions_xlsx_bytes(
  transactions: list[WalletTransaction],
  *,
  language_code: str,
) -> bytes:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  wb = Workbook()
  ws = wb.active
  if ws is None:
    raise RuntimeError("Workbook has no active sheet")
  ws.title = "Transactions"
  ws.append(
    [
      tr("audio_notes.history.col_date", lang),
      tr("audio_notes.history.col_amount", lang),
      tr("audio_notes.history.col_type", lang),
      tr("audio_notes.history.col_balance", lang),
      tr("audio_notes.history.col_description", lang),
    ]
  )
  for tx in transactions:
    tx_type = str(tx.transaction_type.value).upper()
    created_at = tx.created_at.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()
    ws.append(
      [
        created_at,
        _format_amount(tx.amount_usd),
        tr("audio_notes.history.type_credit", lang)
        if tx_type == "CREDIT"
        else tr("audio_notes.history.type_debit", lang),
        _format_amount(tx.balance_after_usd),
        _translate_transaction_description(str(tx.description), lang),
      ]
    )
  buf = io.BytesIO()
  wb.save(buf)
  buf.seek(0)
  content = buf.getvalue()
  buf.close()
  return content
async def export_transactions_xlsx_use_case(
  *,
  user_id: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  wallet_tx_repo: WalletTransactionRepositoryPort,
  language_code: str = "en",
) -> TransactionsExportResult:
  user: User = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user.check_and_reset_limits()
  tier_lower = normalize_user_tier_string(
    str(user.tier) if user.tier is not None else None
  )
  tier_typed = coerce_audio_notes_tier(tier_lower)
  limits_tier = coerce_audio_notes_tier(user.get_limits_tier())
  limit = daily_export_limit_for_tier(limits_tier)
  raw_exports = user.daily_export_count
  used = int(raw_exports) if raw_exports is not None else 0
  remaining = max(0, limit - used)
  if remaining <= 0:
    return TransactionsExportResult(
      user=user,
      filename="transactions_export.xlsx",
      content=b"",
      mime_type=XLSX_MIME,
      tier=tier_typed,
      remaining_exports_today=0,
    )
  transactions = await wallet_tx_repo.get_all_transactions_for_user(user_id)
  content = await asyncio.to_thread(
    _build_transactions_xlsx_bytes,
    transactions,
    language_code=language_code,
  )
  today_str = date.today().isoformat()
  short_suffix = secrets.token_hex(4)
  filename = f"transactions_{today_str}_{short_suffix}.xlsx"
  await repo.increment_user_daily_exports(user_id)
  return TransactionsExportResult(
    user=user,
    filename=filename,
    content=content,
    mime_type=XLSX_MIME,
    tier=tier_typed,
    remaining_exports_today=remaining - 1,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/audio_heuristics.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
_TIER_FREE: str = "free"
_TIER_PAYG: str = "payg"
_TIER_PRO: str = "pro"
_TIER_PREMIUM: str = "premium"
_PAID_TIERS: tuple[str, ...] = (_TIER_PRO, _TIER_PREMIUM, _TIER_PAYG)
_CACHE_STATUS_CACHED: str = "cached"
_SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED: str = "completed"
_AUDIO_TO_SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED: str = "audio_summarized"
GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX: str = "glossary:"
GLOSSARY_CACHE_TTL: int = 3600
_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN: int = 16
_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS: int = 86400
_FLOAT_ZERO: float = 0.0
_EMPTY_STRING: str = ""
_SUMMARY_DICT_KEYS: tuple[str, ...] = (
  "title",
  "summary",
  "key_points",
  "action_items",
  "applied_rules",
)
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_COST: str = "cost_usd"
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_MODEL: str = "model_used"
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT: str = "transcript"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_TEXT: str = "summary_text"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY: str = "summary"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_MODEL: str = "summary_model"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT: str = "transcript"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_HASH: str = "hash"
def is_paid_tier(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  tier_lower: str = tier.lower()
  return tier_lower in _PAID_TIERS
def is_free_tier(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  tier_lower: str = tier.lower()
  return tier_lower == _TIER_FREE
def validate_user_id(user_id: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(user_id, str):
    raise TypeError(f"user_id must be str, got {type(user_id)}")
  if len(user_id) == 0:
    raise ValueError("user_id cannot be empty")
  return True
def build_glossary_cache_key(user_id: str) -> str:
  if not isinstance(user_id, str):
    raise TypeError(f"user_id must be str, got {type(user_id)}")
  if len(user_id) == 0:
    raise ValueError("user_id cannot be empty")
  return f"{GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}"
def should_cache_glossary(context: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(context, str):
    raise TypeError(f"context must be str, got {type(context)}")
  return len(context) > 0
def is_status_completed(status: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(status, str):
    raise TypeError(f"status must be str, got {type(status)}")
  if len(status) == 0:
    raise ValueError("status cannot be empty")
  return status == _SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED
def is_cached_status(status: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(status, str):
    raise TypeError(f"status must be str, got {type(status)}")
  if len(status) == 0:
    raise ValueError("status cannot be empty")
  return status == _CACHE_STATUS_CACHED
def hash_preview(hash_str: str) -> str:
  if not isinstance(hash_str, str):
    raise TypeError(f"hash_str must be str, got {type(hash_str)}")
  if len(hash_str) == 0:
    raise ValueError("hash_str cannot be empty")
  return hash_str[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN]
def validate_summary_dict_keys(summary_dict: dict[str, object]) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(summary_dict, dict):
    raise TypeError(f"summary_dict must be dict, got {type(summary_dict)}")
  for key in _SUMMARY_DICT_KEYS:
    if key not in summary_dict:
      raise ValueError(f"Missing required key: {key!r}")
  return True
def should_run_audio_to_summary(tier: str) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(tier, str):
    raise TypeError(f"tier must be str, got {type(tier)}")
  if len(tier) == 0:
    raise ValueError("tier cannot be empty")
  tier_lower: str = tier.lower()
  return tier_lower in _PAID_TIERS
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/export_glossary_csv.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import csv
import io
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import date
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import (
  coerce_audio_notes_tier,
  normalize_user_tier_string,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import (
  daily_export_limit_for_tier as _daily_export_limit,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import User
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
@dataclass(frozen=True)
class GlossaryExportResult:
  user: User
  filename: str
  content: bytes
  mime_type: str
  tier: str
  remaining_exports_today: int
async def export_glossary_csv_use_case(
  user_id: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
) -> GlossaryExportResult:
  user: User = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user.check_and_reset_limits()
  tier_lower = normalize_user_tier_string(
    str(user.tier) if user.tier is not None else None,
  )
  tier_typed = coerce_audio_notes_tier(tier_lower)
  limits_tier = coerce_audio_notes_tier(user.get_limits_tier())
  limit = _daily_export_limit(limits_tier)
  used = int(user.daily_correction_count or 0)
  remaining = max(0, limit - used)
  if remaining <= 0:
    return GlossaryExportResult(
      user=user,  # pragma: no mutate
      filename="glossary_export.csv",
      content=b"",
      mime_type="text/csv",  # pragma: no mutate
      tier=tier_typed,  # pragma: no mutate
      remaining_exports_today=0,
    )
  rules = await repo.get_all_rules_for_user(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
  buf = io.StringIO(newline="")  # pragma: no mutate
  writer = csv.writer(buf)
  writer.writerow(
    [
      "id",
      "user_id",
      "misheard_term",
      "correction",
      "is_active",
      "deleted_at",
      "created_at",
    ]
  )
  for rule in rules:
    writer.writerow(
      [
        str(rule.id),
        rule.user_id,
        rule.misheard_term,
        rule.correction,
        bool(rule.is_active),
        rule.deleted_at.isoformat() if rule.deleted_at else "",
        rule.created_at.isoformat() if rule.created_at else "",
      ]
    )
  csv_text = buf.getvalue()
  buf.close()
  today_str = date.today().isoformat()
  filename = f"glossary_{user_id}_{today_str}.csv"
  await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)
  return GlossaryExportResult(
    user=user,  # pragma: no mutate
    filename=filename,
    content=csv_text.encode("utf-8-sig"),  # pragma: no mutate
    mime_type="text/csv",  # pragma: no mutate
    tier=tier_typed,  # pragma: no mutate
    remaining_exports_today=remaining - 1,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/audio_summary_pure.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from typing import Any
from app.modules.audio_notes.i18n.messages import normalize_locale, tr
_GLOSSARY_HEADER = "DYNAMIC GLOSSARY (Apply these corrections):"
_TITLE_EMOJI = "🤖"
_KEY_BULLET = "\n- "
def _format_glossary_context(rules: list[Any]) -> str:
  if not rules:
    return ""
  lines = [
    f"- If you hear '{r.misheard_term!s}', write '{r.correction!s}'." for r in rules
  ]
  return _GLOSSARY_HEADER + "\n" + "\n".join(lines)
def _format_telegram_summary(
  data: dict[str, Any],
  *,
  language_code: str,
) -> str:
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  title_raw = data.get("title") or ""
  title = title_raw or tr("audio_notes.summary.title", lang)
  summary = data.get("summary") or ""
  key_points = data.get("key_points") or []
  action_items = data.get("action_items") or []
  applied = data.get("applied_rules") or []
  summary_label = tr("audio_notes.summary.section_summary", lang)
  key_points_label = tr("audio_notes.summary.section_key_points", lang)
  action_items_label = tr("audio_notes.summary.section_action_items", lang)
  glossary_applied_label = tr(
    "audio_notes.summary.section_glossary_applied",
    lang,
  )
  parts = [
    f"{_TITLE_EMOJI} *{title}*",
    "",
    f"*{summary_label}*",
    summary,
    "",
    f"*{key_points_label}*",
    _KEY_BULLET.join(["", *key_points]) if key_points else "-",
    "",
    f"*{action_items_label}*",
    _KEY_BULLET.join(["", *action_items]) if action_items else "-",
  ]
  if applied:
    parts.append("")
    parts.append(f"*{glossary_applied_label}*")
    for rule in applied:
      parts.append(f"  - {rule}")
  return "\n".join(parts).strip()
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/support_ticket_attachments.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path
MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE: int = 10
MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES: int = 5 * 1024 * 1024
MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES: int = 25 * 1024 * 1024
ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS: frozenset[str] = frozenset(
  {"jpg", "jpeg", "png", "webp", "tiff", "avif", "heic", "heif"}
)
EXTENSION_TO_MIME: dict[str, str] = {
  "jpg": "image/jpeg",
  "jpeg": "image/jpeg",
  "png": "image/png",
  "webp": "image/webp",
  "tiff": "image/tiff",
  "avif": "image/avif",
  "heic": "image/heic",
  "heif": "image/heif",
}
def extract_extension(filename_hint: str) -> str:
  raw_ext = (Path(filename_hint).suffix or "").lower()
  return raw_ext.removeprefix(".")
def infer_content_type_from_filename_hint(filename_hint: str) -> str:
  ext = extract_extension(filename_hint)
  if ext not in ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS:
    raise ValueError(
      "Invalid attachment extension. Allowed: "
      "jpg, jpeg, png, webp, tiff, avif, heic, heif."
    )
  return EXTENSION_TO_MIME[ext]
def validate_attachment_limits(*, attachment_count: int, total_bytes: int) -> None:
  if attachment_count > MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE:
    raise ValueError("Too many attachments. Maximum is 10 files per message.")
  if total_bytes > MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES:
    raise ValueError("Attachments exceed max total size of 25MB per request.")
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/manage_llms.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import TypedDict
import app.core.runtime_tunable_config as runtime_tunable_config
from app.core.config import settings
from app.core.pricing_registry import (
  get_model_pricing,
  summary_tokens_per_audio_minute,
  tokens_per_audio_minute,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import normalize_user_tier_string
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import User
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
class AvailableModelsResponse(TypedDict):
  models: list[str]
class SetModelResult(TypedDict):
  user: User
  accepted: bool
  normalized_model: str | None
  reason: str | None
  cost_per_minute_usd: Decimal | None
  max_minutes_with_balance: int | None
class PaygModelResolution(TypedDict):
  selected_model: str
  uses_payg_wallet: bool
  delegated_tier: str
_EXCLUDED_MODELS: set[str] = {
  "groq/llama-3.3-70b-versatile",
}
def _filtered_models() -> list[str]:
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  models = list(snap.audio_notes_available_summary_models or ())
  return [m for m in models if m not in _EXCLUDED_MODELS]
def list_llm_models_use_case() -> AvailableModelsResponse:
  models = _filtered_models()
  return AvailableModelsResponse(models=models)
def resolve_payg_model_resolution(user: User) -> PaygModelResolution:
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  base_tier = normalize_user_tier_string(user.get_limits_tier())
  base_model = str(snap.audio_notes_summary_model_pro_premium or "").strip()
  raw = getattr(user, "payg_summary_model", None)
  requested = str(raw).strip() if isinstance(raw, str) and raw.strip() else ""
  selected_model = ""
  for model_name in _filtered_models():
    if requested and model_name.lower() == requested.lower():
      selected_model = model_name
      break
  if (
    selected_model
    and base_tier in {"premium", "pro"}
    and base_model
    and selected_model.lower() == base_model.lower()
  ):
    return PaygModelResolution(
      selected_model=selected_model,
      uses_payg_wallet=False,
      delegated_tier=base_tier,
    )
  if selected_model:
    return PaygModelResolution(
      selected_model=selected_model,
      uses_payg_wallet=True,
      delegated_tier=base_tier,
    )
  return PaygModelResolution(
    selected_model="",
    uses_payg_wallet=False,
    delegated_tier=base_tier,
  )
def _compute_payg_finops_for_model(user: User, model_name: str) -> tuple[Decimal, int]:
  pricing = get_model_pricing(model_name)
  if pricing is None:
    return Decimal("0"), 0
  audio_tokens_min = tokens_per_audio_minute()
  summary_tokens_min = summary_tokens_per_audio_minute()
  million = Decimal(1_000_000)
  per_minute_cost = Decimal("0")
  if pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens > 0:
    per_minute_cost += (
      Decimal(audio_tokens_min + summary_tokens_min)
      / million
      * pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens
    )
  if pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens > 0:
    per_minute_cost += (
      Decimal(summary_tokens_min) / million * pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens
    )
  if pricing.audio_price_per_m_tokens > 0:
    per_minute_cost += (
      Decimal(audio_tokens_min) / million * pricing.audio_price_per_m_tokens
    )
  if per_minute_cost <= 0:
    return Decimal("0"), 0
  markup_factor = Decimal("1.40")
  effective_cost_per_minute = per_minute_cost * markup_factor
  context_limit = int(
    settings.MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMITS.get(
      model_name,
      pricing.max_context_window,
    )
  )
  output_reserve = int(
    getattr(
      settings,
      "MODEL_OUTPUT_RESERVE",
      2048,
    )
  )
  max_tokens_for_text = max(0, context_limit - output_reserve)
  max_minutes = user.calculate_max_audio_duration(
    input_price_per_m=pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens,
    output_price_per_m=pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens,
    audio_price_per_m=pricing.audio_price_per_m_tokens,
    max_tokens_for_text=max_tokens_for_text,
    audio_tokens_min=audio_tokens_min,
    summary_tokens_min=summary_tokens_min,
  )
  return effective_cost_per_minute, max_minutes
async def set_user_llm_model_use_case(
  user_id: str,
  requested_model: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
) -> SetModelResult:
  user: User = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  tier = normalize_user_tier_string(
    str(user.tier) if user.tier is not None else None,
  )
  allowed_models = _filtered_models()
  if tier != "payg":
    return SetModelResult(
      user=user,
      accepted=False,
      normalized_model=None,
      reason="tier_not_payg",
      cost_per_minute_usd=None,
      max_minutes_with_balance=None,
    )
  requested = requested_model.strip()
  if requested.lower() == "none":
    user.payg_summary_model = None
    await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)
    return SetModelResult(
      user=user,
      accepted=True,
      normalized_model=None,
      reason=None,
      cost_per_minute_usd=None,
      max_minutes_with_balance=None,
    )
  if not requested:
    return SetModelResult(
      user=user,
      accepted=False,
      normalized_model=None,
      reason="empty_model",
      cost_per_minute_usd=None,
      max_minutes_with_balance=None,
    )
  normalized: str | None = None
  for m in allowed_models:
    if m.lower() == requested.lower():
      normalized = m
      break
  if normalized is None:
    return SetModelResult(
      user=user,
      accepted=False,
      normalized_model=None,
      reason="unknown_model",
      cost_per_minute_usd=None,
      max_minutes_with_balance=None,
    )
  user.payg_summary_model = normalized
  _model = normalized
  cost_per_minute_usd, max_minutes = _compute_payg_finops_for_model(
    user,
    _model,
  )
  await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)
  return SetModelResult(
    user=user,
    accepted=True,
    normalized_model=normalized,
    reason=None,
    cost_per_minute_usd=cost_per_minute_usd,
    max_minutes_with_balance=max_minutes,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/process_audio.py`
```py
from time import perf_counter
from typing import Any
import structlog
import app.core.runtime_tunable_config as runtime_tunable_config
from app.core.dynamic_config import DynamicConfigService
from app.domain.exceptions import ServiceUnavailableError
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.audio_summary_pure import (
  _format_glossary_context,
  _format_telegram_summary,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.cache_resilience import (
  CacheResiliencePosture,
  safe_cache_get,
  safe_cache_set,
  safe_idempotency_get,
  safe_idempotency_set,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.glossary_filter import (
  filter_active_rules_by_transcript,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.manage_llms import (
  resolve_payg_model_resolution,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import (
  AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  AudioToSummaryPort,
  IdempotencyPort,
  NotifierPort,
  SummarizerPort,
  WhisperPort,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.i18n.messages import normalize_locale
_TIER_FREE = "free"
_TIER_PAYG = "payg"
_TIER_PRO = "pro"
_TIER_PREMIUM = "premium"
PAID_TIERS = (_TIER_PRO, _TIER_PREMIUM, _TIER_PAYG)
_CACHE_STATUS_CACHED = "cached"
_SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED = "completed"
_AUDIO_TO_SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED = "audio_summarized"
GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX = "glossary:"
GLOSSARY_CACHE_TTL = 3600
_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN = 16
_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS = 86400
_FLOAT_ZERO = 0.0
_EMPTY_STRING = ""
_SUMMARY_DICT_KEYS = ("title", "summary", "key_points", "action_items", "applied_rules")
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_COST = "cost_usd"
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_MODEL = "model_used"
_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT = "transcript"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_TEXT = "summary_text"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY = "summary"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_MODEL = "summary_model"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT = "transcript"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_HASH = "hash"
_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_LANGUAGE_CODE = "language_code"
def cached_payload_matches_language(
  cached: dict[str, Any],
  language_code: str,
) -> bool:
  cached_language = cached.get(_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_LANGUAGE_CODE)
  if not isinstance(cached_language, str) or not cached_language.strip():
    return False
  return normalize_locale(cached_language) == normalize_locale(language_code)
async def get_glossary_context(
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  *,
  transcript: str | None = None,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture = CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN,
) -> str:
  assert isinstance(user_id, str)
  assert len(user_id) > 0, "user_id must not be empty"
  key = f"{GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}"
  assert isinstance(key, str)
  assert key.startswith(GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX), f"Invalid cache key: {key}"
  if transcript is None:
    cached = await safe_cache_get(
      cache,
      key=key,
      surface="glossary",
      user_id=user_id,
      posture=posture,
      event_name="audio_glossary_cache_read_failed",
    )
    if cached is not None and isinstance(cached, str):
      assert isinstance(cached, str)
      return cached
  rules = await repo.get_active_rules_for_user(user_id)
  if transcript is not None:
    rules = filter_active_rules_by_transcript(rules, transcript)
  context = _format_glossary_context(rules)
  assert isinstance(context, str)
  if context and transcript is None:
    await safe_cache_set(
      cache,
      key=key,
      value=context,
      ttl=GLOSSARY_CACHE_TTL,
      surface="glossary",
      user_id=user_id,
      posture=posture,
      event_name="audio_glossary_cache_write_failed",
    )
  return context
async def process_audio_use_case(
  audio_bytes: bytes,
  filename: str,
  user_id: str,
  user_tier: str,
  idempotency: IdempotencyPort,
  whisper: WhisperPort,
  summarizer: SummarizerPort,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  cache: CachePort,
  notifier: NotifierPort | None,
  *,
  chat_id: str = "",
  platform: str = "telegram",
  language_code: str = "en",
  audio_to_summary: AudioToSummaryPort | None = None,
  tier_override: str | None = None,
  idempotency_posture: CacheResiliencePosture = CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN,
  glossary_cache_posture: CacheResiliencePosture = CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN,
  dynamic_config: DynamicConfigService | None = None,
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  assert isinstance(audio_bytes, bytes)
  assert isinstance(filename, str)
  assert isinstance(user_id, str)
  assert isinstance(user_tier, str)
  requested_language = normalize_locale(language_code)
  content_hash = idempotency.hash_bytes(audio_bytes)
  assert isinstance(content_hash, str)
  assert len(content_hash) > 0, "content_hash must not be empty"
  cache_lookup_start = perf_counter()
  cached = await safe_idempotency_get(
    idempotency,
    content_hash=content_hash,
    user_id=user_id,
    posture=idempotency_posture,
  )
  cache_lookup_latency_ms = round((perf_counter() - cache_lookup_start) * 1000, 3)
  if cached is not None and not cached_payload_matches_language(
    cached,
    requested_language,
  ):
    structlog.get_logger().info(
      "audio_summary_cache_language_miss",
      hash=content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN],
      user_id=user_id,
      requested_language=requested_language,
      cached_language=cached.get(_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_LANGUAGE_CODE),
    )
    cached = None
  if cached is not None:
    assert isinstance(cached, dict)
    summary_text = (
      cached.get(_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_TEXT)
      or cached.get(_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY)
      or _EMPTY_STRING
    )
    assert isinstance(summary_text, str)
    cached_summary_model = str(
      cached.get(_CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_MODEL) or _EMPTY_STRING
    )
    assert isinstance(cached_summary_model, str)
    structlog.get_logger().info(
      "audio_summary_from_cache",
      source="cache",
      hash=content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN],
      user_id=user_id,
      latency_ms=cache_lookup_latency_ms,
      layer="redis_idempotency_guard",
      cost_saved_usd=0.0,
    )
    if summary_text and notifier and chat_id:
      await notifier.send_summary(chat_id, summary_text, platform)
    return {
      "status": _CACHE_STATUS_CACHED,
      "summary_text": summary_text,
      "hash": content_hash,
      "cached_summary": summary_text,
      "summary_model": cached_summary_model,
    }
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  raw_user_tier = str(getattr(user, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
  effective_tier = tier_override or (
    _TIER_PAYG
    if raw_user_tier == _TIER_PAYG
    else str(user.get_limits_tier() or user_tier or _TIER_FREE)
  )
  assert isinstance(effective_tier, str)
  limits_tier = str(tier_override or user.get_limits_tier()).lower()
  assert isinstance(limits_tier, str)
  assert len(limits_tier) > 0, "limits_tier must not be empty"
  model_override: str | None = None
  effective_tier_norm = str(effective_tier or _TIER_FREE).strip().lower()
  assert isinstance(effective_tier_norm, str)
  routing_tier_norm = effective_tier_norm
  assert isinstance(routing_tier_norm, str)
  _valid_tiers = (_TIER_FREE, _TIER_PAYG, _TIER_PRO, _TIER_PREMIUM)
  assert routing_tier_norm in _valid_tiers, (
    f"Invalid routing_tier_norm: {routing_tier_norm}"
  )
  if routing_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG:
    payg_resolution = resolve_payg_model_resolution(user)
    model_override = payg_resolution["selected_model"] or None
    raw = getattr(user, "payg_summary_model", None)
    requested = (
      str(raw).strip() if isinstance(raw, str) and raw.strip() else _EMPTY_STRING
    )
    assert isinstance(requested, str)
    if requested and model_override is None:
      structlog.get_logger().warning(
        "payg_model_invalid_delegating_to_base_tier",
        user_id=user_id,
        requested_model=requested or None,
      )
    if not payg_resolution["uses_payg_wallet"]:
      routing_tier_norm = str(
        payg_resolution["delegated_tier"] or limits_tier
      ).lower()
  if routing_tier_norm in {_TIER_PRO, _TIER_PREMIUM}:
    if dynamic_config is not None:
      _, pro_premium_model = await dynamic_config.get_audio_notes_summary_models()
      model_override = pro_premium_model
    else:
      model_override = snap.audio_notes_summary_model_pro_premium
  transcription_model: str = ""
  summary_model: str = ""
  cost_usd: float = _FLOAT_ZERO
  new_balance: str | None = None
  glossary_context: str = _EMPTY_STRING
  if routing_tier_norm in PAID_TIERS and audio_to_summary is not None:
    glossary_context = await get_glossary_context(
      repo, cache, user_id, transcript=None, posture=glossary_cache_posture
    )
    assert isinstance(glossary_context, str)
    try:
      result = await audio_to_summary.summarize_from_audio(
        audio_bytes,
        filename,
        glossary_context,
        routing_tier_norm,
        language_code=requested_language,
        model_name=model_override,
      )
    except ServiceUnavailableError:
      fallback_tier = limits_tier
      if routing_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG:
        structlog.get_logger().critical(
          "audio_notes_payg_vertex_chain_exhausted",
          user_id=user_id,
          fallback_tier=fallback_tier,
          action_required=(
            "All PAYG Vertex audio models failed. Request is "
            "falling back to the user's base tier."
          ),
        )
      if fallback_tier in {_TIER_PREMIUM, _TIER_PRO}:
        try:
          result = await audio_to_summary.summarize_from_audio(
            audio_bytes,
            filename,
            glossary_context,
            fallback_tier,
            language_code=requested_language,
            model_name=None,  # Usa el default dinámico del adaptador
          )
          routing_tier_norm = fallback_tier
          model_override = None
        except ServiceUnavailableError:
          structlog.get_logger().critical(
            "audio_notes_base_tier_vertex_fallback_triggered",
            user_id=user_id,
            base_tier=fallback_tier,
            fallback_tier=_TIER_FREE,
            action_required=(
              "Base tier Vertex model failed. Request is falling "
              "back to the free-tier stack."
            ),
          )
          routing_tier_norm = _TIER_FREE
          model_override = None
      else:
        routing_tier_norm = _TIER_FREE
        model_override = None
        result = None
    if routing_tier_norm in PAID_TIERS:
      if result is None:
        raise ServiceUnavailableError(
          "Paid-tier audio summarization returned no result."
        )
      cost_usd = float(result.get(_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_COST) or _FLOAT_ZERO)
      assert isinstance(cost_usd, float)
      assert cost_usd >= _FLOAT_ZERO
      provider_model = str(result.get(_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_MODEL) or _EMPTY_STRING)
      assert isinstance(provider_model, str)
      summary_model = str(
        model_override or provider_model or _EMPTY_STRING
      ).strip()
      assert isinstance(summary_model, str)
      transcription_model = summary_model
      transcript = str(
        result.get(_SUMMARY_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT) or _EMPTY_STRING
      ).strip()
      assert isinstance(transcript, str)
      summary_dict = {
        "title": result.get("title"),
        "summary": result.get("summary"),
        "key_points": result.get("key_points") or [],
        "action_items": result.get("action_items") or [],
        "applied_rules": result.get("applied_rules") or [],
      }
      assert isinstance(summary_dict, dict)
      if (
        effective_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and routing_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and cost_usd > _FLOAT_ZERO
      ):
        assert cost_usd > _FLOAT_ZERO
        new_balance = await repo.decrement_payg_balance_usd(user_id, cost_usd)
        structlog.get_logger().info(
          "payg_balance_decremented",
          user_id=user_id,
          cost_usd=cost_usd,
          new_balance_usd=new_balance,
          model=model_override or None,
          provider_model=provider_model or None,
        )
  else:
    pass
  if routing_tier_norm not in PAID_TIERS:
    assert routing_tier_norm in (_TIER_FREE, _TIER_PAYG)
    try:
      transcription_model = str(
        getattr(whisper, "_model", _EMPTY_STRING) or _EMPTY_STRING
      )
      assert isinstance(transcription_model, str)
      transcript = await whisper.transcribe(audio_bytes, filename)
      assert isinstance(transcript, str)
      glossary_context = await get_glossary_context(
        repo,
        cache,
        user_id,
        transcript=transcript,
        posture=glossary_cache_posture,
      )
      assert isinstance(glossary_context, str)
      summary_model = model_override or str(
        getattr(summarizer, "_model_free", _EMPTY_STRING) or _EMPTY_STRING
      )
      assert isinstance(summary_model, str)
      summary_dict = await summarizer.summarize(
        transcript,
        glossary_context,
        routing_tier_norm,
        language_code=requested_language,
        model_name=model_override,
      )
      assert isinstance(summary_dict, dict)
    except ServiceUnavailableError:
      structlog.get_logger().critical(
        "audio_notes_free_tier_models_unavailable",
        user_id=user_id,
        tier=routing_tier_norm,
        action_required=(
          "Free-tier audio processing models failed after all higher-tier "
          "fallbacks were exhausted."
        ),
      )
      raise
  summary_text = _format_telegram_summary(
    summary_dict,
    language_code=requested_language,
  )
  assert isinstance(summary_text, str)
  await repo.enforce_log_retention(user_id, limits_tier)
  cache_payload = {
    _CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_TEXT: summary_text,
    _CACHED_RESULT_KEY_TRANSCRIPT: transcript,
    _CACHED_RESULT_KEY_HASH: content_hash,
    _CACHED_RESULT_KEY_SUMMARY_MODEL: summary_model,
    _CACHED_RESULT_KEY_LANGUAGE_CODE: requested_language,
  }
  assert isinstance(cache_payload, dict)
  await safe_idempotency_set(
    idempotency,
    content_hash=content_hash,
    data=cache_payload,
    ttl_seconds=_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
    user_id=user_id,
    posture=idempotency_posture,
  )
  result_payload = {
    "status": _SUMMARY_STATUS_COMPLETED,
    "summary_text": summary_text,
    "transcript": transcript,
    "hash": content_hash,
    "summary_dict": summary_dict,
    "transcription_model": transcription_model,
    "summary_model": summary_model,
    "payg_wallet_charged_usd": (
      cost_usd
      if (
        effective_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and routing_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and cost_usd > _FLOAT_ZERO
      )
      else None
    ),
    "payg_wallet_balance_usd": (
      new_balance
      if (
        effective_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and routing_tier_norm == _TIER_PAYG
        and cost_usd > _FLOAT_ZERO
      )
      else None
    ),
  }
  assert isinstance(result_payload, dict)
  return result_payload
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/export_glossary.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
import io
import secrets
from collections.abc import Sequence
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import date, datetime
from typing import Protocol, cast
from openpyxl import Workbook  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import (
  coerce_audio_notes_tier,
  normalize_user_tier_string,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import (
  daily_export_limit_for_tier as _daily_export_limit,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import User
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
from app.modules.audio_notes.i18n.messages import normalize_locale
XLSX_MIME = "application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet"
class _GlossaryRuleExportRow(Protocol):
  misheard_term: str
  correction: str
  is_active: bool
  created_at: datetime | None
  deleted_at: datetime | None
@dataclass(frozen=True)
class GlossaryExportResult:
  user: User
  filename: str
  content: bytes
  mime_type: str
  tier: str
  remaining_exports_today: int
def _header_labels(lang: str) -> dict[str, str]:
  if lang == "es":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Término mal oído",
      "correction": "Corrección",
      "is_active": "¿La regla está activa?",
      "created_at": "Creado el",
      "deleted_at": "Eliminado el",
    }
  if lang == "pt":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Termo mal ouvido",
      "correction": "Correção",
      "is_active": "A regra está ativa?",
      "created_at": "Criado em",
      "deleted_at": "Eliminado em",
    }
  if lang == "fr":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Terme mal entendu",
      "correction": "Correction",
      "is_active": "La règle est-elle active ?",
      "created_at": "Créé le",
      "deleted_at": "Supprimé le",
    }
  if lang == "de":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Falsch verstandener Begriff",
      "correction": "Korrektur",
      "is_active": "Ist die Regel aktiv?",
      "created_at": "Erstellt am",
      "deleted_at": "Gelöscht am",
    }
  if lang == "it":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Termine frainteso",
      "correction": "Correzione",
      "is_active": "La regola è attiva?",
      "created_at": "Creato il",
      "deleted_at": "Eliminato il",
    }
  if lang == "el":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Λανθασμένα ακουσμένος όρος",
      "correction": "Διόρθωση",
      "is_active": "Είναι ενεργός ο κανόνας;",  # noqa: RUF001
      "created_at": "Δημιουργήθηκε στις",
      "deleted_at": "Διαγράφηκε στις",
    }
  if lang == "th":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "คำที่ได้ยินผิด",
      "correction": "การแก้ไข",
      "is_active": "กฎนี้เปิดใช้งานอยู่หรือไม่?",
      "created_at": "สร้างเมื่อ",
      "deleted_at": "ลบเมื่อ",
    }
  if lang == "fa":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "عبارت اشتباه شنیده‌شده",
      "correction": "اصلاح",
      "is_active": "آیا قانون فعال است؟",
      "created_at": "ایجاد شده در",
      "deleted_at": "حذف شده در",
    }
  if lang == "ru":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Неверно распознанный термин",
      "correction": "Исправление",
      "is_active": "Правило активно?",
      "created_at": "Создано",
      "deleted_at": "Удалено",
    }
  if lang == "uk":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Неправильно почутий термін",
      "correction": "Виправлення",
      "is_active": "Правило активне?",
      "created_at": "Створено",
      "deleted_at": "Видалено",
    }
  if lang == "hi":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "गलत सुना गया शब्द",
      "correction": "सुधार",
      "is_active": "क्या नियम सक्रिय है?",
      "created_at": "निर्मित समय",
      "deleted_at": "हटाए जाने का समय",
    }
  if lang == "id":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Istilah yang salah dengar",
      "correction": "Koreksi",
      "is_active": "Apakah aturan aktif?",
      "created_at": "Dibuat pada",
      "deleted_at": "Dihapus pada",
    }
  if lang == "vi":
    return {
      "misheard_term": "Từ nghe nhầm",
      "correction": "Chỉnh sửa",
      "is_active": "Quy tắc đang hoạt động?",
      "created_at": "Tạo lúc",
      "deleted_at": "Xóa lúc",
    }
  return {
    "misheard_term": "Misheard Term",
    "correction": "Correction",
    "is_active": "Is the rule Active?",
    "created_at": "Created At",
    "deleted_at": "Deleted At",
  }
def _bool_label(value: bool, lang: str) -> str:
  if lang == "es":
    return "Sí" if value else "No"
  if lang == "pt":
    return "Sim" if value else "Não"
  if lang == "fr":
    return "Oui" if value else "Non"
  if lang == "de":
    return "Ja" if value else "Nein"
  if lang == "it":
    return "Sì" if value else "No"
  if lang == "el":
    return "Ναι" if value else "Όχι"  # noqa: RUF001
  if lang == "th":
    return "ใช่" if value else "ไม่ใช่"
  if lang == "fa":
    return "بله" if value else "خیر"
  if lang == "ru":
    return "Да" if value else "Нет"
  if lang == "uk":
    return "Так" if value else "Ні"  # noqa: RUF001
  if lang == "hi":
    return "हाँ" if value else "नहीं"
  if lang == "id":
    return "Ya" if value else "Tidak"
  if lang == "vi":
    return "Có" if value else "Không"
  return "True" if value else "False"
def _format_timestamp(dt: datetime | None) -> str:
  if dt is None:
    return ""
  iso = dt.replace(microsecond=0).isoformat()
  return str(iso).replace("T", " T ")  # pragma: no mutate
def _build_xlsx_bytes(
  rules: Sequence[_GlossaryRuleExportRow],
  *,
  lang: str,
) -> bytes:
  labels = _header_labels(lang)
  wb = Workbook()
  ws = wb.active
  if ws is None:
    raise RuntimeError("Workbook has no active sheet")
  ws.title = "Glossary"
  headers = [
    labels["misheard_term"],
    labels["correction"],
    labels["is_active"],
    labels["created_at"],
    labels["deleted_at"],
  ]
  ws.append(headers)
  for rule in rules:
    is_active = bool(rule.is_active)
    ws.append(
      [
        rule.misheard_term,
        rule.correction,
        _bool_label(is_active, lang),
        _format_timestamp(rule.created_at),
        _format_timestamp(rule.deleted_at),
      ]
    )
  buf = io.BytesIO()
  wb.save(buf)
  buf.seek(0)  # pragma: no mutate
  content = buf.getvalue()
  buf.close()
  return content
async def export_glossary_xlsx_use_case(
  user_id: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  language_code: str = "en",  # pragma: no mutate
) -> GlossaryExportResult:
  user: User = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user.check_and_reset_limits()
  tier_lower = normalize_user_tier_string(
    str(user.tier) if user.tier is not None else None,
  )
  tier_typed = coerce_audio_notes_tier(tier_lower)
  limits_tier = coerce_audio_notes_tier(user.get_limits_tier())
  limit = _daily_export_limit(limits_tier)
  raw_exports = user.daily_export_count
  used = int(raw_exports) if raw_exports is not None else 0  # pragma: no mutate
  remaining = max(0, limit - used)
  if remaining <= 0:
    return GlossaryExportResult(
      user=user,  # pragma: no mutate
      filename="glossary_export.xlsx",
      content=b"",
      mime_type=XLSX_MIME,
      tier=tier_typed,  # pragma: no mutate
      remaining_exports_today=0,
    )
  rules = await repo.get_all_rules_for_user(user_id)
  lang = normalize_locale(language_code)
  rows = cast(Sequence[_GlossaryRuleExportRow], rules)  # pragma: no mutate
  content = await asyncio.to_thread(  # pragma: no mutate
    _build_xlsx_bytes,
    rows,
    lang=lang,  # pragma: no mutate
  )
  today_str = date.today().isoformat()
  short_suffix = secrets.token_hex(4)
  filename = f"glossary_{today_str}_{short_suffix}.xlsx"
  await repo.increment_user_daily_exports(user_id)
  return GlossaryExportResult(
    user=user,  # pragma: no mutate
    filename=filename,
    content=content,
    mime_type=XLSX_MIME,
    tier=tier_typed,  # pragma: no mutate
    remaining_exports_today=remaining - 1,
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/cache_resilience.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from enum import StrEnum
from typing import Any, Literal
import structlog
from app.domain.exceptions import (
  CacheUnavailableError,
  IdempotencyUnavailableError,
)
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort
from app.infrastructure.monitoring import AUDIO_NOTES_CACHE_UNAVAILABLE_TOTAL
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import IdempotencyPort
_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN = 16
class CacheResiliencePosture(StrEnum):
  FAIL_OPEN = "fail_open"
  FAIL_CLOSED = "fail_closed"
def posture_from_str(raw: str) -> CacheResiliencePosture:
  normalized = (raw or "").strip().lower()  # pragma: no mutate
  if normalized == CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN.value:
    return CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN
  return CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED
Surface = Literal[
  "rules_pagination_rate_limit",
  "rules_count",
  "glossary",
  "idempotency",
]
Operation = Literal["get", "set", "incr"]
Outcome = Literal["degraded_open", "rejected_closed"]
def _record_outage(
  *,
  operation: Operation,
  surface: Surface,
  outcome: Outcome,
  user_id: str,
  cache_key: str | None,
  error_type: str,
  event_name: str,
  hash_preview: str | None = None,
) -> None:
  AUDIO_NOTES_CACHE_UNAVAILABLE_TOTAL.labels(
    operation=operation,
    surface=surface,
    outcome=outcome,
  ).inc()
  log_kwargs: dict[str, Any] = {
    "user_id": user_id,
    "operation": operation,
    "surface": surface,
    "outcome": outcome,
    "error_type": error_type,
  }
  if cache_key is not None:
    log_kwargs["cache_key"] = cache_key
  if hash_preview is not None:
    log_kwargs["hash"] = hash_preview
  structlog.get_logger().warning(event_name, **log_kwargs)
async def safe_cache_incr_float(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  key: str,
  amount: float,
  ttl: int,
  surface: Surface,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
  event_name: str,
) -> float | None:
  try:
    return await cache.incr_float(key, amount, ttl=ttl)
  except Exception as exc:
    if posture is CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED:
      _record_outage(
        operation="incr",
        surface=surface,
        outcome="rejected_closed",
        user_id=user_id,
        cache_key=key,
        error_type=type(exc).__name__,
        event_name=event_name,
      )
      raise CacheUnavailableError(
        (f"Cache unavailable for operation=incr surface={surface}"),
        operation="incr",
        surface=surface,
      ) from exc
    _record_outage(
      operation="incr",
      surface=surface,
      outcome="degraded_open",
      user_id=user_id,
      cache_key=key,
      error_type=type(exc).__name__,
      event_name=event_name,
    )
    return None
async def safe_cache_get(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  key: str,
  surface: Surface,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
  event_name: str,
) -> object | None:
  try:
    return await cache.get(key)
  except Exception as exc:
    if posture is CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED:
      _record_outage(
        operation="get",
        surface=surface,
        outcome="rejected_closed",
        user_id=user_id,
        cache_key=key,
        error_type=type(exc).__name__,
        event_name=event_name,
      )
      raise CacheUnavailableError(
        f"Cache unavailable for operation=get surface={surface}",
        operation="get",
        surface=surface,
      ) from exc
    _record_outage(
      operation="get",
      surface=surface,
      outcome="degraded_open",
      user_id=user_id,
      cache_key=key,
      error_type=type(exc).__name__,
      event_name=event_name,
    )
    return None
async def safe_cache_set(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  key: str,
  value: object,
  ttl: int,
  surface: Surface,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
  event_name: str,
) -> None:
  try:
    await cache.set(key, value, ttl=ttl)
  except Exception as exc:
    if posture is CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED:
      _record_outage(
        operation="set",
        surface=surface,
        outcome="rejected_closed",
        user_id=user_id,
        cache_key=key,
        error_type=type(exc).__name__,
        event_name=event_name,
      )
      raise CacheUnavailableError(
        f"Cache unavailable for operation=set surface={surface}",
        operation="set",
        surface=surface,
      ) from exc
    _record_outage(
      operation="set",
      surface=surface,
      outcome="degraded_open",
      user_id=user_id,
      cache_key=key,
      error_type=type(exc).__name__,
      event_name=event_name,
    )
async def safe_idempotency_get(
  idempotency: IdempotencyPort,
  *,
  content_hash: str,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
) -> dict[str, Any] | None:
  try:
    return await idempotency.get_cached(content_hash)
  except Exception as exc:
    hash_preview = content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN]
    if posture is CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED:
      _record_outage(
        operation="get",
        surface="idempotency",
        outcome="rejected_closed",
        user_id=user_id,
        cache_key=None,
        error_type=type(exc).__name__,
        event_name="audio_idempotency_cache_read_failed",
        hash_preview=hash_preview,
      )
      raise IdempotencyUnavailableError(
        "Idempotency store unavailable; refusing to process audio "
        "to prevent duplicate charges.",
        operation="get",
        surface="idempotency",
      ) from exc
    _record_outage(
      operation="get",
      surface="idempotency",
      outcome="degraded_open",
      user_id=user_id,
      cache_key=None,
      error_type=type(exc).__name__,
      event_name="audio_idempotency_cache_read_failed",
      hash_preview=hash_preview,
    )
    return None
async def safe_idempotency_set(
  idempotency: IdempotencyPort,
  *,
  content_hash: str,
  data: dict[str, Any],
  ttl_seconds: int,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
) -> None:
  try:
    await idempotency.set_cached(
      content_hash,
      data,
      ttl_seconds=ttl_seconds,
    )
  except Exception as exc:
    hash_preview = content_hash[:_HASH_PREVIEW_LEN]
    if posture is CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_CLOSED:
      _record_outage(
        operation="set",
        surface="idempotency",
        outcome="rejected_closed",
        user_id=user_id,
        cache_key=None,
        error_type=type(exc).__name__,
        event_name="audio_idempotency_cache_write_failed",
        hash_preview=hash_preview,
      )
      raise IdempotencyUnavailableError(
        "Idempotency store write failed; duplicate risk on retry.",
        operation="set",
        surface="idempotency",
      ) from exc
    _record_outage(
      operation="set",
      surface="idempotency",
      outcome="degraded_open",
      user_id=user_id,
      cache_key=None,
      error_type=type(exc).__name__,
      event_name="audio_idempotency_cache_write_failed",
      hash_preview=hash_preview,
    )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/tier_utils.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from typing import Literal
TierType = Literal["free", "premium", "pro", "payg"]
def normalize_user_tier_string(user_tier: str | None) -> str:
  base = (user_tier or "free").strip().lower()  # pragma: no mutate
  return base if base else "free"
def coerce_audio_notes_tier(tier_lower: str) -> TierType:
  if tier_lower == "free":  # pragma: no mutate
    return "free"
  if tier_lower == "premium":  # pragma: no mutate
    return "premium"
  if tier_lower == "pro":  # pragma: no mutate
    return "pro"
  if tier_lower == "payg":  # pragma: no mutate
    return "payg"
  return "free"
def daily_export_limit_for_tier(tier: TierType) -> int:
  if tier == "premium":
    return 10
  if tier in ("pro", "payg"):
    return 20
  return 3
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/usage_limits.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort
def _month_bucket(user_id: str) -> tuple[str, int, str]:
  now = datetime.now(UTC)
  month_label = now.strftime("%Y-%m")
  key = f"audio_minutes:{user_id}:{month_label}"
  if now.month == 12:
    next_month = datetime(
      year=now.year + 1,
      month=1,
      day=1,
      tzinfo=UTC,
    )
  else:
    next_month = datetime(
      year=now.year,
      month=now.month + 1,
      day=1,
      tzinfo=UTC,
    )
  ttl_seconds = int((next_month - now).total_seconds())
  if ttl_seconds <= 0:
    ttl_seconds = 60
  return key, ttl_seconds, month_label
async def get_monthly_audio_usage_seconds(
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
) -> tuple[float, str]:
  key, _ttl, month_label = _month_bucket(user_id)
  raw = await cache.get(key)
  if isinstance(raw, (int, float)):
    return float(raw), month_label
  return 0.0, month_label
async def add_monthly_audio_usage_seconds(
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  seconds: float,
) -> tuple[float, str]:
  key, ttl_seconds, month_label = _month_bucket(user_id)
  new_val = await cache.incr_float(
    key,
    amount=float(seconds),
    ttl=ttl_seconds,
  )
  return new_val, month_label
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/get_user_status.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
from decimal import Decimal
from typing import TypedDict
import app.core.runtime_tunable_config as runtime_tunable_config
from app.core.config import settings
from app.core.pricing_registry import (
  get_model_pricing,
  summary_tokens_per_audio_minute,
  tokens_per_audio_minute,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.tier_utils import normalize_user_tier_string
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import User
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
class UserStatus(TypedDict):
  tier: str
  max_audio_minutes_per_note: int
  max_audio_minutes_per_month: int
  rules_limit: int
  daily_corrections_limit: int
  payg_balance_usd: str
  dynamic_max_audio_minutes_payg: int
  payg_summary_model: str
  base_tier: str
  base_max_audio_minutes_per_note: int
  base_max_audio_minutes_per_month: int
  base_rules_limit: int
  base_daily_corrections_limit: int
  stripe_link_premium: str
  stripe_link_pro: str
  stripe_link_payg_topup: str
  stripe_customer_id: str | None
  stripe_subscription_id: str | None
  stripe_management_url: str
def _tier_static_limits(tier: str) -> tuple[int, int, int, int]:
  if tier == "free":
    return 5, 150, 200, 10
  if tier == "premium":
    return 20, 3_000, 300, 100
  if tier == "pro":
    return 45, 9_000, 300, 100
  return 5, 150, 200, 10
async def get_user_status_use_case(
  user_id: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
) -> UserStatus:
  user: User = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user.check_and_reset_limits()
  limits_tier = user.get_limits_tier()
  tier = normalize_user_tier_string(
    str(user.tier) if user.tier is not None else None,
  )
  (
    max_minutes_per_note,
    max_minutes_per_month,
    rules_limit,
    daily_corr_limit,
  ) = _tier_static_limits(limits_tier)
  balance_attr = user.balance_usd
  bal_raw = balance_attr if balance_attr is not None else "0"
  balance_usd = format(Decimal(str(bal_raw).strip() or "0"), "f")
  payg_summary_model = ""
  dynamic_max_audio_payg = 0
  base_tier = limits_tier
  base_max_note = max_minutes_per_note
  base_max_month = max_minutes_per_month
  base_rules = rules_limit
  base_daily = daily_corr_limit
  snap = runtime_tunable_config.get_runtime_tunable_snapshot()
  if tier == "payg":
    raw_model = getattr(user, "payg_summary_model", None)
    if isinstance(raw_model, str) and raw_model.strip():
      payg_summary_model = raw_model.strip()
    else:
      payg_summary_model = ""
    allowed = snap.audio_notes_available_summary_models
    if payg_summary_model and not any(
      m.lower() == payg_summary_model.lower() for m in allowed
    ):
      payg_summary_model = ""
    if payg_summary_model:
      summary_model = payg_summary_model
      pricing = get_model_pricing(summary_model)
      if pricing:
        audio_tokens_min = tokens_per_audio_minute()
        summary_tokens_min = summary_tokens_per_audio_minute()
        _ctx_key = summary_model
        _ctx_fb = pricing.max_context_window
        context_limit = int(
          settings.MODEL_CONTEXT_LIMITS.get(_ctx_key, _ctx_fb)
        )
        output_reserve = int(
          getattr(
            settings,
            "MODEL_OUTPUT_RESERVE",
            2048,
          )
        )
        max_tokens_for_text = max(
          0,
          context_limit - output_reserve,
        )
        dynamic_max_audio_payg = user.calculate_max_audio_duration(
          input_price_per_m=pricing.input_price_per_m_tokens,
          output_price_per_m=pricing.output_price_per_m_tokens,
          audio_price_per_m=pricing.audio_price_per_m_tokens,
          max_tokens_for_text=max_tokens_for_text,
          audio_tokens_min=audio_tokens_min,
          summary_tokens_min=summary_tokens_min,
        )
      else:
        dynamic_max_audio_payg = 0
      max_minutes_per_note = int(dynamic_max_audio_payg)
      max_minutes_per_month = 50_000
    else:
      dynamic_max_audio_payg = base_max_note
      max_minutes_per_note = base_max_note
      max_minutes_per_month = base_max_month
  return UserStatus(
    tier=tier,
    max_audio_minutes_per_note=max_minutes_per_note,
    max_audio_minutes_per_month=max_minutes_per_month,
    rules_limit=rules_limit,
    daily_corrections_limit=daily_corr_limit,
    payg_balance_usd=balance_usd,
    dynamic_max_audio_minutes_payg=dynamic_max_audio_payg,
    payg_summary_model=payg_summary_model,
    base_tier=base_tier,
    base_max_audio_minutes_per_note=base_max_note,
    base_max_audio_minutes_per_month=base_max_month,
    base_rules_limit=base_rules,
    base_daily_corrections_limit=base_daily,
    stripe_link_premium=snap.stripe_link_premium,
    stripe_link_pro=snap.stripe_link_pro,
    stripe_link_payg_topup=snap.stripe_link_payg_topup,
    stripe_customer_id=getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", None),
    stripe_subscription_id=getattr(user, "stripe_subscription_id", None),
    stripe_management_url="",
  )
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/glossary_filter.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import re
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import GlossaryRule
def filter_active_rules_by_transcript(
  rules: list[GlossaryRule],
  transcript: str,
) -> list[GlossaryRule]:
  if not rules or not transcript:
    return []
  valid_pairs: list[tuple[str, GlossaryRule]] = []
  for rule in rules:
    raw_term = rule.misheard_term
    if isinstance(raw_term, str) and raw_term.strip():
      valid_pairs.append((raw_term.strip(), rule))
  if not valid_pairs:
    return []
  sorted_pairs = sorted(valid_pairs, key=lambda p: len(p[0]), reverse=True)
  alternation = "|".join(
    r"(?<!\w)" + re.escape(term) + r"(?!\w)" for term, _ in sorted_pairs
  )
  pattern = re.compile(alternation, re.IGNORECASE)
  matched_lower: set[str] = {m.lower() for m in pattern.findall(transcript)}
  return [rule for term, rule in valid_pairs if term.lower() in matched_lower]
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/get_rules.py`
```py
from app.domain.exceptions import CacheUnavailableError
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.cache_resilience import (
  CacheResiliencePosture,
  safe_cache_get,
  safe_cache_incr_float,
  safe_cache_set,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import GlossaryRule
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import AudioNotesRepositoryPort
PAGE_SIZE = 10
DAILY_LIMIT_FREE = 10
DAILY_LIMIT_PRO = 100
RULES_COUNT_CACHE_PREFIX = "cache:rules_count:"
RULES_COUNT_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS = 300  # 5 minutes
PAGINATION_MINUTE_LIMIT = 30
PAGINATION_MINUTE_TTL = 60
PAGINATION_DAY_TTL = 86400
PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_FREE = 50
PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PREMIUM = 200
PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PRO = 500
PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PAYG = 1000
class PaginationRateLimitError(Exception):
  def __init__(self, scope: str, limit: int, retry_after_seconds: int) -> None:
    self.scope = scope
    self.limit = limit
    self.retry_after_seconds = retry_after_seconds
    super().__init__(f"Pagination rate limit exceeded ({scope}): {limit}")
def _coerce_cached_total(raw_total: object) -> int | None:
  if isinstance(raw_total, bool):
    return None
  if isinstance(raw_total, int) and raw_total >= 0:
    return raw_total
  return None
def _daily_pagination_limit(limits_tier: str) -> int:
  if limits_tier == "payg":
    return PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PAYG
  if limits_tier == "pro":
    return PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PRO
  if limits_tier == "premium":
    return PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_PREMIUM
  return PAGINATION_DAY_LIMIT_FREE
async def _enforce_minute_limit(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
) -> None:
  minute_key = f"pagination:minute:{user_id}"
  try:
    new_min = await safe_cache_incr_float(
      cache,
      key=minute_key,
      amount=1.0,
      ttl=PAGINATION_MINUTE_TTL,
      surface="rules_pagination_rate_limit",
      user_id=user_id,
      posture=posture,
      event_name="audio_rules_pagination_rate_limit_cache_unavailable",
    )
  except CacheUnavailableError as exc:
    raise PaginationRateLimitError(
      scope="cache_unavailable",
      limit=PAGINATION_MINUTE_LIMIT,
      retry_after_seconds=PAGINATION_MINUTE_TTL,
    ) from exc
  if new_min is not None and int(new_min) > PAGINATION_MINUTE_LIMIT:
    raise PaginationRateLimitError(
      scope="minute",
      limit=PAGINATION_MINUTE_LIMIT,
      retry_after_seconds=PAGINATION_MINUTE_TTL,
    )
async def _enforce_daily_limit(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  user_id: str,
  limits_tier: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
) -> None:
  day_key = f"pagination:day:{user_id}"
  daily_limit = _daily_pagination_limit(limits_tier)
  try:
    new_day = await safe_cache_incr_float(
      cache,
      key=day_key,
      amount=1.0,
      ttl=PAGINATION_DAY_TTL,
      surface="rules_pagination_rate_limit",
      user_id=user_id,
      posture=posture,
      event_name="audio_rules_pagination_rate_limit_cache_unavailable",
    )
  except CacheUnavailableError as exc:
    raise PaginationRateLimitError(
      scope="cache_unavailable",
      limit=daily_limit,
      retry_after_seconds=PAGINATION_DAY_TTL,
    ) from exc
  if new_day is not None and int(new_day) > daily_limit:
    raise PaginationRateLimitError(
      scope="day",
      limit=daily_limit,
      retry_after_seconds=PAGINATION_DAY_TTL,
    )
async def _resolve_total_with_cache(
  cache: CachePort,
  *,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  user_id: str,
  posture: CacheResiliencePosture,
) -> int:
  cache_key = f"{RULES_COUNT_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}"
  raw_total = await safe_cache_get(
    cache,
    key=cache_key,
    surface="rules_count",
    user_id=user_id,
    posture=posture,
    event_name="audio_rules_count_cache_read_failed",
  )
  cached_total = _coerce_cached_total(raw_total)
  if cached_total is not None:
    return cached_total
  total = await repo.get_rules_count(user_id)
  await safe_cache_set(
    cache,
    key=cache_key,
    value=total,
    ttl=RULES_COUNT_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS,
    surface="rules_count",
    user_id=user_id,
    posture=posture,
    event_name="audio_rules_count_cache_write_failed",
  )
  return total
async def get_rules_use_case(  # pragma: no mutate
  user_id: str,  # pragma: no mutate
  page: int,  # pragma: no mutate
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,  # pragma: no mutate
  cache: CachePort | None = None,  # pragma: no mutate
  *,
  rate_limit_posture: CacheResiliencePosture = (
    CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN
  ),  # pragma: no mutate
  count_cache_posture: CacheResiliencePosture = (
    CacheResiliencePosture.FAIL_OPEN
  ),  # pragma: no mutate
) -> tuple[list[GlossaryRule], int, int, int, str, int]:  # pragma: no mutate
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
  user.check_and_reset_limits()  # pragma: no mutate
  limits_tier = user.get_limits_tier()  # pragma: no mutate
  if cache is not None:  # pragma: no mutate
    await _enforce_minute_limit(  # pragma: no mutate
      cache, user_id=user_id, posture=rate_limit_posture
    )
    await _enforce_daily_limit(  # pragma: no mutate
      cache,
      user_id=user_id,
      limits_tier=limits_tier,
      posture=rate_limit_posture,
    )
    total = await _resolve_total_with_cache(
      cache,
      repo=repo,
      user_id=user_id,
      posture=count_cache_posture,
    )  # pragma: no mutate
  else:  # pragma: no mutate
    total = await repo.get_rules_count(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
  total_pages = max(1, (total + PAGE_SIZE - 1) // PAGE_SIZE)  # pragma: no mutate
  page = max(1, min(page, total_pages))  # pragma: no mutate
  rules = await repo.get_rules_page(user_id, page, PAGE_SIZE)  # pragma: no mutate
  high_tier = {"premium", "pro"}  # pragma: no mutate
  limit = (
    DAILY_LIMIT_PRO if limits_tier in high_tier else DAILY_LIMIT_FREE
  )  # pragma: no mutate
  used = int(user.daily_correction_count or 0)  # pragma: no mutate
  remaining = max(0, limit - used)  # pragma: no mutate
  return (
    rules,
    total,
    page,
    total_pages,
    limits_tier,
    remaining,
  )  # pragma: no mutate
```

### `src/app/modules/audio_notes/application/process_feedback.py`
```py
from typing import cast
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort
from app.modules.audio_notes.application.get_rules import RULES_COUNT_CACHE_PREFIX
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.ports import (
  AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  CorrectionJudgePort,
)
GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX = "glossary:"
STORAGE_LIMIT_FREE = 200
STORAGE_LIMIT_PRO = 300
async def process_feedback_use_case(  # pragma: no mutate
  user_id: str,
  reply_to_message_id: int,
  correction_text: str,
  repo: AudioNotesRepositoryPort,
  judge: CorrectionJudgePort,
  cache: CachePort,
) -> dict[str, str | int]:
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(user_id)
  user.check_and_reset_limits()
  if not user.can_add_correction():
    return {
      "status": "limit_exceeded",
      "tier": user.get_limits_tier(),
    }
  log = await repo.get_log_by_telegram_message_id(  # pragma: no mutate
    reply_to_message_id
  )
  if not log or not log.original_text:
    return {"status": "ignored_invalid"}
  verdict = await judge.evaluate(  # pragma: no mutate
    cast(str, log.original_text), correction_text
  )
  if verdict is None:
    return {"status": "ignored_invalid"}
  misheard, correction = verdict
  existing = await repo.get_rule_by_user_and_misheard(  # pragma: no mutate
    user_id, misheard
  )
  if existing:
    old_correction = cast(str, existing.correction)
    await repo.save_glossary_rule(  # pragma: no mutate
      user_id, misheard, correction
    )
    await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
    await cache.delete(f"{GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}")  # pragma: no mutate
    return {
      "status": "updated",
      "term": misheard,
      "new_correction": correction,
      "old_correction": old_correction,
    }
  limits_tier = user.get_limits_tier()
  storage_limit = (
    STORAGE_LIMIT_PRO if limits_tier in ("premium", "pro") else STORAGE_LIMIT_FREE
  )
  count = await repo.get_rules_count(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
  if count < storage_limit:
    await repo.save_glossary_rule(  # pragma: no mutate
      user_id, misheard, correction
    )
    await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
    await cache.delete(f"{GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}")  # pragma: no mutate
    await cache.delete(f"{RULES_COUNT_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}")  # pragma: no mutate
    return {
      "status": "learned",
      "term": misheard,
      "new_correction": correction,
    }
  inactive = await repo.get_oldest_inactive_rule(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
  if inactive:
    await repo.overwrite_rule(  # pragma: no mutate
      cast(str, inactive.id), misheard, correction
    )
    await repo.increment_user_daily_corrections(user_id)  # pragma: no mutate
    await cache.delete(f"{GLOSSARY_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}")  # pragma: no mutate
    await cache.delete(f"{RULES_COUNT_CACHE_PREFIX}{user_id}")  # pragma: no mutate
    return {
      "status": "learned",
      "term": misheard,
      "new_correction": correction,
    }
  return {
    "status": "storage_limit",
    "tier": user.get_limits_tier(),
    "limit": storage_limit,
  }
```
