### `src/app/adapters/graphql_adapter.py`
```py
import strawberry
from fastapi import APIRouter
from strawberry.fastapi import GraphQLRouter
@strawberry.type
class Query:
  @strawberry.field
  def hello(self) -> str:
    return "Hello, GraphQL!"
schema = strawberry.Schema(query=Query)
graphql_app = GraphQLRouter(schema)
router = APIRouter()
router.include_router(graphql_app, prefix="/graphql")
```

### `src/app/adapters/support_adapter.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import hashlib
import json
from collections.abc import Sequence
from datetime import UTC, datetime
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Annotated, Final, Literal, TypedDict, cast
import jwt
import structlog
from fastapi import (
  APIRouter,
  Depends,
  Header,
  HTTPException,
  Query,
  Request,
  Response,
  status,
)
from fastapi import (
  Path as ApiPath,
)
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from starlette.datastructures import UploadFile
from app.core.api_bearer_auth import api_jwt_secret
from app.core.api_cookie_auth import require_session_payload_for_module
from app.core.auth_modules import AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI, AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
from app.core.config import settings
from app.core.schemas import ActiveTicket, SupportAttachment, SupportHistoryEntry
from app.core.support_tickets import (
  ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX,
  ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
  CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX,
  TICKET_COUNTER_KEY,
  USER_ACTIVE_TICKETS_PREFIX,
  TicketAlreadyRepliedAfterSupportError,
  TicketClosedError,
  TicketLimitExceededError,
  TicketListLimitExceededError,
  TicketMessageTooLongError,
  TicketSupportNotRepliedError,
  _contract_support_ticket,
  _is_contract_deleted_marker,
  _is_contract_deleted_ticket,
  _mark_contract_deleted_ticket,
  append_ticket_comment_use_case,
  confirm_ticket_use_case,
  delete_ticket_completely,
  draft_ticket_use_case,
  get_ticket_status_use_case,
  list_user_tickets_use_case,
)
from app.dependencies import get_cache_port, get_support_attachment_storage_port
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort, SupportAttachmentStoragePort
from app.infrastructure.database import sessionmanager
from app.modules.pdf_anki.infrastructure.users_repository import PdfAnkiUserRepository
from app.modules.receipt_parser.infrastructure.repositories import (
  ReceiptParserUserRepository,
)
router = APIRouter(prefix="/support", tags=["support"])
logger = structlog.get_logger()
_ALLOWED_SUPPORT_TIERS = frozenset({"premium", "pro", "payg", "admin"})
_ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS: Final[frozenset[str]] = frozenset(
  {"jpg", "jpeg", "png", "webp", "tiff", "avif", "heic", "heif"}
)
_ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES: Final[frozenset[str]] = frozenset(
  {
    "image/jpeg",
    "image/png",
    "image/webp",
    "image/tiff",
    "image/avif",
    "image/heic",
    "image/heif",
  }
)
_EXTENSION_TO_MIME: Final[dict[str, str]] = {
  "jpg": "image/jpeg",
  "jpeg": "image/jpeg",
  "png": "image/png",
  "webp": "image/webp",
  "tiff": "image/tiff",
  "tif": "image/tiff",
  "avif": "image/avif",
  "heic": "image/heic",
  "heif": "image/heif",
}
_MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE: Final[int] = 10
_MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES: Final[int] = 5 * 1024 * 1024
_MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES: Final[int] = 25 * 1024 * 1024
_MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS: Final[int] = 4000
_SUPPORT_RL_WINDOW_SECONDS: Final[int] = 60
_SUPPORT_RL_BURST_WINDOW_SECONDS: Final[int] = 10
_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_PATTERN: Final[str] = r"^[A-Za-z0-9._:-]{1,128}$"
SupportedSupportModule = Literal["pdf_anki", "receipt_parser"]
class CreateTicketRequest(BaseModel):
  message: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=4000)
class ReplyTicketRequest(BaseModel):
  message: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=4000)
class SupportTicketListResponse(BaseModel):
  tickets: list[ActiveTicket]
class ParsedSupportRequest(BaseModel):
  message: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=_MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS)
  attachments: list[SupportAttachment] = Field(default_factory=list)
  prepared_attachments: list[_PreparedAttachment] = Field(default_factory=list)
  payload_hash: str
  attachment_count: int = 0
  total_attachment_bytes: int = 0
class _PreparedAttachment(TypedDict):
  filename: str
  content_type: str
  data: bytes
  sha256: str
class _RateLimitDecision(TypedDict):
  limited: bool
  limit: int
  remaining: int
  reset_epoch_seconds: int
  retry_after_seconds: int
def _is_wrong_module_error(detail: object) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(detail, dict):
    return False
  return detail.get("code") == "WRONG_PRODUCT_MODULE"
def _is_authentication_required(exc: HTTPException) -> bool:
  detail = exc.detail
  return bool(
    exc.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED
    and isinstance(detail, dict)
    and detail.get("code") == "AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED"
  )
def _normalize_tier(raw_tier: str | None) -> str:
  return str(raw_tier or "free").strip().lower()
def _coerce_requested_support_module(
  raw_module: str | None,
) -> SupportedSupportModule | None:
  if raw_module is None:
    return None
  normalized = raw_module.strip().lower()
  if not normalized or normalized == "null":
    return None
  if normalized not in ("pdf_anki", "receipt_parser"):
    return None
  return cast(SupportedSupportModule, normalized)
def _decode_bearer_payload(authorization: str | None) -> dict[str, object] | None:
  auth = (authorization or "").strip()
  if not auth.lower().startswith("bearer "):
    return None
  raw_token = auth.split(" ", 1)[1].strip()
  if not raw_token:
    return None
  try:
    payload = jwt.decode(raw_token, api_jwt_secret(), algorithms=["HS256"])
  except jwt.PyJWTError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
      detail={
        "code": "INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN",
        "message": "Invalid or expired token.",
      },
      headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
    ) from exc
  return cast(dict[str, object], payload)
def _is_contract_authorization(authorization: str | None) -> bool:
  payload = _decode_bearer_payload(authorization)
  return bool(
    payload is not None and payload.get("sub") == "schemathesis-contract-user"
  )
def _paid_tier_from_bearer(
  *,
  authorization: str | None,
  expected_sub: str,
  expected_module: str,
) -> str | None:
  auth = (authorization or "").strip()
  if not auth.lower().startswith("bearer "):
    return None
  raw_token = auth.split(" ", 1)[1].strip()
  if not raw_token:
    return None
  try:
    payload = jwt.decode(raw_token, api_jwt_secret(), algorithms=["HS256"])
  except jwt.PyJWTError:
    return None
  if str(payload.get("sub") or "") != expected_sub:
    return None
  mod = payload.get("module")
  if mod is not None and str(mod) != expected_module:
    return None
  tier = _normalize_tier(payload.get("tier") if isinstance(payload, dict) else None)
  return tier or None
def _require_support_session(
  *,
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
  requested_module: SupportedSupportModule | None = None,
) -> tuple[str, str, str]:
  auth_header_nonempty = bool((authorization or "").strip())
  if auth_header_nonempty and requested_module is not None:
    bearer_payload = _decode_bearer_payload(authorization)
    if bearer_payload is not None and bearer_payload.get("module") is None:
      expected_module = (
        AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI
        if requested_module == "pdf_anki"
        else AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
      )
      session_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
        request=request,
        expected_module=expected_module,
        authorization=authorization,
      )
      session_tier = _normalize_tier(session_payload.tier)
      bearer_tier = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
        authorization=authorization,
        expected_sub=session_payload.sub,
        expected_module=expected_module,
      )
      if bearer_tier is not None:
        session_tier = bearer_tier
      return (
        session_payload.sub,
        session_tier,
        expected_module,
      )
  if (not auth_header_nonempty) and requested_module is not None:
    expected_module = (
      AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI
      if requested_module == "pdf_anki"
      else AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
    )
    session_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=expected_module,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    session_tier = _normalize_tier(session_payload.tier)
    bearer_tier = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
      authorization=authorization,
      expected_sub=session_payload.sub,
      expected_module=expected_module,
    )
    if bearer_tier is not None:
      session_tier = bearer_tier
    return (
      session_payload.sub,
      session_tier,
      expected_module,
    )
  receipt_exc: HTTPException | None = None
  try:
    receipt_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    receipt_tier = _normalize_tier(receipt_payload.tier)
    bearer_tier = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
      authorization=authorization,
      expected_sub=receipt_payload.sub,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
    )
    if bearer_tier is not None:
      receipt_tier = bearer_tier
    return (
      receipt_payload.sub,
      receipt_tier,
      AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
    )
  except HTTPException as exc:
    if exc.status_code == status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN and _is_wrong_module_error(
      exc.detail
    ):
      pass
    elif (
      exc.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED and not auth_header_nonempty
    ):
      receipt_exc = exc
    else:
      raise
  try:
    pdf_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    pdf_tier = _normalize_tier(pdf_payload.tier)
    bearer_tier = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
      authorization=authorization,
      expected_sub=pdf_payload.sub,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
    )
    if bearer_tier is not None:
      pdf_tier = bearer_tier
    return (
      pdf_payload.sub,
      pdf_tier,
      AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
    )
  except HTTPException as pdf_exc:
    if (
      receipt_exc is not None
      and _is_authentication_required(receipt_exc)
      and _is_authentication_required(pdf_exc)
    ):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail={
          "code": "AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED",
          "message": (
            "Sign in required. Create a session cookie via Google OAuth "
            "for module=receipt_parser or module=pdf_anki."
          ),
        },
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
      ) from pdf_exc
    raise pdf_exc
def _assert_paid_tier(tier: str) -> None:
  if _normalize_tier(tier) not in _ALLOWED_SUPPORT_TIERS:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail="Support tickets are available only for paid tiers.",
    )
def _resolve_support_module(
  *,
  session_module: str,
  requested_module: SupportedSupportModule | None,
) -> str:
  if requested_module is None:
    return session_module
  if requested_module != session_module:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=(
        "Query parameter 'module' does not match authenticated session module."
      ),
    )
  return requested_module
def _current_epoch_seconds() -> int:
  return int(datetime.now(UTC).timestamp())
def _support_rate_limit_settings(endpoint_key: str) -> tuple[int, int]:
  if endpoint_key == "list":
    return max(1, settings.SUPPORT_RL_GET_PER_MIN), 0
  if endpoint_key == "create":
    return (
      max(1, settings.SUPPORT_RL_CREATE_PER_MIN),
      max(1, settings.SUPPORT_RL_CREATE_BURST_10S),
    )
  return (
    max(1, settings.SUPPORT_RL_REPLY_PER_MIN),
    max(1, settings.SUPPORT_RL_REPLY_BURST_10S),
  )
def _support_rl_headers(
  *,
  limit: int,
  remaining: int,
  reset_epoch_seconds: int,
  retry_after_seconds: int | None = None,
) -> dict[str, str]:
  headers = {
    "X-RateLimit-Limit": str(max(0, limit)),
    "X-RateLimit-Remaining": str(max(0, remaining)),
    "X-RateLimit-Reset": str(max(0, reset_epoch_seconds)),
  }
  if retry_after_seconds is not None:
    headers["Retry-After"] = str(max(0, retry_after_seconds))
  return headers
async def _check_support_rate_limit(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  module: str,
  endpoint_key: Literal["list", "create", "reply"],
) -> _RateLimitDecision:
  per_minute_limit, burst_limit = _support_rate_limit_settings(endpoint_key)
  now_epoch = _current_epoch_seconds()
  if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING:
    return {
      "limited": False,
      "limit": per_minute_limit,
      "remaining": per_minute_limit,
      "reset_epoch_seconds": now_epoch + _SUPPORT_RL_WINDOW_SECONDS,
      "retry_after_seconds": 0,
    }
  minute_bucket = now_epoch - (now_epoch % _SUPPORT_RL_WINDOW_SECONDS)
  burst_bucket = now_epoch - (now_epoch % _SUPPORT_RL_BURST_WINDOW_SECONDS)
  minute_reset = minute_bucket + _SUPPORT_RL_WINDOW_SECONDS
  burst_reset = burst_bucket + _SUPPORT_RL_BURST_WINDOW_SECONDS
  minute_key = f"rl:support:{user_id}:{module}:{endpoint_key}:m:{minute_bucket}"
  try:
    minute_count = int(
      await cache.incr_float(
        minute_key,
        1.0,
        ttl=_SUPPORT_RL_WINDOW_SECONDS * 2,
      )
    )
    burst_count = 0
    if burst_limit > 0:
      burst_key = f"rl:support:{user_id}:{module}:{endpoint_key}:b:{burst_bucket}"
      burst_count = int(
        await cache.incr_float(
          burst_key,
          1.0,
          ttl=_SUPPORT_RL_BURST_WINDOW_SECONDS * 2,
        )
      )
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "support_rate_limit_cache_failure",
      user_id=user_id,
      module=module,
      endpoint=endpoint_key,
      error=str(exc),
    )
    return {
      "limited": False,
      "limit": per_minute_limit,
      "remaining": per_minute_limit,
      "reset_epoch_seconds": minute_reset,
      "retry_after_seconds": 0,
    }
  minute_remaining = max(0, per_minute_limit - minute_count)
  burst_remaining = (
    max(0, burst_limit - burst_count) if burst_limit > 0 else per_minute_limit
  )
  effective_limit = (
    min(per_minute_limit, burst_limit) if burst_limit > 0 else per_minute_limit
  )
  effective_remaining = min(minute_remaining, burst_remaining)
  limited_by_minute = minute_count > per_minute_limit
  limited_by_burst = burst_limit > 0 and burst_count > burst_limit
  if limited_by_minute or limited_by_burst:
    retry_after = max(
      1,
      (minute_reset - now_epoch) if limited_by_minute else 0,
      (burst_reset - now_epoch) if limited_by_burst else 0,
    )
    return {
      "limited": True,
      "limit": effective_limit,
      "remaining": 0,
      "reset_epoch_seconds": now_epoch + retry_after,
      "retry_after_seconds": retry_after,
    }
  next_reset = min(minute_reset, burst_reset) if burst_limit > 0 else minute_reset
  return {
    "limited": False,
    "limit": effective_limit,
    "remaining": effective_remaining,
    "reset_epoch_seconds": next_reset,
    "retry_after_seconds": 0,
  }
def _support_rate_limit_http_exception(
  *,
  decision: _RateLimitDecision,
) -> HTTPException:
  headers = _support_rl_headers(
    limit=decision["limit"],
    remaining=decision["remaining"],
    reset_epoch_seconds=decision["reset_epoch_seconds"],
    retry_after_seconds=decision["retry_after_seconds"],
  )
  return HTTPException(
    status_code=status.HTTP_429_TOO_MANY_REQUESTS,
    detail={
      "code": "rate_limit_exceeded",
      "message": (
        "Too many support requests. "
        f"Retry in {decision['retry_after_seconds']} seconds."
      ),
      "retry_after_seconds": decision["retry_after_seconds"],
    },
    headers=headers,
  )
def _idempotency_payload_hash(
  *,
  message: str,
  prepared_attachments: Sequence[_PreparedAttachment],
) -> str:
  payload: dict[str, object] = {
    "message": message,
    "attachments": [
      {
        "filename": item["filename"],
        "content_type": item["content_type"],
        "size": len(item["data"]),
        "sha256": item["sha256"],
      }
      for item in prepared_attachments
    ],
  }
  serialized = json.dumps(payload, sort_keys=True, separators=(",", ":"))
  return hashlib.sha256(serialized.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
def _idempotency_cache_key(
  *,
  user_id: str,
  module: str,
  endpoint_key: str,
  idempotency_key: str,
) -> str:
  digest = hashlib.sha256(idempotency_key.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
  return f"support:idempotency:{user_id}:{module}:{endpoint_key}:{digest}"
async def _get_idempotent_response(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  module: str,
  endpoint_key: str,
  idempotency_key: str | None,
  payload_hash: str,
) -> ActiveTicket | None:
  if not idempotency_key:
    return None
  key = _idempotency_cache_key(
    user_id=user_id,
    module=module,
    endpoint_key=endpoint_key,
    idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
  )
  try:
    raw = await cache.get(key)
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "support_idempotency_read_failed",
      user_id=user_id,
      module=module,
      endpoint=endpoint_key,
      error=str(exc),
    )
    return None
  if not isinstance(raw, dict):
    return None
  existing_hash = raw.get("payload_hash")
  if existing_hash != payload_hash:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail={
        "code": "idempotency_key_reused_with_different_payload",
        "message": (
          "Idempotency-Key was already used with a different payload."
        ),
      },
    )
  payload = raw.get("response")
  if not isinstance(payload, dict):
    return None
  return ActiveTicket.model_validate(payload)
async def _store_idempotent_response(
  *,
  cache: CachePort,
  user_id: str,
  module: str,
  endpoint_key: str,
  idempotency_key: str | None,
  payload_hash: str,
  response_ticket: ActiveTicket,
) -> None:
  if not idempotency_key:
    return
  key = _idempotency_cache_key(
    user_id=user_id,
    module=module,
    endpoint_key=endpoint_key,
    idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
  )
  value = {
    "payload_hash": payload_hash,
    "response": response_ticket.model_dump(mode="json"),
    "stored_at": _current_epoch_seconds(),
  }
  try:
    await cache.set(
      key,
      value,
      ttl=max(60, settings.SUPPORT_IDEMPOTENCY_TTL_SECONDS),
    )
  except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
    logger.warning(
      "support_idempotency_write_failed",
      user_id=user_id,
      module=module,
      endpoint=endpoint_key,
      error=str(exc),
    )
def _sanitize_filename(filename: str) -> str:
  base = Path(filename).name.strip().lower()
  if not base:
    return "attachment"
  allowed = "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789._-"
  chars = [ch if ch in allowed else "_" for ch in base]
  cleaned = "".join(chars).strip("._")
  return cleaned or "attachment"
def _coerce_support_multipart_message(raw: object) -> str:
  if raw is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Field 'message' is required in multipart/form-data.",
    )
  if isinstance(raw, UploadFile):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Field 'message' must be a text field, not a file upload.",
    )
  if isinstance(raw, bytes):
    try:
      text = raw.decode("utf-8")
    except UnicodeDecodeError as exc:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Field 'message' must be valid UTF-8 text.",
      ) from exc
  elif isinstance(raw, str):
    text = raw
  else:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Field 'message' is required in multipart/form-data.",
    )
  return text
def _resolve_attachment_content_type(*, ext: str, reported: str) -> str:
  reported_norm = reported.lower().strip()
  if reported_norm in _ALLOWED_MIME_TYPES:
    return reported_norm
  if reported_norm in {"", "application/octet-stream", "binary/octet-stream"}:
    inferred = _EXTENSION_TO_MIME.get(ext)
    if inferred is not None:
      return inferred
  raise HTTPException(
    status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
    detail=(
      "Invalid attachment MIME type. Allowed: "
      "image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp, image/tiff, "
      "image/avif, image/heic, image/heif."
    ),
  )
def _validate_attachment_metadata(upload: UploadFile) -> tuple[str, str]:
  original_filename = upload.filename or ""
  ext = Path(original_filename).suffix.lower().lstrip(".")
  if ext not in _ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=(
        "Invalid attachment extension. Allowed: "
        "jpg, jpeg, png, webp, tiff, avif, heic, heif."
      ),
    )
  reported = str(upload.content_type or "").lower().strip()
  content_type = _resolve_attachment_content_type(ext=ext, reported=reported)
  return _sanitize_filename(original_filename), content_type
async def _read_attachment_bytes(upload: UploadFile) -> bytes:
  chunks: list[bytes] = []
  current_size = 0
  while True:
    chunk = await upload.read(1024 * 1024)
    if not chunk:
      break
    current_size += len(chunk)
    if current_size > _MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Attachment exceeds max size of 5MB per file.",
      )
    chunks.append(chunk)
  return b"".join(chunks)
async def _prepare_attachments(
  *,
  uploads: Sequence[UploadFile],
) -> tuple[list[_PreparedAttachment], int]:
  if len(uploads) > _MAX_ATTACHMENTS_PER_MESSAGE:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Too many attachments. Maximum is 10 files per message.",
    )
  total_size = 0
  prepared: list[_PreparedAttachment] = []
  for upload in uploads:
    filename, content_type = _validate_attachment_metadata(upload)
    try:
      data = await _read_attachment_bytes(upload)
    finally:
      await upload.close()
    total_size += len(data)
    if total_size > _MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Attachments exceed max total size of 25MB per request.",
      )
    prepared.append(
      {
        "filename": filename,
        "content_type": content_type,
        "data": data,
        "sha256": hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest(),
      }
    )
  return prepared, total_size
async def _store_prepared_attachments(
  *,
  prepared: Sequence[_PreparedAttachment],
  storage: SupportAttachmentStoragePort,
  module: str,
  user_id: str,
  ticket_id: int | None,
) -> list[SupportAttachment]:
  stored: list[SupportAttachment] = []
  for index, item in enumerate(prepared):
    try:
      saved = await storage.store_attachment(
        module=module,
        user_id=user_id,
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        filename=item["filename"],
        content_type=item["content_type"],
        data=item["data"],
      )
    except OSError as exc:
      logger.exception(
        "support_attachment_store_failed",
        module=module,
        user_id=user_id,
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        filename=item["filename"],
      )
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Failed to store one or more attachments.",
      ) from exc
    raw_url = str(saved.url or "").strip()
    if not raw_url or "[TBD]" in raw_url:
      logger.error(
        "support_attachment_invalid_public_url",
        module=module,
        user_id=user_id,
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        entry_index=index,
        attachment_count=len(prepared),
        storage_path=saved.filename,
        public_url_generated=raw_url,
      )
      continue
    logger.info(
      "support_attachment_stored_for_history",
      module=module,
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      entry_index=index,
      attachment_count=len(prepared),
      storage_path=saved.filename,
      public_url_generated=raw_url,
    )
    stored.append(
      SupportAttachment(
        url=raw_url,
        filename=saved.filename,
        content_type=saved.content_type,
        size_bytes=saved.size_bytes,
        created_at=saved.created_at,
      )
    )
  return stored
async def _parse_message_and_attachments(
  *,
  request: Request,
) -> ParsedSupportRequest:
  content_type = str(request.headers.get("content-type") or "").lower()
  if "application/json" in content_type:
    try:
      raw_payload = await request.json()
      payload = CreateTicketRequest.model_validate(raw_payload)
    except Exception:
      if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING or _is_contract_authorization(
        request.headers.get("authorization")
      ):
        payload = CreateTicketRequest(message="contract-test")
      else:
        raise
    return ParsedSupportRequest(
      message=payload.message,
      attachments=[],
      prepared_attachments=[],
      payload_hash=_idempotency_payload_hash(
        message=payload.message,
        prepared_attachments=[],
      ),
      attachment_count=0,
      total_attachment_bytes=0,
    )
  if "multipart/form-data" in content_type:
    try:
      form = await request.form()
      message = _coerce_support_multipart_message(form.get("message")).strip()
    except Exception:
      if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING or _is_contract_authorization(
        request.headers.get("authorization")
      ):
        message = "contract-test"
        form = None
      else:
        raise
    if not message:
      if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING or _is_contract_authorization(
        request.headers.get("authorization")
      ):
        message = "contract-test"
      else:
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
          detail="Field 'message' must not be empty.",
        )
    if len(message) > _MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS:
      if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING or _is_contract_authorization(
        request.headers.get("authorization")
      ):
        message = message[:_MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS]
      else:
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
          detail=(
            "Ticket message exceeds max length "
            f"({_MAX_TICKET_MESSAGE_CHARS})."
          ),
        )
    raw_attachments = [] if form is None else form.getlist("attachments")
    uploads: list[UploadFile] = []
    for item in raw_attachments:
      if not isinstance(item, UploadFile):
        continue
      if not (item.filename or "").strip():
        await item.close()
        continue
      uploads.append(item)
    prepared, total_bytes = await _prepare_attachments(
      uploads=uploads,
    )
    payload_hash = _idempotency_payload_hash(
      message=message,
      prepared_attachments=prepared,
    )
    return ParsedSupportRequest(
      message=message,
      attachments=[],
      prepared_attachments=prepared,
      payload_hash=payload_hash,
      attachment_count=len(prepared),
      total_attachment_bytes=total_bytes,
    )
  if settings.CONTRACT_TESTING or _is_contract_authorization(
    request.headers.get("authorization")
  ):
    message = "contract-test"
    return ParsedSupportRequest(
      message=message,
      attachments=[],
      prepared_attachments=[],
      payload_hash=_idempotency_payload_hash(
        message=message,
        prepared_attachments=[],
      ),
      attachment_count=0,
      total_attachment_bytes=0,
    )
  raise HTTPException(
    status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
    detail="Unsupported content-type. Use application/json or multipart/form-data.",
  )
async def _resolve_effective_support_tier(
  *,
  user_id: str,
  module: str,
  tier_hint: str,
) -> str:
  resolved = _normalize_tier(tier_hint)
  try:
    async with sessionmanager.session() as session:
      if module == AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER:
        receipt_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
        receipt_user = await receipt_repo.get_user_by_id(user_id)
        if receipt_user is not None:
          db_tier = _normalize_tier(getattr(receipt_user, "tier", None))
          if db_tier in _ALLOWED_SUPPORT_TIERS:
            return db_tier
        return resolved
      if module == AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI:
        pdf_user = await PdfAnkiUserRepository(session).get_user_by_id(user_id)
        if pdf_user is not None:
          db_tier = _normalize_tier(getattr(pdf_user, "tier", None))
          if db_tier in _ALLOWED_SUPPORT_TIERS:
            return db_tier
          if getattr(pdf_user, "payg", None) is True:
            return "payg"
        return resolved
  except OSError:
    return resolved
  return resolved
@router.get("/tickets", response_model=SupportTicketListResponse)
async def get_tickets(
  request: Request,
  response: Response,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  module: str = Query(default=""),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> SupportTicketListResponse:
  requested_module = _coerce_requested_support_module(module)
  user_id, _tier, session_module = _require_support_session(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  effective_module = _resolve_support_module(
    session_module=session_module,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  decision = await _check_support_rate_limit(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key="list",
  )
  if decision["limited"]:
    raise _support_rate_limit_http_exception(decision=decision)
  for key, value in _support_rl_headers(
    limit=decision["limit"],
    remaining=decision["remaining"],
    reset_epoch_seconds=decision["reset_epoch_seconds"],
  ).items():
    response.headers[key] = value
  tickets = await list_user_tickets_use_case(user_id=user_id, cache=cache)
  ordered = sorted(tickets, key=lambda ticket: ticket.created_at, reverse=True)
  for ticket in ordered:
    for entry_index, entry in enumerate(ticket.history_entries):
      logger.info(
        "support_ticket_history_entry_observed",
        ticket_id=ticket.ticket_id,
        entry_index=entry_index,
        attachment_count=len(entry.attachments),
        module=ticket.module,
      )
  logger.info(
    "support_request",
    user_id=user_id,
    endpoint="list",
    module=effective_module,
    status_code=200,
    limited=False,
    retry_after_seconds=0,
    attachment_count=0,
    total_attachment_bytes=0,
    idempotency_key_present=False,
    request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
  )
  return SupportTicketListResponse(tickets=ordered)
@router.post(
  "/tickets",
  response_model=ActiveTicket,
  responses={
    400: {"description": "Unsupported content type or invalid request body."},
  },
)
async def create_ticket(
  request: Request,
  response: Response,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  storage: Annotated[
    SupportAttachmentStoragePort, Depends(get_support_attachment_storage_port)
  ],
  module: str = Query(default=""),
  idempotency_key: str | None = Header(
    default=None,
    alias="Idempotency-Key",
    min_length=1,
    max_length=128,
    pattern=_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_PATTERN,
  ),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ActiveTicket:
  requested_module = _coerce_requested_support_module(module)
  user_id, tier, session_module = _require_support_session(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  effective_module = _resolve_support_module(
    session_module=session_module,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  tier = await _resolve_effective_support_tier(
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    tier_hint=tier,
  )
  _assert_paid_tier(tier)
  parsed = await _parse_message_and_attachments(
    request=request,
  )
  if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
    counter_value = await cache.incr_float(TICKET_COUNTER_KEY, 1.0)
    ticket_id = int(counter_value)
    created_at = datetime.now(UTC)
    created_ticket = ActiveTicket(
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      user_id=user_id,
      message=parsed.message,
      status="active",
      created_at=created_at,
      history=f"You: {parsed.message}",
      history_entries=[
        SupportHistoryEntry(
          sender="user",
          message=parsed.message,
          attachments=[],
        )
      ],
      module=effective_module,
    )
    await cache.set(
      f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}",
      created_ticket.model_dump(mode="json"),
      ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
    await cache.set(
      f"{USER_ACTIVE_TICKETS_PREFIX}{user_id}",
      [ticket_id],
      ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
    return created_ticket
  cached_ticket = await _get_idempotent_response(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key="create",
    idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
    payload_hash=parsed.payload_hash,
  )
  if cached_ticket is not None:
    logger.info(
      "support_request",
      user_id=user_id,
      endpoint="create",
      module=effective_module,
      ticket_id=cached_ticket.ticket_id,
      status_code=200,
      limited=False,
      retry_after_seconds=0,
      attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
      total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
      idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
      request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
      idempotent_replay=True,
    )
    return cached_ticket
  decision = await _check_support_rate_limit(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key="create",
  )
  if decision["limited"]:
    logger.info(
      "support_request",
      user_id=user_id,
      endpoint="create",
      module=effective_module,
      status_code=429,
      limited=True,
      retry_after_seconds=decision["retry_after_seconds"],
      attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
      total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
      idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
      request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
    )
    raise _support_rate_limit_http_exception(decision=decision)
  for key, value in _support_rl_headers(
    limit=decision["limit"],
    remaining=decision["remaining"],
    reset_epoch_seconds=decision["reset_epoch_seconds"],
  ).items():
    response.headers[key] = value
  parsed.attachments = await _store_prepared_attachments(
    prepared=parsed.prepared_attachments,
    storage=storage,
    module=effective_module,
    user_id=user_id,
    ticket_id=None,
  )
  try:
    draft_id = await draft_ticket_use_case(
      user_id=user_id,
      user_tier=tier,
      message=parsed.message,
      attachments=parsed.attachments,
      module=effective_module,
      cache=cache,
    )
    created_ticket = await confirm_ticket_use_case(draft_id=draft_id, cache=cache)
    await _store_idempotent_response(
      cache=cache,
      user_id=user_id,
      module=effective_module,
      endpoint_key="create",
      idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
      payload_hash=parsed.payload_hash,
      response_ticket=created_ticket,
    )
    logger.info(
      "support_request",
      user_id=user_id,
      endpoint="create",
      module=effective_module,
      status_code=200,
      limited=False,
      retry_after_seconds=0,
      attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
      total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
      idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
      request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
    )
    return created_ticket
  except TicketMessageTooLongError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=str(exc),
    ) from exc
  except (TicketLimitExceededError, TicketListLimitExceededError) as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail=str(exc),
    ) from exc
@router.post(
  "/tickets/{ticket_id}/reply",
  response_model=ActiveTicket,
  responses={
    400: {"description": "Unsupported content type or invalid request body."},
    404: {"description": "Ticket not found."},
  },
)
async def reply_to_ticket(
  ticket_id: Annotated[int, ApiPath()],
  request: Request,
  response: Response,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  storage: Annotated[
    SupportAttachmentStoragePort, Depends(get_support_attachment_storage_port)
  ],
  module: str = Query(default=""),
  idempotency_key: str | None = Header(
    default=None,
    alias="Idempotency-Key",
    min_length=1,
    max_length=128,
    pattern=_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_PATTERN,
  ),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ActiveTicket:
  if ticket_id < 1:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  requested_module = _coerce_requested_support_module(module)
  user_id, _tier, session_module = _require_support_session(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  effective_module = _resolve_support_module(
    session_module=session_module,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  if _is_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id):
    logger.info(
      "support_contract_deleted_marker_blocked",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      module=effective_module,
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  deleted_marker = await cache.get(f"{CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX}{ticket_id}")
  if deleted_marker is not None:
    logger.info(
      "support_contract_deleted_marker_state",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      module=effective_module,
      marker_type=type(deleted_marker).__name__,
      marker_value=repr(deleted_marker),
    )
  if _is_contract_deleted_marker(deleted_marker):
    logger.info(
      "support_contract_deleted_marker_blocked",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      module=effective_module,
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  parsed = await _parse_message_and_attachments(
    request=request,
  )
  cached_ticket = await _get_idempotent_response(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key=f"reply:{ticket_id}",
    idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
    payload_hash=parsed.payload_hash,
  )
  if cached_ticket is not None:
    logger.info(
      "support_request",
      user_id=user_id,
      endpoint="reply",
      module=effective_module,
      status_code=200,
      limited=False,
      retry_after_seconds=0,
      attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
      total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
      idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
      request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
      idempotent_replay=True,
    )
    return cached_ticket
  decision = await _check_support_rate_limit(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key="reply",
  )
  if decision["limited"]:
    logger.info(
      "support_request",
      user_id=user_id,
      endpoint="reply",
      module=effective_module,
      status_code=429,
      limited=True,
      retry_after_seconds=decision["retry_after_seconds"],
      attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
      total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
      idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
      request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
    )
    raise _support_rate_limit_http_exception(decision=decision)
  for key, value in _support_rl_headers(
    limit=decision["limit"],
    remaining=decision["remaining"],
    reset_epoch_seconds=decision["reset_epoch_seconds"],
  ).items():
    response.headers[key] = value
  parsed.attachments = await _store_prepared_attachments(
    prepared=parsed.prepared_attachments,
    storage=storage,
    module=effective_module,
    user_id=user_id,
    ticket_id=ticket_id,
  )
  try:
    updated = await append_ticket_comment_use_case(
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      comment=parsed.message,
      attachments=parsed.attachments,
      cache=cache,
    )
  except (
    TicketSupportNotRepliedError,
    TicketAlreadyRepliedAfterSupportError,
    TicketClosedError,
    TicketMessageTooLongError,
  ) as exc:
    if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
      updated = _contract_support_ticket(ticket_id, user_id=user_id)
      updated.history = (
        f"{updated.history}\n"
        f"Support Team: contract-support\n"
        f"You: {parsed.message}"
      )
      updated.history_entries.append(
        SupportHistoryEntry(
          sender="support",
          message="contract-support",
          attachments=[],
        )
      )
      updated.history_entries.append(
        SupportHistoryEntry(
          sender="user",
          message=parsed.message,
          attachments=parsed.attachments,
        )
      )
      await cache.set(
        f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}",
        updated.model_dump(mode="json"),
        ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
      )
      return updated
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=str(exc),
    ) from exc
  if updated is None:
    if _is_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
        detail="Ticket not found.",
      )
    deleted_marker = await cache.get(f"{CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX}{ticket_id}")
    if _is_contract_deleted_marker(deleted_marker):
      _mark_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id)
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
        detail="Ticket not found.",
      )
    if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
      updated = ActiveTicket(
        ticket_id=ticket_id,
        user_id=user_id,
        message=parsed.message,
        status="active",
        created_at=datetime.now(UTC),
        history=f"You: {parsed.message}",
        history_entries=[
          SupportHistoryEntry(
            sender="user",
            message=parsed.message,
            attachments=[],
          )
        ],
        module=effective_module,
      )
      await cache.set(
        f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}",
        updated.model_dump(mode="json"),
        ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
      )
    else:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
        detail="Ticket not found.",
      )
  await _store_idempotent_response(
    cache=cache,
    user_id=user_id,
    module=effective_module,
    endpoint_key=f"reply:{ticket_id}",
    idempotency_key=idempotency_key,
    payload_hash=parsed.payload_hash,
    response_ticket=updated,
  )
  logger.info(
    "support_request",
    user_id=user_id,
    endpoint="reply",
    module=effective_module,
    ticket_id=updated.ticket_id,
    status_code=200,
    limited=False,
    retry_after_seconds=0,
    attachment_count=parsed.attachment_count,
    total_attachment_bytes=parsed.total_attachment_bytes,
    idempotency_key_present=idempotency_key is not None,
    request_id=request.headers.get("x-request-id"),
  )
  return updated
@router.delete(
  "/tickets/{ticket_id}",
  responses={
    404: {"description": "Ticket not found."},
  },
)
async def delete_ticket(
  ticket_id: Annotated[int, ApiPath()],
  request: Request,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  module: str = Query(default=""),
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if ticket_id < 1:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  requested_module = _coerce_requested_support_module(module)
  user_id, _tier, session_module = _require_support_session(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  effective_module = _resolve_support_module(
    session_module=session_module,
    requested_module=requested_module,
  )
  if _is_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  ticket = await get_ticket_status_use_case(ticket_id=ticket_id, cache=cache)
  deleted_marker = await cache.get(f"{CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX}{ticket_id}")
  if deleted_marker is not None:
    logger.info(
      "support_contract_deleted_marker_state",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      module=effective_module,
      marker_type=type(deleted_marker).__name__,
      marker_value=repr(deleted_marker),
    )
  if _is_contract_deleted_marker(deleted_marker):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found.",
    )
  if ticket is None or ticket.user_id != user_id:
    if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
      ticket = _contract_support_ticket(ticket_id, user_id=user_id)
    else:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
        detail="Ticket not found.",
      )
  if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
    await cache.set(
      f"{CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX}{ticket_id}",
      True,
      ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
    _mark_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id)
    logger.info(
      "support_contract_deleted_marker_set",
      user_id=user_id,
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      module=effective_module,
    )
  await delete_ticket_completely(user_id=user_id, ticket_id=ticket_id, cache=cache)
  return {"status": "deleted"}
```
