```py
def _sanitize_sse(value: str) -> str:
  return (
    value.replace("\r\n", "\\n")
    .replace("\r", "\\n")
    .replace("\n", "\\n")
    .replace("\x00", "")
  )
def _coerce_audio_balance_storage(
  previous_value: object,
  new_balance: Decimal,
) -> object:
  if isinstance(previous_value, Decimal):
    return new_balance
  if isinstance(previous_value, int):
    return int(new_balance)
  if isinstance(previous_value, float):
    return float(new_balance)
  return format(new_balance, "f")
def _parse_audio_notes_client_reference_id(value: str) -> tuple[str, str | None]:
  raw = str(value or "").strip()
  if not raw:
    return "", None
  if ":" in raw:
    tid, _, lang = raw.partition(":")
    return tid.strip(), (lang.strip().lower() or None)
  if "_" in raw:
    tid, _, lang = raw.rpartition("_")
    lang_norm = lang.strip().lower()
    if tid.strip() and len(lang_norm) == 2:
      return tid.strip(), lang_norm
  return raw, None
def _audio_notes_effective_subscription_tier(user: User) -> str:
  base = str(getattr(user, "base_tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
  if base in {"premium", "pro"}:
    return base
  raw = str(getattr(user, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
  if raw in {"premium", "pro"}:
    return raw
  return "free"
def _format_notice_date(value: object) -> str:
  if hasattr(value, "date"):
    try:
      return value.date().isoformat()  # type: ignore[no-any-return]
    except (AttributeError, ValueError, TypeError):
      pass
  return "N/A"
class FeedbackRequest(BaseModel):
  request_id: UUID
  score: float = Field(..., ge=0.0, le=1.0)
  correction: str | None = Field(None, max_length=10000)
  @field_validator("score", mode="before")
  @classmethod
  def reject_boolean_score(cls, v: Any) -> Any:
    if isinstance(v, bool):
      raise ValueError("score must be a number between 0 and 1, not boolean")
    return v
router = APIRouter(tags=["rest"])
logger = structlog.get_logger()
@router.get("/", response_model=HealthCheckResponse)
async def health_check(
  monitor: Annotated[HealthService, Depends(get_system_monitor)],
) -> dict[str, Any]:
  health_status = await monitor.check_health()
  if health_status["status"] == "ok":
    return health_status
  status_code = status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE
  if health_status["status"] == "degraded":
    status_code = status.HTTP_200_OK
  if status_code != status.HTTP_200_OK:
    raise HTTPException(status_code=status_code, detail=health_status)
  return health_status
@router.get("/example", response_model=ExampleResponse)
async def get_example(db: DbDependency) -> ExampleResponse:
  status_str = "True" if db.is_active else "False"
  return ExampleResponse(
    message="This is a REST adapter example.",
    db_status=f"Session active: {status_str}",
  )
@router.post(
  "/test-router",
  response_model=RouterResponse,
  responses={
    400: {"description": "Malformed Request Body"},
  },
)
async def diagnose_llm_router(
  adaptive_router: RouterDependency,
  prompt: str = Body(..., embed=True, max_length=20000),
) -> RouterResponse:
  return await adaptive_router.route_request(prompt=prompt)
@router.post(
  "/stream",
  response_class=StreamingResponse,
  responses={
    200: {
      "description": "Server-Sent Events Stream",
      "content": {"text/event-stream": {"schema": {"type": "string"}}},
    },
    400: {"description": "Malformed Request Body"},
  },
)
async def stream_llm_router(
  adaptive_router: RouterDependency,
  prompt: str = Body(..., embed=True, max_length=20000),
) -> StreamingResponse:
  async def sse_generator() -> AsyncGenerator[str, None]:
    async for chunk in adaptive_router.route_stream(prompt=prompt):
      if chunk.finish_reason in (
        "error",
        "service_unavailable",
        "context_length",
      ):
        sanitized = _sanitize_sse(chunk.content)
        yield (f"event: error\ndata: {sanitized}\n\n")
      elif chunk.content:
        sanitized = _sanitize_sse(chunk.content)
        yield f"data: {sanitized}\n\n"
  return StreamingResponse(sse_generator(), media_type="text/event-stream")
@router.post(
  "/feedback",
  status_code=status.HTTP_202_ACCEPTED,
  responses={
    503: {"description": "Queue unavailable"},
    400: {"description": "Malformed Request Body"},
  },
)
async def submit_feedback(
  feedback: FeedbackRequest,
) -> dict[str, str]:
  try:
    pool = await QueueManager.get_pool()
    trace_ctx = inject_trace_context()
    await pool.enqueue_job(
      JobNames.PROCESS_FEEDBACK,
      request_id=feedback.request_id,
      score=feedback.score,
      correction=feedback.correction,
      trace_context=trace_ctx,
    )
  except Exception as e:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,
      detail="Feedback queue is currently unavailable.",
    ) from e
  return {"message": "Feedback queued for processing."}
async def _stripe_pdf_anki_checkout_topup(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  event_type: str,
  stripe_object: dict[str, Any],
  metadata: dict[str, Any],
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if event_type != "checkout.session.completed":
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "pdf_anki_topup_requires_checkout"}
  raw_tier = str(metadata.get("tier") or "").strip().lower()
  if raw_tier != "payg":
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="pdf_anki Stripe metadata tier must be payg.",
    )
  user_id = str(metadata.get("user_id") or "").strip()
  if not user_id:
    user_id = str(stripe_object.get("client_reference_id") or "").strip()
  if not user_id:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=(
        "Missing user_id for pdf_anki checkout "
        "(metadata or client_reference_id)."
      ),
    )
  amount_total = stripe_object.get("amount_total")
  if not isinstance(amount_total, int) or amount_total <= 0:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid amount_total for pdf_anki top-up.",
    )
  currency = str(stripe_object.get("currency") or "usd").strip().lower()
  if currency != "usd":
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="pdf_anki top-ups must use USD.",
    )
  repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  await repo.apply_balance_topup_from_stripe_cents(
    user_id,
    amount_total_cents=amount_total,
  )
  new_balance = await repo.get_balance_usd_decimal(user_id)
  await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
    WalletTransaction(
      tenant_id=user_id,
      module="pdf_anki",
      transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.CREDIT,
      amount_usd=(Decimal(amount_total) / Decimal(100)),
      balance_after_usd=new_balance,
      reference_id=str(stripe_object.get("id") or ""),
      description="PAYG wallet top-up from Stripe checkout",
    )
  )
  await session.commit()
  return {"status": "processed", "product": "pdf_anki", "tier": raw_tier}
async def _find_audio_notes_user_by_billing_ids(
  session: AsyncSession,
  *,
  stripe_customer_id_value: str | None,
  stripe_subscription_id_value: str | None,
) -> User | None:
  customer_id = str(stripe_customer_id_value or "").strip()
  subscription_id = str(stripe_subscription_id_value or "").strip()
  if not customer_id and not subscription_id:
    return None
  result = await session.execute(select(User))
  for user in result.scalars().all():
    stored_customer_id = str(getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", "") or "").strip()
    if customer_id and stored_customer_id == customer_id:
      return user
    if (
      subscription_id
      and str(getattr(user, "stripe_subscription_id", "") or "").strip()
      == subscription_id
    ):
      return user
  return None
async def _apply_pdf_anki_subscription_event(
  *,
  session: AsyncSession,
  event_type: str,
  stripe_object: dict[str, Any],
  metadata: dict[str, Any],
) -> dict[str, str]:
  repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  existing_tier = ""
  user_id = str(metadata.get("user_id") or "").strip()
  if not user_id:
    user_id = str(stripe_object.get("client_reference_id") or "").strip()
  direct_tier = str(metadata.get("tier") or "").strip().lower()
  amount_tier = infer_pdf_anki_tier_from_amounts(stripe_object)
  inferred_tier = infer_tier_from_stripe_object(stripe_object)
  raw_tier = direct_tier or amount_tier or inferred_tier
  resolved_customer_id = stripe_customer_id(stripe_object)
  resolved_subscription_id = stripe_subscription_id(stripe_object)
  period_start, period_end = stripe_period_bounds(event_type, stripe_object)
  resolved_status = normalize_subscription_status(event_type, stripe_object)
  if resolved_subscription_id and (
    event_type.startswith("subscription_schedule.")
    or event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
    or not raw_tier
    or period_start is None
    or period_end is None
    or not resolved_status
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      subscription_obj = await fetch_stripe_subscription(resolved_subscription_id)
      if not raw_tier:
        raw_tier = (
          str(stripe_metadata(subscription_obj).get("tier") or "").lower()
          or infer_pdf_anki_tier_from_amounts(subscription_obj)
          or infer_tier_from_stripe_object(subscription_obj)
          or raw_tier
        )
      sub_start, sub_end = stripe_period_bounds(
        "customer.subscription.created",
        subscription_obj,
      )
      period_start = period_start or sub_start
      period_end = period_end or sub_end
      resolved_status = resolved_status or normalize_subscription_status(
        "customer.subscription.created",
        subscription_obj,
      )
      resolved_customer_id = resolved_customer_id or stripe_customer_id(
        subscription_obj
      )
  if not user_id:
    matched = None
    if resolved_subscription_id:
      matched = await repo.find_user_by_stripe_subscription_id(
        resolved_subscription_id
      )
    if matched is None and resolved_customer_id:
      matched = await repo.find_user_by_stripe_customer_id(resolved_customer_id)
    if matched is not None:
      user_id = str(getattr(matched, "id", "") or "").strip()
      existing_tier = str(getattr(matched, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
  if not user_id:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "missing pdf_anki user_id or tier"}
  valid_tier = raw_tier if raw_tier in {"premium", "pro", "payg"} else ""
  if event_type == "checkout.session.completed" and not valid_tier:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "missing pdf_anki user_id or tier"}
  if event_type == "checkout.session.completed" and valid_tier == "payg":
    return await _stripe_pdf_anki_checkout_topup(
      session=session,
      event_type=event_type,
      stripe_object=stripe_object,
      metadata=metadata,
    )
  payg_wallet_flag: bool | None = True if valid_tier == "payg" else None
  tier_to_store: str | None = valid_tier or None
  if valid_tier == "payg":
    matched_payg = await repo.get_user_by_id(user_id)
    stored_tier = str(getattr(matched_payg, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower()
    tier_to_store = stored_tier or "free"
  await repo.apply_stripe_subscription_state(
    user_id=user_id,
    tier=tier_to_store,
    stripe_customer_id=resolved_customer_id,
    stripe_subscription_id=resolved_subscription_id,
    subscription_status=resolved_status,
    current_period_start=period_start,
    current_period_end=period_end,
    payg_wallet=payg_wallet_flag,
  )
  known_tier = valid_tier or existing_tier
  if event_type == "customer.subscription.deleted" and known_tier in {
    "premium",
    "pro",
  }:
    await repo.apply_stripe_subscription_state(
      user_id=user_id,
      tier="free",
      stripe_customer_id=resolved_customer_id,
      stripe_subscription_id=resolved_subscription_id,
      subscription_status="canceled",
      current_period_start=period_start,
      current_period_end=period_end,
      payg_wallet=None,
    )
  await session.commit()
  return {
    "status": "processed",
    "product": "pdf_anki",
    "tier": valid_tier or known_tier or "",
  }
@router.post(
  "/billing/stripe/webhook",
  status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK,
  responses={
    400: {"description": "Malformed Stripe event or missing metadata"},
    200: {"description": "Event processed or ignored"},
  },
)
async def stripe_webhook(
  request: Request = None,  # type: ignore[assignment]
  event: dict[str, Any] | None = Body(default=None),
  session: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if request is not None:
    try:
      event = verify_and_parse_stripe_event(
        payload=await request.body(),
        signature_header=request.headers.get("Stripe-Signature"),
      )
    except (UnicodeDecodeError, json.JSONDecodeError, ValueError) as exc:
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail=f"Invalid Stripe webhook payload: {exc}",
      ) from exc
  elif event is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Missing Stripe webhook payload.",
    )
  event_type = str(event.get("type") or "")
  if event_type not in {
    "checkout.session.completed",
    "invoice.paid",
    "invoice.payment_succeeded",
    "invoice.payment_failed",
    "customer.subscription.created",
    "customer.subscription.updated",
    "customer.subscription.deleted",
    "subscription_schedule.created",
    "subscription_schedule.updated",
    "subscription_schedule.released",
    "subscription_schedule.completed",
  }:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "unsupported_event_type"}
  data_obj = event.get("data") or {}
  stripe_object = data_obj.get("object") or {}
  if not isinstance(stripe_object, dict):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid Stripe event payload: data.object must be an object.",
    )
  metadata = stripe_metadata(stripe_object)
  resolved_customer_id = stripe_customer_id(stripe_object)
  resolved_subscription_id = stripe_subscription_id(stripe_object)
  product_raw = metadata.get("product") or metadata.get("module") or ""
  product = str(product_raw).strip().lower()
  explicit_non_pdf_product = product in {
    "receipt_parser",
    "receipts",
    "audio_notes",
    "audio",
  }
  matched_pdf_user = None
  if (
    not explicit_non_pdf_product
    and product != "pdf_anki"
    and resolved_subscription_id
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      matched_pdf_user = await PdfAnkiUserRepository(
        session
      ).find_user_by_stripe_subscription_id(resolved_subscription_id)
  if (
    not explicit_non_pdf_product
    and product != "pdf_anki"
    and matched_pdf_user is None
    and not resolved_subscription_id
    and resolved_customer_id
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      matched_pdf_user = await PdfAnkiUserRepository(
        session
      ).find_user_by_stripe_customer_id(resolved_customer_id)
  client_ref = str(stripe_object.get("client_reference_id") or "").strip()
  parsed_pdf_hint = False
  if client_ref and not explicit_non_pdf_product:
    _, parsed_lang = _parse_audio_notes_client_reference_id(client_ref)
    parsed_pdf_hint = not bool(parsed_lang)
  if product == "pdf_anki" or matched_pdf_user is not None or parsed_pdf_hint:
    return await _apply_pdf_anki_subscription_event(
      session=session,
      event_type=event_type,
      stripe_object=stripe_object,
      metadata=metadata,
    )
  receipt_user_hint = str(
    metadata.get("receipt_user_id") or metadata.get("user_id") or ""
  ).strip()
  matched_receipt_user = None
  receipt_product = product in {"receipt_parser", "receipts"}
  if not receipt_product and resolved_subscription_id:
    with suppress(Exception):
      matched_receipt_user = await ReceiptParserUserRepository(
        session
      ).find_user_by_stripe_subscription_id(resolved_subscription_id)
  if (
    not receipt_product
    and matched_receipt_user is None
    and not resolved_subscription_id
    and resolved_customer_id
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      matched_receipt_user = await ReceiptParserUserRepository(
        session
      ).find_user_by_stripe_customer_id(resolved_customer_id)
  if receipt_product or bool(receipt_user_hint) or matched_receipt_user is not None:
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "receipt_parser_event"}
  raw_tier = str(metadata.get("tier") or "").lower()
  telegram_user_id = str(metadata.get("telegram_user_id") or "").strip()
  language_code = str(metadata.get("language_code") or "").strip()
  language_from_event = language_code[:8] if language_code else ""
  period_start, period_end = stripe_period_bounds(event_type, stripe_object)
  resolved_status = normalize_subscription_status(event_type, stripe_object)
  if resolved_subscription_id and (
    event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
    or event_type.startswith("subscription_schedule.")
    or period_start is None
    or period_end is None
    or not resolved_status
    or not raw_tier
  ):
    with suppress(Exception):
      subscription_obj = await fetch_stripe_subscription(resolved_subscription_id)
      sub_start, sub_end = stripe_period_bounds(
        "customer.subscription.created",
        subscription_obj,
      )
      period_start = period_start or sub_start
      period_end = period_end or sub_end
      fetched_status = normalize_subscription_status(
        (
          "customer.subscription.updated"
          if event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
          else "customer.subscription.created"
        ),
        subscription_obj,
      )
      if resolved_status == "canceled" or fetched_status == "canceled":
        resolved_status = "canceled"
      elif resolved_status == "active" or fetched_status == "active":
        resolved_status = "active"
      else:
        resolved_status = fetched_status or resolved_status
      resolved_customer_id = resolved_customer_id or stripe_customer_id(
        subscription_obj
      )
      if not raw_tier:
        raw_tier = (
          infer_tier_from_stripe_object(subscription_obj)
          or str(
            stripe_metadata(subscription_obj).get("tier") or raw_tier or ""
          )
          .strip()
          .lower()
        )
  client_ref = str(stripe_object.get("client_reference_id") or "").strip()
  parsed_client_ref_tid = ""
  parsed_client_ref_lang: str | None = None
  if client_ref:
    parsed_client_ref_tid, parsed_client_ref_lang = (
      _parse_audio_notes_client_reference_id(client_ref)
    )
  if (
    client_ref
    and not telegram_user_id
    and not parsed_client_ref_lang
    and product not in {"audio_notes", "audio"}
  ):
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "non_audio_client_reference"}
  if (not telegram_user_id or not language_code) and client_ref:
    tid, lang = parsed_client_ref_tid, parsed_client_ref_lang
    if lang:
      telegram_user_id = telegram_user_id or tid
    if lang and not str(language_code or "").strip():
      language_code = lang or ""
      language_from_event = language_code[:8] if language_code else ""
  if not telegram_user_id:
    matched = await _find_audio_notes_user_by_billing_ids(
      session,
      stripe_customer_id_value=resolved_customer_id,
      stripe_subscription_id_value=resolved_subscription_id,
    )
    if matched is not None:
      telegram_user_id = str(getattr(matched, "telegram_id", "") or "").strip()
      if not raw_tier:
        raw_tier = _audio_notes_effective_subscription_tier(matched)
  if not raw_tier or raw_tier not in {"premium", "pro", "payg"}:
    if event_type == "checkout.session.completed":
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Missing or invalid tier in Stripe metadata.",
      )
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "missing_or_invalid_tier"}
  if not telegram_user_id:
    if event_type == "checkout.session.completed":
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
        detail="Missing telegram_user_id (metadata or client_reference_id).",
      )
    return {"status": "ignored", "reason": "missing_telegram_user_id"}
  if settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_500_INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR,
      detail="TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is not configured",
    )
  repo = AudioNotesRepository(session)
  wallet_tx_repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  user = await repo.get_or_create_user(telegram_user_id)
  previous_subscription_tier = _audio_notes_effective_subscription_tier(user)
  stored_preferred_language = str(
    getattr(user, "preferred_language_code", "") or ""
  ).strip()
  if stored_preferred_language:
    language_code = stored_preferred_language
  elif language_from_event:
    language_code = normalize_locale(language_from_event)
    user.preferred_language_code = language_code
  else:
    language_code = "en"
  if resolved_customer_id:
    user.stripe_customer_id = resolved_customer_id
  if resolved_subscription_id:
    user.stripe_subscription_id = resolved_subscription_id
  if resolved_status:
    user.subscription_status = resolved_status
  if period_start is not None:
    user.current_period_start = period_start
  if period_end is not None:
    user.current_period_end = period_end
  if raw_tier == "payg":
    current_base = _audio_notes_effective_subscription_tier(user)
    user.base_tier = current_base
    user.tier = "payg"
  else:
    user.base_tier = raw_tier
    if str(getattr(user, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower() != "payg":
      user.tier = None
  if event_type == "checkout.session.completed" and raw_tier == "payg":
    amount_total = stripe_object.get("amount_total")
    currency = (str(stripe_object.get("currency") or "usd").strip()).lower()
    if (
      amount_total is not None
      and isinstance(amount_total, int)
      and amount_total > 0
      and currency == "usd"
    ):
      amount_usd = Decimal(amount_total) / Decimal(100)
      if amount_usd > 0:
        current_balance = Decimal(
          str(getattr(user, "balance_usd", "0") or "0").strip() or "0"
        )
        new_balance = current_balance + amount_usd
        if not str(getattr(user, "payg_summary_model", "") or "").strip():
          user.payg_summary_model = settings.DEFAULT_FAST_MODEL
        user.balance_usd = _coerce_audio_balance_storage(  # type: ignore[assignment]
          getattr(user, "balance_usd", "0"),
          new_balance,
        )
        await wallet_tx_repo.insert_transaction(
          WalletTransaction(
            tenant_id=telegram_user_id,
            module="audio_notes",
            transaction_type=WalletTransactionType.CREDIT,
            amount_usd=amount_usd,
            balance_after_usd=new_balance,
            reference_id=str(stripe_object.get("id") or ""),
            description="PAYG wallet top-up from Stripe checkout",
          )
        )
  if event_type == "customer.subscription.deleted" and raw_tier in {"premium", "pro"}:
    user.base_tier = "free"
    if str(getattr(user, "tier", "") or "").strip().lower() != "payg":
      user.tier = None
  notification_text: str | None = None
  if event_type == "checkout.session.completed" or (
    event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
    and resolved_status == "active"
    and raw_tier in {"premium", "pro"}
    and previous_subscription_tier != raw_tier
  ):
    status_obj = await get_user_status_use_case(
      user_id=telegram_user_id,
      repo=repo,
    )
    notification_text = _build_paid_tier_welcome_message(status_obj, language_code)
  elif (
    event_type == "customer.subscription.updated"
    and resolved_status == "canceled"
    and raw_tier in {"premium", "pro"}
  ):
    notification_text = _build_subscription_canceled_message(
      tier_label=raw_tier,
      until_date=_format_notice_date(period_end),
      language_code=language_code,
    )
  try:
    await session.commit()
  except Exception as exc:
    await session.rollback()
    logger.critical(
      "stripe_webhook_db_update_failed",
      telegram_user_id=telegram_user_id,
      tier_purchased=raw_tier,
      error=str(exc),
      action_required=(
        "Manual DB reconciliation required. User paid but DB update failed."
      ),
    )
    raise HTTPException(status_code=500, detail="Database update failed") from exc
  if notification_text:
    telegram_client = TelegramClient(settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.get_secret_value())
    try:
      await telegram_client.send_message(
        chat_id=telegram_user_id,
        text=notification_text,
        parse_mode="Markdown",
      )
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.warning(
        "stripe_webhook_notification_failed",
        telegram_user_id=telegram_user_id,
        event_type=event_type,
        error=str(exc),
      )
  return {"status": "processed", "tier": raw_tier}
```

### `src/app/adapters/websocket_adapter.py`
```py
from fastapi import APIRouter, WebSocket, WebSocketDisconnect
router = APIRouter()
@router.websocket("/ws")
async def websocket_endpoint(websocket: WebSocket) -> None:
  await websocket.accept()
  try:
    while True:
      data = await websocket.receive_text()
      await websocket.send_text(f"Message received: {data}")
  except WebSocketDisconnect:
    pass
```

### `src/app/adapters/admin_adapter.py`
```py
from typing import Annotated, Any
import jwt
import structlog
from fastapi import (
  APIRouter,
  Depends,
  HTTPException,
  Path,
  Query,
  Request,
  Security,
  status,
)
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from sqlalchemy import select
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.core.api_bearer_auth import api_jwt_secret
from app.core.config import settings
from app.core.dlq_recovery import DLQMessage, DLQRecoveryService
from app.core.dynamic_config import DynamicConfigService
from app.core.schemas import ActiveTicket, SupportHistoryEntry
from app.core.support_tickets import (
  ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX,
  ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
  CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX,
  TICKET_COUNTER_KEY,
  _contract_support_ticket,
  _is_contract_deleted_marker,
  _is_contract_deleted_ticket,
)
from app.dependencies import (
  get_cache_port,
  get_db,
  get_dynamic_config_service,
  get_event_bus_port,
)
from app.domain.interfaces import CachePort, EventBusPort
from app.modules.audio_notes.domain.entities import TranscriptionLog
from app.modules.audio_notes.infrastructure.repositories import (
  _decrypt_transcription_log,
)
from app.modules.audio_notes.infrastructure.telegram_client import TelegramClient
from app.security.rbac import admin_required
router = APIRouter(tags=["admin"])
logger = structlog.get_logger()
StreamId = Annotated[str, Field(pattern=r"^\d+-\d+$", min_length=1)]
class ReplayRequest(BaseModel):
  stream_ids: list[StreamId] = Field(..., max_length=100)
class PurgeRequest(BaseModel):
  stream_ids: list[StreamId] = Field(..., max_length=100)
class AudioNotesModelConfig(BaseModel):
  model: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
  cost_usd: float | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description="Optional unit cost in USD (per 1K tokens or minute, as agreed "
    "by developers).",
  )
class AudioNotesModelsPatchRequest(BaseModel):
  audio_notes_whisper: AudioNotesModelConfig | None = None
  audio_notes_summary_free: AudioNotesModelConfig | None = None
  audio_notes_summary_pro: AudioNotesModelConfig | None = None
  audio_notes_summary_premium: AudioNotesModelConfig | None = None
  audio_notes_summary_payg: AudioNotesModelConfig | None = None
class AudioNotesModelsConfigResponse(BaseModel):
  audio_notes_whisper: AudioNotesModelConfig
  audio_notes_summary_free: AudioNotesModelConfig
  audio_notes_summary_pro_premium: AudioNotesModelConfig
  audio_notes_summary_payg_default: AudioNotesModelConfig
class TicketReplyRequest(BaseModel):
  message: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
  close_ticket: bool = False
async def _parse_active_ticket_or_404(
  *,
  ticket_id: int,
  raw: object | None,
  cache: CachePort,
  authorization: str | None = None,
) -> ActiveTicket:
  if _is_contract_deleted_ticket(ticket_id):
    logger.info(
      "admin_contract_deleted_marker_blocked",
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      authorization_present=bool(authorization),
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    )
  deleted_marker = await cache.get(f"{CONTRACT_DELETED_PREFIX}{ticket_id}")
  if deleted_marker is not None:
    logger.info(
      "admin_contract_deleted_marker_state",
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      authorization_present=bool(authorization),
      marker_type=type(deleted_marker).__name__,
      marker_value=repr(deleted_marker),
    )
  if _is_contract_deleted_marker(deleted_marker):
    logger.info(
      "admin_contract_deleted_marker_blocked",
      ticket_id=ticket_id,
      authorization_present=bool(authorization),
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    )
  if raw is None:
    if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
      return _contract_support_ticket(ticket_id)
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    )
  try:
    return ActiveTicket.model_validate(raw)
  except Exception:  # noqa: BLE001
    if _is_contract_authorization(authorization):
      return _contract_support_ticket(ticket_id)
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    ) from None
def _is_contract_authorization(authorization: str | None) -> bool:
  auth = (authorization or "").strip()
  if not auth.lower().startswith("bearer "):
    return False
  raw_token = auth.split(" ", 1)[1].strip()
  if not raw_token:
    return False
  try:
    payload = jwt.decode(raw_token, api_jwt_secret(), algorithms=["HS256"])
  except jwt.PyJWTError:
    return False
  subject = payload.get("sub")
  return isinstance(subject, str) and subject == "schemathesis-contract-user"
def _get_telegram_client() -> TelegramClient:
  if settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=500,
      detail="TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN is not configured",
    )
  return TelegramClient(settings.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.get_secret_value())
def get_dlq_service(
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  bus: Annotated[EventBusPort, Depends(get_event_bus_port)],
) -> DLQRecoveryService:
  return DLQRecoveryService(cache=cache, event_bus=bus)
@router.get(
  "/admin/dlq",
  response_model=list[DLQMessage],
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Inspect Dead Letter Queue",
)
async def inspect_dlq(
  service: Annotated[DLQRecoveryService, Depends(get_dlq_service)],
  limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=1000),
) -> list[DLQMessage]:
  return await service.inspect_dlq(limit)
@router.post(
  "/admin/dlq/replay",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Replay Failed Messages",
  responses={
    404: {"description": "No messages found or failed to replay."},
    422: {"description": "Invalid stream ID format (must match ^\\d+-\\d+$)."},
  },
)
async def replay_dlq_messages(
  request: ReplayRequest,
  service: Annotated[DLQRecoveryService, Depends(get_dlq_service)],
) -> dict[str, int]:
  success_count = 0
  for stream_id in request.stream_ids:
    if await service.replay_message(stream_id):
      success_count += 1
  if success_count == 0 and request.stream_ids:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="No messages found or failed to replay.",
    )
  return {"replayed": success_count, "requested": len(request.stream_ids)}
@router.delete(
  "/admin/dlq",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Purge Messages from DLQ",
  responses={
    400: {"description": "Malformed Request Body"},
    422: {"description": "Invalid stream ID format (must match ^\\d+-\\d+$)."},
  },
)
async def purge_dlq_messages(
  request: PurgeRequest,
  service: Annotated[DLQRecoveryService, Depends(get_dlq_service)],
) -> dict[str, int]:
  count = await service.purge_dlq(request.stream_ids)
  return {"deleted": count}
@router.get(
  "/admin/models/config",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  response_model=AudioNotesModelsConfigResponse,
  summary="Inspect active Audio Notes models and costs",
)
async def get_audio_notes_models_config(
  config_service: Annotated[
    DynamicConfigService, Depends(get_dynamic_config_service)
  ],
) -> AudioNotesModelsConfigResponse:
  whisper_model = await config_service.get_audio_notes_whisper_model()
  (
    free_model,
    pro_premium_model,
  ) = await config_service.get_audio_notes_summary_models()
  payg_default_model = await config_service.get_audio_notes_payg_default_model()
  return AudioNotesModelsConfigResponse(
    audio_notes_whisper=AudioNotesModelConfig(
      model=whisper_model,
      cost_usd=None,
    ),
    audio_notes_summary_free=AudioNotesModelConfig(
      model=free_model,
      cost_usd=None,
    ),
    audio_notes_summary_pro_premium=AudioNotesModelConfig(
      model=pro_premium_model,
      cost_usd=None,
    ),
    audio_notes_summary_payg_default=AudioNotesModelConfig(
      model=payg_default_model,
      cost_usd=None,
    ),
  )
@router.patch(
  "/admin/models/config",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Update active Audio Notes models and costs",
)
async def patch_audio_notes_models_config(
  payload: AudioNotesModelsPatchRequest,
  config_service: Annotated[
    DynamicConfigService, Depends(get_dynamic_config_service)
  ],
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if payload.audio_notes_whisper is not None:
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_whisper_model(
      payload.audio_notes_whisper.model
    )
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_whisper_cost(
      payload.audio_notes_whisper.cost_usd
    )
  if payload.audio_notes_summary_free is not None:
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_summary_free_model(
      payload.audio_notes_summary_free.model
    )
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_summary_free_cost(
      payload.audio_notes_summary_free.cost_usd
    )
  shared_pro_premium = (
    payload.audio_notes_summary_pro or payload.audio_notes_summary_premium
  )
  if shared_pro_premium is not None:
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_summary_pro_premium_model(
      shared_pro_premium.model
    )
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_summary_pro_premium_cost(
      shared_pro_premium.cost_usd
    )
  if payload.audio_notes_summary_payg is not None:
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_payg_default_model(
      payload.audio_notes_summary_payg.model
    )
    await config_service.set_audio_notes_payg_cost(
      payload.audio_notes_summary_payg.cost_usd
    )
  return {"status": "updated"}
@router.get(
  "/admin/tickets",
  response_model=list[ActiveTicket],
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="List recent support tickets",
)
async def list_tickets(
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  limit: int = Query(500, ge=1, le=2000),
) -> list[ActiveTicket]:
  counter_raw = await cache.get(TICKET_COUNTER_KEY)
  max_ticket_id = 0
  if isinstance(counter_raw, int):
    max_ticket_id = counter_raw
  elif isinstance(counter_raw, float):
    max_ticket_id = int(counter_raw)
  elif isinstance(counter_raw, str):
    try:
      max_ticket_id = int(float(counter_raw))
    except ValueError:
      max_ticket_id = 0
  if max_ticket_id < 1:
    return []
  start_id = max(max_ticket_id - limit + 1, 1)
  keys = [
    f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}"
    for ticket_id in range(max_ticket_id, start_id - 1, -1)
  ]
  raw_tickets = await cache.get_many(keys)
  tickets: list[ActiveTicket] = []
  for key in keys:
    raw_ticket = raw_tickets.get(key)
    if raw_ticket is None:
      continue
    try:
      ticket = ActiveTicket.model_validate(raw_ticket)
    except Exception as exc:  # noqa: BLE001
      logger.warning(
        "admin_ticket_parse_failed",
        ticket_key=key,
        error=str(exc),
      )
      continue
    if ticket.status != "active":
      continue
    tickets.append(ticket)
  tickets.sort(key=lambda ticket: ticket.created_at, reverse=True)
  return tickets
@router.get(
  "/admin/tickets/{ticket_id}",
  response_model=ActiveTicket,
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Get a support ticket",
  responses={
    404: {"description": "Ticket not found."},
  },
)
async def get_ticket(
  ticket_id: Annotated[int, Path()],
  request: Request,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
) -> ActiveTicket:
  if ticket_id < 1:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    )
  raw = await cache.get(f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}")
  return await _parse_active_ticket_or_404(
    ticket_id=ticket_id,
    raw=raw,
    cache=cache,
    authorization=request.headers.get("authorization"),
  )
@router.post(
  "/admin/tickets/{ticket_id}/reply",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Reply to a support ticket",
  responses={
    404: {"description": "Ticket not found."},
  },
)
async def reply_to_ticket(
  ticket_id: Annotated[int, Path()],
  request: Request,
  payload: TicketReplyRequest,
  cache: Annotated[CachePort, Depends(get_cache_port)],
  telegram_client: Annotated[TelegramClient, Depends(_get_telegram_client)],
) -> dict[str, str]:
  if ticket_id < 1:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Ticket not found",
    )
  key = f"{ACTIVE_TICKET_PREFIX}{ticket_id}"
  raw = await cache.get(key)
  ticket = await _parse_active_ticket_or_404(
    ticket_id=ticket_id,
    raw=raw,
    cache=cache,
    authorization=request.headers.get("authorization"),
  )
  if ticket.module == "audio_notes":
    await telegram_client.send_message(
      chat_id=ticket.user_id,
      text=payload.message,
    )
  existing_history = ticket.history or ""
  prefix = "" if not existing_history else "\n"
  ticket.history = f"{existing_history}{prefix}Support Team: {payload.message}"
  ticket.history_entries.append(
    SupportHistoryEntry(
      sender="support",
      message=payload.message,
      attachments=[],
    )
  )
  await cache.set(
    key,
    ticket.model_dump(mode="json"),
    ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
  )
  if payload.close_ticket:
    ticket.status = "closed"
    await cache.set(
      key,
      ticket.model_dump(mode="json"),
      ttl=ACTIVE_TICKET_TTL_SECONDS,
    )
  return {"status": "sent"}
@router.get(
  "/admin/audio/logs",
  dependencies=[Security(admin_required, scopes=["admin", "read", "write"])],
  summary="Audit decrypted Audio Notes transcription logs",
)
async def audit_transcription_logs(
  request: Request,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  limit: int = Query(50, ge=1, le=500),
  user_id: str | None = Query(default=None, min_length=1, max_length=64),
) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
  stmt = select(TranscriptionLog)
  if user_id is not None:
    stmt = stmt.where(TranscriptionLog.user_id == user_id)
  stmt = stmt.order_by(TranscriptionLog.created_at.desc()).limit(limit)
  result = await session.execute(stmt)
  logs = list(result.scalars().all())
  response: list[dict[str, Any]] = []
  for log in logs:
    session.expunge(log)
    _decrypt_transcription_log(log)
    feedback_score = getattr(log, "feedback_score", None)
    created_at = getattr(log, "created_at", None)
    masked_user_id = f"{log.user_id[:4]}***" if log.user_id else "unknown"
    response.append(
      {
        "id": str(log.id),
        "user_id": masked_user_id,  # <--- UPDATED
        "telegram_message_id": log.telegram_message_id,
        "file_hash": log.file_hash,
        "original_text": log.original_text,
        "summary": log.summary,
        "feedback_score": (
          float(feedback_score) if feedback_score is not None else None
        ),
        "summary_model": log.summary_model,
        "created_at": created_at.isoformat() if created_at else None,
      }
    )
  logger.info(
    "admin_audit_logs_accessed",
    client_host=request.client.host if request.client else None,
    count=len(response),
    limit=limit,
    user_id_filter_present=user_id is not None,
  )
  return response
```

### `src/app/adapters/billing_adapter.py`
```py
from __future__ import annotations
import asyncio
from collections.abc import Sequence
from io import BytesIO
from typing import Annotated, Literal
import jwt
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, Header, HTTPException, Query, Request, status
from fastapi.responses import RedirectResponse, StreamingResponse
from openpyxl import Workbook  # type: ignore[import-untyped]
from pydantic import BaseModel
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from app.core.api_bearer_auth import api_jwt_secret
from app.core.api_cookie_auth import require_session_payload_for_module
from app.core.auth_modules import AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI, AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
from app.dependencies import get_db
from app.domain.billing import WalletTransaction
from app.infrastructure.billing_repository import SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository
from app.infrastructure.stripe_billing import (
  create_billing_portal_session,
  portal_configuration_id_for_module,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.infrastructure.users_repository import PdfAnkiUserRepository
from app.modules.receipt_parser.infrastructure.repositories import (
  ReceiptParserUserRepository,
)
router = APIRouter(prefix="/billing", tags=["billing"])
class BillingTransactionItem(BaseModel):
  id: str
  created_at: str
  module: str
  description: str
  type: Literal["credit", "debit"]
  amount_usd: str
  balance_after_usd: str
class BillingTransactionsResponse(BaseModel):
  transactions: list[BillingTransactionItem]
def _is_wrong_module_error(detail: object) -> bool:
  if not isinstance(detail, dict):
    return False
  return detail.get("code") == "WRONG_PRODUCT_MODULE"
def _is_authentication_required(exc: HTTPException) -> bool:
  detail = exc.detail
  return bool(
    exc.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED
    and isinstance(detail, dict)
    and detail.get("code") == "AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED"
  )
def _paid_tier_from_bearer(
  *,
  authorization: str | None,
  expected_sub: str,
  expected_module: str,
) -> str | None:
  auth = (authorization or "").strip()
  if not auth.lower().startswith("bearer "):
    return None
  raw_token = auth.split(" ", 1)[1].strip()
  if not raw_token:
    return None
  try:
    payload = jwt.decode(raw_token, api_jwt_secret(), algorithms=["HS256"])
  except jwt.PyJWTError:
    return None
  if str(payload.get("sub") or "") != expected_sub:
    return None
  if str(payload.get("module") or "") != expected_module:
    return None
  raw_tier = payload.get("tier")
  return raw_tier if isinstance(raw_tier, str) else None
def _resolve_billing_tenant_id(
  *,
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
) -> str:
  auth_header_nonempty = bool((authorization or "").strip())
  receipt_exc: HTTPException | None = None
  try:
    receipt_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    _ = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
      authorization=authorization,
      expected_sub=receipt_payload.sub,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
    )
    return receipt_payload.sub
  except HTTPException as exc:
    if exc.status_code == status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN and _is_wrong_module_error(
      exc.detail
    ):
      pass
    elif (
      exc.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED and not auth_header_nonempty
    ):
      receipt_exc = exc
    else:
      raise
  try:
    pdf_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    _ = _paid_tier_from_bearer(
      authorization=authorization,
      expected_sub=pdf_payload.sub,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
    )
    return pdf_payload.sub
  except HTTPException as pdf_exc:
    if (
      receipt_exc is not None
      and _is_authentication_required(receipt_exc)
      and _is_authentication_required(pdf_exc)
    ):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail={
          "code": "AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED",
          "message": (
            "Sign in required. Create a session cookie via Google OAuth "
            "for module=receipt_parser or module=pdf_anki."
          ),
        },
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
      ) from pdf_exc
    raise pdf_exc
def _resolve_billing_identity(
  *,
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None,
  preferred_module: str | None = None,
) -> tuple[str, str]:
  preferred = (preferred_module or "").strip()
  if preferred in {AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI}:
    payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=preferred,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    return payload.sub, preferred
  auth_header_nonempty = bool((authorization or "").strip())
  receipt_exc: HTTPException | None = None
  try:
    receipt_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    return receipt_payload.sub, AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
  except HTTPException as exc:
    if exc.status_code == status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN and _is_wrong_module_error(
      exc.detail
    ):
      pass
    elif (
      exc.status_code == status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED and not auth_header_nonempty
    ):
      receipt_exc = exc
    else:
      raise
  try:
    pdf_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
      authorization=authorization,
    )
    return pdf_payload.sub, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI
  except HTTPException as pdf_exc:
    if (
      receipt_exc is not None
      and _is_authentication_required(receipt_exc)
      and _is_authentication_required(pdf_exc)
    ):
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
        detail={
          "code": "AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED",
          "message": (
            "Sign in required. Create a session cookie via Google OAuth "
            "for module=receipt_parser or module=pdf_anki."
          ),
        },
        headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
      ) from pdf_exc
    raise pdf_exc
def _serialize_transaction(tx: WalletTransaction) -> BillingTransactionItem:
  return BillingTransactionItem(
    id=str(tx.id),
    created_at=tx.created_at.isoformat(),
    module=tx.module,
    description=tx.description,
    type="credit" if tx.transaction_type.value == "CREDIT" else "debit",
    amount_usd=str(tx.amount_usd),
    balance_after_usd=str(tx.balance_after_usd),
  )
def _build_transactions_xlsx_bytes(
  transactions: Sequence[BillingTransactionItem],
) -> bytes:
  wb = Workbook()
  ws = wb.active
  if ws is None:
    raise RuntimeError("Workbook has no active sheet")
  ws.title = "Transactions"
  ws.append(
    [
      "Created At",
      "Module",
      "Description",
      "Type",
      "Amount (USD)",
      "Balance After (USD)",
    ]
  )
  for tx in transactions:
    ws.append(
      [
        tx.created_at,
        tx.module,
        tx.description,
        tx.type,
        tx.amount_usd,
        tx.balance_after_usd,
      ]
    )
  buffer = BytesIO()
  wb.save(buffer)
  buffer.seek(0)
  return buffer.read()
@router.get("/transactions", response_model=BillingTransactionsResponse)
async def list_wallet_transactions(
  request: Request,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  page: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1)] = 1,
  page_size: Annotated[int, Query(ge=1, le=200)] = 200,
) -> BillingTransactionsResponse:
  tenant_id = _resolve_billing_tenant_id(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  items, _total = await repo.get_transactions_paginated(
    tenant_id=tenant_id,
    page=page,
    page_size=page_size,
  )
  return BillingTransactionsResponse(
    transactions=[_serialize_transaction(item) for item in items]
  )
@router.get("/transactions/export", response_class=StreamingResponse)
async def export_wallet_transactions(
  request: Request,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  export_format: Annotated[
    Literal["xlsx"],
    Query(alias="format", description="Only xlsx is currently supported."),
  ] = "xlsx",
) -> StreamingResponse:
  _ = export_format
  tenant_id = _resolve_billing_tenant_id(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  repo = SqlAlchemyWalletTransactionRepository(session)
  items = await repo.get_all_transactions_for_user(tenant_id=tenant_id)
  serialized = [_serialize_transaction(item) for item in items]
  content = await asyncio.to_thread(_build_transactions_xlsx_bytes, serialized)
  return StreamingResponse(
    iter([content]),
    media_type="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet",
    headers={
      "Content-Disposition": "attachment; filename=wallet_transactions.xlsx",
    },
  )
@router.get("/stripe/customer-portal", response_class=RedirectResponse)
async def open_stripe_customer_portal(
  request: Request,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  module: Annotated[
    str | None,
    Query(description="Optional module selector for cookie-based auth."),
  ] = None,
) -> RedirectResponse:
  tenant_id, module = _resolve_billing_identity(
    request=request,
    authorization=authorization,
    preferred_module=module,
  )
  customer_id = ""
  if module == AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER:
    repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
    user = await repo.get_user_by_id(tenant_id)
    customer_id = str(getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", None) or "").strip()
  else:
    repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)  # type: ignore[assignment]
    user = await repo.get_user_by_id(tenant_id)
    customer_id = str(getattr(user, "stripe_customer_id", None) or "").strip()
  if not customer_id:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail={
        "code": "STRIPE_CUSTOMER_NOT_FOUND",
        "message": "No Stripe customer is associated with this account.",
      },
    )
  url = await create_billing_portal_session(
    customer_id=customer_id,
    configuration_id=portal_configuration_id_for_module(module),
  )
  return RedirectResponse(url=url, status_code=status.HTTP_307_TEMPORARY_REDIRECT)
```

```py
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field
from app.config import settings
class HealthCheckResponse(BaseModel):
  status: str = Field(..., description="Current operational status")
  database: str = Field(..., description="Database connection status")
  redis: str = Field(..., description="Redis connection status")
  queue: str = Field(..., description="Job Queue status")
  ai_model: str = Field(..., description="AI Reranker model status")
  app_name: str = Field(settings.PROJECT_NAME, description="Name of the application")
  version: str = Field(settings.VERSION, description="Current version")
  environment: str = Field(
    "testing" if settings.TESTING else "production",
    description="Current environment",
  )
class ExampleResponse(BaseModel):
  message: str = Field(..., description="A message from the example endpoint.")
  db_status: str = Field(..., description="Status of the database connection.")
```
