```py
from __future__ import annotations
import base64
import contextlib
import hashlib
import secrets
import time
from datetime import datetime
from decimal import Decimal, InvalidOperation
from typing import Annotated, Final, TypedDict, cast
from urllib.parse import quote, urlencode
import httpx
import jwt
import structlog
from fastapi import (
  APIRouter,
  Depends,
  Header,
  HTTPException,
  Query,
  Request,
  Response,
  status,
)
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse, RedirectResponse
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ValidationError
from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession
from tenacity import (
  retry,
  retry_if_exception_type,
  stop_after_attempt,
  wait_exponential,
)
from app.config import settings
from app.core.api_cookie_auth import (
  mint_refresh_jwt_payload,
  refresh_cookie_name,
  require_session_payload_for_module,
  set_module_refresh_cookie,
)
from app.core.auth_modules import AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI, AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
from app.infrastructure.database import get_db
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.entities import PdfAnkiUser
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.parsing_pipeline_public import (
  build_pdf_anki_parsing_me_fields,
  resolve_payg_unified_pdf_model_id,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.domain.storage_quotas import (
  effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.infrastructure.storage_counts_repository import (
  PdfAnkiStorageCountsRepository,
)
from app.modules.pdf_anki.infrastructure.users_repository import (
  PdfAnkiUserRepository,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.application.parsing_me_public import (
  _resolve_receipt_parser_payg_llm_model_id,
  build_receipt_parser_parsing_me_fields,
)
from app.modules.receipt_parser.infrastructure.repositories import (
  ReceiptParserUserRepository,
)
router = APIRouter(prefix="/auth", tags=["auth"])
logger = structlog.get_logger()
_TOKEN_TYPE_BEARER: Final[str] = "bearer"  # noqa: S105
_GOOGLE_OAUTH_SCOPES: Final[str] = "openid email profile"
class AuthProvidersResponse(BaseModel):
  google: str | None
  google_receipt_parser: str | None = None
  google_pdf_anki: str | None = None
class GoogleCallbackResponse(BaseModel):
  access_token: str
  token_type: str
  user_id: str
  email: str | None = None
  display_name: str | None = None
  avatar_url: str | None = None
  tier: str
  module: str
  expires_in: int
class GoogleOAuthTokenResponse(BaseModel):
  access_token: str
class GoogleUserInfoResponse(BaseModel):
  sub: str
  email: str | None = None
  name: str | None = None
  picture: str | None = None
class ApiJwtPayload(BaseModel):
  sub: str
  email: str | None = None
  provider: str | None = None
  tier: str | None = None
  module: str | None = None
  iat: int
  exp: int
class AuthMeResponse(BaseModel):
  user_id: str
  email: str | None = None
  provider: str | None = None
  tier: str | None = None
  module: str | None = None
  display_name: str | None = None
  avatar_url: str | None = None
  balance_usd: str | None = None
  auth_provider: str | None = None
  stripe_subscription_id: str | None = None
  stripe_customer_id: str | None = None
  subscription_status: str | None = None
  pdf_anki_flashcards_stored: int | None = Field(
    default=None,
    ge=0,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki flashcards persisted for this user (FIFO storage). "
      "Populated for module pdf_anki."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_max_flashcards: int | None = Field(
    default=None,
    ge=1,
    description=(
      "Effective flashcard storage cap (tier, grace, PAYG base storage, "
      "admin=Pro). Send with pdf_anki_max_decks for pdf_anki."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_max_decks: int | None = Field(
    default=None,
    ge=1,
    description=(
      "Effective deck storage cap. Send with pdf_anki_max_flashcards "
      "for pdf_anki."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_pdf_text_extractor: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: third-party text extract (e.g. LlamaParse). Null when "
      "the PDF is processed in one multimodal LLM call (premium/pro/wallet)."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_id: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: effective LiteLLM-style model id used to generate "
      "flashcards for this tier."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_options: list[str] | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: when set, user-selectable unified PDF models "
      "(``pdf_anki_users.payg`` wallet unlock; premium/pro use this when "
      "they also have the wallet flag). "
      "``pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_id`` mirrors ``active_unified_pdf_model``."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_parse_pipeline_kind: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: llamaparse_then_llm (free/admin) or unified_multimodal "
      "(premium/pro or wallet unlock)."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_tier_included_unified_model_id: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: LiteLLM model id included with premium/pro. With wallet "
      "unlock, selecting this model avoids ``balance_usd`` charges."
    ),
  )
  pdf_anki_payg: bool | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "PDF-Anki: True after at least one balance top-up (Stripe); enables "
      "the unified-model selector. NULL if unset."
    ),
  )
  receipt_parser_llm_model_id: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Receipt Parser: effective LiteLLM-style model id used to extract "
      "structured receipt JSON for this tier (matches worker routing)."
    ),
  )
  receipt_parser_parse_pipeline_kind: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Receipt Parser: short pipeline key for UI "
      "(e.g. llamaparse_then_llm vs unified_multimodal)."
    ),
  )
  receipt_parser_llm_model_options: list[str] | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Receipt Parser: allowlisted model ids when PAYG picker is enabled; "
      "null or empty means no selector."
    ),
  )
  receipt_parser_payg: bool | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Receipt Parser: True when wallet/PAYG (Vertex path); drives balance UI."
    ),
  )
  receipt_parser_balance_usd_display: str | None = Field(
    default=None,
    description=(
      "Receipt Parser: balance formatted with two decimals (e.g. 12.34); "
      "only when ``receipt_parser_payg`` is true."
    ),
  )
class PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceBody(BaseModel):
  unified_pdf_model_id: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=256)
class PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceResponse(BaseModel):
  pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_id: str
class ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceBody(BaseModel):
  receipt_parser_llm_model_id: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=256)
class ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceResponse(BaseModel):
  receipt_parser_llm_model_id: str
class GoogleOAuthStateClaims(TypedDict):
  purpose: str
  iat: int
  code_verifier: str | None
  module: str
  pending_google_sub: str | None
def _receipt_balance_two_decimal_string(balance_plain: str | None) -> str | None:
  if balance_plain is None:
    return None
  raw = str(balance_plain).strip()
  if not raw:
    return None
  try:
    return format(Decimal(raw), "f")
  except InvalidOperation:
    return None
def _jwt_secret() -> str:
  if settings.SECRET_KEY is not None:
    return settings.SECRET_KEY.get_secret_value()
  if settings.TESTING or settings.DEBUG:
    return "unsafe-mock-secret-key-for-load-testing"
  raise HTTPException(
    status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,
    detail="SECRET_KEY is required for OAuth token issuance.",
  )
def _external_base_url(request: Request) -> str | None:
  host = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-host") or request.headers.get("host")
  if host is None:
    return None
  host = host.split(",", 1)[0].strip()
  if not host:
    return None
  proto = request.headers.get("x-forwarded-proto") or request.url.scheme
  proto_str = str(proto).split(",", 1)[0].strip()
  if not proto_str:
    return None
  return f"{proto_str}://{host}".rstrip("/")
def _get_base_url(request: Request) -> str | None:
  configured = (settings.AUTH_CALLBACK_BASE_URL or "").strip().rstrip("/")
  if configured:
    return configured
  return _external_base_url(request)
def _google_redirect_uri(base_url: str) -> str:
  return f"{base_url}{settings.API_V1_STR}/auth/callback/google"
def _oauth_success_redirect_location(
  frontend_url: str,
  *,
  access_token: str,
  token_type: str,
  expires_in: int,
  user_id: str,
  email: str | None,
  display_name: str | None,
  avatar_url: str | None,
  tier: str,
  module: str,
) -> str:
  base = frontend_url.strip().rstrip("/")
  params: dict[str, str] = {
    "access_token": access_token,
    "token_type": token_type,
    "expires_in": str(expires_in),
    "user_id": user_id,
    "tier": tier,
    "module": module,
  }
  if email:
    params["email"] = email
  if display_name:
    params["display_name"] = display_name
  if avatar_url:
    params["avatar_url"] = avatar_url
  fragment = urlencode(params, quote_via=quote)
  return f"{base}#{fragment}"
def _generate_code_verifier() -> str:
  return secrets.token_urlsafe(64)
def _code_challenge_s256(code_verifier: str) -> str:
  digest = hashlib.sha256(code_verifier.encode("utf-8")).digest()
  b64 = base64.urlsafe_b64encode(digest).decode("ascii")
  return b64.rstrip("=")
def _mint_google_oauth_state(code_verifier: str | None, module: str) -> str:
  claims: dict[str, object] = {
    "purpose": "google_oauth",
    "iat": int(time.time()),
    "code_verifier": code_verifier,
    "module": module,
  }
  return jwt.encode(claims, _jwt_secret(), algorithm="HS256")
def _require_api_jwt(authorization: str | None) -> ApiJwtPayload:
  if not authorization or not authorization.lower().startswith("bearer "):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
      detail="Missing Bearer token.",
    )
  raw = authorization.split(" ", 1)[1].strip()
  try:
    payload_raw = jwt.decode(
      raw,
      _jwt_secret(),
      algorithms=["HS256"],
    )
  except jwt.PyJWTError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
      detail="Invalid or expired token.",
    ) from exc
  return ApiJwtPayload.model_validate(payload_raw)
def _decode_google_oauth_state(state: str) -> GoogleOAuthStateClaims:
  try:
    payload_raw = cast(
      dict[str, object],
      jwt.decode(state, _jwt_secret(), algorithms=["HS256"]),
    )
  except jwt.PyJWTError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid OAuth state.",
    ) from exc
  purpose_raw = payload_raw.get("purpose")
  if purpose_raw != "google_oauth":
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid OAuth state purpose.",
    )
  code_verifier_raw = payload_raw.get("code_verifier")
  iat_raw = payload_raw.get("iat")
  iat_val = 0
  if isinstance(iat_raw, int):
    iat_val = iat_raw
  elif isinstance(iat_raw, str) and iat_raw.isdigit():
    iat_val = int(iat_raw)
  module_raw = payload_raw.get("module")
  module_val = str(module_raw) if isinstance(module_raw, str) else ""
  if not module_val.strip():
    module_val = AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
  elif module_val not in (AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Invalid OAuth state module.",
    )
  pending_raw = payload_raw.get("pending_google_sub")
  pending_google_sub: str | None = None
  if isinstance(pending_raw, str) and pending_raw.strip():
    pending_google_sub = pending_raw.strip()
  return {
    "purpose": "google_oauth",
    "iat": iat_val,
    "code_verifier": (
      str(code_verifier_raw) if isinstance(code_verifier_raw, str) else None
    ),
    "module": module_val,
    "pending_google_sub": pending_google_sub,
  }
@retry(
  stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
  wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=1, max=10),
  retry=retry_if_exception_type((httpx.TimeoutException, httpx.NetworkError)),
  reraise=True,
)
async def _http_post_form(url: str, data: dict[str, str]) -> httpx.Response:
  async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:
    return await client.post(url, data=data)
@retry(
  stop=stop_after_attempt(3),
  wait=wait_exponential(multiplier=1, min=1, max=10),
  retry=retry_if_exception_type((httpx.TimeoutException, httpx.NetworkError)),
  reraise=True,
)
async def _http_get_headers(url: str, headers: dict[str, str]) -> httpx.Response:
  async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=30.0) as client:
    return await client.get(url, headers=headers)
@router.get("/providers")
async def get_auth_providers(request: Request) -> AuthProvidersResponse:
  base_url = _get_base_url(request)
  if not base_url or not settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:
    return AuthProvidersResponse(
      google=None,
      google_receipt_parser=None,
      google_pdf_anki=None,
    )
  receipt_login = (
    f"{base_url}{settings.API_V1_STR}/auth/login/google"
    f"?module={AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER}"
  )
  pdf_login = (
    f"{base_url}{settings.API_V1_STR}/auth/login/google"
    f"?module={AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI}"
  )
  return AuthProvidersResponse(
    google=receipt_login,
    google_receipt_parser=receipt_login,
    google_pdf_anki=pdf_login,
  )
@router.get("/login/google")
async def login_google_redirect(request: Request) -> RedirectResponse:
  if not settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_501_NOT_IMPLEMENTED,
      detail="Set AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to enable Google OAuth.",
    )
  base_url = _get_base_url(request)
  if not base_url:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_501_NOT_IMPLEMENTED,
      detail=(
        "Unable to infer OAuth redirect base URL. "
        "Set AUTH_CALLBACK_BASE_URL or configure proxy headers "
        "(`X-Forwarded-Host` and `X-Forwarded-Proto`)."
      ),
    )
  module_raw = request.query_params.get("module", "").strip()
  if module_raw not in (AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI):
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail=(
        "Missing or invalid module. Use "
        f"module={AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER} or "
        f"module={AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI}."
      ),
    )
  code_verifier = _generate_code_verifier()
  code_challenge = _code_challenge_s256(code_verifier)
  state = _mint_google_oauth_state(code_verifier, module_raw)
  redirect_uri = _google_redirect_uri(base_url)
  params: dict[str, str] = {
    "client_id": settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
    "redirect_uri": redirect_uri,
    "response_type": "code",
    "scope": _GOOGLE_OAUTH_SCOPES,
    "state": state,
    "code_challenge": code_challenge,
    "code_challenge_method": "S256",
    "prompt": "consent",
  }
  url = "https://accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth?" + urlencode(params)
  return RedirectResponse(url=url, status_code=status.HTTP_302_FOUND)
@router.get("/callback/google", response_model=None)
async def google_oauth_callback(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  code: str = "",
  state: str = "",
) -> RedirectResponse | JSONResponse:
  if not settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_501_NOT_IMPLEMENTED,
      detail="Google OAuth is not configured.",
    )
  base_url = _get_base_url(request)
  if not base_url:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_501_NOT_IMPLEMENTED,
      detail=(
        "Unable to infer OAuth redirect base URL. "
        "Set AUTH_CALLBACK_BASE_URL or configure proxy headers "
        "(`X-Forwarded-Host` and `X-Forwarded-Proto`)."
      ),
    )
  claims = _decode_google_oauth_state(state)
  oauth_module = claims["module"]
  pending_in_state = claims["pending_google_sub"]
  code_verifier = claims["code_verifier"]
  if not code.strip():
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Missing authorization code.",
    )
  if code_verifier is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Missing PKCE code verifier.",
    )
  redirect_uri = _google_redirect_uri(base_url)
  token_data: dict[str, str] = {
    "code": code.strip(),
    "client_id": settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID,
    "redirect_uri": redirect_uri,
    "grant_type": "authorization_code",
    "code_verifier": code_verifier,
  }
  if settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET is not None:
    token_data["client_secret"] = (
      settings.AUTH_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.get_secret_value()
    )
  token_resp = await _http_post_form(
    "https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token",
    token_data,
  )
  if token_resp.status_code != status.HTTP_200_OK:
    logger.warning(
      "google_token_exchange_failed",
      status=token_resp.status_code,
      body=token_resp.text[:500],
    )
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_502_BAD_GATEWAY,
      detail="Google token exchange failed.",
    )
  try:
    token_payload = GoogleOAuthTokenResponse.model_validate(token_resp.json())
  except ValidationError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_502_BAD_GATEWAY,
      detail="Google token exchange response invalid.",
    ) from exc
  access_token = token_payload.access_token
  ui_resp = await _http_get_headers(
    "https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/userinfo",
    {"Authorization": f"Bearer {access_token}"},
  )
  if ui_resp.status_code != status.HTTP_200_OK:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_502_BAD_GATEWAY,
      detail="Failed to load Google user profile.",
    )
  try:
    user_info = GoogleUserInfoResponse.model_validate(ui_resp.json())
  except ValidationError as exc:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_502_BAD_GATEWAY,
      detail="Google user profile response invalid.",
    ) from exc
  sub = user_info.sub
  email = user_info.email.strip() if user_info.email else None
  display_name = user_info.name.strip() if user_info.name else None
  avatar_url = user_info.picture.strip() if user_info.picture else None
  receipt_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  pdf_repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  if pending_in_state is not None and sub != pending_in_state:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="Google account does not match the consent step.",
    )
  receipt_row = None
  pdf_row: PdfAnkiUser | None = None
  tier = "free"
  if oauth_module == AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER:
    try:
      receipt_row = await receipt_repo.upsert_google_oauth_user(
        google_sub=sub,
        email=email,
        display_name=display_name,
        avatar_url=avatar_url,
      )
      tier = str(getattr(receipt_row, "tier", None) or "free")
    except Exception as exc:
      logger.warning(
        "receipt_parser_user_upsert_failed",
        error=str(exc),
        user_id=sub,
        exc_info=True,
      )
      detail = "Could not persist Receipt Parser user profile."
      if settings.DEBUG:
        msg = str(exc).strip()
        if len(msg) > 400:
          msg = msg[:400] + "..."
        detail = f"{detail} ({type(exc).__name__}: {msg})"
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,
        detail=detail,
      ) from exc
  elif oauth_module == AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI:
    try:
      pdf_row = await pdf_repo.upsert_google_oauth_user(
        google_sub=sub,
        email=email,
        display_name=display_name,
        avatar_url=avatar_url,
      )
      tier = str(getattr(pdf_row, "tier", None) or "free")
    except Exception as exc:
      logger.warning(
        "pdf_anki_user_upsert_failed",
        error=str(exc),
        user_id=sub,
        exc_info=True,
      )
      detail = "Could not persist PDF-Anki user profile."
      exc_l = str(exc).lower()
      if any(
        s in exc_l for s in ("value too long", "righttruncation", "stringdata")
      ):
        detail += (
          " PostgreSQL columns on pdf_anki_users are too short for "
          "encrypted values. Run docs/pdf-anki/"
          "supabase_pdf_anki_users_fix_login.sql or `alembic upgrade head`."
        )
      if settings.DEBUG:
        msg = str(exc).strip()
        if len(msg) > 400:
          msg = msg[:400] + "..."
        detail = f"{detail} ({type(exc).__name__}: {msg})"
      raise HTTPException(
        status_code=status.HTTP_503_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE,
        detail=detail,
      ) from exc
  await session.commit()
  now = int(time.time())
  exp = now + max(60, settings.AUTH_JWT_EXPIRE_SECONDS)
  api_jwt = jwt.encode(
    {
      "sub": sub,
      "email": email,
      "provider": "google",
      "tier": tier,
      "module": oauth_module,
      "iat": now,
      "exp": exp,
    },
    _jwt_secret(),
    algorithm="HS256",
  )
  expires_in = exp - now
  refresh_jwt, refresh_expires_in = mint_refresh_jwt_payload(
    sub=sub,
    email=email,
    provider="google",
    tier=tier,
    module=oauth_module,
    expires_in_seconds=settings.AUTH_REFRESH_JWT_EXPIRE_SECONDS,
  )
  body = GoogleCallbackResponse(
    access_token=api_jwt,
    token_type=_TOKEN_TYPE_BEARER,
    user_id=sub,
    email=email,
    display_name=display_name,
    avatar_url=avatar_url,
    tier=tier,
    module=oauth_module,
    expires_in=expires_in,
  )
  frontend_success = (settings.AUTH_FRONTEND_SUCCESS_URL or "").strip()
  if frontend_success:
    location = _oauth_success_redirect_location(
      frontend_success,
      access_token=api_jwt,
      token_type=_TOKEN_TYPE_BEARER,
      expires_in=expires_in,
      user_id=sub,
      email=email,
      display_name=display_name,
      avatar_url=avatar_url,
      tier=tier,
      module=oauth_module,
    )
    resp = RedirectResponse(url=location, status_code=status.HTTP_302_FOUND)
    set_module_refresh_cookie(
      resp,
      module=oauth_module,
      token=refresh_jwt,
      expires_in_seconds=refresh_expires_in,
    )
    return resp
  if request.headers.get("sec-fetch-dest") == "document":
    logger.warning(
      "google_oauth_callback_json_in_browser",
      hint=(
        "Set AUTH_FRONTEND_SUCCESS_URL to your SPA "
        "`/auth/callback/google`; the callback will 302 with the API JWT "
        "in the URL fragment instead of raw JSON."
      ),
    )
  json_resp = JSONResponse(
    content=body.model_dump(mode="json"),
    status_code=status.HTTP_200_OK,
  )
  set_module_refresh_cookie(
    json_resp,
    module=oauth_module,
    token=refresh_jwt,
    expires_in_seconds=refresh_expires_in,
  )
  return json_resp
@router.get("/me")
async def get_current_user(
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
  module: Annotated[
    str | None,
    Query(description="Optional module selector for cookie-based auth."),
  ] = None,
) -> AuthMeResponse:
  if authorization is not None:
    payload = _require_api_jwt(authorization)
    sub = payload.sub
    resolved_module = payload.module or AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
    email = payload.email
    provider = payload.provider
    tier = payload.tier
  else:
    requested_module = (module or "").strip()
    if requested_module in (AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI):
      resolved_module = requested_module
    else:
      pdf_cookie = request.cookies.get(refresh_cookie_name(AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI))
      receipt_cookie = request.cookies.get(
        refresh_cookie_name(AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER)
      )
      resolved_module = (
        AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI
        if pdf_cookie is not None
        else AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER
      )
      if pdf_cookie is None and receipt_cookie is None:
        raise HTTPException(
          status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
          detail="Sign in required.",
          headers={"WWW-Authenticate": "Bearer"},
        )
    session_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
      request=request,
      expected_module=resolved_module,
    )
    sub = session_payload.sub
    email = session_payload.email
    provider = session_payload.provider
    tier = session_payload.tier
  module = resolved_module
  receipt_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  pdf_repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  receipt_row = await receipt_repo.get_user_by_id(sub)
  pdf_row = await pdf_repo.get_user_by_id(sub)
  out = AuthMeResponse(
    user_id=sub,
    email=email,
    provider=provider,
    tier=tier,
    module=module,
  )
  if module == AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER:
    receipt_payg_unlocked = False
    active_rp_model: str | None = None
    if receipt_row is not None:
      out.stripe_customer_id = cast(
        str | None, getattr(receipt_row, "stripe_customer_id", None)
      )
      out.stripe_subscription_id = cast(
        str | None, getattr(receipt_row, "stripe_subscription_id", None)
      )
      receipt_email = getattr(receipt_row, "email", None)
      if receipt_email:
        out.email = cast(str | None, receipt_email)
      receipt_display_name = getattr(receipt_row, "display_name", None)
      if receipt_display_name is not None:
        out.display_name = cast(str | None, receipt_display_name)
      receipt_avatar_url = getattr(receipt_row, "avatar_url", None)
      if receipt_avatar_url is not None:
        out.avatar_url = cast(str | None, receipt_avatar_url)
      receipt_tier = getattr(receipt_row, "tier", None)
      if receipt_tier:
        out.tier = cast(str | None, receipt_tier)
      receipt_balance_usd = getattr(receipt_row, "balance_usd", None)
      out.balance_usd = cast(str | None, receipt_balance_usd)
      receipt_auth_provider = getattr(receipt_row, "auth_provider", None)
      out.auth_provider = cast(str | None, receipt_auth_provider)
      receipt_subscription_status = getattr(
        receipt_row, "subscription_status", None
      )
      out.subscription_status = cast(str | None, receipt_subscription_status)
      receipt_payg_unlocked = getattr(receipt_row, "payg", None) is True
      out.receipt_parser_payg = receipt_payg_unlocked
      if receipt_payg_unlocked:
        out.receipt_parser_balance_usd_display = (
          _receipt_balance_two_decimal_string(
            cast(str | None, receipt_balance_usd)
          )
        )
      else:
        out.receipt_parser_balance_usd_display = None
      active_raw = getattr(receipt_row, "active_receipt_parser_llm_model", None)
      active_rp_model = (
        str(active_raw).strip() if active_raw is not None else None
      )
    else:
      out.receipt_parser_payg = None
      out.receipt_parser_balance_usd_display = None
    tier_for_parse = (out.tier or "free").strip().lower() or "free"
    rp_parsing = build_receipt_parser_parsing_me_fields(
      tier_for_parse,
      balance_payg_unlocked=receipt_payg_unlocked,
      payg_selectable_llm_model_ids=tuple(
        settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_SELECTABLE_LLM_MODELS
      ),
      payg_default_llm_model_id=settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL_ID,
      active_receipt_parser_llm_model_id=active_rp_model,
    )
    out.receipt_parser_parse_pipeline_kind = rp_parsing.parse_pipeline_kind
    out.receipt_parser_llm_model_id = rp_parsing.receipt_parser_llm_model_id
    out.receipt_parser_llm_model_options = (
      list(rp_parsing.receipt_parser_llm_model_options)
      if rp_parsing.receipt_parser_llm_model_options is not None
      else None
    )
    return out
  if module == AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI:
    period_end: datetime | None = None
    if pdf_row is not None:
      out.stripe_customer_id = cast(
        str | None, getattr(pdf_row, "stripe_customer_id", None)
      )
      out.stripe_subscription_id = cast(
        str | None, getattr(pdf_row, "stripe_subscription_id", None)
      )
      pdf_email = getattr(pdf_row, "email", None)
      if pdf_email:
        out.email = cast(str | None, pdf_email)
      pdf_display_name = getattr(pdf_row, "display_name", None)
      if pdf_display_name is not None:
        out.display_name = cast(str | None, pdf_display_name)
      pdf_avatar_url = getattr(pdf_row, "avatar_url", None)
      if pdf_avatar_url is not None:
        out.avatar_url = cast(str | None, pdf_avatar_url)
      pdf_tier = getattr(pdf_row, "tier", None)
      if pdf_tier:
        out.tier = cast(str | None, pdf_tier)
      pdf_subscription_status = getattr(pdf_row, "subscription_status", None)
      if pdf_subscription_status:
        out.subscription_status = cast(str | None, pdf_subscription_status)
      raw_period_end = getattr(pdf_row, "current_period_end", None)
      if isinstance(raw_period_end, datetime):
        period_end = raw_period_end
      elif isinstance(raw_period_end, str) and raw_period_end.strip():
        with contextlib.suppress(ValueError, TypeError):
          period_end = datetime.fromisoformat(raw_period_end.strip())
      bal = getattr(pdf_row, "balance_usd", None)
      if bal is not None:
        out.balance_usd = str(bal).strip() or None
      payg_col = getattr(pdf_row, "payg", None)
      out.pdf_anki_payg = cast(bool | None, payg_col)
      active_raw = getattr(pdf_row, "active_unified_pdf_model", None)
      active_model = str(active_raw).strip() if active_raw is not None else None
      balance_payg_unlocked = payg_col is True
    else:
      active_model = None
      balance_payg_unlocked = False
    tier_for_caps = out.tier or "free"
    max_fc, max_dk = effective_pdf_anki_storage_limits(
      tier_for_caps,
      out.subscription_status,
      period_end,
    )
    counts_repo = PdfAnkiStorageCountsRepository(session)
    stored_fc = await counts_repo.count_flashcards_for_user(sub)
    out.pdf_anki_flashcards_stored = stored_fc
    out.pdf_anki_max_flashcards = max_fc
    out.pdf_anki_max_decks = max_dk
    parsing = build_pdf_anki_parsing_me_fields(
      tier_for_caps,
      balance_payg_unlocked=balance_payg_unlocked,
      premium_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PREMIUM,
      pro_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PRO,
      payg_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PAYG,
      payg_selectable_llm_model_ids=tuple(
        settings.PDF_ANKI_PAYG_SELECTABLE_UNIFIED_MODELS
      ),
      active_unified_pdf_model_id=active_model,
    )
    out.pdf_anki_parse_pipeline_kind = parsing.parse_pipeline_kind
    out.pdf_anki_pdf_text_extractor = parsing.pdf_text_extractor
    out.pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_id = parsing.flashcard_llm_model_id
    out.pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_options = (
      list(parsing.flashcard_llm_model_options)
      if parsing.flashcard_llm_model_options is not None
      else None
    )
    out.pdf_anki_tier_included_unified_model_id = (
      parsing.tier_included_unified_model_id
    )
    return out
  raise HTTPException(
    status_code=status.HTTP_401_UNAUTHORIZED,
    detail="Token has an unknown module.",
  )
@router.post("/logout")
async def logout_refresh_cookies(
  response: Response,
  module: str | None = Query(default=None),
) -> dict[str, str]:
  known_modules = (AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER, AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI)
  module = module if isinstance(module, str) and module in known_modules else None
  if module is not None:
    set_module_refresh_cookie(
      response,
      module=module,
      token="",
      expires_in_seconds=0,  # nosec B106
    )
  else:
    for mod in known_modules:
      set_module_refresh_cookie(
        response,
        module=mod,
        token="",  # nosec B106
        expires_in_seconds=0,
      )
  return {"status": "signed_out"}
@router.patch(
  "/me/pdf-anki/unified-model",
  response_model=PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceResponse,
)
async def patch_pdf_anki_unified_model_preference(
  body: PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceBody,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceResponse:
  session_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_PDF_ANKI,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  sub = session_payload.sub
  pdf_repo = PdfAnkiUserRepository(session)
  row = await pdf_repo.get_user_by_id(sub)
  if row is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="PDF-AnKi user profile not found.",
    )
  tier_for_parse = str(getattr(row, "tier", None) or "free").strip().lower()
  payg_unlocked = getattr(row, "payg", None) is True
  active_raw = getattr(row, "active_unified_pdf_model", None)
  active_model = str(active_raw).strip() if active_raw else None
  parsing_gate = build_pdf_anki_parsing_me_fields(
    tier_for_parse,
    balance_payg_unlocked=payg_unlocked,
    premium_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PREMIUM,
    pro_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PRO,
    payg_unified_model_id=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PAYG,
    payg_selectable_llm_model_ids=tuple(
      settings.PDF_ANKI_PAYG_SELECTABLE_UNIFIED_MODELS
    ),
    active_unified_pdf_model_id=active_model,
  )
  if parsing_gate.flashcard_llm_model_options is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail="Unified PDF model preference is not enabled for this account.",
    )
  allow = tuple(settings.PDF_ANKI_PAYG_SELECTABLE_UNIFIED_MODELS)
  allowed_set = frozenset(allow)
  mid = body.unified_pdf_model_id.strip()
  if mid not in allowed_set:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="unified_pdf_model_id is not an allowed PAYG model.",
    )
  await pdf_repo.update_active_unified_pdf_model(sub, mid)
  await session.commit()
  effective = resolve_payg_unified_pdf_model_id(
    allowlist=allow,
    configured_default=settings.PDF_ANKI_UNIFIED_MODEL_PAYG,
    upload_override=None,
    stored_preference=mid,
  )
  return PdfAnkiUnifiedModelPreferenceResponse(
    pdf_anki_flashcard_llm_model_id=effective,
  )
@router.patch(
  "/me/receipt-parser/unified-model",
  response_model=ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceResponse,
)
async def patch_receipt_parser_llm_model_preference(
  body: ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceBody,
  session: Annotated[AsyncSession, Depends(get_db)],
  request: Request,
  authorization: str | None = Header(default=None, alias="Authorization"),
) -> ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceResponse:
  session_payload = require_session_payload_for_module(
    request=request,
    expected_module=AUTH_MODULE_RECEIPT_PARSER,
    authorization=authorization,
  )
  sub = session_payload.sub
  receipt_repo = ReceiptParserUserRepository(session)
  row = await receipt_repo.get_user_by_id(sub)
  if row is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND,
      detail="Receipt Parser user profile not found.",
    )
  tier_for_parse = str(getattr(row, "tier", None) or "free").strip().lower()
  payg_unlocked = getattr(row, "payg", None) is True
  active_raw = getattr(row, "active_receipt_parser_llm_model", None)
  active_model = str(active_raw).strip() if active_raw else None
  parsing_gate = build_receipt_parser_parsing_me_fields(
    tier_for_parse,
    balance_payg_unlocked=payg_unlocked,
    payg_selectable_llm_model_ids=tuple(
      settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_SELECTABLE_LLM_MODELS
    ),
    payg_default_llm_model_id=settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL_ID,
    active_receipt_parser_llm_model_id=active_model,
  )
  if parsing_gate.receipt_parser_llm_model_options is None:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_403_FORBIDDEN,
      detail="Receipt Parser model preference is not enabled for this account.",
    )
  allow = tuple(settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_SELECTABLE_LLM_MODELS)
  allowed_set = frozenset(allow)
  mid = body.receipt_parser_llm_model_id.strip()
  if mid not in allowed_set:
    raise HTTPException(
      status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
      detail="receipt_parser_llm_model_id is not an allowed PAYG model.",
    )
  await receipt_repo.update_active_receipt_parser_llm_model(sub, mid)
  await session.commit()
  effective = _resolve_receipt_parser_payg_llm_model_id(
    allowlist=allow,
    configured_default=settings.RECEIPT_PARSER_PAYG_DEFAULT_LLM_MODEL_ID,
    stored_preference=mid,
  )
  return ReceiptParserLlmModelPreferenceResponse(
    receipt_parser_llm_model_id=effective,
  )
```
